Together, we will devour the very gods! 0
18Mohg, Lord of Bloodhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mohg_the_omen_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg18,389{'Mohgwyn Palace': ['420,000', "Mohg's Great Rune", 'Remembrance of the Blood Lord']}Welcome, honored guest. To the birthplace of our Dynasty! 0
19Malenia, Blade of Miquellahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/malenia,-blade-of-miquella1-min.jpg33,251{'Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree': ["480,000 Malenia's Great Rune Remembrance of the Rot Goddess"]}...Heed my words. I am Malenia. Blade of Miquella. And I have never known defeat. 0
20Lichdragon Fortissaxhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fortissax_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg12,903{'Deeproot Depths': ['90,000', 'Remembrance of the Lichdragon']}After Godwyn the Golden became the Prince of Death, the ancient dragon fought long and hard against the Death within its companion. Alas, victory was never achieved and its only reward was corruption. 0
21Maliketh, The Black Bladehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/maliketh-the-black-blade-4k1-min.jpg10,620{'Crumbling Farum Azula': ['220,000', 'Remembrance of the Black Blade']}Cower before Maliketh, Marika’s Black Blade. 0
22Astel, Naturalborn of the Voidhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/astel-naturalborn-of-the-void-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg11,170{'Grand Cloister': ['80,000', 'Remembrance of the Naturalborn']}A malformed star born in the lightless void far away. Once destroyed an Eternal City and took away their sky. A falling star of ill omen. 0
23Regal Ancestor Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/regal-ancestor-spirit_map-bosses-enemies-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpg6,301{'Nokron, Eternal City': ['24,000', 'Remembrance of the Regal Ancestor']}Ancestral spirits exist as a phenomenon beyond the purview of the Erdtree. Life sprouts from death, as it does from birth. Such is the way of the living. 0
24Radagon of the Golden Orderhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/radagon_of_the_golden_order_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg≈ 13,339 (GOD){'Stone Platform': ['Elden Throne :', 'N/A']}As the husband of Rennala of Caria, the red-haired Radagon studied sorcery, and as the husband of Queen Marika, he studied incantations. Thus did the hero aspire to be complete. 0
25Godfrey, First Elden Lordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/godfrey_first_elden_lord_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg21,903{'Leyndell, Ashen Capital': ['300,000', 'Remembrance of Hoarah Loux']}nan0
26Fire Gianthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fire_giant_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg42,363{'Flame Peak': ['180,000', 'Remembrance of the Fire Giant']}The Fire Giant is a survivor of the War against the Giants. Upon realizing the flames of their forge would never die, Queen Marika marked him with a curse. 0
27Dragonlord Placidusaxhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonlord_placidusax_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg26,651{'Crumbling Farum Azula': ['280,000', 'Remembrance of the Dragonlord']}The Dragonlord whose seat lies at the heart of the storm beyond time is said to have been Elden Lord in the age before the Erdtree. Once his god was fled, the lord continued to await its return. 0
28Ancient Dragon Senessaxhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/senessax.png45,551{'Jagged Peak': ['200,000', 'Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone', 'Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone']}nan1
29Ancient Dragon-Manhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragon-weeb.png19,097{"Dragon's Pit": ['130,000', "Dragon-Hunter's Great Katana"]}nan0
30Chief Bloodfiendhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/chief-bloodfiend-elden-ring-wiki-600px.jpg10,974{'Rivermouth Cave': ['80,000', "Bloodfiend Hexer's Ashes"]}nan0
31Dancer of Ranahhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dancer.png14,046{'Southern Nameless Mausoleum': ['80,000', 'Dancing Blade of Ranah', "Dancer's Set"]}nan0
32Dryleaf Danehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dryleaf.png12,249{'Moorth Ruins': ['0', "Dane's Hat", 'Dryleaf Arts']}nan1
33Golden Hippopotamushttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/hippo.png33,866{'Shadow Keep': ['150,000', 'Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns', 'Scadutree Fragment x2'], "Charo's Hidden Grave": ['9,576', 'Scadutree Fragment'], "Recluses' River": ['11,270 each', 'Scadutree Fragment each'], 'Ancient Ruins of Rauh': ['11,960', 'Scadutree Fragment']}nan0
34Jagged Peak Drakehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/jagged-peak-drake-1-elden-ring-wiki-600px.jpgnan{'Jagged Peak Foothills': ['90,000', 'Dragon Heart', 'Dragonscale Flesh'], 'Jagged Peak:': ['120,000', 'Dragon Heart', 'Dragonscale Flesh']}nan0
35Jori, Elder Inquisitorhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/jori.png30,506{'Abyssal Woods': ['260,000', 'Barbed Staff-Spear']}nan1
36Cemetery Shadehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cemetery_shade_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpgnan{'Tombsward Catacombs:': ['2,200', 'Lhutel the Headless'], 'Black Knife Catacombs:': ['3,500', 'Twinsage Sorcerer Ashes'], 'Caelid Catacombs:': ['6,800', 'Kindred of Rot Ashes']}Insect-ridden grave keepers. 0
37Ancestor Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ancestor_spirit1-min.jpg4,393{'Siofra River': ['13,000', 'Ancestral Follower Ashes']}nan0
38Dragonkin Soldierhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonkin-soldier-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgnan{'Siofra River:': ['16,000', 'Dragon Halberd'], 'Lake of Rot:': ['58,000', 'Dragonscale Blade']}Alas, the Dragonkin Soldiers never attained immortality, and perished as decrepit, pale imitations of their skyborn kin. 0
39Margit, the Fell Omenhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/margit-1-boss-elden-ring-wiki.jpg4,174{'Stormveil Castle:': ['12,000', 'Talisman Pouch (NG only, Morgott not defeated)'], 'Capital Outskirts': ['16,800', 'Viridian Amber Medallion +1']}Someone must extinguish thy flame. Let it be Margit the Fell! 0
40Flying Dragon Agheelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flying_dragon_agheel_2_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg3,200{'Dragon-Burnt Ruins': ['5,000, Dragon Heart']}The dead gazed at the skies over the lakes of Limgrave, praying that the dragons' flames would burn them to ash. 0
41Dragonkin Soldier of Nokstellahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonkin_nokstella_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg4,372{'Ainsel River': ['12,000', 'Frozen Lightning Spear']}The Dragonkin were born in the Eternal City, where they knew no true sky, nor true lightning. Instead, ice lightning was their weapon. 0
42Leonine Misbegottenhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/leonine_misbegotten_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1.jpg2,198{'Castle Morne': ['Runes 3,800 (NG)', 'Runes 950 (NG, Co-op)', 'Grafted Blade Greatsword']}nan0
43Red Wolf of Radagonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/red-wolf-of-radagon-2-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg2,204{'Raya Lucaria Academy': ['14,000 Runes (NG)', '3,500 Runes (NG, Co-op)', 'Runes 63,100 (NG +3)', 'Memory Stone']}nan0
44Glintstone Dragon Adulahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/glintstone_dragon_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpgnan{'Three Sisters:': ['No drops'], 'Cathedral of Manus Celes:': ['120,000', "Adula's Moonblade", 'Dragon Heart x3']}Adula, a devourer of sorcerers, was bested by Ranni and subsequently swore a knightly oath to her Dark Moon. 0
45Borealis, the Freezing Foghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/borealis_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpg11,268{'Mountaintops of the Giants': ['100,000', 'Dragon Heart']}The ice dragons were once lords of the mountaintops long ago, until they were defeated by the Fire Giants and chased from the peak. 0
46Decaying Ekzykeshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/decaying_ekzykes_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpg23,731{'Caelid': ['38,000, Dragon Heart']}Ekzykes, Dragon Communion Revenger, did not forget his hatred even as he succumbed to the scarlet rot. 0
47Valiant Gargoylehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/valiant_gargoyle1-min.jpgnan{'Siofra Aqueduct:': ['30,000', "Gargoyle's Greatsword", "Gargoyle's Twinblade"], 'Capital Outskirts:': ['2,835', 'Gargoyle’s Great Axe'], 'Leyndell, Royal Capital:': ['3,332', "Gargoyle's Halberd"], 'Leyndell, Ashen Capital:': ['8,608']}The missing parts have been mended with corpse wax; a patchwork of champions. 0
48Valiant Gargoylehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/valiant_gargoyle1-min.jpgnan{'Siofra Aqueduct:': ['30,000', "Gargoyle's Greatsword", "Gargoyle's Twinblade"], 'Capital Outskirts:': ['2,835', 'Gargoyle’s Great Axe'], 'Leyndell, Royal Capital:': ['3,332', "Gargoyle's Halberd"], 'Leyndell, Ashen Capital:': ['8,608']}The missing parts have been mended with corpse wax; a patchwork of champions. 0
49Godskin Apostle and Godskin Noblehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/godskin_duo_spirit_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpg22,581 - Combined (Field Boss){'Spiritcaller Cave , Mountaintops of the Giants': ['Runes 70,000 (NG)', 'Runes 52,500 (NG, Co-op Host)', 'Runes 17,500 (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Godskin Swaddling Cloth x1', 'Black Flame Ritual x1']}nan0
50Godskin Duohttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/godskin_duo_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpg26,350{'Crumbling Farum Azula': ['170,000', "Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing [4] (NG only)", 'Ash of War: Black Flame Tornado']}The black flame could once slay gods. But when Maliketh sealed Destined Death, the true power of the black flame was lost. 0
51Blackgaol Knighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/blackight-gaol-boss-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg14,129{'Western Nameless Mausoleum': ['70,000', 'Greatsword of Solitude', 'Solitude Set']}nan1
52Black Knight Garrewhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/garrew.png9,792{'Fog Rift Fort': ['80,000', 'Black Steel Greatshield']}nan0
53Black Knight Edreddhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/edreed.png9,792{'Fort of Reprimand': ['80,000 (400,000 with Golden Eyes)', 'Ash of War: Aspects of the Crucible: Wings']}nan1
54Count Ymir, Mother of Fingershttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/count-ymir-mother-of-fingers-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg11,147{'Cathedral of Manus Metyr': ['210,000', "Ymir's Bell Bearing", 'Maternal Staff', 'High Priest Set']}My Shining Star. 0
55Curseblade Labirithhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/curseblade-labirith-elden-ring-wiki-600px.jpg8,426{'Bonny Gaol': ['100,000', 'Curseblade Meera']}nan0
56Death Knighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/death-knight.pngnan{'Fog Rift Catacombs': ['110,000 Runes', "Death Knight's Twin Axes", 'Crimson Amber Medallion +3'], 'Scorpion River Catacombs:': ['130,000 Runes', "Death Knight's Longhaft Axe", 'Cerulean Amber Medallion +3']}nan0
57Death Rite Birdhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/death_rite_bird_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpgnan{'Academy Gate Town:': ['7,800', 'Ancient Death Rancor'], 'Caelid': ['15,000', "Death's Poker"], 'Mountaintops of the Giants:': ['77,000', 'Death Ritual Spear'], 'Apostate Derelict:': ['220,000', 'Explosive Ghostflame'], "Charo's Hidden Grave": ['230,000', 'Ash of War: Ghostflame Call']}In the time when there was no Erdtree, death was burned in ghostflame. Deathbirds were the keepers of that fire. 0
58Demi-Human Swordmaster Onzehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/demi-human_swordmaster_onze.png7,441{'Belurat Gaol': ['80,000 Runes', 'Demi-Human Swordsman Yosh']}nan1
59Demi-Human Queen Mariggahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/demi-queen.png9,793{'Cerulean Coast': ['100,000', 'Star-Lined Sword']}nan1
60Fallingstar Beasthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fallingstar_beast_altus_plateau_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgnan{'Sellia Crystal Tunnel': ['7,600', "Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing (1)", 'Smithing Stone (7) x5', 'Somber Smithing Stone (6)', 'Gravity Stone Chunk x4'], 'Altus Plateau:': ['11,000', 'Somber Smithing Stone (5)', 'Smithing Stone (6) x5', 'Gravity Stone Fan', 'Gravity Stone Chunk'], 'Finger Ruins of Dheo:': ['170,000', 'Gravitational Missile']}nan0
61Lamenterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lamenter.png12,249{"Lamenter's Gaol": ['160,000', "Lamenter's Mask"]}nan0
62Ralva the Great Red Bearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ralva.png29,606{'Scadu Altus': ['180,000', 'Pelt of Ralva']}nan1
63Rakshasahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rakshasa.png20,235{'Eastern Nameless Mausoleum': ['90,000', "Rakshasa's Great Katana", "Rakshasa's Set"]}nan0
64Red Bearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mr-teddy.png16,365{'Northern Nameless Mausoleum': ['80,000', "Red Bear's Claw", 'Iron Rivet Set']}nan0
65Rugalea the Great Red Bearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rugalea-the-great-red-bear-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg30,535{'Rauh Base': ['210,000', 'Roar of Rugalea']}nan1
66Tree Sentinelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tree-sentinel-1-small1-min.jpgnan{'Limgrave': ['3,200', 'Golden Halberd'], 'Altus Plateau:': ['20,000', 'Erdtree Greatshield', "Hero's Rune [1]"], 'Hinterland': ['120,000', 'Blessing of Marika each']}The living rampart of the Erdtree, the Tree Sentinels are the standard to which all defenders of the Erdtree aspire. 0
67Mad Pumpkin Headhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mad_pumpkin_head_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpgnan{None: ['120,000', 'Blessing of Marika each']}Though he has stifled his panic within the dark confines of his helmet, he rampages as if driven mad when agitated by bloodshed or the humming of insects. This mad soldier is all that is left of a broken gladiator. 0
68Erdtree Burial Watchdoghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/burial_watchdog_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpgnan{}The Watchdogs, battered and broken over their lengthy tenure, rule the catacombs and are even said to command the imps. 0
69Stonedigger Trollhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/stonedigger_troll_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpgnan{'Limgrave Tunnels:': ['1,800 Runes (NG)', '450 Runes (NG, Co-op)'], '': ['Roar Medallion'], 'Old Altus Tunnel:': ['9,600 (NG)', '7,200 (NG, Co-op Host)', '2,400 (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', 'Great Club']}Trolls are descended from the giants, and their hammers were supposedly once used as ceremonial smithing tools. In the distant past, smithing was considered divine. 0
70Grafted Scionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grafted_scion_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpgnan{'Chapel of Anticipation': ['3,200', 'Ornamental Straight Sword', 'Golden Beast Crest Shield'], "Fringefolk Hero's Grave": ['Stormveil Castle : 1,176'], 'Liurnia of the Lakes': ['1,283', 'Larval Tear'], 'Mt Gelmir': []}nan0
71Rick, Soldier Of Godhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/soldier-of-godrick-boss-elden-rings.jpg384{'Stranded Graveyard': ['400']}That depraved lot are obsessed with sacrificing Tarnished like you for the sake of "grafting". 0
72Beastman of Farum Azulahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/beastman-of-farum-azula1.jpgnan{}Beastmen from the doomed Farum Azula, the slowly crumbling ruins in the skies. These ruins are said to be the remains of a giant mausoleum enshrining an ancient dragon, guarded by chosen beastmen who wield weapons clad in lightning. 0
73Demi-Human Chiefshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/demihuman-chief-boss-enemy-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg1,218{'Coastal Cave': ['1,200', 'Tailoring Tools', 'Sewing Needle']}They'll rush in and beat you to a pulp. You'll end up just like me. - Boc the Seamster 0
74Runebearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/runebear_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1.jpg3,311{'Earthbore Cave': ['Runes 2,600 (NG)', 'Runes 650 (NG, Co-op)', 'Spelldrake Talisman']}nan0
75Crucible Knightshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/crucible-knight-stormhill-3-min.jpgnan{None: ['Stormhill Evergaol :', '2,100 (NG)', '10,500 (NG+1)', 'Aspects of the Crucible: Tail Stormveil Castle :', '1,613', 'Aspects of the Crucible: Horns', 'Siofra River :', '3,080 Siofra Aqueduct :', '3,080 each', 'Sword: Crucible Hornshield', 'Spear: Somber Smithing Stone [6] Leyndell, Royal Capital :', '3,840 each Crumbling Farum Azula :', '7,360 each']}nan0
76Ancient Hero of Zamorhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ancient_hero_of_zamor_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgnan{'Weeping Evergaol': ['5,400', 'Other Drops', "Radagon's Scarseal"], "Sainted Hero's Grave:": ['24,000 Runes (NG)', '15,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '5,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', 'Ancient Dragon Knight Kristoff Ashes'], "Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave:": ['83,000 Runes (NG)', '62,250 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '20,750 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', 'Zamor Curved Sword', 'Zamor Mask', 'Zamor Armor', 'Zamor Bracelets', 'Zamor Legwraps']}These long-lived warriors, clad in biting, freezing winds, are said to have been the mortal enemies of the Fire Giants since time immemorial. 0
77Tree Sentinelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tree-sentinel-1-small1-min.jpgnan{'Limgrave': ['3,200', 'Golden Halberd'], 'Altus Plateau:': ['20,000', 'Erdtree Greatshield', "Hero's Rune [1]"], 'Hinterland': ['120,000', 'Blessing of Marika each']}The living rampart of the Erdtree, the Tree Sentinels are the standard to which all defenders of the Erdtree aspire. 0
78Draconic Tree Sentinelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/draconic-tree-sentinel-2-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgnan{'Capital Outskirts:': ['50,000', 'Dragon Greatclaw', 'Dragonclaw Shield'], 'Crumbling Farum Azula:': ['28,080', 'Malformed Dragon Set']}After the great ancient dragon Gransax attacked, the sentinels had an epiphany. The only way to truly protect the Erdtree was to become dragons themselves. 0
79Black Knife Assassinhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black-knife-assassin-limgrave-2-min.jpgnan{None: ['28,080', 'Malformed Dragon Set']}The assassins that carried out the deeds of the Night of the Black Knives were all women, and rumored to be Numen who had close ties with Marika herself. 0
80Crystalianhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/crystalians_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300x.jpgnan{'Raya Lucaria Crystal Tunnel:': ['3,000 Runes (NG)', '2,350 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '750 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', "Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing (1)"], 'Academy Crystal Cave:': ['3,300 Runes (NG)', '2,465 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '835 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', 'Crystal Release'], 'Altus Tunnel:': ['9,000 Runes (NG)', '6750 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '2,250 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', "Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing (2)"]}The Crystalians are inorganic beings, yet they live. They cleave close to the ideals of the primeval current, and as such, they are revered guests of the sorcerers.. 0
81Night's Cavalryhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/nights_cavalry_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpgnan{None: ['Limgrave :', 'Runes 2,400 (NG)', 'Other Drops:', 'Ash of War: Repeating Thrust', 'Weeping Peninsula :', '3,400 (NG)', 'Other Drops:', 'Ash of War: Barricade Shield', 'Nightrider Flail', 'Liurnia South :', '5,600 Runes', 'Other Drops:', 'Ash of War: Ice Spear', 'Liurnia North :', '5,600', 'Other Drops:', 'Ash of War: Giant Hunt', 'Nightrider Glaive Caelid :', '8,500', 'Other Drops:', 'Ash of War: Poison Moth Flight Altus Plateau :', '10,000', 'Other Drops:', 'Ash of War: Shared Order Forbidden Lands :', '36,000', 'Other Drops:', "Ash of War: Phantom Slash Greyoll's Dragonbarrow :", '42,000', 'Other Drops:', "Ash of War: Bloodhound's Step Consecrated Snowfield :", '84,000', 'Other Drops:', "Night's Cavalry Set", 'Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone']}The Night's Cavalry, who now wander the dim roads at night, were once led by the Fell Omen and were deliverers of death for great warriors, knights, and champions. 0
82Bell Bearing Hunterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bell-bearing-hunter-elden-ring.jpgnan{"Warmaster's Shack:": ['2,700 Runes (NG)', '675 Runes (NG, Co-op)', "Bone Peddler's Bell Bearing"], 'Church of Vows:': ['6,000 Runes', '(NG)', '4,500 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '1,500 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', "Meat Peddler's Bell Bearing"], "Hermit Merchant's Shack:": ['20,000 Runes (NG)', '15,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '5,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', "Medicine Peddler's Bell Bearing"], "Isolated Merchant's Shack (Dragonbarrow):": ['50,000', "Gravity Stone Peddler's Bell Bearing"]}Elemer murdered numerous instructors and merchants, and was known as the Bell Bearing Hunter. 0
83Crucible Knight Ordovishttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/crucible_knight_ordovis_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpg5,460 each{"Auriza Hero's Grave": ['28,000', "Ordovis's Greatsword", 'Crucible Axe Helm', 'Crucible Axe Armor', 'Crucible Gauntlets', 'Crucible Greaves']}Ordovis, one of the two honored as foremost among the Crucible Knights. 0
84Fell Twinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fell_twins_omen_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg7,871 (Cleaver) 6,539 (Axe){'Capital Outskirts': ['29,000', 'Omenkiller Rollo']}nan0
85Black Blade Kindredhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black_blade_kindred_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgnan{'Bestial Sanctum:': ['88,000', "Gargoyle's Blackblade", "Gargoyle's Black Halberd"], 'Forbidden Lands:': ['60,000', "Gargoyle's Black Axe", "Gargoyle's Black Blades"]}Valiant Gargoyles, mended with blackened corpse wax. Such is the mark of those who serve Maliketh, the Black Blade. 0
86Death Rite Birdhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/death_rite_bird_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpgnan{'Academy Gate Town:': ['7,800', 'Ancient Death Rancor'], 'Caelid': ['15,000', "Death's Poker"], 'Mountaintops of the Giants:': ['77,000', 'Death Ritual Spear'], 'Apostate Derelict:': ['220,000', 'Explosive Ghostflame'], "Charo's Hidden Grave": ['230,000', 'Ash of War: Ghostflame Call']}In the time when there was no Erdtree, death was burned in ghostflame. Deathbirds were the keepers of that fire. 0
87Sir Gideon Ofnir, The All-Knowinghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sir_gideon_ofnir_the_all_knowing_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpg6,226{'Leyndell, Ashen Capital': ['35,500', 'All-Knowing Set', 'Scepter of the All-Knowing']}Queen Marika has high hopes for us. That we continue to struggle, unto eternity. 0
88Tibia Marinerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tibia-mariner_ground_boss_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgnan{'Summonwater Village': ['2,400', 'Deathroot', 'Skeletal Militiaman Ashes'], 'Liurnia of the Lakes:': ['4,700', 'Deathroot', 'Skeletal Bandit Ashes'], 'Wyndham Ruins:': ['14,000', 'Deathroot', "Tibia's Summons"], 'Mountaintops of the Giants:\xa0': ['4,234', 'Deathroot', "Helphen's Steeple"], "Charo's Hidden Grave": ['9,959', "Tibia's Cookbook"]}nan0
89Bloodhound Knight Darriwilhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodhound-knight-darriwil-boss-enemy-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg1,450{'Forlorn Hound Evergaol': ['1,900', "Bloodhound's Fang"]}Darriwil is nothing but a traitor. And in need of a fitting end to his tale. - Blaidd 0
90Esgar, Priest of Bloodhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/esgar_priest_of_blood_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpg3,511{'Leyndell Catacombs': ['30,000', "Lord of Blood's Exultation"]}Aided by his two ferocious dogs, this Priest is capable of the deadliest hemorrhage-inducing attacks. 0
91Erdtree Avatarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtree-avatar-weeping-peninsula-elden-rink-wiki-guide-1-small.jpgnan{'Minor Erdtree (Weeping Peninsula)': ['Runes 4,500 (NG)', 'Runes 3,600 (NG, Co-op Host)', 'Runes 930 (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Opaline Bubbletear', 'Crimsonburst Crystal Tear'], 'Minor Erdtree (Liurnia Southwest):': ['5,800', 'Cerulean Crystal Tear', 'Ruptured Crystal Tear'], 'Minor Erdtree (Liurnia Northeast):': ['5,800', 'Holy-Shrouding Cracked Tear', 'Lightning-Shrouding Cracked Tear', 'Magic-Shrouding Cracked Tear'], 'Leyndell, Royal Capital': ['10,062', "Lord's Rune"], 'Deeproot Depths:': ['10,621', 'Staff of the Avatar'], 'Minor Erdtree (Mountaintops East):': ['70,000 (NG)', '52,500 (NG, Co-op Host)', '17,500 (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Cerulean Crystal Tear', 'Crimson Bubbletear']}nan0
92Alecto, Black Knife Ringleaderhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/alecto_black_knife_ringleader_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpg17,482{"Ringleader's Evergaol": ['88,000', 'Black Knife Tiche']}The assassins who carried out the deed were scions of the Eternal City. A group entirely of women, arrayed in armour of silver under cloaks which fooled the eye. 0
93Grave Warden Duelisthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grave-warden-duelist-2-small1-min.jpgnan{'Murkwater Catacombs:': ['1,700', 'Banished Knight Engvall Ashes'], 'Auriza Side Tomb:': ['15,000', 'Soldjars of Fortune Ashes']}Duelists who were exiled from the colosseum. 0
94Cleanrot Knighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cleanrot_knight_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpgnan{'Stillwater Cave': ['2,475 Runes (NG)', '825 Runes (NG, Co-op)', 'Winged Sword Insignia', "Cleanrot Knight's Sword"], 'Abandoned Cave:': ['7,000', 'Gold Scarab']}The Cleanrot Knights vowed to fight alongside Malenia, despite the inevitable, if gradual, putrefaction of their flesh. Their acceptance of their fate made these battles fiercest of all. 0
95Omenkillerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/omenkiller-3-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg2,306{'Village of the Albinaurics': ['4,900', 'Crucible Knot Talisman']}nan0
96Spiritcaller Snailhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spirit-caller_snail_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgnan{"Road's End Catacombs": ['2,250 Runes (NG)', '750 Runes (NG, Co-op)', 'Glintstone Sorcerer Ashes'], "Spiritcaller's Cave:": ['70,000', 'Black Flame Ritual', 'Godskin Swaddling Cloth']}A strange snail-like creature that gives off a pale glow. While weak on their own, they summon forth spirits from beyond to fight on their behalf. But once the snail dies, the spirit will vanish. 0
97Perfumer Tricia and Misbegotten Warriorhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/perfumer-tricia-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgnannanTricia was once known as a healer who dedicated her efforts to treating Misbegotten, Omen, and all those seen as impure. When her efforts failed, she was their companion as they died, watching over them to ensure that they could pass peacefully, free of pain. 0
98Ulcerated Tree Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ulcerated_tree_spirit1-min.jpgnan{"Fringefolk Hero's Grave": ['15,000', 'Golden Seed', 'Banished Knight Oleg'], 'Stormveil Castle': ['4,736', 'Golden Seed'], 'Minor Erdtree (Mt. 100Demi-Human Queen Margothttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/demi-human-queen-margot-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpeg3,971{'Volcano Cave': ['11,000', 'Jar Cannon']}nan0
101Demi-Human Queen Maggiehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/demi-human-queen-maggie-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpeg7,515{'Hermit Village': ['13,000', 'Memory Stone', 'Golden Rune [1]']}nan0
102Onyx Lordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/onyx-lord-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgnan{'Royal Grave Evergaol': ['3,600', 'Meteorite'], 'Sealed Tunnel': ['16,000', "Onyx Lord's Greatsword"]}A race of ancients with skin of stone who were said to have risen to life when a meteor struck long ago. They were called lords in reverential fear of their destructive power. 0
103Abductor Virginshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/abductor-virgins-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg3,811 each{'Volcano Manor': ['10,000', "Inquisitor's Girandole"]}nan0
104Adan, Thief of Firehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/adan_thief_of_fire_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpg1,717{"Malefactor's Evergaol": ['3,800', 'Flame of the Fell God']}The monks came to the land of Liurnia in pursuit of a fugitive who stole their fire. 0
105Onyx Lordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/onyx-lord-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgnan{'Royal Grave Evergaol': ['3,600', 'Meteorite'], 'Sealed Tunnel': ['16,000', "Onyx Lord's Greatsword"]}A race of ancients with skin of stone who were said to have risen to life when a meteor struck long ago. They were called lords in reverential fear of their destructive power. 0
106Ancient Dragon Lansseaxhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ancient-dragon-lansseax-elden-ring-wiki-guide1-min.jpg9,087{'Altus Plateau': ['60,000', "Lansseax's Glaive"]}Lansseax was the sister of Fortissax. It is said that she took the form of a human to commune with the knights as a priestess of the ancient dragon cult. 0
107Astel, Stars of Darknesshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/astel-stars-of-darkness-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg18,617{'Yelough Anix Tunnel': ['120,000', 'Meteorite of Astel']}nan0
108Battlemage Hugueshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/battlemage-hugues-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg4,095{'Sellia Evergaol': ['7,800', 'Battlemage Hugues Ashes']}Hugues came from Sellia to study the Haima Conspectus at the academy, where he became a battlemage. Haima scholars seek to quell conflict with cannon fire and the gavel, but Hugues developed a longing for it. 0
109Bloodhound Knighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodgound_knight_liurnia_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpg1,985{'Lakeside Crystal Cave': ['2,700', 'Cerulean Amber Medallion']}The Bloodhound Knights are trained as hunters and known to be unshakable trackers. Without the use of language, each knight chooses his own master. Once the decision has been made, the knight stays loyal for life. 0
110Bols, Carian Knighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bols_carian_knight_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1.jpg5,109{"Cuckoo's Evergaol , Liurnia of the Lakes": ['4,600, Greatblade Phalanx']}nan0
111Commander O'Neilhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/commander_oniel1-min.jpg9,210{'Swamp of Aeonia': ['12,000', "Commander's Standard", 'Unalloyed Gold Needle']}Even after his lord was fled, Commander O'Neil continued to brandish his flag in the devastation of the rot-eaten field of battle, the sole veteran who remembers that battle with pride. 0
112Commander Niallhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/capture1-min.jpg15,541{'Castle Sol': ['90,000', "Veteran's Prosthesis"]}Commander Niall, veteran of Castle Sol, offered his prosthesis in exchange for the lives of defeated knights held prisoner. He went on to lead these men as an army of no nation. 0
113Crucible Knight Siluriahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/crucible_knight_siluria_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpg4,606{'Deeproot Depths': ['25,000', "Siluria's Tree"]}nan0
114Demi-Human Queen Gilikahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/queen-gilika-elden-ring-wiki-600px.jpg3,284{'Lux Ruins': ['8,500']}nan0
115Deathbirdhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/deathbird_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgnan{"Warmaster's Shack": ['Runes 2,800 (NG)', 'Runes 700 (NG, Co-op)', 'Other Drops:', 'Blue-Feathered Branchsword'], 'Weeping Peninsula:': ['Runes 3,900 (NG)', 'Runes 975 (NG, Co-op)', 'Other Drops:', 'Sacrificial Axe'], 'Scenic Isle:': ['6,600 Runes (NG)', '? Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '1,650 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', 'Red-Feathered Branchsword'], 'Capital Outskirts:': ['29,000 (NG)', '63,250 Runes (NG+3)', 'Other Drops:', 'Twinbird Kite Shield']}The Deathbirds are graveyard fire keepers; it is said they rake out the ashen remains of the dead from their kilns. 0
116Elemer of the Briarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/element_of_the_briar_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpg4,897{'The Shaded Castle': ['24,000 Runes (NG)', '18,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '6,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', "Marais Executioner's Sword", 'Briar Greatshield']}Elemer of the Briar, the Bell Bearing Hunter, snatched the sword from the site of his looming execution, and furnished it with battle skills from his home of Eochaid 0

120Flying Dragon Greyllhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flying_dragon_greyll_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpg11,500{'Dragonbarrow': ['80,000, Dragon Heart']}nan0
121Frenzied Duelisthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frenzied-duelist-axe-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpg3,079{'Gaol Cave': ['6,700', 'Putrid Corpse Ashes']}nan0
122Glintstone Dragon Smaraghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/glintstone-dragon-smarag-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg6,069{'Liurnia of the Lakes': ['14,000, Dragon Heart']}Smarag was a devourer of sorcerers, and over time, his body became corrupted by their glintstones. 0
123God-Devouring Serpenthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/god-devouring-serpent-elden-ring-wiki-guide1-min.jpg≈ 30439 (Demi God){'Mt. Gelmir': ['Volcano Manor :', '130,000 Runes', "Rykard's Great Rune", 'Remembrance of the Blasphemous']}The great serpent of Mt. Gelmir that swallowed Praetor Rykard. Attacks with poisonous spit, bites, and slams. 0
124Godefroy The Graftedhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/goderoy-the-grafted-boss-elden-ring.jpg12419{'Golden Lineage Evergaol': ['26,000, Godfrey Icon 78,000, Godfrey Icon (NG+1)']}nan0
125Godfrey, First Elden Lord (Golden Shade)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/godfrey_golden_shade_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpg7099{'Leyndell, Royal Capital': ['80,000', 'Talisman Pouch (NG Only)']}nan0
126Godskin Apostlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/apostle1-min.jpgnan{'Dominula, Windmill Village': ['14,000', 'Godskin Peeler', 'Scouring Black Flame'], 'Divine Tower of Caelid:': ['94,000', 'Godskin Apostle Set']}The apostles, once said to serve Destined Death, are wielders of the god-slaying black flame. But after their defeat by Maliketh, the Black Blade, the source of their power was sealed away. 0
127Godskin Noblehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/godskin_noble_elden_ring_wiki_600px.jpgnan{'Volcano Manor': ['50,000', "Serpent's Amnion", 'Godskin Stitcher', 'Noble Presence'], 'Divine Tower of Liurnia:': ['4.810', 'Godskin Noble Set']}Nobles are the most ancient apostles who are said to have assimilated inhuman physiology. Not unlike the crucible, the Erdtree in its primordial form. 0
128Great Wyrm Theodorixhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/great_wyrm_theodorix_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpg25,649{'Consecrated Snowfield': ['180,000 Runes (NG)', '135,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '45,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Dragon Heart x3']}The name of the ancient troll warrior Theodorix lives on — as a hero of the War against the Giants. 0
129Guardian Golemhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/guardian-golem-field-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg5,974{'Highroad Cave': ['1,700 Runes (NG)', '600 Runes (NG, Co-op)', 'Blue Dancer Charm']}One of the many constructs found across the Lands Between. It wields a large halberd to attack, along with being able to breath fire on anything below it. 0
130Kindred of Rothttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/miner_prawn_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpg2,034 each{'Seethewater Cave': ['10,000', "Kindred of Rot's Exultation"]}nan0
131Lion Guardianhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lion_guardian_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_600px.jpg2,119 - 7,019 HP{'Stormveil Castle Fort Gael (Caelid) Redmane Castle Castle Sol Leyndell, Royal Capital': ['Stormveil Castle :', '1138 Runes', 'Somber Smithing Stone [1]', 'Beast Blood', 'Old Fang x2']}nan0
132Loretta, Knight of the Haligtreehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/loretta-knight-of-the-haligtree-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg13,397{"Miquella's Haligtree": ['200,000', "Loretta's Mastery", "Loretta's War Sickle"]}Loretta, once a royal Carian Knight, went on a journey in search of a haven for Albinaurics, and determined that the Haligtree was their best chance for eventual salvation. 0
133Magma Wyrmhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/magma_wyrm_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpgnan{'Gael Tunnel': ['7,500', 'Dragon Heart', 'Moonveil'], 'Fort Laiedd:': ['19,000', 'Dragon Heart'], 'Volcano Manor': ['5,044', 'Other Drops:', 'Dragon Heart'], "Dragon's Pit": ['7,718', 'Dragon Heart', 'Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone']}Those who have performed the Dragon Communion will find their humanity slowly slipping away. Once they fully succumb to their fate, they are left no more than wyrms that crawl the earth. 0
134MAGMA WYRM MAKARhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/magma-wyrm-3-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg7141{'Ruin-Strewn Precipice': ['24,000 Runes (NG)', '6000 Runes (NG, Co-op) Other Drops:', "Magma Wyrm's Scalesword", 'Dragon Heart']}It's said these land-bound dragons were once human heroes who partook in dragon communion, a grave transgression for which they were cursed to crawl the earth upon their bellies, shadows of their former selves. 0
135Miranda The Blighted Bloomhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/miranda-the-blighted-bloom-field-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpg2,483{'Tombsward Cave': ['Runes 2,100 (NG)', 'Runes 525 (NG, Co-op)', 'Viridian Amber Medallion']}Miranda, maiden of the Flower Crucible is said to have been the very first of this breed. 0
136Misbegotten Crusaderhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/misbegotten-crusader-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpeg9,130{'Cave of the Forlorn': ['93,000', 'Golden Order Greatsword']}nan0
137Misbegotten Warriorhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/misbegotten_warrior_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpg≈ 3560 ( Field Boss ){'Unsightly Catacombs': ['Unsightly Catacombs :', '9400 Runes', 'Perfumer Tricia Ashes Redmane Castle :', '16000 Runes', 'Ruins Greatsword']}A Vicious beast that has lost all reason, attacking indiscriminately. 0
138Mohg, the Omenhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mogh_the_omen1-min.jpg14,000{'Subterranean Shunning-Grounds': ['100,000', 'Bloodflame Talons']}The reigning lord and hierarch of the coming dynasty of Mohgwyn. Or perhaps, of a raving lunatic. 0
139Necromancer Garrishttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/necromancer-garris-elden-ring-wiki-600px.jpg3,202{"Sage's Cave , Altus Plateau": ['9,000', 'Family Heads']}The heads of his flail were made to resemble those of his wife and two children. 0
140Nox Swordstress & Nox Monkhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/nox-swordstress-nox-monk_-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg1,631 each{'Sellia, Town of Sorcery': ['6,400', 'Nox Flowing Sword']}Long ago, the Nox invoked the ire of the Greater Will, and were banished deep underground. Now they live under a false night sky, in eternal anticipation of their liege. Of the coming age of the stars. And their Lord of Night. 0
141Patcheshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/patches-npc-photo-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpg1,191{'Murkwater Cave , Limgrave Liurnia Mt. Gelmir Volcano Manor The Shaded Castle': ['Spared:', '800', 'Golden Rune [1] x2', 'Grovel for Mercy', 'Slain:', 'Spear +7', 'Leather Armor', 'Leather Gloves', 'Leather Boots', "Patches' Bell Bearing"]}Well, well, well? Thought you'd just help yourself to a man's personal belongings? 0
142Putrid Avatarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/putrid-avatar-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgnan{'Minor Erdtree (Caelid):': ['9,600', 'Greenburst Crystal Tear', 'Flame-Shrouding Cracked Tear'], 'Minor Erdtree (Dragonbarrow):': ['91,000', 'Opaline Hardtear', 'Stonebarb Cracked Tear'], 'Minor Erdtree (Consecrated Snowfield):': ['160,000', 'Ruptured Crystal Tear', 'Thorny Cracked Tear'], 'Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree:': ['27,090', 'Walkway: Rotten Staff', "Gateway: Lord's Rune"]}Guardians of the Minor Erdtrees, infested with Scarlet Rot. Their large staff can knock foes away, and their slam attack releases a cloud of rot, quickly leading to enemies’ demise. 0
143Putrid Grave Warden Duelisthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/putrid-grave-warden-duelist-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg8,800{'Consecrated Snowfield Catacombs': ['Runes 78,000', 'Runes 58,500 (Coop)', 'Great Grave Glovewort x2', 'Rotten Gravekeeper Cloak']}nan0
144Putrid Tree Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/putrid-tree-spirit-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegnan{'War-Dead Catacombs': ['64,000', 'Redmane Knight Ogha Spirit Ashes', 'Golden Seed'], 'Grand Cloister': ['11,193', 'Golden Seed'], 'Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree': ['26,460', 'Golden Seed']}nan0
145Red Wolf of the Championhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/red-wolf-of-radagon-3-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg3,162{"Gelmir Hero's Grave": ['21,000 Runes', '15,750 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '5,250 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops', 'Bloodhound Knight Floh']}nan0
146Roundtable Knight Vykehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/vyke-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg5,366{"Lord Contender's Evergaol": ['21,000 Runes', '15,750 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '5,250 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops', 'Bloodhound Knight Floh']}No other Tarnished was closer to the throne of the Elden Lord than Vyke. But without announcement, Vyke traveled far below the capital, and was scorched by the flame of frenzy. Did he make his choice for his maiden, or did some other force lure him with suggestion? 0
147Royal Knight Lorettahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/royal_knight_loretta_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpg4,214{'Caria Manor': ['7,500 (NG)', '2,500 (NG, Co-op)', "Loretta's Greatbow", "Ash of War: Loretta's Slash"]}nan0
148Royal Revenanthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/royal-revenant-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg3,077{'Kingsrealm Ruins': ['3,100']}An obscene and disturbing abomination, blend of a spider-like creature and human limbs resulting in a quite resourceful fighter at close range. 0
149Sanguine Noblehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sanguine-noble-6-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg3,128{'Writheblood Ruins': ['8,800']}Known to strike from pools of blood, these assassins are missionaries come to share the gospel of accursed blood. 0
150Scaly Misbegottenhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/scaly_misbegotten.jpg1,360{'Morne Tunnel': ['2,000', 'Rusted Anchor']}The misbegotten are held to be a punishment for making contact with the Crucible, and from birth they are treated as slaves, or worse. 0
151Mimic Tearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mimic-tear-boss-enemies-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpg≈ 19,536 (GREAT ENEMY){'Nokron, Eternal City Hidden Path to the Haligtree': ['Nokron, Eternal City : 10.000 Runes', '33.750 Runes (NG+3)', 'Larval Tear x2', 'Silver Tear Mask Hidden Path to the Haligtree:', '5 0,000 Runes (NG)', '37,500 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '12,500 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', '105,000 Runes (NG+1)', 'Blackflame Monk Amon Ashes']}Those of the Eternal City have created a special type of Silver Tear, capable of completely mimicking its opponent, along with any spells, skills and armaments they have. 0
152Wormfacehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/wormface-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegnan{'Minor Erdtree (Altus Plateau):': ['10,000', 'Crimsonspill Crystal Tear', 'Speckled Hardtear'], 'Minor Erdtree (Mt. Gelmir):': ['2,937', 'Larval Tear'], 'Crumbling Farum Azula:': ['6,812']}nan0
0Divine Beast Dancing Lionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/divine_beast_dancing_lion_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_1200px.png22,571{'Belurat, Tower Settlement:': ['120,000', 'Remembrance of the Dancing Lion', 'Divine Beast Head'], 'Ancient Ruins of Rauh:': ['180,000', 'Divine Beast Tornado']}nan0
1Rellana, Twin Moon Knighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rellana_twin_moon_knight2.png29,723{'Castle Ensis': ['240,000', 'Remembrance of the Twin Moon Knight']}nan1
2Commander Gaiushttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/commander_gaius_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_1200px.png33,871{'Scaduview': ['230,000', 'Remembrance of the Wild Boar Rider']}nan1
3Scadutree Avatarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/scadutree_avatar_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_1200px.png7,560 (phase 1) 13,608 (phase 2) 13,608 (phase 3){'Scadutree Base': ['260,000', 'Remembrance of the Shadow Sunflower', "Miquella's Great Rune"]}nan1
4Putrescent Knighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/putrescent_knight_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_1200px.png20,612{'Stone Coffin Fissure': ['220,000', 'Remembrance of Putrescence']}nan1
5Midra, Lord of Frenzied Flamehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/midra_lord_of_frenzied_flame_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_1200px.png47,171{"Midra's Manse": ['410,000', 'Remembrance of the Lord of Frenzied Flame']}Enough.... I have endured more than enough...I ask you forgive me, dearest Nanaya... 1
6Romina, Saint of the Budhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/romina.png35,798{'Church of the Bud': ['380,000', 'Remembrance of the Saint of the Bud']}nan1
7Metyr, Mother of Fingershttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/1000000223.jpg43,296{'Finger Ruins of Miyr': ['420,000', 'Remembrance of the Mother of Fingers']}nan0
8Messmer the Impalerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/messmer_the_impaler_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_1200px.png38,981{'Shadow Keep , Specimen Storehouse': ['400,000', 'Remembrance of the Impaler', "Messmer's Kindling"]}Mother, wouldst thou truly Lordship sanction, in one so bereft of light? 1
9Base Serpent Messmerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/messmer_p2_(1).pngTBD{'Shadow Keep , Specimen Storehouse': ['400,000 Runes', 'Remembrance of the Impaler', "Messmer's Kindling"]}Wilt thou be taken in the jaws... of the abbyssal serpent, shorn of light. 0
10Promised Consort Radahnhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/consort.png46134{'Enir-Ilim': ['500,000 Runes', 'Remembrance of a God and a Lord']}Now, the vow will be honoured, and my Lord brother's soul will return. 1
11Radahn, Consort of Miquellahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/radahn-consort-of-miquella-elden-ring-wiki-guide-min.png46134{'Enir-Ilim': ['500,000 Runes', 'Remembrance of a God and a Lord']}Now, the vow will be honoured, and my Lord brother's soul will return. 1
12Bayle The Dreadhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bayle.png41,612{'Jagged Peak': ['490000', 'Heart of Bayle']}nan1
13Godrick the Graftedhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/godrick_the_grafted_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg6,080{'Stormveil Castle': ['20,000 (NG)', '5,000 (NG, Co-op)', "Godrick's Great Rune", 'Remembrance of the Grafted']}I command thee, kneel! I am the lord of all that is golden! 0
14Rennala Carian Queen of the Full Moonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rennala_queen_of_the_full_moon_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpgPhase 1{'Raya Lucaria Academy': ['40,000 Runes (NG)', '30,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '10,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', 'Remembrance of the Full Moon Queen', 'Great Rune of the Unborn']}Hush, little culver. I'll soon birth thee anew, a sweeting fresh and pure… 0
15Starscourge Radahnhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/radahn_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg9,572{'Redmane Castle': ['70,000', 'Remembrance of the Starscourge', "Radahn's Great Rune"]}The Red Lion General wielded gravitational powers which he learned in Sellia during his younger days. All so he would never have to abandon his beloved but scrawny steed. 0
16Morgott The Grace-Given Veiled Monarch Omen Kinghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/morgott-omen-king-3-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg10,399{'Leyndell, Royal Capital': ['120,000', 'Remembrance of the Omen King', "Morgott's Great Rune", 'Talisman Pouch (NG only, Margit not defeated)']}Have it writ upon thy meagre grave: "Felled by King Morgott! Last of all kings." 0
17Rykard, Lord of Blasphemyhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rykard_lord_of_blasphemy_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1.jpg89,613{'Volcano Manor': ['130.000', "Rykard's Great Rune", 'Remembrance of the Blasphemous']}Join the Serpent King, as family... Together, we will devour the very gods! 0
18Mohg, Lord of Bloodhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mohg_the_omen_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg18,389{'Mohgwyn Palace': ['420,000', "Mohg's Great Rune", 'Remembrance of the Blood Lord']}Welcome, honored guest. To the birthplace of our Dynasty! 0
19Malenia, Blade of Miquellahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/malenia,-blade-of-miquella1-min.jpg33,251{'Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree': ["480,000 Malenia's Great Rune Remembrance of the Rot Goddess"]}...Heed my words. I am Malenia. Blade of Miquella. And I have never known defeat. 0
20Lichdragon Fortissaxhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fortissax_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg12,903{'Deeproot Depths': ['90,000', 'Remembrance of the Lichdragon']}After Godwyn the Golden became the Prince of Death, the ancient dragon fought long and hard against the Death within its companion. Alas, victory was never achieved and its only reward was corruption. 0
21Maliketh, The Black Bladehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/maliketh-the-black-blade-4k1-min.jpg10,620{'Crumbling Farum Azula': ['220,000', 'Remembrance of the Black Blade']}Cower before Maliketh, Marika’s Black Blade. 0
22Astel, Naturalborn of the Voidhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/astel-naturalborn-of-the-void-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg11,170{'Grand Cloister': ['80,000', 'Remembrance of the Naturalborn']}A malformed star born in the lightless void far away. Once destroyed an Eternal City and took away their sky. A falling star of ill omen. 0
23Regal Ancestor Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/regal-ancestor-spirit_map-bosses-enemies-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpg6,301{'Nokron, Eternal City': ['24,000', 'Remembrance of the Regal Ancestor']}Ancestral spirits exist as a phenomenon beyond the purview of the Erdtree. Life sprouts from death, as it does from birth. Such is the way of the living. 0
24Radagon of the Golden Orderhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/radagon_of_the_golden_order_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg≈ 13,339 (GOD){'Stone Platform': ['Elden Throne :', 'N/A']}As the husband of Rennala of Caria, the red-haired Radagon studied sorcery, and as the husband of Queen Marika, he studied incantations. Thus did the hero aspire to be complete. 0
25Godfrey, First Elden Lordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/godfrey_first_elden_lord_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg21,903{'Leyndell, Ashen Capital': ['300,000', 'Remembrance of Hoarah Loux']}nan0
26Fire Gianthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fire_giant_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg42,363{'Flame Peak': ['180,000', 'Remembrance of the Fire Giant']}The Fire Giant is a survivor of the War against the Giants. Upon realizing the flames of their forge would never die, Queen Marika marked him with a curse. 0
27Dragonlord Placidusaxhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonlord_placidusax_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg26,651{'Crumbling Farum Azula': ['280,000', 'Remembrance of the Dragonlord']}The Dragonlord whose seat lies at the heart of the storm beyond time is said to have been Elden Lord in the age before the Erdtree. Once his god was fled, the lord continued to await its return. 0
28Ancient Dragon Senessaxhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/senessax.png45,551{'Jagged Peak': ['200,000', 'Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone', 'Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone']}nan1

37Ancestor Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ancestor_spirit1-min.jpg4,393{'Siofra River': ['13,000', 'Ancestral Follower Ashes']}nan0
38Dragonkin Soldierhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonkin-soldier-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgnan{'Siofra River:': ['16,000', 'Dragon Halberd'], 'Lake of Rot:': ['58,000', 'Dragonscale Blade']}Alas, the Dragonkin Soldiers never attained immortality, and perished as decrepit, pale imitations of their skyborn kin. 0
39Margit, the Fell Omenhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/margit-1-boss-elden-ring-wiki.jpg4,174{'Stormveil Castle:': ['12,000', 'Talisman Pouch (NG only, Morgott not defeated)'], 'Capital Outskirts': ['16,800', 'Viridian Amber Medallion +1']}Someone must extinguish thy flame. Let it be Margit the Fell! 0
40Flying Dragon Agheelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flying_dragon_agheel_2_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg3,200{'Dragon-Burnt Ruins': ['5,000, Dragon Heart']}The dead gazed at the skies over the lakes of Limgrave, praying that the dragons' flames would burn them to ash. 0
41Dragonkin Soldier of Nokstellahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonkin_nokstella_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg4,372{'Ainsel River': ['12,000', 'Frozen Lightning Spear']}The Dragonkin were born in the Eternal City, where they knew no true sky, nor true lightning. Instead, ice lightning was their weapon. 0
42Leonine Misbegottenhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/leonine_misbegotten_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1.jpg2,198{'Castle Morne': ['Runes 3,800 (NG)', 'Runes 950 (NG, Co-op)', 'Grafted Blade Greatsword']}nan0
43Red Wolf of Radagonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/red-wolf-of-radagon-2-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg2,204{'Raya Lucaria Academy': ['14,000 Runes (NG)', '3,500 Runes (NG, Co-op)', 'Runes 63,100 (NG +3)', 'Memory Stone']}nan0
44Glintstone Dragon Adulahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/glintstone_dragon_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpgnan{'Three Sisters:': ['No drops'], 'Cathedral of Manus Celes:': ['120,000', "Adula's Moonblade", 'Dragon Heart x3']}Adula, a devourer of sorcerers, was bested by Ranni and subsequently swore a knightly oath to her Dark Moon. 0
45Borealis, the Freezing Foghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/borealis_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpg11,268{'Mountaintops of the Giants': ['100,000', 'Dragon Heart']}The ice dragons were once lords of the mountaintops long ago, until they were defeated by the Fire Giants and chased from the peak. 0
46Decaying Ekzykeshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/decaying_ekzykes_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpg23,731{'Caelid': ['38,000, Dragon Heart']}Ekzykes, Dragon Communion Revenger, did not forget his hatred even as he succumbed to the scarlet rot. 0
47Valiant Gargoylehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/valiant_gargoyle1-min.jpgnan{'Siofra Aqueduct:': ['30,000', "Gargoyle's Greatsword", "Gargoyle's Twinblade"], 'Capital Outskirts:': ['2,835', 'Gargoyle’s Great Axe'], 'Leyndell, Royal Capital:': ['3,332', "Gargoyle's Halberd"], 'Leyndell, Ashen Capital:': ['8,608']}The missing parts have been mended with corpse wax; a patchwork of champions. 0
48Valiant Gargoylehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/valiant_gargoyle1-min.jpgnan{'Siofra Aqueduct:': ['30,000', "Gargoyle's Greatsword", "Gargoyle's Twinblade"], 'Capital Outskirts:': ['2,835', 'Gargoyle’s Great Axe'], 'Leyndell, Royal Capital:': ['3,332', "Gargoyle's Halberd"], 'Leyndell, Ashen Capital:': ['8,608']}The missing parts have been mended with corpse wax; a patchwork of champions. 0
49Godskin Apostle and Godskin Noblehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/godskin_duo_spirit_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpg22,581 - Combined (Field Boss){'Spiritcaller Cave , Mountaintops of the Giants': ['Runes 70,000 (NG)', 'Runes 52,500 (NG, Co-op Host)', 'Runes 17,500 (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Godskin Swaddling Cloth x1', 'Black Flame Ritual x1']}nan0
50Godskin Duohttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/godskin_duo_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpg26,350{'Crumbling Farum Azula': ['170,000', "Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing [4] (NG only)", 'Ash of War: Black Flame Tornado']}The black flame could once slay gods. But when Maliketh sealed Destined Death, the true power of the black flame was lost. 0
51Blackgaol Knighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/blackight-gaol-boss-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg14,129{'Western Nameless Mausoleum': ['70,000', 'Greatsword of Solitude', 'Solitude Set']}nan1

53Black Knight Edreddhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/edreed.png9,792{'Fort of Reprimand': ['80,000 (400,000 with Golden Eyes)', 'Ash of War: Aspects of the Crucible: Wings']}nan1
54Count Ymir, Mother of Fingershttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/count-ymir-mother-of-fingers-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg11,147{'Cathedral of Manus Metyr': ['210,000', "Ymir's Bell Bearing", 'Maternal Staff', 'High Priest Set']}My Shining Star. 0
55Curseblade Labirithhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/curseblade-labirith-elden-ring-wiki-600px.jpg8,426{'Bonny Gaol': ['100,000', 'Curseblade Meera']}nan0
56Death Knighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/death-knight.pngnan{'Fog Rift Catacombs': ['110,000 Runes', "Death Knight's Twin Axes", 'Crimson Amber Medallion +3'], 'Scorpion River Catacombs:': ['130,000 Runes', "Death Knight's Longhaft Axe", 'Cerulean Amber Medallion +3']}nan0
57Death Rite Birdhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/death_rite_bird_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpgnan{'Academy Gate Town:': ['7,800', 'Ancient Death Rancor'], 'Caelid': ['15,000', "Death's Poker"], 'Mountaintops of the Giants:': ['77,000', 'Death Ritual Spear'], 'Apostate Derelict:': ['220,000', 'Explosive Ghostflame'], "Charo's Hidden Grave": ['230,000', 'Ash of War: Ghostflame Call']}In the time when there was no Erdtree, death was burned in ghostflame. Deathbirds were the keepers of that fire. 0
58Demi-Human Swordmaster Onzehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/demi-human_swordmaster_onze.png7,441{'Belurat Gaol': ['80,000 Runes', 'Demi-Human Swordsman Yosh']}nan1
59Demi-Human Queen Mariggahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/demi-queen.png9,793{'Cerulean Coast': ['100,000', 'Star-Lined Sword']}nan1
60Fallingstar Beasthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fallingstar_beast_altus_plateau_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgnan{'Sellia Crystal Tunnel': ['7,600', "Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing (1)", 'Smithing Stone (7) x5', 'Somber Smithing Stone (6)', 'Gravity Stone Chunk x4'], 'Altus Plateau:': ['11,000', 'Somber Smithing Stone (5)', 'Smithing Stone (6) x5', 'Gravity Stone Fan', 'Gravity Stone Chunk'], 'Finger Ruins of Dheo:': ['170,000', 'Gravitational Missile']}nan0
61Lamenterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lamenter.png12,249{"Lamenter's Gaol": ['160,000', "Lamenter's Mask"]}nan0
62Ralva the Great Red Bearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ralva.png29,606{'Scadu Altus': ['180,000', 'Pelt of Ralva']}nan1
63Rakshasahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rakshasa.png20,235{'Eastern Nameless Mausoleum': ['90,000', "Rakshasa's Great Katana", "Rakshasa's Set"]}nan0
64Red Bearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mr-teddy.png16,365{'Northern Nameless Mausoleum': ['80,000', "Red Bear's Claw", 'Iron Rivet Set']}nan0
65Rugalea the Great Red Bearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rugalea-the-great-red-bear-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg30,535{'Rauh Base': ['210,000', 'Roar of Rugalea']}nan1
66Tree Sentinelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tree-sentinel-1-small1-min.jpgnan{'Limgrave': ['3,200', 'Golden Halberd'], 'Altus Plateau:': ['20,000', 'Erdtree Greatshield', "Hero's Rune [1]"], 'Hinterland': ['120,000', 'Blessing of Marika each']}The living rampart of the Erdtree, the Tree Sentinels are the standard to which all defenders of the Erdtree aspire. 0
67Mad Pumpkin Headhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mad_pumpkin_head_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpgnan{None: ['120,000', 'Blessing of Marika each']}Though he has stifled his panic within the dark confines of his helmet, he rampages as if driven mad when agitated by bloodshed or the humming of insects. This mad soldier is all that is left of a broken gladiator. 0
68Erdtree Burial Watchdoghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/burial_watchdog_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpgnan{}The Watchdogs, battered and broken over their lengthy tenure, rule the catacombs and are even said to command the imps. 0
69Stonedigger Trollhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/stonedigger_troll_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpgnan{'Limgrave Tunnels:': ['1,800 Runes (NG)', '450 Runes (NG, Co-op)'], '': ['Roar Medallion'], 'Old Altus Tunnel:': ['9,600 (NG)', '7,200 (NG, Co-op Host)', '2,400 (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', 'Great Club']}Trolls are descended from the giants, and their hammers were supposedly once used as ceremonial smithing tools. In the distant past, smithing was considered divine. 0
70Grafted Scionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grafted_scion_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpgnan{'Chapel of Anticipation': ['3,200', 'Ornamental Straight Sword', 'Golden Beast Crest Shield'], "Fringefolk Hero's Grave": ['Stormveil Castle : 1,176'], 'Liurnia of the Lakes': ['1,283', 'Larval Tear'], 'Mt Gelmir': []}nan0
71Rick, Soldier Of Godhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/soldier-of-godrick-boss-elden-rings.jpg384{'Stranded Graveyard': ['400']}That depraved lot are obsessed with sacrificing Tarnished like you for the sake of "grafting". 0
72Beastman of Farum Azulahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/beastman-of-farum-azula1.jpgnan{}Beastmen from the doomed Farum Azula, the slowly crumbling ruins in the skies. These ruins are said to be the remains of a giant mausoleum enshrining an ancient dragon, guarded by chosen beastmen who wield weapons clad in lightning. 0
73Demi-Human Chiefshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/demihuman-chief-boss-enemy-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg1,218{'Coastal Cave': ['1,200', 'Tailoring Tools', 'Sewing Needle']}They'll rush in and beat you to a pulp. You'll end up just like me. - Boc the Seamster 0
74Runebearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/runebear_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1.jpg3,311{'Earthbore Cave': ['Runes 2,600 (NG)', 'Runes 650 (NG, Co-op)', 'Spelldrake Talisman']}nan0
75Crucible Knightshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/crucible-knight-stormhill-3-min.jpgnan{None: ['Stormhill Evergaol :', '2,100 (NG)', '10,500 (NG+1)', 'Aspects of the Crucible: Tail Stormveil Castle :', '1,613', 'Aspects of the Crucible: Horns', 'Siofra River :', '3,080 Siofra Aqueduct :', '3,080 each', 'Sword: Crucible Hornshield', 'Spear: Somber Smithing Stone [6] Leyndell, Royal Capital :', '3,840 each Crumbling Farum Azula :', '7,360 each']}nan0
76Ancient Hero of Zamorhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ancient_hero_of_zamor_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgnan{'Weeping Evergaol': ['5,400', 'Other Drops', "Radagon's Scarseal"], "Sainted Hero's Grave:": ['24,000 Runes (NG)', '15,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '5,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', 'Ancient Dragon Knight Kristoff Ashes'], "Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave:": ['83,000 Runes (NG)', '62,250 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '20,750 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', 'Zamor Curved Sword', 'Zamor Mask', 'Zamor Armor', 'Zamor Bracelets', 'Zamor Legwraps']}These long-lived warriors, clad in biting, freezing winds, are said to have been the mortal enemies of the Fire Giants since time immemorial. 0
77Tree Sentinelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tree-sentinel-1-small1-min.jpgnan{'Limgrave': ['3,200', 'Golden Halberd'], 'Altus Plateau:': ['20,000', 'Erdtree Greatshield', "Hero's Rune [1]"], 'Hinterland': ['120,000', 'Blessing of Marika each']}The living rampart of the Erdtree, the Tree Sentinels are the standard to which all defenders of the Erdtree aspire. 0
78Draconic Tree Sentinelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/draconic-tree-sentinel-2-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgnan{'Capital Outskirts:': ['50,000', 'Dragon Greatclaw', 'Dragonclaw Shield'], 'Crumbling Farum Azula:': ['28,080', 'Malformed Dragon Set']}After the great ancient dragon Gransax attacked, the sentinels had an epiphany. The only way to truly protect the Erdtree was to become dragons themselves. 0
79Black Knife Assassinhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black-knife-assassin-limgrave-2-min.jpgnan{None: ['28,080', 'Malformed Dragon Set']}The assassins that carried out the deeds of the Night of the Black Knives were all women, and rumored to be Numen who had close ties with Marika herself. 0
80Crystalianhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/crystalians_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300x.jpgnan{'Raya Lucaria Crystal Tunnel:': ['3,000 Runes (NG)', '2,350 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '750 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', "Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing (1)"], 'Academy Crystal Cave:': ['3,300 Runes (NG)', '2,465 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '835 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', 'Crystal Release'], 'Altus Tunnel:': ['9,000 Runes (NG)', '6750 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '2,250 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Other Drops:', "Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing (2)"]}The Crystalians are inorganic beings, yet they live. They cleave close to the ideals of the primeval current, and as such, they are revered guests of the sorcerers.. 0
81Night's Cavalryhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/nights_cavalry_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpgnan{None: ['Limgrave :', 'Runes 2,400 (NG)', 'Other Drops:', 'Ash of War: Repeating Thrust', 'Weeping Peninsula :', '3,400 (NG)', 'Other Drops:', 'Ash of War: Barricade Shield', 'Nightrider Flail', 'Liurnia South :', '5,600 Runes', 'Other Drops:', 'Ash of War: Ice Spear', 'Liurnia North :', '5,600', 'Other Drops:', 'Ash of War: Giant Hunt', 'Nightrider Glaive Caelid :', '8,500', 'Other Drops:', 'Ash of War: Poison Moth Flight Altus Plateau :', '10,000', 'Other Drops:', 'Ash of War: Shared Order Forbidden Lands :', '36,000', 'Other Drops:', "Ash of War: Phantom Slash Greyoll's Dragonbarrow :", '42,000', 'Other Drops:', "Ash of War: Bloodhound's Step Consecrated Snowfield :", '84,000', 'Other Drops:', "Night's Cavalry Set", 'Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone']}The Night's Cavalry, who now wander the dim roads at night, were once led by the Fell Omen and were deliverers of death for great warriors, knights, and champions. 0
82Bell Bearing Hunterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bell-bearing-hunter-elden-ring.jpgnan{"Warmaster's Shack:": ['2,700 Runes (NG)', '675 Runes (NG, Co-op)', "Bone Peddler's Bell Bearing"], 'Church of Vows:': ['6,000 Runes', '(NG)', '4,500 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '1,500 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', "Meat Peddler's Bell Bearing"], "Hermit Merchant's Shack:": ['20,000 Runes (NG)', '15,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Host)', '5,000 Runes (NG, Co-op Phantom)', "Medicine Peddler's Bell Bearing"], "Isolated Merchant's Shack (Dragonbarrow):": ['50,000', "Gravity Stone Peddler's Bell Bearing"]}Elemer murdered numerous instructors and merchants, and was known as the Bell Bearing Hunter. 0
83Crucible Knight Ordovishttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/crucible_knight_ordovis_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpg5,460 each{"Auriza Hero's Grave": ['28,000', "Ordovis's Greatsword", 'Crucible Axe Helm', 'Crucible Axe Armor', 'Crucible Gauntlets', 'Crucible Greaves']}Ordovis, one of the two honored as foremost among the Crucible Knights. 0
84Fell Twinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fell_twins_omen_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1-min.jpg7,871 (Cleaver) 6,539 (Axe){'Capital Outskirts': ['29,000', 'Omenkiller Rollo']}nan0
85Black Blade Kindredhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black_blade_kindred_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgnan{'Bestial Sanctum:': ['88,000', "Gargoyle's Blackblade", "Gargoyle's Black Halberd"], 'Forbidden Lands:': ['60,000', "Gargoyle's Black Axe", "Gargoyle's Black Blades"]}Valiant Gargoyles, mended with blackened corpse wax. Such is the mark of those who serve Maliketh, the Black Blade. 0
86Death Rite Birdhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/death_rite_bird_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpgnan{'Academy Gate Town:': ['7,800', 'Ancient Death Rancor'], 'Caelid': ['15,000', "Death's Poker"], 'Mountaintops of the Giants:': ['77,000', 'Death Ritual Spear'], 'Apostate Derelict:': ['220,000', 'Explosive Ghostflame'], "Charo's Hidden Grave": ['230,000', 'Ash of War: Ghostflame Call']}In the time when there was no Erdtree, death was burned in ghostflame. Deathbirds were the keepers of that fire. 0
87Sir Gideon Ofnir, The All-Knowinghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sir_gideon_ofnir_the_all_knowing_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpg6,226{'Leyndell, Ashen Capital': ['35,500', 'All-Knowing Set', 'Scepter of the All-Knowing']}Queen Marika has high hopes for us. That we continue to struggle, unto eternity. 0
88Tibia Marinerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tibia-mariner_ground_boss_enemies_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgnan{'Summonwater Village': ['2,400', 'Deathroot', 'Skeletal Militiaman Ashes'], 'Liurnia of the Lakes:': ['4,700', 'Deathroot', 'Skeletal Bandit Ashes'], 'Wyndham Ruins:': ['14,000', 'Deathroot', "Tibia's Summons"], 'Mountaintops of the Giants:\xa0': ['4,234', 'Deathroot', "Helphen's Steeple"], "Charo's Hidden Grave": ['9,959', "Tibia's Cookbook"]}nan0
89Bloodhound Knight Darriwilhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodhound-knight-darriwil-boss-enemy-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg1,450{'Forlorn Hound Evergaol': ['1,900', "Bloodhound's Fang"]}Darriwil is nothing but a traitor. And in need of a fitting end to his tale. - Blaidd 0
90Esgar, Priest of Bloodhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/esgar_priest_of_blood_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpg3,511{'Leyndell Catacombs': ['30,000', "Lord of Blood's Exultation"]}Aided by his two ferocious dogs, this Priest is capable of the deadliest hemorrhage-inducing attacks. 0
91Erdtree Avatarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtree-avatar-weeping-peninsula-elden-rink-wiki-guide-1-small.jpgnan{'Minor Erdtree (Weeping Peninsula)': ['Runes 4,500 (NG)', 'Runes 3,600 (NG, Co-op Host)', 'Runes 930 (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Opaline Bubbletear', 'Crimsonburst Crystal Tear'], 'Minor Erdtree (Liurnia Southwest):': ['5,800', 'Cerulean Crystal Tear', 'Ruptured Crystal Tear'], 'Minor Erdtree (Liurnia Northeast):': ['5,800', 'Holy-Shrouding Cracked Tear', 'Lightning-Shrouding Cracked Tear', 'Magic-Shrouding Cracked Tear'], 'Leyndell, Royal Capital': ['10,062', "Lord's Rune"], 'Deeproot Depths:': ['10,621', 'Staff of the Avatar'], 'Minor Erdtree (Mountaintops East):': ['70,000 (NG)', '52,500 (NG, Co-op Host)', '17,500 (NG, Co-op Phantom)', 'Cerulean Crystal Tear', 'Crimson Bubbletear']}nan0
92Alecto, Black Knife Ringleaderhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/alecto_black_knife_ringleader_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpg17,482{"Ringleader's Evergaol": ['88,000', 'Black Knife Tiche']}The assassins who carried out the deed were scions of the Eternal City. A group entirely of women, arrayed in armour of silver under cloaks which fooled the eye. 0
93Grave Warden Duelisthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grave-warden-duelist-2-small1-min.jpgnan{'Murkwater Catacombs:': ['1,700', 'Banished Knight Engvall Ashes'], 'Auriza Side Tomb:': ['15,000', 'Soldjars of Fortune Ashes']}Duelists who were exiled from the colosseum. 0
94Cleanrot Knighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cleanrot_knight_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpgnan{'Stillwater Cave': ['2,475 Runes (NG)', '825 Runes (NG, Co-op)', 'Winged Sword Insignia', "Cleanrot Knight's Sword"], 'Abandoned Cave:': ['7,000', 'Gold Scarab']}The Cleanrot Knights vowed to fight alongside Malenia, despite the inevitable, if gradual, putrefaction of their flesh. Their acceptance of their fate made these battles fiercest of all. 0
95Omenkillerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/omenkiller-3-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg2,306{'Village of the Albinaurics': ['4,900', 'Crucible Knot Talisman']}nan0
96Spiritcaller Snailhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spirit-caller_snail_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgnan{"Road's End Catacombs": ['2,250 Runes (NG)', '750 Runes (NG, Co-op)', 'Glintstone Sorcerer Ashes'], "Spiritcaller's Cave:": ['70,000', 'Black Flame Ritual', 'Godskin Swaddling Cloth']}A strange snail-like creature that gives off a pale glow. While weak on their own, they summon forth spirits from beyond to fight on their behalf. But once the snail dies, the spirit will vanish. 0
97Perfumer Tricia and Misbegotten Warriorhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/perfumer-tricia-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgnannanTricia was once known as a healer who dedicated her efforts to treating Misbegotten, Omen, and all those seen as impure. When her efforts failed, she was their companion as they died, watching over them to ensure that they could pass peacefully, free of pain. 0

102Onyx Lordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/onyx-lord-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgnan{'Royal Grave Evergaol': ['3,600', 'Meteorite'], 'Sealed Tunnel': ['16,000', "Onyx Lord's Greatsword"]}A race of ancients with skin of stone who were said to have risen to life when a meteor struck long ago. They were called lords in reverential fear of their destructive power. 0
103Abductor Virginshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/abductor-virgins-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg3,811 each{'Volcano Manor': ['10,000', "Inquisitor's Girandole"]}nan0
104Adan, Thief of Firehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/adan_thief_of_fire_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1-min.jpg1,717{"Malefactor's Evergaol": ['3,800', 'Flame of the Fell God']}The monks came to the land of Liurnia in pursuit of a fugitive who stole their fire. 0
105Onyx Lordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/onyx-lord-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgnan{'Royal Grave Evergaol': ['3,600', 'Meteorite'], 'Sealed Tunnel': ['16,000', "Onyx Lord's Greatsword"]}A race of ancients with skin of stone who were said to have risen to life when a meteor struck long ago. They were called lords in reverential fear of their destructive power. 0
106Ancient Dragon Lansseaxhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ancient-dragon-lansseax-elden-ring-wiki-guide1-min.jpg9,087{'Altus Plateau': ['60,000', "Lansseax's Glaive"]}Lansseax was the sister of Fortissax. It is said that she took the form of a human to commune with the knights as a priestess of the ancient dragon cult. 0
107Astel, Stars of Darknesshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/astel-stars-of-darkness-boss-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg18,617{'Yelough Anix Tunnel': ['120,000', 'Meteorite of Astel']}nan0
108Battlemage Hugueshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/battlemage-hugues-1-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpg4,095{'Sellia Evergaol': ['7,800', 'Battlemage Hugues Ashes']}Hugues came from Sellia to study the Haima Conspectus at the academy, where he became a battlemage. Haima scholars seek to quell conflict with cannon fire and the gavel, but Hugues developed a longing for it. 0
109Bloodhound Knighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodgound_knight_liurnia_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpg1,985{'Lakeside Crystal Cave': ['2,700', 'Cerulean Amber Medallion']}The Bloodhound Knights are trained as hunters and known to be unshakable trackers. Without the use of language, each knight chooses his own master. Once the decision has been made, the knight stays loyal for life. 0
110Bols, Carian Knighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bols_carian_knight_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_guide1.jpg5,109{"Cuckoo's Evergaol , Liurnia of the Lakes": ['4,600, Greatblade Phalanx']}nan0
111Commander O'Neilhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/commander_oniel1-min.jpg9,210{'Swamp of Aeonia': ['12,000', "Commander's Standard", 'Unalloyed Gold Needle']}Even after his lord was fled, Commander O'Neil continued to brandish his flag in the devastation of the rot-eaten field of battle, the sole veteran who remembers that battle with pride. 0
112Commander Niallhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/capture1-min.jpg15,541{'Castle Sol': ['90,000', "Veteran's Prosthesis"]}Commander Niall, veteran of Castle Sol, offered his prosthesis in exchange for the lives of defeated knights held prisoner. He went on to lead these men as an army of no nation. 0
