82Stranded Graveyardhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fringefolk-heros-grave-300.jpgLimgrave['Rowa Fruit', 'Haligdrake Talisman', 'Flask of Crimson Tears', 'Flask of Cerulean Tears', 'Finger Severer', "Tarnished's Furled Finger", 'Gesture']['Commoner']['Wandering Nobles', 'Soldier of Godrick']['Soldier of Godrick']Stranded Graveyard is a dark and secluded location within the Cave of Knowledge. The confused and aimless dwell within.0
83Summonwater Villagehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/summonwater-village-limgrave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min.jpegLimgrave['Mushroom', "Trina's Lily", 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Green Turtle Talisman']['D Hunter of the Dead']['Giant Dragonfly', 'Turtle']['Tibia Mariner']D, Hunter of The Dead, warns you of this nearby village taken over by death, known as Summonwater Village0
84Third Church of Marikahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/third_church_of_marika_locations_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgLimgrave['Sacred Tear ', 'Flask of Wondrous Physick', 'Crimson Crystal Tear']['Melina']['Wolf', 'Eagle']nanThe Ruins of an Old Church found in the Mistwood. The most prominent sight here is a statue of a lady with her arms outstretched.0
85Warmaster's Shackhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/warmasters_shack_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLimgrave['Herba', 'Ash of War: Stamp (Upward Cut)', 'Ash of War: Kick', 'Ash of War: Endure', 'Ash of War: War Cry', 'Ash of War: Spinning Slash', 'Ash of War: Impaling Thrust', 'Ash of War: Quickstep', 'Ash of War: Storm Blade', 'Ash of War: Parry', 'Ash of War: No Skill']['Knight Bernahl', 'Bell Bearing Hunter']nan['Bell Bearing Hunter']Small shack in a remote area near north-central Stormhill.0
86Waypoint Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/waypoint-ruins-limgrave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min-min.jpegLimgrave['Rowa Fruit', 'Mushroom', 'Ruin Fragment', 'Immunizing Cured Meat', 'Glowstone', "Trina's Lily", 'Golden Rune [1]']['Sorceress Sellen']['Miranda Sprout', 'Giant Miranda Sprout']['Mad Pumpkin Head']Waypoint Ruins consists of a group of broken buildings and abandoned campsites, now overrun with Miranda sprouts and their crazed caretaker.0
87Ailing Villagehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ailing-village-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Arteria Leaf', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Eye of Yelough', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Golden Rune (1)', 'Mushroom', 'Sacred Tear', 'Flame Crest Wooden Shield', 'The Flame of Frenzy']nan['Frenzied Villager', 'Giant Rat', 'Lesser Alabaster Lord']nanA small, abandoned village nestled within a forested area north of the Castle Morne Rampart. This village is host to long-dilapidated dwellings, inhabited only by maddened fanatics gripped by the Flame of Frenzy.0
88Bridge of Sacrificehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bridge-of-sacrifice-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Smoldering Butterfly', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Herba', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Bolt', "Lordsworn's Bolt", 'Stonesword Key', "Irina's Letter"]['Irina']['Soldier', 'Godrick Soldier']nanA busy bridge swarming with iron-clad foes. Be prepared to engage in an array of melee, ranged and artillery attacks or attempt to push past them.0
89Callu Baptismal Churchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/callu_baptismal_church-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Eye of Yelough', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Sacred Tear', 'The Flame of Frenzy']nan['Rat', 'Giant Rat', 'Frenzied Villager']nanA dilapidated church, presumably frequented by the former residents of Ailing Village. Now it lies in ruin, its congregation replaced by a family of mutant vermin feasting on the remains of unfortunate travelers.0
90Castle Mornehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/castle-mourne-locationpreview-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Fire Grease', 'Fire Grease', 'Pickled Turtle Neck', 'Throwing Dagger', 'Rune Arc', 'Smoldering Butterfly', 'Smoldering Butterfly', 'Tarnished Golden Sunflower', 'Sanctuary Stone', 'Thin Beast Bones', 'Golden Rune (2)', 'Golden Rune (2)', 'Golden Rune (1)', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Smithing Stone (2)', 'Claymore', 'Claymore', 'Grafted Blade Greatsword', 'Steel-Wire Torch', 'Whip', 'Iron Cleaver', 'Bolt', 'Bolt', "Lordsworn's Bolt", 'Pumpkin Helm', 'Pumpkin Helm', 'Sacrificial Twig', 'Sacrificial Twig', 'Twinblade Talisman', 'Stonesword Key', 'Stonesword Key', 'Furlcalling Finger Remedy', 'Furlcalling Finger Remedy']['Edgar']['Giant Rat', 'Soldier', 'Rotten Stray', 'Misbegotten', 'Skeletal Slime', 'Spirit Jellyfish', 'Godrick Soldier', 'Lesser Mad Pumpkin Head']['Leonine Misbegotten']I've escaped from Castle Morne, to the south. The servants there...have rebelled. Irina0
91Church of Pilgrimagehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church-of-pilgrimage-location-eldenring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Mushroom', 'Blood Grease', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Herba', 'Ruin Fragment', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Tarnished Golden Sunflower', 'Golden Centipede', 'Sacred Tear', 'Gilded Iron Shield', 'Warhawk Ashes']['Melina ']['Eagle', 'Sheep', 'Skeleton', 'Skeletal Bandit', 'Springhare']nanThe Church of Pilgrimage is a broken building situated at the top of the cliff in the north of the Weeping Peninsula. Even with the walls and roof destroyed pilgrims still make the journey to visit this church.0
92Demi-Human Forest Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/demi-human-forest-ruins-weeping-peninsula-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Arteria Leaf', 'Gold-Tinged Excrement', "Trina's Lily", 'Poisonbloom', 'Shield of the Guilty', "Demi-Human Queen's Staff", 'Crystal Burst', 'Faith-knot Crystal Tear']nan['Demi-Human', 'Demi-Human Queen']nanDemi-Humans congregate here to worship their queen. Defeating her will reward players with the Demi-Human Queen's Staff, which is excellent for beginner mages.0
93Earthbore Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/earthbore-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Cave Moss', 'Silver Firefly', "Trina's Lily", 'Pickled Turtle Neck', 'Kukri', 'Glowstone', 'Golden Rune [1]', 'Smoldering Butterfly', 'Spelldrake Talisman']nan['Rat', 'Giant Rat']['Runebear']Earthbore Cave is a small dark cave on the side of the Cliffside between Limgrave and Weeping Peninsula. One might be able to hear the squeaks of rats and the snoring of a large beast deep within if you listen closely.0
94Forest Lookout Towerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/forest-lookout-tower-weeping-peninsula-location-elden-ring-wiki-300px-min-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Smoldering Butterfly', 'Hand Ballista', 'Ballista Bolt']['NPCs']['Miranda Sprout', 'Soldier', 'Rotten Stray']nanA run-down tower built on the edge of the cliffs of the Weeping Peninsula, located west of the Bridge of Sacrifice.0
95Fourth Church of Marikahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fourth_church_of_marika_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Rowa Fruit', 'Sacred Tear']nan['Mausoleum Soldier']nanThe ruins of a lonely church, sitting atop a plateau west of the peninsula. Despite its current state, the altar remains intact and ghostly knights still roam the fields nearby, perhaps restless and duty-bound to safeguarding the area...0
96Impaler's Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/impalers-catacombs-entrance-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Grave Violet', 'Grave Glovewort (1)', 'Grave Glovewort (2)', 'Ghost Glovewort (2)', 'Prattling Pate "Please help"', 'Demi-Human Ashes']nan['Imp', 'Putrid Corpse']['Erdtree Burial Watchdog']The Impaler's Catacombs are found in the east side of the Weeping Peninsula. Once used to store the bodies of the dead, it is now crawling with Imps.0
97Isolated Merchant's Shack Weeping Peninsulahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/isolated_merchant_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Arteria Leaf', 'Herba', 'Arrow', 'Ballista Bolt', 'Bolt', 'Great Arrow', 'Sacrificial Twig', 'Zweihander', 'Lantern', 'Lost Ashes of War', 'Info: Walking Mausoleum', 'Stonesword Key']['Isolated Merchant']nannanFound at the western edge of the Weeping Peninsula, this lonesome hut is home to but a single person who has long adapted to a life of seclusion.0
98Minor Erdtree (Weeping Peninsula)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/minor-erdtree-weeping-peninsula-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min-min-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Tarnished Golden Sunflower', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Mushroom', 'Sanctuary Stone', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Sliver of Meat', 'Golden Rune (6)', 'Opaline Bubbletear', 'Crimsonburst Crystal Tear']nan['Sheep', 'Turtle', 'Demi-Human', 'Guardian', 'Giant Bat', 'Crimson Teardrop Scarab', 'Chanting Winged Dame']['Erdtree Avatar']One of the large Erdtree's found in the Weeping Peninsula. An Erdtree Avatar charges at those who approach0
99Morne Tunnelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/morne-tunnel-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Soft Cotton', 'Arteria Leaf', 'Exalted Flesh', 'Golden Rune [2]', 'Golden Rune [4', 'Stanching Boluses', 'Large Glintstone Scrap', 'Smithing Stone [1]', 'Somber Smithing Stone [1]', 'Rusted Anchor']['NPCs']['Miner', 'Misbegotten']['Scaly Misbegotten']A dark and hidden tunnel that is inhabited by Misbegottens and Miners.0
100Oridys's Risehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/oridyss-rise-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Memory Stone']nannannanA lone observation tower atop a plateau in the east of the Weeping Peninsula. Long since abandoned, the entrance is barred by a seal, presenting travelers with a small challenge.0
101Tombsward Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tombsward-catacombs-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Grave Violet', 'Human Bone Shard', 'Golden Rune [2]', 'Grave Glovewort [1]', '\xa0 ', 'Ghost Gloveworth [1]', "Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [9]", 'Lhutel the Headless', 'Prattling Pate "Thank you"']nan['Grossmesser']['Cemetery Shade']The Tombsward Catacombs are hidden inside the mountain near the Minor Erdtree in the Weeping Peninsula. Once filled with the bodies of the dead, armed skeletons now rise to chase away those that wish to explore its depths.0
102Tombsward Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tombsward-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min-min-min-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Cave Moss', 'Poisonbloom', 'x1 Arteria Leaf', 'x1 Immunizing Cured Meat', 'Golden Rune [2]', 'Poisonbone Dart', 'Furlcalling Finger Remedy', 'Viridian Amber Medallion', "Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [8]"]nan['Miranda Sprout', 'Servant of Rot', 'Rat', 'Giant Rat', 'Skeletal Slime']['Miranda the Blighted Bloom']Hidden cave in the forest teeming with poison-filled creatures.0
103Tombsward Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tombsward-ruins-weeping-peninsula-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Beast Liver', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Rowa Fruit', "Trina's Lily", 'Winged Scythe', 'Page Hood']nan['Rat', 'Page']nanThe ruins of a former burial ground. Next to nothing remains here, yet squires still roam the dark tunnels beneath. Perhaps protecting the graves of their former noble masters...0
104Tower of Returnhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tower-of-return-weeping-peninsula-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Great Dragonfly Head', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Bolt']nan['Wandering Nobles', 'Godrick Foot Soldier', 'Godrick Soldier', 'Godrick Knight']nanA dilapidated tower guarded by foot soldiers and mounted cavalry. Makeshift wooden platforms and ladders line the inside of the tower, allowing it to retain some function as a lookout point and a mount for ballistae.0
105Weeping Evergaolhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/weeping_gaol_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Tarnished Golden Sunflower', "Radagon's Scarseal"]nannan['Ancient Hero of Zamor']An evergaol located on the western landmass of the Weeping Peninsula. A formidable opponent is imprisoned within.0
106Witchbane Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/witchbane_ruins_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Erdleaf Flower', 'Great Dragonfly Head', 'Poisonbloom', 'Ambush Shard', 'Marionette Soldier Set', 'Spiked Spear']['Sorceress Sellen', 'Witch-Hunter Jerren']['Marionette Soldier', 'School of Graven Mages']nanA set of ruins found in western Weeping Peninsula. Overgrown with thick shrubs and poisonous pools, this decrepit landmark invites only misery and dread.0
107Academy Crystal Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/academy-crystal-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Budding Cave Moss', 'Crystal Cave Moss', 'Cave Moss', 'Cuckoo Glintstone', 'Rune Arc', 'Silver Firefly', 'Crystal Release', 'Terra Magica', 'Crystal Staff', 'Stonesword Key']nan['Giant Rat', 'Glintstone Sorcerer', 'Twinsage Sorcerer', 'Battlemage']['Crystalians']The depths of the Raya Lucaria Academy are rich in rose-tinted crystals, imbued with the natural magic of the area.0
108Academy Gate Townhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/academy-gate-town-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Rainbow Stone', "Trina's Lily", 'Arteria Leaf', 'Glintstone Firefly', 'Smithing Stone (2)', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (2)', 'Golden Seed', 'Map (Liurnia, North)', 'Ash of War: Charge Forth', "Glintstone Craftsman's Cookbook [4]"]['Finger Reader Crone', 'Diallos']['Albinauric', 'Marionette Soldier', 'Raya Lucaria Soldier', 'Land Squirt', 'Teardrop Scarab']nanThe sunken remains of the academy town.0
109Ainsel River Wellhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ainsel-river-well-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakesnannan['Golem']nanA small structure housing a lift that takes you down to the Ainsel River.0
110Artist's Shack (Liurnia of the Lakes)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/artist's_shack_locations_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Golden Rune [1]', 'Smithing Stone [4]', 'Resurrection Painting']nan['Leyndell Knight']nanA small cabin at North Liurnia of The Lakes. Its strongly perceived tranquility seems overshadowed by oblivion.0
111Bellum Churchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bellum_church_location_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Golden Centipede', 'Sacred Tear', 'Nightrider Glaive', 'Ash of War: Giant Hunt']['Hyetta', 'Nomadic Merchant North Liurnia of the Lakes']nan["Night's Cavalry"]Located past the ruins and the forested area guarded by Cuckoo Knights.0
112Bellum Highwayhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bellum-highway-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-exterior-min-min.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Rune Arc', 'Golden Centipede', 'Sacred Tear', 'Nightrider Glaive', 'Ash of War: Giant Hunt']['Hyetta', 'Nomadic Merchant\xa0']['Mausoleum Knight']["Night's Cavalry"]Outside the East Raya Lucaria Gate0
113Black Knife Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black-knife-catacombs-entrance-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Grave Violet', 'Crab Eggs', 'Spellproof Dried Liver', 'Rune Arc', 'Root Resin', 'Grave Glovewort (2)', 'Grave Glovewort (3)', 'Grave Glovewort (4)', "Assassin's Cerulean Dagger", "Rosus' Axe", 'Black Knifeprint', 'Twinsage Sorcerer Ashes', 'Deathroot']nan['Skeleton', 'Crab', 'Giant Crab', 'Necromancer']['Black Knife Assassin', 'Cemetery Shade']The dreaded catacombs holds many skeletons that can revive until properly killed, but also holds the Black Knifeprint, a key item in a certain quest.0
114Boilprawn Shackhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/boilprawn_shack_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Boiled Prawn', "Rya's Necklace", 'Gesture']['Blackguard Big Boggart']nannanSmall run-down shack in the swamps of Liurnia. The Blackguard is said to reside here, cooking prawns.0
115Caria Manorhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/caria_manor_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Crystal Bud', 'Golden Rune (4)', 'Herba', "Miquella's Lily", 'Mushroom', 'Magic Grease', 'Rune Arc', 'Rimed Crystal Bud', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Golden Seed', 'Smithing Stone (3)', 'Smithing Stone (4)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (3)', 'Carian Piercer', 'Crystal Dart', 'Ice Crest Shield', 'Sword of Night and Flame', 'Urumi', "Loretta's Greatbow", 'Ash of War: Carian Grandeur', "Ash of War: Loretta's Slash", 'Cracked Pot', "Glintstone Craftsman's Cookbook (6)", 'Stonesword Key']['Pidia, Carian Servant']['Abductor Virgin', 'Direwolf', 'Lazuli Sorcerer', 'Fingercreeper', 'Giant Crab', 'Lesser Fingercreeper', 'Living Jar', 'Page', 'Raya Lucaria Soldiers', 'Troll Knight']['Royal Knight Loretta']A large estate situated far to the north of Liurnia. Heavily guarded by all manner of creatures as well as its eternal warden, the spectral Royal Knight Loretta.0
116Carian Study Hallhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/8ef42fdc-7aba-4cb4-8906-15ad073dfc1f.pngLiurnia of the Lakes['Golden Rune [3]', 'Holyproof Dried Liver', 'Glintstone Firefly', 'Cerulean Seed Talisman', 'Carian Glintstone Staff', 'Mask of Confidence']nan['Lesser Fingercreeper']['Preceptor Miriam']A large library-like location full of spectres and magic users that leads to the Divine Tower of Liurnia. Using the Carian Inverted Statue unlocks an alternative version of the map.0
117Cathedral of Manus Celeshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cathedral_of_manus_celes-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-exterior-min.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Dragon Heart', 'Starlight Shards', "Adula's Moonblade", 'Dark Moon Greatsword']['Ranni the Witch']nan['Glintstone Dragon Adula']A large church atop the southern plateau of Liurnia. Ranni awaits her lord in the depths of the church, guarded by her loyal Dragon.0
118Chelona's Risehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/chelona's_rise-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-exterior-min.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Rowa Fruit', 'Smithing Stone (7)', 'Smithing Stone (8)', "Ranni's Dark Moon"]nan['Crystalian', 'Deer', 'Lesser Red Wolf of Radagon', 'Turtle']nanA tower overlooking the southwestern-most tip of Liurnia of the lakes.0
119Church of Inhibitionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church-of-inhibition-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Eye of Yelough', 'Gold-Tinged Excrement', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Sacred Tear', 'Finger Maiden Fillet', 'Finger Maiden Robe', 'Finger Maiden Shoes']['White Mask Varre']['Festering Fingerprint Vyke (Invader)']nanThe remnants of an old church in the north of Liurnia, just before the Altus Plateau.0
120Church of Irithhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church_of_irith_locaiton_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Mushroom', 'Warming Stone', 'Sacred Tear', "Ash of War: Thops's Barrier"]['Thops']['Teardrop Scarab']nanA peaceful church at the back of Stormveil Castle.0
121Church of Vowshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church_of_vows_locations_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Golden Tailoring Tools', 'Gold Sewing Needle', 'Magic Glintblade', 'Carian Greatsword', "Blessing's Boon"]['Miriel, Pastor of Vows']nan['Bell Bearing Hunter']It is here, at the Church of Vows, that the great houses of the Erdtree and the Moon were joined by the matrimonial bond between red-haired Radagon and Rennala of the Full Moon. That is why it holds in view the monuments of both houses, the Erdtree of the Capital and the Academy of Raya Lucaria.0
122Cliffbottom Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cliffbottom-catacombs-entrance-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Grave Violet', 'Root Resin', 'Hefty Beast Bone', 'Grave Glovewort (2)', 'Grave Glovewort (3)', 'Ghost Glovewort (3)', 'Nox Mirrorhelm', 'Scythe', 'Warped Axe', 'Rune Arc', 'Prattling Pate "Wonderful"', 'Page Ashes', 'Kaiden Sellsword Ashes']nan['Imp', 'Omen']['Erdtree Burial Watchdog']Catacombs found at the bottom of the cliffs in the eastern side of the Liurnia of the Lakes region, now infested by Imps and Omens0
123Converted Fringe Towerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/converted-fringe-tower-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Eye of Yelough', "Miquella's Lily", 'Mushroom', 'Crystal Dart', 'Cannon of Haima', 'Gavel of Haima']nan['School of Graven Mages']nanA tower found on the fringe in the northeastern tip of Liurnia.0
124Converted Towerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/converted_tower_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300x.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Cuckoo Glintstone', 'Magic Grease', 'Memory Stone']nannannanAn abandoned tower overlooking the lakes from the southwest.0
125Cuckoo's Evergaolhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cuckoos_evergaol_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Greatblade Phalanx']nan['Lookout Stones']['Bols, Carian Knight']Evergaol located on the western landmass of Liurnia. A powerful knight stirs within.0
126Deep Ainsel Wellhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/deep-ainsel-well-locations-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpgLiurnia of the LakesnannannannanA deep well leading to the Moonlight Altar from the underground Grand Cloister.0
127Divine Tower of Liurniahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/divine-tower-of-liurnia-locations-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Stargazer Heirloom', 'Godskin Noble Hood', 'Godskin Noble Robe', 'Godskin Noble Bracelets', 'Godskin Noble Trousers', 'Cursemark of Death']nannan['Godskin Noble']A long bridge leads to the nearly empty Tower of Liurnia where a corpse lies at the peak.0
128Frenzied Flame Villagehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frenzied_flame_village-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Eye of Yelough', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Crystal Bud', "Shabriri's Woe", 'Howl of Shabriri', "Frenzied's Cookbook (1)", 'Stonesword Key']nan['Frenzied Villager', 'Raya Lucaria Knight', 'Festering Fingerprint Vyke']nanA village in Liurnia gripped in the madness of Three Fingers. Its denizens know nothing but the fiery frenzy burning within them.0
129Frenzy-Flaming Towerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frenzy-flaming-tower-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Howl of Shabriri']nan['Frenzied Villager', 'Giant Rat', 'Rats']nanA tower in north-east Liurnia of the Lakes, atop which is a giant flame causing madness in the surrounding area.0
130Grand Lift of Dectushttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grand_lift_of_dectus_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Great Mace', 'Stonesword Key']nannannanA massive lift platform found between Liurnia and the Altus Plateau. The mechanism that operates the lift is barred by four Guardian Statues, requiring the brandishing of a special artifact for them to release their hold.0
131Highway Lookout Tower Liurnia of the Lakeshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/highway_lookout_tower-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min-min.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Golden Rune [4]', 'Carian Glintblade Staff', "Glintstone Craftsman's Cookbook (3)"]nan['Godrick Knight', 'Noble Sorcerer', 'Twinsage Sorcerer']nanA lone tower overlooking the Liurnia main road on the eastern landmass.0
132Jarburghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/jarburg-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Arteria Leaf ', 'Crystal Bud', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Eye of Yelough', 'Golden Rune [1]', 'Golden Rune [2]', 'Golden Rune [3]', 'Golden Rune [6]', 'Grave Violet', 'Herba', 'Living Jar Shard', "Miquella's Lily", 'Mushroom', "Numen's Rune", 'Poisonbloom', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Tarnished Golden Sunflower', "Trina's Lily", 'Smithing Stone (3)', "Hoslow's Petal Whip", "Diallos's Mask", 'Companion Jar', 'Cracked Pot', 'Ritual Pot']['Jar Bairn', 'Diallos']['Living Jar']nanA peaceful village hidden on the side of a cliff. It is home to many friendly Jars, who only wish to be left alone.0
133Kingsrealm Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/kingsrealm_ruins_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Rowa Fruit', 'Mushroom', 'Rimed Crystal Bud\xa0 ', 'Frozen Needle']['Kingsrealm Spirit']['Lone Wolf', 'Wandering Nobles']['Royal Revenant']A ruined area, only seemingly bare.0

154Slumbering Wolf's Shackhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/slumbering-wolfs-shack-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes["Trina's Lily", 'Rune Arc']['Latenna']nannanA small shack nestled at the side of a cliff, only accessible through a long winding cave system. 155Stillwater Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/stillwater_cave_location_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Golden Rune (5)', 'Golden Rune (6)', 'Cave Moss', 'Budding Cave Moss', 'Crystal Cave Moss', 'Toxic Mushroom', 'Sage Hood', 'Sage Robe', 'Sage Trousers', 'Serpent Arrow', 'Winged Sword Insignia']nan['Giant Bat', 'Giant Miranda Sprout', 'Miranda Sprout', 'Servant of Rot']['Cleanrot Knight']A dark and murky cave beset by a poisonous miasma. 156Temple Quarterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/temple-quarter-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min-min-min.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Bloodrose', 'Icerind Hatchet']['NPCs']['Albinauric']nanRuined by the breaking, the Temple Quarter is now overrun with dangerous creatures, ready to attack any who come near0
157Testu's Risehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/testus_rise_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Bloodrose', 'Mushroom', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Smithing Stone [2]', 'Memory Stone']nan['Skeleton', 'Turtle']nanAn observation tower found in the middle of a lone isle in Liurnia. 158The Four Belfrieshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/d0d26f10-73a9-4213-9838-bce38e7ec370.pngLiurnia of the Lakes['Imbued Sword Key']nan['Troll Spirit Knight']nanAs its name suggests, The Four Belfries is a hill with four large bell towers overlooking Liurnia from the west. 159Village of the Albinauricshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/village_of_the_albinaurics_1.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Mushroom', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Rune Arc', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Albinauric Bloodclot', 'Budding Cave Moss', 'Ivory Sickle', 'Crystal Sword', 'Stormhawk Axe', 'Crucible Knot Talisman', 'Larval Tear', 'Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right)']['Albus', 'Nepheli Loux']['Depraved Perfumer', 'First-Generation Albinauric', 'Rotten Stray']['Omenkiller']The cursemongers have destroyed the home of the old Albinaurics, but perhaps hope is not lost for them to find their promised land.0

161Caelid Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/caelid-catacombs-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min-min.jpegCaelid['Grave Violet', 'Root Resin', 'Ghost Glovewort [3]', 'Ghost Glovewort [4]', 'Grave Glovewort [3]', 'Grave Glovewort [4]', 'Grave Glovewort [5]', 'Miranda Sprout Ashes ', 'Kindred of Rot Ashes']nan['Miranda Sprout', 'Giant Miranda Sprout', 'Skeletons']['Cemetery Shade']A labyrinth of Scarlet Rot-soaked floors and tunnels.0

183War-Dead Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/war-dead-catacombs-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgCaelid['Grave Violet', "Trina's Lily", 'Ghost Glovewort [4]', 'Golden Seed', 'Grave Glovewort [6]', 'Collapsing Stars', 'Golden Rune [6]', 'Magic Grease', 'Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot', 'Radahn Soldier Ashes', 'Redmane Knight Ogha Ashes']nan['Lesser Cleanrot Knight', 'Radahn Soldier', 'Redmane Knight', 'Imp']['Putrid Tree Spirit']Tombs for those who have perished in battle, endlessly clashing even as spirits.0
184Altus Tunnelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/altus_tunnel_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgAltus Plateau['Rune Arc', 'Cracked Crystal', 'Arteria Leaf', 'Golden Rune (7)', 'Smithing Stone (5)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (5)', "Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing (2)", 'Crystal Dart', 'Arsenal Charm +1']nan['Avionette Soldier', 'Crystal Snail', 'Glintstone Miner', 'Malformed Star']['Crystalian (Spear)', 'Crystalian (Ringblade)']The Altus tunnels were once used to supply the lands with quality crystals0
185Dominula, Windmill Villagehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/windmill_village_locations_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgAltus Plateau['Human Bone Shard', 'Stormhawk Feather', 'Gold firefly', 'Holyproof Dried Liver', 'Lightning Grease', 'Golden Seed', 'Rune Arc', 'Festive Hood', 'Festive Garb', 'Festive Garb (Altered)', 'Blue Festive Hood', 'Blue Festive Garb', "Celebrant's Skull", "Celebrant's Cleaver", "Celebrant's Sickle", "Celebrant's Rib-Rake", 'Godskin Peeler', 'Scouring Black Flame', "Fire's Deadly Sin"]['Millicent']['Celebrant', 'Rotten Stray']['Godskin Apostle']Located in northern Altus Plateau, many have heard ominous laughter from the locals, who dance as a part of their festival.0
186East Windmill Pasturehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/east-windmill-pasture-location_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px-min-min.jpegAltus Plateau["Noble's Set", 'Navy Hood', "Noble's Traveling Garb", "Noble's Gloves", "Noble's Trousers", 'Twinned Knight Swords']nan['Celebrant', 'Putrid Corpse']nanEast Pasture Outskirsts of Windmill Village. True to its name, it can be identified by the still-working windmill placed in the center of the pasture.0
187Golden Lineage Evergaolhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/golden-lineage-evergaol-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min.jpegAltus Plateau['Godfrey Icon']['Godefroy the Grafted']['Abnormal Stone Cluster']['Godefroy the Grafted']Found near the Grand Lift of Dectus, this prison contains a member of the Golden Lineage, imprisoned for the grotesque act of Grafting.0
188Grand Lift of Dectushttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grand_lift_of_dectus_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgAltus Plateau['Great Mace', 'Stonesword Key']nannannanA massive lift platform found between Liurnia and the Altus Plateau. The mechanism that operates the lift is barred by four Guardian Statues, requiring the brandishing of a special artifact for them to release their hold.0
189Highway Lookout Tower Altus Plateauhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/view-highway-lookout-tower-altus-plateau-01-elden-ring-wiki-600px.jpgAltus Plateau['Hefty Beast Bone', 'Greatbow']nan['Leyndell Knight', 'Soldier']nanA lookout tower in Altus Plateau, overlooking the main road leading up to the northwestern entrance of the Capital Outskirts.0
190Lux Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lux_ruins1200x.pngAltus Plateau['Rainbow Stone', 'String', 'Glowstone', 'Rickety Shield', 'Falchion', 'Ash of War: Shield Crash', 'Ritual Sword Talisman']nan['Demi-Human', 'Lesser Demi-Human Chief']['Demi-Human Queen Gilika']Long forgotten ruins among golden trees, swarmed with demi-humans protecting the underground chamber.0
191Minor Erdtree (Altus Plateau)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/minor-erdtree-altus-plateau-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300p.jpegAltus Plateau['Tarnished Golden Sunflower', 'Golden Seed', 'Crimsonspill Crystal Tear', 'Speckled Hardtear']nan['Guardian']['Wormface']A Minor Erdtree found in central Altus Plateau. An air of perpetual gloom permeates the area.0
192Mirage Risehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mimrage-rise-location_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px-min-min.jpegAltus Plateau['Slumbering Egg', 'Altus Bloom', 'Unseen Blade', 'Unseen Form', 'Mirage Riddle']nan['Fanged Imp', 'Springhare']nanAn area with a mystic glow. Adventurers who solve the riddle and touch the Phantom Crests found across the fields will unveil the Mirage Rise and reap its rewards.0
193Old Altus Tunnelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/old_altus_tunnel_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgAltus Plateau['Cracked Crystal', 'Golden Rune [6]', 'Stanching Boluses', 'Smithing Stone [5]', 'Somber Smithing Stone [4]', 'Somber Smithing Stone [5]', 'Somber Smithing Stone [6]', 'Boltdrake Talisman', 'Great Club', "Troll's Hammer"]nan['Leyndell Knight', 'Miner', 'Rotten Stray', 'Wandering Nobles']['Stonedigger Troll']An old mining site, still active to this day. Its tunnels echo with the grunts and groans of the commoners, tirelessly slaving away, grinding at the rich reservoir of crystals deep within.0
194Perfumer's Grottohttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/perfumers-grotto-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegAltus Plateau['Budding Cave Moss', 'Crystal Cave Moss', 'Living Jar Shard', 'Silver Firefly', 'Perfume Bottle', 'Arteria Leaf', 'Miranda Powder', 'Golden Rune [5]', 'Warming Stone', 'Great Omenkiller Cleaver', 'Perfumer Hood', 'Perfumer Robe', 'Perfumer Gloves', 'Perfumer Sarong']nan['Perfumer', 'Giant Poison Flower', 'Malformed Star', 'Poison Flowers']['Omenkiller', 'Miranda the Blighted Bloom']The perfumers of the Altus Plateau tend for their gardens, even when they are blighted beyond recovery0

196Sage's Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sages-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegAltus Plateau['Budding Cave Moss', 'Crystal Cave Moss', 'Rejuvinating Boluses', 'Nascent Butterfly', 'Dragonwound Grease', 'Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot', 'Black Hood', 'Candletree Wooden Shield', 'Golden Great Arrow', 'Raptor Talons', "Raptor's Black Feathers", 'Skeletal Mask', 'Family Heads', 'Concealing Veil', 'Stonesword Key']nan['Skeletal Bandit']['Black Knife Assassin', 'Necromancer Garris']Sage's Cave is a dark opening in the side of a mountain. 197Sainted Hero's Gravehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sainted_hero's_grave_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgAltus Plateau['Root Resin', 'Grave Violet', 'Ghost Glovewort [4]', 'Sacrificial Twig', 'Ghost Glovewort [4]', 'Ghost Glovewort [5]', 'Grave Glovewort [3]', 'Grave Glovewort [4]', 'Grave Glovewort [5]', 'Black Knife', 'Dragoncrest Shield Talisman +1', 'Crimson Seed Talisman', 'Leyndell Soldier Ashes', 'Ancient Dragon Knight Kristoff Ashes']nan['Imp', 'Putrid Corpse', 'Wraith Caller', 'Revenant', 'Grave Warden Duelist']['Ancient Hero of Zamor']An ominous grave, found at central Altus Plateau0

201Unsightly Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/unsightly-catacombs-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegAltus Plateau['Grave Violet', 'Ghost Glovewort [5]', 'Grave Glovewort [4]', 'Grave Glovewort [5]', 'Prattling Pate "Apologies"', 'Rune Arc', 'Winged Misbegotten Ashes', 'Perfumer Tricia Ashes']nan['Misbegotten', 'Omen']['Perfumer Tricia']A burial grounds crawling with Misbegotten creatures found deep beneath the Perfumer's Ruins. 232Bestial Sanctumhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bestial-sanctuary-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgDragonbarrow['Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone', 'Beastclaw Greathammer', 'Bestial Sling', 'Bestial Vitality', 'Clawmark Seal', "Gargoyle's Blackblade", "Gargoyle's Black Halberd", 'Stone of Gurranq', 'Dragoncrest Shield Talisman', 'Cinquedea', "Ash of War: Beast's Roar", 'Beast Eye']['Gurranq, Beast Clergyman', 'Clawmark Seal', 'Bestial Sling', 'Bestial Vitality', "Ash of War: Beast's Roar", 'Beast Claw', 'Stone of Gurranq', 'Beastclaw Greathammer', "Gurranq's Beast Claw", 'Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone']nan['Black Blade Kindred', 'Gurranq']The Bestial Sanctum is a refuge for Gurranq, Beast Clergyman, who feeds on Deathroot. 264Hidden Path to the Haligtreehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/hidden_path_to_the_haligtree_locations_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgConsecrated Snowfield['Warming Stone', 'Freezing Grease', 'Grave Glovewort [9]', 'Silver Scarab', 'Spelldrake Talisman +2', 'Blackflame Monk Amon Ashes', 'Deathroot']nan['Giant Land Octopus', 'Land Octopus', 'Vulgar Militiamen']['Stray Mimic Tear']The secret passage leading to the Haligtree has been overrun by the Vulgar Militia, seeking to ambush any who try to cross.0
265Minor Erdtree (Consecrated Snowfield)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/minor-erdtree-snowfield-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min-min.jpegConsecrated Snowfield['Arteria Leaf', 'Rimed Crystal Bud', 'Rimed Rowa', 'Tarnished Golden Sunflower', "Trina's Lily", 'Warming Stone', 'Thorny Cracked Tear', 'Ruptured Crystal Tear']nan['Guardian', 'Teardrop Scarab']['Putrid Avatar']A Minor Erdtree enveloped in corruption, standing in the blizzards of the Consecrated Snowfield.0
266Miquella's Haligtreehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Monster-Hunter-World/thumbnails/mhws.pngLegacy Dungeons['Pearldrake Talisman +2', 'Viridian Amber Medallion +2', 'Dappled Cured Meat', 'Fire Grease', 'Flaming Bolt', 'Golden Rune (10)', 'Golden Rune (12)', 'Golden Rune (13)', "Hero's Rune (4)", "Numen's Rune", 'Preserving Boluses', 'Rot Grease', 'Warming Stones', 'Envoy Crown', 'Aeonian Butterfly', 'Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone', 'Lost Ashes of War', 'Sacramental Bud', 'Smithing Stone (6)', 'Smithing Stone (7)', 'Smithing Stone (8)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (8)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (9)', 'Iron Cleaver', 'Iron Greatsword', 'Grave Glovewort (1)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (7)', "Loretta's Mastery", "Loretta's War Sickle", "Envoy's Greathorn", 'Prattling Pate "My Beloved"', 'Stonesword Key']nan['Battlemage', 'Giant Ant', 'Giant Miranda Sprout', 'Lesser Spirit-Caller Snail', 'Misbegotten', 'Oracle Envoy', 'Large Oracle Envoy ', 'Giant Oracle Envoy', 'Miranda Sprout', 'Putrid Corpse', 'Teardrop Scarab']['Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree']A Legacy Dungeon in Elden Ring. Miquella's Haligtree is found far to the north of the Consecrated Snowfield and the entire Lands Between.0
267Ordina, Liturgical Townhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ordina,_liturgical_town_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgConsecrated Snowfield['Nascent Butterfly', 'Freezing Grease', 'Golden Rune (10)', 'Invigorating Cured Meat', 'Ghost Glovewort (9)', 'Black Knife Hood', 'Black Knife Armor', 'Black Knife Gauntlets', 'Black Knife Greaves']nan['Albinauric Wolfback Archer', 'Lesser Black Knife Assassin']nanA long abandoned town in the snowfield. 52Roundtable Holdhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/roundtable-hold-hub-location-preview-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegMain Hub['weapon', "Baldachin's Blessing", "Crepus's Black-Key Crossbow", "Assassin's Prayerbook", 'Cipher Pata', "Taunter's Tongue", 'Prayer Gesture', 'What Do You Want? Gesture', 'Curtsy Gesture', 'Reverential Bow Gesture']['Gideon Ofnir', 'Corhyn', 'Diallos', 'Roderika', 'D, Hunter of the Dead', 'Smithing Master\xa0Hewg', 'Fia', 'Nepheli Loux', 'Sorcerer Rogier', 'Enia', 'Ensha', 'Twin Maiden Husks', 'Dung Eater']nan['Mad Tongue Alberich', 'Ensha']The bustling hub area that exists outside of the Lands Between. A place to mingle with other adventurerers, craftsmen, resupply and discover a trove of blessings and rooms of secrets.0
53Artist's Shack (Limgrave)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/view-artists-shack-limgrave-01-elden-ring-wiki-600px.jpgLimgrave['Erdleaf Flower', 'Gold-Tinged Excrement', 'Mushroom', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Smithing Stone [1]', 'Homing Instinct Painting']nan['Springhare']nanA small cabin in Limgrave. Its strongly perceived tranquility seems overshadowed by oblivion.0
54Bridge of Sacrificehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bridge-of-sacrifice-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Smoldering Butterfly', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Herba', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Bolt', "Lordsworn's Bolt", 'Stonesword Key', "Irina's Letter"]['Irina']['Soldier', 'Godrick Soldier']nanA busy bridge swarming with iron-clad foes. Be prepared to engage in an array of melee, ranged and artillery attacks or attempt to push past them.0
55Chapel of Anticipationhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/chapel-of-anticipation-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Golden Beast Crest Shield', 'Ornamental Straight Sword', 'Gesture', "Tarnished's Wizened Finger", 'Stormhawk Deenh', 'The Stormhawk King']nannan['Grafted Scion']The area where the start of a great adventure takes place, but not before getting ambushed by a difficult enemy.0
56Church of Dragon Communionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church-of-dragon-communion-2-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Herba', 'Mushroom', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Exalted Flesh', 'Great Dragonfly Head', 'Somber Smithing Stone (1)', 'Smithing Stone (2)', 'Dragonclaw', 'Dragonfire', 'Dragonmaw']nan['Guillemot', 'Spirit Jellyfish', 'Sheep', 'Springhare', 'Turtle']nanThe dilapidated remains of a church where many consume the hearts of Dragons in order to perform communion.0
57Church of Ellehhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church-of-elleh-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Rowa Fruit', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Smithing Stone [1]', 'Merchant Kale', 'Spirit Calling Bell', 'Lone Wolf Ashes']['Renna', 'Merchant Kalé']nan['Tree Sentinel']Church of Elleh is a ruined building that hides a Site of Grace. The rooftop has caved in and offers no protection from the elements, and weeds are overtaking the walls, but this doesn't stop merchants from seeking what little shelter is on offer.0
58Coastal Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dissenters-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Cave Moss', 'Silver Firefly', 'Land Octopus Ovary', 'Smoldering Butterfly', 'Sewing Needle', 'Tailoring Tools']['Boc', 'Nomadic Merchant West Limgrave']['Demi-Human']['Demi-Human Chief']Coastal Cave is a dark opening on the side of a cliff. Its mossy depths are overrun by hostile humanoid creatures, but those who brave it may find passage to new lands.0
59Deathtouched Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/deathtouched_catacombs_location_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300x.jpgLimgrave['Bloodrose', 'Grave Violet', 'Grave Glovewort (1)', "Assassin's Crimson Dagger", 'Uchigatana', 'Deathroot']nan['Skeleton']['Black Knife Assassin']Catacombs filled with the stench of death, Skeletons dwell in the shadows.0
60Divine Tower of Limgravehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/limgrave_divine_tower_locations_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgLimgrave['Stormhawk Feather', 'Flight Pinion', 'Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot', 'Soft Cotton', 'Boltdrake Talisman', 'Golem Greatbow', "Golem's Halberd", 'Ash-of-War Scarab', "Godrick's Great Rune"]nan['Golem', 'Eagles']nanClosed with a giant set of doors. It looks like you need some pieces to interact with the tower.0
61Dragon-Burnt Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragon-burnt-ruins-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Mushroom', 'Crab Eggs', 'Arteria Leaf', 'Poisonbloom', 'Golden Rune [1]', 'Golden Rune [2]', 'Great Dragonfly Head', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Twinblade', 'Dragon Heart', 'Stonesword Key']['Yura']['Giant Bat', 'Rat', 'Giant Rat', 'Dog', 'Rotten Stray', 'Wandering Nobles', 'Land Squirt', 'Giant Crab', 'Giant Dragonfly']['Flying Dragon Agheel']Dragon-Burnt Ruins are what remains of the housing area among Agheel Lake, long lost to the deadly attacks of the fierce Agheel Dragon0
62Forlorn Hound Evergaolhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/forlorn-hound-evergaol-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave["Bloodhound's Fang"]['Blaidd']['Abnormal Stone Cluster']['Bloodhound Knight Darriwil']The southern gaol of Limgrave holds a lone knight, who had abandoned his master, now forced to rot inside his cell.0
63Fort Haighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fort-haight-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegLimgrave['Golden Seed', 'Bloodrose', 'Smoldering Butterfly', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Chainlink Flail', 'Pumpkin Helm', 'Partisan', 'Godrick Knight Helm', 'Godrick Knight Armor', 'Godrick Knight Gauntlets', 'Godrick Knight Greaves', 'Erdsteel Dagger', "Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook (6)", 'Ash of War: Bloody Slash', 'Dectus Medallion (Left)']['Kenneth Haight']['Giant Rat', 'Godrick Knight', 'Lesser Mad Pumpkin Head']nanThe overrun fort of Kenneth Haith, the alleged next ruler of Limgrave.0
64Fringefolk Hero's Gravehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fringefolk-heros-grave-elden-ring-wiki-600px-min.jpegLimgrave['Golden Seed', 'Lightning Grease', 'Dragonwound Grease', 'Dragon Communion Seal', 'Erdtree Greatbow', "Erdtree's Favor", 'Banished Knight Oleg Ashes', 'Stonesword Key']nan['Chariot', 'Exile Soldier', 'Imp']['Ulcerated Tree Spirit', 'Grafted Scion']Fringefolk Hero's Grave is a dark and secluded location within the Cave of Knowledge. The confused and aimless dwell within.0
65Gatefront Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gatefront-ruins-300.jpgLimgrave['Herba', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Flail', 'Partisan', 'Godrick Knight Set', "Lordsworn's Greatsword", 'Gilded Greatshield', 'Map (Limgrave, West)', 'Ash of War: Storm Stomp', 'Whetstone Knife']nan['Wolf', 'Wandering Nobles', 'Godrick Soldier', 'Godrick Knight']['Tree Sentinel']Gatefront Ruins is what remains of the now destroyed barracks near the fortification. Despite its poor state, it is a heavily guarded location by those loyal to Stormveil.0
66Groveside Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/groveside-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Cave Moss', 'Glowstone', 'Silver Firefly', 'Mushroom', 'Flamedrake Talisman', 'Cracked Pot']nan['Wolf']['Beastman of Farum Azula']Groveside Cave is a small refuge for wildlife in Limgrave. Its proximity to water and ease of access make it a sought-after shelter against bad weather, but those who venture in don't seem to return.0
67Highroad Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/highroad-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Cave Moss', 'Silver Firefly', 'Fire Grease', 'Arteria Leaf', ' Golden Rune (1)', 'Golden Rune (4)', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Smithing Stone (2)', 'Shamshir', 'Blue Dancer Charm', 'Furlcalling Finger Remedy']['NPCs']['Wolf', 'Giant Bat', 'Land Octopus', 'Giant Land Octopus']['Guardian Golem']A cave that houses a tomb, deep within. It is situated at the northmost part of Limgrave. It has been inhabited by a pack of Wolves, Land Octopuses, and Giant Bats.0
68Limgrave Tunnelshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/limgrave-tunnels-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Glintstone Scrap', 'Large Glintstone Scrap', 'Golden Rune (1)', 'Golden Rune (4)', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (1)', 'Roar Medallion']nan['Giant Rat', 'Miner', 'Rotten Stray']['Stonedigger Troll']A deep tunnel used by many to mine smithing stones. Its zealous miners never dare to venture into its hidden chambers, for fear of the great Troll within.0
69Minor Erdtree (Mistwood)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/view-minor-erdtree-mistwood-01-elden-ring-wiki-600px.jpgLimgrave['Tarnished Golden Sunflower', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Ash of War: Ground Slam', 'Greenspill Crystal Tear', 'Spiked Cracked Tear']nan['Teardrop Scarab']nanEasily distiguished from the rest of the trees in Mistwood Forest.0
70Mistwoodhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mistwood-location-elden-ring-wiki-300px-min-min-min.jpegLimgrave['Bloodrose', 'Crab Eggs', 'Gold-Tinged Excrement', 'Land Octopus Ovary', 'Miranda Powder', 'Poisonbloom', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Sacrificial Twig', 'Strip of White Flesh', 'Tarnished Golden Sunflower', 'Thin Beast Bones', "Trina's Lily", 'Golden Seed', 'Greenspill Crystal Tear', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Smithing Stone (2)', 'Spiked Cracked Tear', 'Axe Talisman', 'Chainlink Flail', 'Erdsteel Dagger', "Armorer's Cookbook (3)", 'Ash of War: Bloody Slash', 'Ash of War: Ground Slam', 'Dectus Medallion (Left)', "Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook (4)", "Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook (5)", "Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook (6)"]['Kenneth Haight', 'Nomadic Merchant', 'Blaidd']['Bear', 'Demi-Human', 'Giant Miranda Sprout', 'Giant Rat', 'Godrick Knight', 'Godrick Soldier', 'Lesser Mad Pumpkin Head', 'Lesser Runebear', 'Lone Wolf', 'Miranda Sprout', 'Skeletal Militiamen', 'Skeleton Mage', 'Soldier', 'Troll']['Tibia Mariner', 'Ancestor Spirit', 'Dragonkin Soldier']Mistwood Map & FragmentsSites of Grace & Sub-LocationsAll NPCs & MerchantsAll Items, Equipment & MagicAll Enemies & Bosses0
71Mistwood Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mistwood-ruins-locations-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpgLimgrave['Smithing Stone [2]', 'Axe Talisman']nan['Lesser Runebear']nanConcealed by the thriving growth of vegetation, these ruins are kept out of sight by the veil of nature itself. But there's more to it than what you see.0
72Murkwater Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/murkwater-catacombs-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Root Resin', 'Grave Glovewort (1)', 'Ghost Glovewort (1)', 'Banished Knight Engvall Ashes']['Root Resin']['Cat Imp']['Grave Warden Duelist']An underground cemetery that is located at the north-east side of Agheel Lake in Limgrave. Once a place for peaceful rest for fallen heroes, it is now infested by goblins.0
73Murkwater Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/murkwater_cave_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300x.jpgLimgrave['Cave Moss', 'Mushroom', 'Golden Rune (1)', 'Cloth Garb', 'Cloth Trousers', 'Gesture', 'Gesture']['Patches']['Highwayman']['Patches']A dark cave halfway through the Murkwater River0
74Siofra River Wellhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/siofra-river-well-limgrave-location-elden-ring-wiki-300px-min-min-min.jpegLimgrave['Melted Mushroom', 'Rainbow Stone', 'Immunizing Cured Meat', 'Dewkissed Herba', 'Budding Horn', 'Silver Firefly', 'Beast Liver', 'Preserving Boluses', 'Crab Eggs', 'Gold-Pickled Fowl Foot', 'Smithing Stone (4)', 'Ghost Glovewort (1)', "Clayman's Harpoon", 'Golden Centipede', 'Soap', 'Furlcalling Finger Remedy', 'Map: Siofra River', 'Golden Rune (4)', "Armorer's Cookbook (6)"]nan['Clayman', 'Teardrop Scarab', 'Giant Crab', 'Giant Miranda Sprout', 'Miranda Sprout']['Ancestor Spirit']A mystical underground region filled with its own set of skies and stars. Beware, it is teeming with creatures big and small alike.0
75Starfall Craterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/view-starfall-crater-01-elden-ring-wiki-600px.jpgLimgravenannannannanA crater formed by the falling star upon the defeat of conqueror of the stars.0
76Stormfoot Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/stormfoot-catacombs-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Root Resin', 'Grave Violet', 'Smoldering Butterfly', 'Grave Glovewort [1]', 'Ghost Glovewort [1]', 'Prattling Pate Hello', 'Wandering Noble Ashes', 'Noble Sorcerer Ashes']['Root Resin', 'Grave Violet', 'Smoldering Butterfly']['Fanged Imp']['Erdtree Burial Watchdog']Stormfoot Catacombs are meant to be a restful place for the deceased, and are protected by the imps and their Watchdog.0
77Stormgatehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/stormgate-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Herba', 'Mushroom', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Ruin Fragment', 'Pickled Turtle Neck', 'Golden Rune [1]', 'Lump of Flesh', "Lordsworn's Bolt", 'Smithing Stone (1)', "Arrow's Reach Talisman", "Lordsworn's Greatsword"]nan['Troll', 'Soldier', 'Teardrop Scarab', 'Wandering Nobles']nanThe Stormgate is a heavily guarded area that marks the border within Limgrave and Stormhill. Only the foolhardy would rush such against such odds0
78Stormhillhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/stormhill-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Ruin Fragment', 'Golden Seed', 'Slumbering Egg', 'Starlight Shards', 'Fulgurbloom', 'Golden Rune (1)', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Herba', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Golden Rune (1)', 'Aspects of the Crucible: Tail', 'Kaiden Helm', 'Stonesword Key', "Armorer's Cookbook [1]"]['Iron Fist Alexander', 'Knight Bernahl', 'Roderika']['Abnormal Stone Cluster', 'Boar', 'Eagle', 'Godrick Soldier', 'Godrick Knight', 'Golem', 'Lone Wolf', 'Owl', 'Sheep', 'Skeleton', 'Soldier', 'Springhare', 'Troll', 'Wild Mouflon']['Bell Bearing Hunter', 'Margit, the Fell Omen']Stormhill Map & FragmentsSites of Grace & Sub-LocationsAll NPCs & MerchantsAll Items, Equipment & MagicAll Enemies & Bosses0
79Stormhill Evergaolhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/forlorn-hound-evergaol-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Golden Rune (1)', 'Aspects of the Crucible: Tail']nannan['Crucible Knight']The Brave and Foolish alike dare venture into the Stormhill Evergaol and face its relentless knight in battle.0
80Stormhill Shackhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/scavangers-shack-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave['Rowa Fruit', 'Golden Seed', 'Stonesword Key', 'Spirit Jellyfish Ashes']['Roderika']nannanThe Stormhill Shack is a dilapidated shelter formerly used to house hunters in the area. A Site of Grace offers a needed moment of rest for those traveling nearby0
81Stormveil Castlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/stormveil_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgLegacy Dungeons['Curved Sword Talisman', 'Boltdrake Talisman', 'Claw Talisman', "Prince well as mini-bosses.0
82Stranded Graveyardhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fringefolk-heros-grave-300.jpgLimgrave['Rowa Fruit', 'Haligdrake Talisman', 'Flask of Crimson Tears', 'Flask of Cerulean Tears', 'Finger Severer', "Tarnished's Furled Finger", 'Gesture']['Commoner']['Wandering Nobles', 'Soldier of Godrick']['Soldier of Godrick']Stranded Graveyard is a dark and secluded location within the Cave of Knowledge. The confused and aimless dwell within.0
83Summonwater Villagehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/summonwater-village-limgrave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min.jpegLimgrave['Mushroom', "Trina's Lily", 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Green Turtle Talisman']['D Hunter of the Dead']['Giant Dragonfly', 'Turtle']['Tibia Mariner']D, Hunter of The Dead, warns you of this nearby village taken over by death, known as Summonwater Village0
84Third Church of Marikahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/third_church_of_marika_locations_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgLimgrave['Sacred Tear ', 'Flask of Wondrous Physick', 'Crimson Crystal Tear']['Melina']['Wolf', 'Eagle']nanThe Ruins of an Old Church found in the Mistwood. The most prominent sight here is a statue of a lady with her arms outstretched.0
85Warmaster's Shackhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/warmasters_shack_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLimgrave['Herba', 'Ash of War: Stamp (Upward Cut)', 'Ash of War: Kick', 'Ash of War: Endure', 'Ash of War: War Cry', 'Ash of War: Spinning Slash', 'Ash of War: Impaling Thrust', 'Ash of War: Quickstep', 'Ash of War: Storm Blade', 'Ash of War: Parry', 'Ash of War: No Skill']['Knight Bernahl', 'Bell Bearing Hunter']nan['Bell Bearing Hunter']Small shack in a remote area near north-central Stormhill.0
86Waypoint Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/waypoint-ruins-limgrave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min-min.jpegLimgrave['Rowa Fruit', 'Mushroom', 'Ruin Fragment', 'Immunizing Cured Meat', 'Glowstone', "Trina's Lily", 'Golden Rune [1]']['Sorceress Sellen']['Miranda Sprout', 'Giant Miranda Sprout']['Mad Pumpkin Head']Waypoint Ruins consists of a group of broken buildings and abandoned campsites, now overrun with Miranda sprouts and their crazed caretaker.0
87Ailing Villagehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ailing-village-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Arteria Leaf', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Eye of Yelough', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Golden Rune (1)', 'Mushroom', 'Sacred Tear', 'Flame Crest Wooden Shield', 'The Flame of Frenzy']nan['Frenzied Villager', 'Giant Rat', 'Lesser Alabaster Lord']nanA small, abandoned village nestled within a forested area north of the Castle Morne Rampart. This village is host to long-dilapidated dwellings, inhabited only by maddened fanatics gripped by the Flame of Frenzy.0
88Bridge of Sacrificehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bridge-of-sacrifice-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Smoldering Butterfly', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Herba', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Bolt', "Lordsworn's Bolt", 'Stonesword Key', "Irina's Letter"]['Irina']['Soldier', 'Godrick Soldier']nanA busy bridge swarming with iron-clad foes. Be prepared to engage in an array of melee, ranged and artillery attacks or attempt to push past them.0
89Callu Baptismal Churchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/callu_baptismal_church-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Eye of Yelough', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Sacred Tear', 'The Flame of Frenzy']nan['Rat', 'Giant Rat', 'Frenzied Villager']nanA dilapidated church, presumably frequented by the former residents of Ailing Village. Now it lies in ruin, its congregation replaced by a family of mutant vermin feasting on the remains of unfortunate travelers.0
90Castle Mornehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/castle-mourne-locationpreview-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Fire Grease', 'Fire Grease', 'Pickled Turtle Neck', 'Throwing Dagger', 'Rune Arc', 'Smoldering Butterfly', 'Smoldering Butterfly', 'Tarnished Golden Sunflower', 'Sanctuary Stone', 'Thin Beast Bones', 'Golden Rune (2)', 'Golden Rune (2)', 'Golden Rune (1)', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Smithing Stone (2)', 'Claymore', 'Claymore', 'Grafted Blade Greatsword', 'Steel-Wire Torch', 'Whip', 'Iron Cleaver', 'Bolt', 'Bolt', "Lordsworn's Bolt", 'Pumpkin Helm', 'Pumpkin Helm', 'Sacrificial Twig', 'Sacrificial Twig', 'Twinblade Talisman', 'Stonesword Key', 'Stonesword Key', 'Furlcalling Finger Remedy', 'Furlcalling Finger Remedy']['Edgar']['Giant Rat', 'Soldier', 'Rotten Stray', 'Misbegotten', 'Skeletal Slime', 'Spirit Jellyfish', 'Godrick Soldier', 'Lesser Mad Pumpkin Head']['Leonine Misbegotten']I've escaped from Castle Morne, to the south. The servants there...have rebelled. Irina0
91Church of Pilgrimagehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church-of-pilgrimage-location-eldenring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Mushroom', 'Blood Grease', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Herba', 'Ruin Fragment', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Tarnished Golden Sunflower', 'Golden Centipede', 'Sacred Tear', 'Gilded Iron Shield', 'Warhawk Ashes']['Melina ']['Eagle', 'Sheep', 'Skeleton', 'Skeletal Bandit', 'Springhare']nanThe Church of Pilgrimage is a broken building situated at the top of the cliff in the north of the Weeping Peninsula. Even with the walls and roof destroyed pilgrims still make the journey to visit this church.0
92Demi-Human Forest Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/demi-human-forest-ruins-weeping-peninsula-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Arteria Leaf', 'Gold-Tinged Excrement', "Trina's Lily", 'Poisonbloom', 'Shield of the Guilty', "Demi-Human Queen's Staff", 'Crystal Burst', 'Faith-knot Crystal Tear']nan['Demi-Human', 'Demi-Human Queen']nanDemi-Humans congregate here to worship their queen. Defeating her will reward players with the Demi-Human Queen's Staff, which is excellent for beginner mages.0
93Earthbore Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/earthbore-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Cave Moss', 'Silver Firefly', "Trina's Lily", 'Pickled Turtle Neck', 'Kukri', 'Glowstone', 'Golden Rune [1]', 'Smoldering Butterfly', 'Spelldrake Talisman']nan['Rat', 'Giant Rat']['Runebear']Earthbore Cave is a small dark cave on the side of the Cliffside between Limgrave and Weeping Peninsula. One might be able to hear the squeaks of rats and the snoring of a large beast deep within if you listen closely.0
94Forest Lookout Towerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/forest-lookout-tower-weeping-peninsula-location-elden-ring-wiki-300px-min-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Smoldering Butterfly', 'Hand Ballista', 'Ballista Bolt']['NPCs']['Miranda Sprout', 'Soldier', 'Rotten Stray']nanA run-down tower built on the edge of the cliffs of the Weeping Peninsula, located west of the Bridge of Sacrifice.0
95Fourth Church of Marikahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fourth_church_of_marika_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Rowa Fruit', 'Sacred Tear']nan['Mausoleum Soldier']nanThe ruins of a lonely church, sitting atop a plateau west of the peninsula. Despite its current state, the altar remains intact and ghostly knights still roam the fields nearby, perhaps restless and duty-bound to safeguarding the area...0
96Impaler's Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/impalers-catacombs-entrance-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Grave Violet', 'Grave Glovewort (1)', 'Grave Glovewort (2)', 'Ghost Glovewort (2)', 'Prattling Pate "Please help"', 'Demi-Human Ashes']nan['Imp', 'Putrid Corpse']['Erdtree Burial Watchdog']The Impaler's Catacombs are found in the east side of the Weeping Peninsula. Once used to store the bodies of the dead, it is now crawling with Imps.0
97Isolated Merchant's Shack Weeping Peninsulahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/isolated_merchant_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Arteria Leaf', 'Herba', 'Arrow', 'Ballista Bolt', 'Bolt', 'Great Arrow', 'Sacrificial Twig', 'Zweihander', 'Lantern', 'Lost Ashes of War', 'Info: Walking Mausoleum', 'Stonesword Key']['Isolated Merchant']nannanFound at the western edge of the Weeping Peninsula, this lonesome hut is home to but a single person who has long adapted to a life of seclusion.0
98Minor Erdtree (Weeping Peninsula)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/minor-erdtree-weeping-peninsula-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min-min-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Tarnished Golden Sunflower', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Mushroom', 'Sanctuary Stone', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Sliver of Meat', 'Golden Rune (6)', 'Opaline Bubbletear', 'Crimsonburst Crystal Tear']nan['Sheep', 'Turtle', 'Demi-Human', 'Guardian', 'Giant Bat', 'Crimson Teardrop Scarab', 'Chanting Winged Dame']['Erdtree Avatar']One of the large Erdtree's found in the Weeping Peninsula. An Erdtree Avatar charges at those who approach0
99Morne Tunnelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/morne-tunnel-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Soft Cotton', 'Arteria Leaf', 'Exalted Flesh', 'Golden Rune [2]', 'Golden Rune [4', 'Stanching Boluses', 'Large Glintstone Scrap', 'Smithing Stone [1]', 'Somber Smithing Stone [1]', 'Rusted Anchor']['NPCs']['Miner', 'Misbegotten']['Scaly Misbegotten']A dark and hidden tunnel that is inhabited by Misbegottens and Miners.0
100Oridys's Risehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/oridyss-rise-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Memory Stone']nannannanA lone observation tower atop a plateau in the east of the Weeping Peninsula. Long since abandoned, the entrance is barred by a seal, presenting travelers with a small challenge.0
101Tombsward Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tombsward-catacombs-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Grave Violet', 'Human Bone Shard', 'Golden Rune [2]', 'Grave Glovewort [1]', '\xa0 ', 'Ghost Gloveworth [1]', "Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [9]", 'Lhutel the Headless', 'Prattling Pate "Thank you"']nan['Grossmesser']['Cemetery Shade']The Tombsward Catacombs are hidden inside the mountain near the Minor Erdtree in the Weeping Peninsula. Once filled with the bodies of the dead, armed skeletons now rise to chase away those that wish to explore its depths.0
102Tombsward Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tombsward-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min-min-min-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Cave Moss', 'Poisonbloom', 'x1 Arteria Leaf', 'x1 Immunizing Cured Meat', 'Golden Rune [2]', 'Poisonbone Dart', 'Furlcalling Finger Remedy', 'Viridian Amber Medallion', "Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [8]"]nan['Miranda Sprout', 'Servant of Rot', 'Rat', 'Giant Rat', 'Skeletal Slime']['Miranda the Blighted Bloom']Hidden cave in the forest teeming with poison-filled creatures.0
103Tombsward Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tombsward-ruins-weeping-peninsula-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Beast Liver', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Rowa Fruit', "Trina's Lily", 'Winged Scythe', 'Page Hood']nan['Rat', 'Page']nanThe ruins of a former burial ground. Next to nothing remains here, yet squires still roam the dark tunnels beneath. Perhaps protecting the graves of their former noble masters...0
104Tower of Returnhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tower-of-return-weeping-peninsula-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegWeeping Peninsula['Great Dragonfly Head', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Bolt']nan['Wandering Nobles', 'Godrick Foot Soldier', 'Godrick Soldier', 'Godrick Knight']nanA dilapidated tower guarded by foot soldiers and mounted cavalry. Makeshift wooden platforms and ladders line the inside of the tower, allowing it to retain some function as a lookout point and a mount for ballistae.0
105Weeping Evergaolhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/weeping_gaol_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Tarnished Golden Sunflower', "Radagon's Scarseal"]nannan['Ancient Hero of Zamor']An evergaol located on the western landmass of the Weeping Peninsula. A formidable opponent is imprisoned within.0
106Witchbane Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/witchbane_ruins_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgWeeping Peninsula['Erdleaf Flower', 'Great Dragonfly Head', 'Poisonbloom', 'Ambush Shard', 'Marionette Soldier Set', 'Spiked Spear']['Sorceress Sellen', 'Witch-Hunter Jerren']['Marionette Soldier', 'School of Graven Mages']nanA set of ruins found in western Weeping Peninsula. Overgrown with thick shrubs and poisonous pools, this decrepit landmark invites only misery and dread.0
107Academy Crystal Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/academy-crystal-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Budding Cave Moss', 'Crystal Cave Moss', 'Cave Moss', 'Cuckoo Glintstone', 'Rune Arc', 'Silver Firefly', 'Crystal Release', 'Terra Magica', 'Crystal Staff', 'Stonesword Key']nan['Giant Rat', 'Glintstone Sorcerer', 'Twinsage Sorcerer', 'Battlemage']['Crystalians']The depths of the Raya Lucaria Academy are rich in rose-tinted crystals, imbued with the natural magic of the area.0
108Academy Gate Townhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/academy-gate-town-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Rainbow Stone', "Trina's Lily", 'Arteria Leaf', 'Glintstone Firefly', 'Smithing Stone (2)', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (2)', 'Golden Seed', 'Map (Liurnia, North)', 'Ash of War: Charge Forth', "Glintstone Craftsman's Cookbook [4]"]['Finger Reader Crone', 'Diallos']['Albinauric', 'Marionette Soldier', 'Raya Lucaria Soldier', 'Land Squirt', 'Teardrop Scarab']nanThe sunken remains of the academy town.0
109Ainsel River Wellhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ainsel-river-well-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakesnannan['Golem']nanA small structure housing a lift that takes you down to the Ainsel River.0
110Artist's Shack (Liurnia of the Lakes)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/artist's_shack_locations_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Golden Rune [1]', 'Smithing Stone [4]', 'Resurrection Painting']nan['Leyndell Knight']nanA small cabin at North Liurnia of The Lakes. Its strongly perceived tranquility seems overshadowed by oblivion.0
111Bellum Churchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bellum_church_location_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Golden Centipede', 'Sacred Tear', 'Nightrider Glaive', 'Ash of War: Giant Hunt']['Hyetta', 'Nomadic Merchant North Liurnia of the Lakes']nan["Night's Cavalry"]Located past the ruins and the forested area guarded by Cuckoo Knights.0
112Bellum Highwayhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bellum-highway-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-exterior-min-min.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Rune Arc', 'Golden Centipede', 'Sacred Tear', 'Nightrider Glaive', 'Ash of War: Giant Hunt']['Hyetta', 'Nomadic Merchant\xa0']['Mausoleum Knight']["Night's Cavalry"]Outside the East Raya Lucaria Gate0
113Black Knife Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black-knife-catacombs-entrance-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Grave Violet', 'Crab Eggs', 'Spellproof Dried Liver', 'Rune Arc', 'Root Resin', 'Grave Glovewort (2)', 'Grave Glovewort (3)', 'Grave Glovewort (4)', "Assassin's Cerulean Dagger", "Rosus' Axe", 'Black Knifeprint', 'Twinsage Sorcerer Ashes', 'Deathroot']nan['Skeleton', 'Crab', 'Giant Crab', 'Necromancer']['Black Knife Assassin', 'Cemetery Shade']The dreaded catacombs holds many skeletons that can revive until properly killed, but also holds the Black Knifeprint, a key item in a certain quest.0
114Boilprawn Shackhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/boilprawn_shack_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Boiled Prawn', "Rya's Necklace", 'Gesture']['Blackguard Big Boggart']nannanSmall run-down shack in the swamps of Liurnia. The Blackguard is said to reside here, cooking prawns.0
115Caria Manorhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/caria_manor_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Crystal Bud', 'Golden Rune (4)', 'Herba', "Miquella's Lily", 'Mushroom', 'Magic Grease', 'Rune Arc', 'Rimed Crystal Bud', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Golden Seed', 'Smithing Stone (3)', 'Smithing Stone (4)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (3)', 'Carian Piercer', 'Crystal Dart', 'Ice Crest Shield', 'Sword of Night and Flame', 'Urumi', "Loretta's Greatbow", 'Ash of War: Carian Grandeur', "Ash of War: Loretta's Slash", 'Cracked Pot', "Glintstone Craftsman's Cookbook (6)", 'Stonesword Key']['Pidia, Carian Servant']['Abductor Virgin', 'Direwolf', 'Lazuli Sorcerer', 'Fingercreeper', 'Giant Crab', 'Lesser Fingercreeper', 'Living Jar', 'Page', 'Raya Lucaria Soldiers', 'Troll Knight']['Royal Knight Loretta']A large estate situated far to the north of Liurnia. Heavily guarded by all manner of creatures as well as its eternal warden, the spectral Royal Knight Loretta.0
116Carian Study Hallhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/8ef42fdc-7aba-4cb4-8906-15ad073dfc1f.pngLiurnia of the Lakes['Golden Rune [3]', 'Holyproof Dried Liver', 'Glintstone Firefly', 'Cerulean Seed Talisman', 'Carian Glintstone Staff', 'Mask of Confidence']nan['Lesser Fingercreeper']['Preceptor Miriam']A large library-like location full of spectres and magic users that leads to the Divine Tower of Liurnia. Using the Carian Inverted Statue unlocks an alternative version of the map.0
117Cathedral of Manus Celeshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cathedral_of_manus_celes-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-exterior-min.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Dragon Heart', 'Starlight Shards', "Adula's Moonblade", 'Dark Moon Greatsword']['Ranni the Witch']nan['Glintstone Dragon Adula']A large church atop the southern plateau of Liurnia. Ranni awaits her lord in the depths of the church, guarded by her loyal Dragon.0
118Chelona's Risehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/chelona's_rise-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-exterior-min.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Rowa Fruit', 'Smithing Stone (7)', 'Smithing Stone (8)', "Ranni's Dark Moon"]nan['Crystalian', 'Deer', 'Lesser Red Wolf of Radagon', 'Turtle']nanA tower overlooking the southwestern-most tip of Liurnia of the lakes.0
119Church of Inhibitionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church-of-inhibition-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Eye of Yelough', 'Gold-Tinged Excrement', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Sacred Tear', 'Finger Maiden Fillet', 'Finger Maiden Robe', 'Finger Maiden Shoes']['White Mask Varre']['Festering Fingerprint Vyke (Invader)']nanThe remnants of an old church in the north of Liurnia, just before the Altus Plateau.0
120Church of Irithhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church_of_irith_locaiton_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Mushroom', 'Warming Stone', 'Sacred Tear', "Ash of War: Thops's Barrier"]['Thops']['Teardrop Scarab']nanA peaceful church at the back of Stormveil Castle.0
121Church of Vowshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church_of_vows_locations_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Golden Tailoring Tools', 'Gold Sewing Needle', 'Magic Glintblade', 'Carian Greatsword', "Blessing's Boon"]['Miriel, Pastor of Vows']nan['Bell Bearing Hunter']It is here, at the Church of Vows, that the great houses of the Erdtree and the Moon were joined by the matrimonial bond between red-haired Radagon and Rennala of the Full Moon. That is why it holds in view the monuments of both houses, the Erdtree of the Capital and the Academy of Raya Lucaria.0
122Cliffbottom Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cliffbottom-catacombs-entrance-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Grave Violet', 'Root Resin', 'Hefty Beast Bone', 'Grave Glovewort (2)', 'Grave Glovewort (3)', 'Ghost Glovewort (3)', 'Nox Mirrorhelm', 'Scythe', 'Warped Axe', 'Rune Arc', 'Prattling Pate "Wonderful"', 'Page Ashes', 'Kaiden Sellsword Ashes']nan['Imp', 'Omen']['Erdtree Burial Watchdog']Catacombs found at the bottom of the cliffs in the eastern side of the Liurnia of the Lakes region, now infested by Imps and Omens0
123Converted Fringe Towerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/converted-fringe-tower-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Eye of Yelough', "Miquella's Lily", 'Mushroom', 'Crystal Dart', 'Cannon of Haima', 'Gavel of Haima']nan['School of Graven Mages']nanA tower found on the fringe in the northeastern tip of Liurnia.0

125Cuckoo's Evergaolhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cuckoos_evergaol_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Greatblade Phalanx']nan['Lookout Stones']['Bols, Carian Knight']Evergaol located on the western landmass of Liurnia. A powerful knight stirs within.0
126Deep Ainsel Wellhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/deep-ainsel-well-locations-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpgLiurnia of the LakesnannannannanA deep well leading to the Moonlight Altar from the underground Grand Cloister.0
127Divine Tower of Liurniahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/divine-tower-of-liurnia-locations-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Stargazer Heirloom', 'Godskin Noble Hood', 'Godskin Noble Robe', 'Godskin Noble Bracelets', 'Godskin Noble Trousers', 'Cursemark of Death']nannan['Godskin Noble']A long bridge leads to the nearly empty Tower of Liurnia where a corpse lies at the peak.0
128Frenzied Flame Villagehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frenzied_flame_village-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Eye of Yelough', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Crystal Bud', "Shabriri's Woe", 'Howl of Shabriri', "Frenzied's Cookbook (1)", 'Stonesword Key']nan['Frenzied Villager', 'Raya Lucaria Knight', 'Festering Fingerprint Vyke']nanA village in Liurnia gripped in the madness of Three Fingers. 129Frenzy-Flaming Towerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frenzy-flaming-tower-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegLiurnia of the Lakes['Howl of Shabriri']nan['Frenzied Villager', 'Giant Rat', 'Rats']nanA tower in north-east Liurnia of the Lakes, atop which is a giant flame causing madness in the surrounding area.0
130Grand Lift of Dectushttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grand_lift_of_dectus_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Great Mace', 'Stonesword Key']nannannanA massive lift platform found between Liurnia and the Altus Plateau.
