Finger Hunter Yura', 'Sorceress Sellen', 'Witch-Hunter Jerren', 'Boc', 'Rennala']['Abductor Virgin', 'Alabaster Lord', 'Avionette Soldier', 'Crab', 'Flame Chariot', 'Giant Crab', 'Glintstone Sorcerer', 'High Page', 'Land Squirt', 'Lazuli Sorcerer', 'Lesser Mad Pumpkin Head', 'Living Jar', 'Putrid Corpse', 'Marionette Soldier', 'Moongrum, Carian Knight', 'Noble Sorcerer', 'Raya Lucaria Foot Soldier', 'Raya Lucaria Soldier', 'Rotten Stray', 'Teardrop Scarab', 'Wandering Nobles']['Red Wolf of Radagon', 'Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon']A towering ivory tower where scholars come to study the art of sorcery. The gates have been sealed to prevent trespassers from entering the institute. It is heavily guarded by sorcerers, wardens, and reanimated beings imbued with magical properties.0
145Raya Lucaria Crystal Tunnelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/raya_lucaria_crystal_tunnel_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Cracked Crystal', 'Glintstone Scrap', 'Golden Rune (3)', 'Large Glintstone Scrap', 'Smithing Stone (1)', 'Smithing Stone (2)', 'Smithing Stone (3)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (1)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (2)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (3)', 'Crystal Knife', 'Shatter Earth', "Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing (1)"]nan['Glintstone Miner', 'Marionette Soldier']['Crystalian (Ringblade)']One of the vast networks of tunnels used prominently for the academy's crystal mining operation.0
146Renna's Risehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rennas_rise_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Snow Witch Set']nannannanA Tower of the Three Sisters, belonging to Renna. It houses Ranni's Snow Witch Armor Set.0
147Revenger's Shackhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/revengers_shack_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Raw Meat Dumpling', 'Raw Meat Dumpling', 'Root Resin', "Banished Knight's Halberd", 'Furlcalling Finger Remedy', 'Shabriri Grape']['Edgar the Revenger']['Edgar the Revenger']nanAn isolated shack north of the Minor Erdtree. Bodies litter the ground inside the shack.0
148Ringleader's Evergaolhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cuckoos_evergaol_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Smithing Stone (7)', 'Smithing Stone (8)', 'Black Knife Tiche']nan['Bear', 'Deer', 'Crystalian', 'Lesser Red Wolf of Radagon', 'Turtle']['Alecto, Black Knife Ringleader']Found on the Moonlight Altar. Inside awaits a notorious assassin, imprisoned for the act of slaying a demigod.0
149Road's End Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/road's_end_catacombs_location_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300x.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Root Resin', 'Grave Violet', 'Grave Glovewort (2)', 'Grave Glovewort (3)', 'Ghost Glovewort (2)', 'Rune Arc', "Watchdog's Staff", 'Raya Lucaria Soldier Ashes', 'Glintstone Sorcerer Ashes']nan['Fanged Imp']['Spirit-Caller Snail']Catacombs at the end of the world...0
150Rose Churchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rose_church_location_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300x.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Bloodrose', 'Festering Bloody Finger', "Lord of Blood's Favor", "Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook (12)", "Pureblood Knight's Medal"]['White Mask Varre']['Albinauric', 'Lesser Sanguine Noble']nanThe ruins of a former church aptly named Rose Church, for its walls are now festering with accursed blood pustules and overgrown with bloodroses.0
151Royal Grave Evergaolhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/royal_grave_evergaol_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Meteorite']nannan['Onyx Lord']An evergaol constructed for the Carian Royal family in the plains east of the royal estate.0
152Ruin-Strewn Precipicehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/precipice_locations_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Kukri', 'Cracked Crystal', 'Golden Rune [5]', 'Golden Rune [6]', 'Rune Arc', 'Lightning Grease', 'Soft Cotton', 'Smithing Stone [3]', 'Smithing Stone [4]', 'Smithing Stone [5]', 'Somber Smithing Stone [4]', "Magma Wyrm's Scalesword", "Serpent-God's Curved Sword", 'Lost Ashes of War']nan['Miner', 'Land Octopus', 'Giant Land Octopus', 'Vulgar Militiamen', 'Giant Bat', 'Chanting Winged Dame']['Magma Wyrm Makar']A steep precipice with abundant caves in the insides all the way through0
153Seluvis's Risehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/seluviss_rise_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes["Preceptor's Set", 'Memory Stone', 'Finger Maiden Therolina Puppet', 'Jarwight Puppet', "Seluvis's Potion", "Seluvis's Bell Bearing", "Seluvis's Introduction"]['Preceptor Seluvis']['Wolf']nanA tower bequeathed unto Preceptor Seluvis. Serves as his personal study as he delves into the sorcerous arts.0
154Slumbering Wolf's Shackhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/slumbering-wolfs-shack-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes["Trina's Lily", 'Rune Arc']['Latenna']nannanA small shack nestled at the side of a cliff, only accessible through a long winding cave system. A woman and her wolf companion rest here.0
155Stillwater Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/stillwater_cave_location_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Golden Rune (5)', 'Golden Rune (6)', 'Cave Moss', 'Budding Cave Moss', 'Crystal Cave Moss', 'Toxic Mushroom', 'Sage Hood', 'Sage Robe', 'Sage Trousers', 'Serpent Arrow', 'Winged Sword Insignia']nan['Giant Bat', 'Giant Miranda Sprout', 'Miranda Sprout', 'Servant of Rot']['Cleanrot Knight']A dark and murky cave beset by a poisonous miasma. Home to servants of rot, relishing in the presence of the giant poisonblooms endemic to the cave.0
156Temple Quarterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/temple-quarter-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min-min-min.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Bloodrose', 'Icerind Hatchet']['NPCs']['Albinauric']nanRuined by the breaking, the Temple Quarter is now overrun with dangerous creatures, ready to attack any who come near0
157Testu's Risehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/testus_rise_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Bloodrose', 'Mushroom', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Smithing Stone [2]', 'Memory Stone']nan['Skeleton', 'Turtle']nanAn observation tower found in the middle of a lone isle in Liurnia. The entrance is sealed by impish magic and presents a challenge to would-be visitors.0
158The Four Belfrieshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/d0d26f10-73a9-4213-9838-bce38e7ec370.pngLiurnia of the Lakes['Imbued Sword Key']nan['Troll Spirit Knight']nanAs its name suggests, The Four Belfries is a hill with four large bell towers overlooking Liurnia from the west. Each belfry hosts a waygate that transports travellers to various locations.0
159Village of the Albinauricshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/village_of_the_albinaurics_1.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes['Mushroom', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Rune Arc', 'Erdleaf Flower', 'Albinauric Bloodclot', 'Budding Cave Moss', 'Ivory Sickle', 'Crystal Sword', 'Stormhawk Axe', 'Crucible Knot Talisman', 'Larval Tear', 'Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right)']['Albus', 'Nepheli Loux']['Depraved Perfumer', 'First-Generation Albinauric', 'Rotten Stray']['Omenkiller']The cursemongers have destroyed the home of the old Albinaurics, but perhaps hope is not lost for them to find their promised land.0
160Caelem Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/caelem_ruins_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgCaelid['Smoldering Butterfly', 'Visage Shield']nan['Flame Chariot', 'Putrid Corpse']['Mad Pumpkin Head (Duo)']A set of perpetually burning ruins in western Caelid. The Caelid Highway cuts through these ruins which are heavily guarded by mobile flamethrowers and swarming with burning reanimated corpses.0
161Caelid Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/caelid-catacombs-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min-min.jpegCaelid['Grave Violet', 'Root Resin', 'Ghost Glovewort [3]', 'Ghost Glovewort [4]', 'Grave Glovewort [3]', 'Grave Glovewort [4]', 'Grave Glovewort [5]', 'Miranda Sprout Ashes ', 'Kindred of Rot Ashes']nan['Miranda Sprout', 'Giant Miranda Sprout', 'Skeletons']['Cemetery Shade']A labyrinth of Scarlet Rot-soaked floors and tunnels.0
162Caelid Waypoint Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/caelid-waypoint-ruins-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgCaelid['Great Dragonfly Head', 'Meteoric Ore Blade', 'Rot Grease']nan['Lesser Kindred of Rot (Pests)', 'Rotten Stray', 'Servant of Rot']nanA set of ruins found in southwest Caelid, along the highway. Long abandoned, the ruins have become home to all manner of creatures that revel in the decay and putrefaction brought on by the scarlet rot.0
163Cathedral of Dragon Communion (Caelid)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cathedral_of_dragon_communion_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgCaelid['Faded Erdleaf Flower', "Miquella's Lily", 'Incantations', "Ancient Dragon Apostle's Cookbook [3]"]nan['Banished Knight', 'Guillemot']['Decaying Ekzykes']The Cathedral of Dragon Communion has long been destroyed, but those who seek to commune with draconic power may yet access its power0
164Church of the Plaguehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church-of-the-plague-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgCaelid['Sacramental Bud', 'Smoldering Butterfly', 'Sacred Tear']['Millicent']['Lesser Kindred of Rot (Pests)']nanA dilapidated church found in the cliffs east of Sellia, Town of Sorcery.0
165Divine Tower of Caelidhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/divinetowerofcaelid.pngCaelid['Golden Rune (12)', "Numen's Rune", 'Rune Arc', 'Godskin Apostle Bracelets', 'Godskin Apostle Hood', 'Godskin Apostle Robe', 'Godskin Apostle Trousers', "Godslayer's Greatsword", 'Stonesword Key']nan['Blackflame Monk', 'Radahn Soldier']['Godskin Apostle']A massive tower found in central Dragonbarrow, north of Caelid. 166Forsaken Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/forsaken-ruins-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgCaelid['Faded Erdleaf Flower', "Trina's Lily", 'Golden Rune [5]', 'Smithing Stone [4]', 'Sword of St. Trina']['NPCs']['Giant Crow']nanThe Forsaken Ruins consists of a group of broken buildings and abandoned campsites. 167Fort Gaelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fort-gael-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgCaelid['Mushroom', 'Faded Erdleaf Flower', 'Rune Arc', 'Warming Stone', 'Katar', 'Starscourge Heirloom', 'Partisan', 'Greatbow', 'Radahn Soldier Greaves', 'Flame, Grant Me Strength', "Ash of War: Lion's Claw"]nan['Flame Chariot', 'Soldier', 'Redmane Knight', 'Radahn Soldier']['Lion Guardian']A ruined fort in a ruined land, Fort Gael looms above the surrounding landscape, a vicious roar can be heard within.0
168Gael Tunnelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gael_tunnel_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgCaelid['Cracked Crystal', 'Golden Rune [5]', 'Silver Firefly', 'Large Glintstone Scrap', 'Smithing Stone [4]', 'Somber Smithing Stone [2]', 'Somber Smithing Stone [4]', 'Cross-Naginata', 'Gold-Pickled Fowl Foot', 'Grace Mimic', 'Moonveil', 'Dragon Heart']['Alexander']['Miner', 'Radahn Soldier', 'Land Octopus', 'Giant Land Octopus']['Magma Wyrm']A set of tunnels found on the western edge of Caelid, along the border to Limgrave.0
169Gaol Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gaol-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgCaelid['Rune Arc', 'Turtle Neck Meat', 'Old Fang', 'Rainbow Stone', 'Glowstone', 'Golden Rune [2]', 'Golden Rune [3]', 'Golden Rune [4]', 'Golden Rune [5]', 'Somber Smithing Stone [5]', 'Regalia Of Eochaid', 'Pillory Shield', 'Wakizashi', 'Putrid Corpse Ashes', 'Stonesword Key']nan['Vulgar Militiamen', 'Giant Rat', 'Putrid Corpse']['Frenzied Duelist']Found at the west of Caelid0

184Altus Tunnelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/altus_tunnel_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgAltus Plateau['Rune Arc', 'Cracked Crystal', 'Arteria Leaf', 'Golden Rune (7)', 'Smithing Stone (5)', 'Somber Smithing Stone (5)', "Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing (2)", 'Crystal Dart', 'Arsenal Charm +1']nan['Avionette Soldier', 'Crystal Snail', 'Glintstone Miner', 'Malformed Star']['Crystalian (Spear)', 'Crystalian (Ringblade)']The Altus tunnels were once used to supply the lands with quality crystals0
185Dominula, Windmill Villagehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/windmill_village_locations_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgAltus Plateau['Human Bone Shard', 'Stormhawk Feather', 'Gold firefly', 'Holyproof Dried Liver', 'Lightning Grease', 'Golden Seed', 'Rune Arc', 'Festive Hood', 'Festive Garb', 'Festive Garb (Altered)', 'Blue Festive Hood', 'Blue Festive Garb', "Celebrant's Skull", "Celebrant's Cleaver", "Celebrant's Sickle", "Celebrant's Rib-Rake", 'Godskin Peeler', 'Scouring Black Flame', "Fire's Deadly Sin"]['Millicent']['Celebrant', 'Rotten Stray']['Godskin Apostle']Located in northern Altus Plateau, many have heard ominous laughter from the locals, who dance as a part of their festival.0
186East Windmill Pasturehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/east-windmill-pasture-location_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px-min-min.jpegAltus Plateau["Noble's Set", 'Navy Hood', "Noble's Traveling Garb", "Noble's Gloves", "Noble's Trousers", 'Twinned Knight Swords']nan['Celebrant', 'Putrid Corpse']nanEast Pasture Outskirsts of Windmill Village. 187Golden Lineage Evergaolhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/golden-lineage-evergaol-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min.jpegAltus Plateau['Godfrey Icon']['Godefroy the Grafted']['Abnormal Stone Cluster']['Godefroy the Grafted']Found near the Grand Lift of Dectus, this prison contains a member of the Golden Lineage, imprisoned for the grotesque act of Grafting.0
188Grand Lift of Dectushttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grand_lift_of_dectus_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgAltus Plateau['Great Mace', 'Stonesword Key']nannannanA massive lift platform found between Liurnia and the Altus Plateau. The mechanism that operates the lift is barred by four Guardian Statues, requiring the brandishing of a special artifact for them to release their hold.0
189Highway Lookout Tower Altus Plateauhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/view-highway-lookout-tower-altus-plateau-01-elden-ring-wiki-600px.jpgAltus Plateau['Hefty Beast Bone', 'Greatbow']nan['Leyndell Knight', 'Soldier']nanA lookout tower in Altus Plateau, overlooking the main road leading up to the northwestern entrance of the Capital Outskirts.0
190Lux Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lux_ruins1200x.pngAltus Plateau['Rainbow Stone', 'String', 'Glowstone', 'Rickety Shield', 'Falchion', 'Ash of War: Shield Crash', 'Ritual Sword Talisman']nan['Demi-Human', 'Lesser Demi-Human Chief']['Demi-Human Queen Gilika']Long forgotten ruins among golden trees, swarmed with demi-humans protecting the underground chamber.0
191Minor Erdtree (Altus Plateau)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/minor-erdtree-altus-plateau-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300p.jpegAltus Plateau['Tarnished Golden Sunflower', 'Golden Seed', 'Crimsonspill Crystal Tear', 'Speckled Hardtear']nan['Guardian']['Wormface']A Minor Erdtree found in central Altus Plateau. 192Mirage Risehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mimrage-rise-location_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px-min-min.jpegAltus Plateau['Slumbering Egg', 'Altus Bloom', 'Unseen Blade', 'Unseen Form', 'Mirage Riddle']nan['Fanged Imp', 'Springhare']nanAn area with a mystic glow. Adventurers who solve the riddle and touch the Phantom Crests found across the fields will unveil the Mirage Rise and reap its rewards.0
193Old Altus Tunnelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/old_altus_tunnel_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgAltus Plateau['Cracked Crystal', 'Golden Rune [6]', 'Stanching Boluses', 'Smithing Stone [5]', 'Somber Smithing Stone [4]', 'Somber Smithing Stone [5]', 'Somber Smithing Stone [6]', 'Boltdrake Talisman', 'Great Club', "Troll's Hammer"]nan['Leyndell Knight', 'Miner', 'Rotten Stray', 'Wandering Nobles']['Stonedigger Troll']An old mining site, still active to this day. Its tunnels echo with the grunts and groans of the commoners, tirelessly slaving away, grinding at the rich reservoir of crystals deep within.0
194Perfumer's Grottohttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/perfumers-grotto-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegAltus Plateau['Budding Cave Moss', 'Crystal Cave Moss', 'Living Jar Shard', 'Silver Firefly', 'Perfume Bottle', 'Arteria Leaf', 'Miranda Powder', 'Golden Rune [5]', 'Warming Stone', 'Great Omenkiller Cleaver', 'Perfumer Hood', 'Perfumer Robe', 'Perfumer Gloves', 'Perfumer Sarong']nan['Perfumer', 'Giant Poison Flower', 'Malformed Star', 'Poison Flowers']['Omenkiller', 'Miranda the Blighted Bloom']The perfumers of the Altus Plateau tend for their gardens, even when they are blighted beyond recovery0
195Perfumer's Ruinshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/perfumers-ruins-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegAltus Plateau['Nascent Butterfly', 'Altus Bloom', 'Budding Cave Moss', "Perfumer's Talisman", 'Omenkiller Set', 'Perfume Bottle', "Perfumer's Cookbook [1]"]nan['Perfumer', 'Omenkiller', 'Miranda Sprout', 'Giant Miranda Sprout']nanA set of ruins found in Altus Plateau, far to the west and below Mt. Gelmir.0
196Sage's Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sages-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpegAltus Plateau['Budding Cave Moss', 'Crystal Cave Moss', 'Rejuvinating Boluses', 'Nascent Butterfly', 'Dragonwound Grease', 'Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot', 'Black Hood', 'Candletree Wooden Shield', 'Golden Great Arrow', 'Raptor Talons', "Raptor's Black Feathers", 'Skeletal Mask', 'Family Heads', 'Concealing Veil', 'Stonesword Key']nan['Skeletal Bandit']['Black Knife Assassin', 'Necromancer Garris']Sage's Cave is a dark opening in the side of a mountain. Its dark depths are overrun by hostile undead, but those who brave it may find treasures beyond compare.0
197Sainted Hero's Gravehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sainted_hero's_grave_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgAltus Plateau['Root Resin', 'Grave Violet', 'Ghost Glovewort [4]', 'Sacrificial Twig', 'Ghost Glovewort [4]', 'Ghost Glovewort [5]', 'Grave Glovewort [3]', 'Grave Glovewort [4]', 'Grave Glovewort [5]', 'Black Knife', 'Dragoncrest Shield Talisman +1', 'Crimson Seed Talisman', 'Leyndell Soldier Ashes', 'Ancient Dragon Knight Kristoff Ashes']nan['Imp', 'Putrid Corpse', 'Wraith Caller', 'Revenant', 'Grave Warden Duelist']['Ancient Hero of Zamor']An ominous grave, found at central Altus Plateau0
198Second Church of Marikahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/second_church_of-marika-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min.jpegAltus Plateau['Bloodrose', 'Human Bone Shard', 'Golden Rowa', 'Altus Bloom', 'Sacred Tear', "Eleonora's Poleblade", 'Purifying Crystal Tear']['Bloody Finger Hunter Yura']['Rotten Stray', 'Eleonora, Violet Bloody Finger']['Sanguine Noble']Second of the four Churches of Marika where players can gather a Sacred Tear for their flask0
199Stormcaller Churchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/stormcaller_church_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgAltus Plateau['Altus Bloom', 'Sacred Tear', 'Dragonbolt Blessing', 'Lightning Greatbolt']nan['Soldier']nanA lonely church on a steppe.0
200The Shaded Castlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/the-shaded-castle-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgAltus Plateau['Golden Rune (3)', 'Golden Rune (6)', 'Glass Shard', 'Poisonbone Dart', 'Grave Violet', 'Budding Cave Moss', 'Mushroom', 'Drawstring Fire Grease', 'Toxic Mushroom', 'Miranda Powder', 'Rot Grease', 'Golden Sunflower', 'Gold Firefly', 'Hefty Beast Bone', 'Aeonian Butterfly (2)', 'Smithing Stone (4)', 'Smithing Stone (5)', 'Ghost Glovewort (4)', 'Depraved Perfumer Set\xa0 ', "Cleanrot Knight's Sword", 'Briar Greatshield', "Marais Executioner's Sword", '"Champion\'s Song" Painting', 'Stonesword Key', "Valkyrie's Prosthesis", 'Perfume Bottle', "Perfumer's Cookbook (2)"]['Patches', 'Shaded Castle Spirit']['Basilisk', 'Depraved Perfumer', 'Giant Miranda Sprout', 'Lesser Cleanrot Knight', 'Miranda Sprout', 'Page', 'Putrid Corpse', 'Revenant', 'Rotten Stray', 'Slug', 'Wandering Nobles', 'Wraith Caller']['Elemer of the Briar']An abandoned and Decrepit castle found in the northern region between the Mt. 201Unsightly Catacombshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/unsightly-catacombs-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpegAltus Plateau['Grave Violet', 'Ghost Glovewort [5]', 'Grave Glovewort [4]', 'Grave Glovewort [5]', 'Prattling Pate "Apologies"', 'Rune Arc', 'Winged Misbegotten Ashes', 'Perfumer Tricia Ashes']nan['Misbegotten', 'Omen']['Perfumer Tricia']A burial grounds crawling with Misbegotten creatures found deep beneath the Perfumer's Ruins. 202Village Windmill Pasturehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/view-village-windmill-pasture-01-elden-ring-wiki-600px.jpgAltus Plateau['Altus Bloom', 'Arteria Leaf', 'Raw Meat Dumpling']nan['Misbegotten', 'Rotten Stray', 'Wandering Nobles']nanA windmill with two stables, found near the Dominula, Windmill Village. The windmill here is still functional but the area has been taken over by Misbegotten creatures.0

232Bestial Sanctumhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bestial-sanctuary-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgDragonbarrow['Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone', 'Beastclaw Greathammer', 'Bestial Sling', 'Bestial Vitality', 'Clawmark Seal', "Gargoyle's Blackblade", "Gargoyle's Black Halberd", 'Stone of Gurranq', 'Dragoncrest Shield Talisman', 'Cinquedea', "Ash of War: Beast's Roar", 'Beast Eye']['Gurranq, Beast Clergyman', 'Clawmark Seal', 'Bestial Sling', 'Bestial Vitality', "Ash of War: Beast's Roar", 'Beast Claw', 'Stone of Gurranq', 'Beastclaw Greathammer', "Gurranq's Beast Claw", 'Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone']nan['Black Blade Kindred', 'Gurranq']The Bestial Sanctum is a refuge for Gurranq, Beast Clergyman, who feeds on Deathroot. Offer him any in your possession, and he will grant you the strength of beasts.0
233Dragonbarrow Cavehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonbarrow-cave-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgDragonbarrow['Beast Blood', 'Budding Cave Moss', 'Crystal Bud', 'Crystal Cave Moss', 'Golden Rune (8)', 'Golden Rune (12)', 'Rowa Fruit', 'Warming Stone', "Bull-Goat's Talisman", 'Flamedrake Talisman +2']nan['Deer', 'Lesser Runebear', 'Springhare', 'Wolf']['Beastman of Farum Azula']A small dungeon found beneath the Minor Erdtree in Dragonbarrow.0
234Divine Tower of Caelidhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/divinetowerofcaelid.pngDragonbarrow['Golden Rune (12)', "Numen's Rune", 'Rune Arc', 'Godskin Apostle Bracelets', 'Godskin Apostle Hood', 'Godskin Apostle Robe', 'Godskin Apostle Trousers', "Godslayer's Greatsword", 'Stonesword Key']nan['Blackflame Monk', 'Radahn Soldier']['Godskin Apostle']A massive tower found in central Dragonbarrow, north of Caelid. 235Deep Siofra Wellhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/deep-siofra-well-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min-min.jpegDragonbarrownannannannanA second lift to the Siofra River0
236Fort Farothhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fort-faroth-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgDragonbarrow['Golden Rune (12)', "Radagon's Soreseal", 'Starlight Shards', 'Dectus Medallion (Right)', 'Dragon Heart']nan['Chanting Winged Dame', 'Giant Bat', 'Rat']['Elder Dragon Greyoll']Fort Faroth used to house the guardians of Caelid, but its defenders have long fallen, now bound to earth as hostile spirits.0
237Isolated Merchant's Shack (Dragonbarrow)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/isolated_merchants_shack_dragonbarrow_locations_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgDragonbarrow['Arrow', 'Beast-Repellent Torch', 'Bolt', 'Dragonwound Grease', 'Gravel Stone', 'Land of Reeds Armor', 'Land of Reeds Gauntlets', 'Land of Reeds Greaves', 'Land of Reeds Helm', 'Sacrificial Twig', 'Serpent Arrow', 'Spiked Caestus', 'Ash of War: Sky Shot', "Gravity Stone Peddler's Bell Bearing", 'Lost Ashes of War', 'Note: Gateway', 'Note: Hidden Cave', 'Ritual Pot']['Isolated Merchant Dragonbarrow']nan['Bell Bearing Hunter']A lonesome hut found atop a plateau in western Dragonbarrow. 238Lenne's Risehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lennes-rise-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgDragonbarrow['Glintstone Firefly', 'Faded Erdleaf Flower', 'Memory Stone']nan['School of Graven Mages']nanAn observation tower in the northeast of Dragonbarrow, off the path to the Bestial Sanctum.0
239Minor Erdtree (Dragonbarrow)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/minor_erdtree_(dragonbarrow).pngDragonbarrow['Opaline Hardtear', 'Stonebarb Cracked Tear']nannan['Putrid Avatar']A Minor Erdtree in eastern Dragonbarrow, overlooking the eastern roads.0
240Sellia Evergaolhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sellia_evergaol2.pngDragonbarrow['Battlemage Hugues Ashes']nannan['Battlemage Hugues']Found on a cliff in the Dragonbarrow, this one holds an esteemed Battlemage, who developed a longing for conflict.0

248Grand Lift of Roldhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grand-lift-of-rold-location-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgMountaintops of the Giants['Rold Medallion', 'Haligtree Secret Medallion (Left)', 'Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right)']['Finger Reader Crone']nannanThe impressive Lift of Rold transports those who wield the right key. NPCs (436 registros)

idnameimagelocationrolevoiced bydescriptiondlc
0Abandoned Merchant Siofra Riverhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/nomadic-merchant-siofra-river-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpgSiofra RiverGeneral Goods ShopVoice Actor goes here.Abandoned Merchant Siofra River is an NPC and one of several Nomadic Merchants in Elden Ring. Abandoned Merchants sell various items and equipment including Consumables, Materials, Weapons and Armor as well as notes containing hints on how to acquire certain items. This Abandoned Merchant can be found inside one of the ruins in Central Siofra River.0
1Aeonian Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/swamp_of_aoenia_spirit.jpgNorthern cliff of Swamp of AeoniaBenevolentnanThe Aeonian Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He stands upon the northern cliffs of the Swamp of Aeonia.0
2Aeonian Swamp Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/aeonianswampspirit_.jpgAeonia Swamp ShoreBenevolentnanThe Aeonian Swamp Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He rests on the shore of the swamp and looks out towards the Heart of Aeonia.0
3Albinauric Village Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/albinauricvillagespiritb.jpgVillage of the AlbinauricsBenevolentnanThe Albinauric Village Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. Located in the Village of the Albinaurics, he wishes for Albus' safety and gives you a hint on how to find him.0
4Albushttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/albus-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgVillage of the Albinaurics, Liurnia of the LakesGives Key ItemMartyn EllisAlbus is an NPC in Elden Ring. Albus is an Albinauric who is trying to hide from the calamity that befell Village of the Albinaurics in Liurnia of the Lakes. He has an important item that he would like you to protect0
5Sir Ansbachhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ansbach(1).pngOutside Belurat, Tower SettlementPureblood Knight Captain (former), NPC Quest RelatedBen MilesSir Ansbach is an NPC in Elden Ring. Sir Ansbach is a former servant of Mohg, Lord of Blood, but is now part of the group that follows Miquella through the Realm of Shadow. Sir Ansbach is an NPC exclusive to Shadow of the Erdtree and does not appear in the base game.1
6Ashen Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ashen_spirit_b.jpgLeyndell, Ashen CapitalBenevolentnanAshen Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. Ashen Spirit can be found sitting on the ground in the ash.0
7Blackguard Big Boggarthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/blackguard-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgBoilprawn ShackBlackguardDean FaganBlackguard Big Boggart is an NPC in Elden Ring. Initially encountered as the thief of Rya's Necklace, he is a minor NPC and merchant.0
8Blaidd the Half-Wolfhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/blaidd-wolfman-location2-npc-elden-ring-wiki-300px-min.jpegnanQuest NPC and summonScott ArthurMistwood Ruins Forlorn Hound Evergaol Siofra River Redmane Castle Three Sisters0
9Bloody Finger Hunter Yurahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloody-finger-hunter-yura-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave: near Seaside RuinsLiurnia of the Lakes: Near Raya Lucaria Academy entrance.Altus Plateau: Second Church of MarikaQuest NPC and Summonable CooperatorShaun DooleyLimgrave: near Seaside RuinsLiurnia of the Lakes: Near Raya Lucaria Academy entrance.Altus Plateau: Second Church of Marika0
10Boc the Seamsterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/boc_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgLimgraveGarments Adjuster andQuest NPCCalvin A. DeanBoc the Seamster is an NPC in Elden Ring. Boc is a Demi-Human who is capable of advanced communication. Boc is initially met by the player in the form of a small tree.0
11Brother Corhynhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/brother_corhyn_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgRoundtable HoldMerchant and Quest NPCSamuel BarnettBrother Corhyn is an NPC in Elden Ring. Brother Corhyn is a holy practitioner who will teach you practical faith-based Incantations in exchange for Runes. You will encounter him once you've reached the Roundtable Hold.0
12Carian Manor Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/carianmanorspirit.jpgCarian ManorBenevolentnanThe Carian Manor Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be found sitting on a chair, inside the0
13Church of Pilgrimage Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church-of-pilgrimage-spirit-npc.pngChurch of PilgrimageSpirit NPCnanThe Church of Pilgrimage Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. They can be found outside of the Church of Pilgrimage in the Weeping Peninsula.0
14Count Ymir, High Priesthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ymir.pngCathedral of Manus MetyrMerchantMatthew GravelleCount Ymir, High Priest is an NPC in Elden Ring. Count Ymir, High Priest is a High Priest who oversees the Cathedral of Manus Metyr. He sells a collection of spells that can be purchased with runes. He has a servant named Jolan, who can be summoned during certain fights after progressing his questline. Count Ymir, High Priest is an NPC exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC and does not appear in the base game.1
15D, Beholder of Deathhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/d_twin_brother_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgNokron, Eternal CityQuest NPC and Summon???D, Beholder of Death (real name: Devin) is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be found in Nokron, Eternal City, east of the Great Waterfall Basin grace. To interact with D, Beholder of Death, you need the Twinned Armor. If given the armor, he will be available as a summon against the Valiant Gargoyle pair. He is the twin brother of Darian, also known as D, Hunter of the Dead.0
16D, Hunter of the Deadhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/d-hunter-of-the-dead-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgRoundtable HoldQuest NPC and SummonHuw ParmenterD, Hunter of the Dead is an NPC in Elden Ring. D is a hunter of the undead who can be found where the Tibia Mariner boss is located, and later at the Roundtable Hold. When you first encounter D, he will warn you that the nearby small town of Summonwater Village has been taken over by a Mariner. If the player shows him Deathroot and takes him up on his offer of introduction, he will mark your map with a red "Sending Gate" waypoint, indicating that it will take you to the Beast Clergymen.0
17Deathtouched Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/deathtouchedspirit.jpgOutside the Deathtouched CatacombsSpirit NPCnanThe Deathtouched Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be found sitting defeated out the front of the Deathtouched Catacombs in Northern Limgrave.0
18Knight Dialloshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/diallos-npc-elden-ring-wiki-300px-min.jpegRoundtable HoldQuest NPCPeter CaulfieldDiallos is an NPC in Elden Ring. Diallos is a noble you'll come across at the Roundtable Hold. Upon welcoming you, he mentions that he's looking for a loyal servant to his house called Lanya, and asks you to tell him if you happen to come across her.0
19Dragon Communion Priestesshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/priestess.pngGrand Altar of Dragon CommunionQuestline RelatedKajsa MohammarDragon Communion Priestess is an NPC in Elden Ring. Dragon Communion Priestess is a survivor of the ancient dragon worshippers, or also known as servants of Dragonlord Placidusax. Dragon Communion Priestess is exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC and does not appear in the base game.1
20Dryleaf Danehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dryleaf.pngMoorth RuinsEnir-IlimMini-BossAlec NewmanDryleaf Dane is an NPC in Elden Ring. Dryleaf Dane is an NPC exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree expansion. Dryleaf Dane is a master of hand-to-hand combat, he leaves a Monk's Missive for travelers to find and wish to seek a challenge and learn the way of the warrior.1
21Dung Eaterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dung_eater_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgRoundtable Hold Subterannean Shunning-GroundsQuest NPC, Invader, and SummonJim JohnsonRoundtable Hold0
22Eclipse Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/eclipsespiritb.jpgChurch of Eclipse, Castle SolSpirit NPCnanThe Eclipse Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be seen praying inside the Church of Eclipse.0
23Edgarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/edgar-npcs-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgCastle Morne, Weeping PeninsulaMorne Castellan, Quest NPCRichard HainsworthEdgar is an NPC in Elden Ring. Edgar is Irina's father and introduces himself as the warden of Castle Morne. He can be found sitting on a bench in a non-hostile area of the ramparts of the castle. His NPC Summon Sign can be used to fight against the Leonine Misbegotten once he has received Irina's Letter.0
24Eniahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/enia-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgRoundtable HoldFinger ReaderSouad Faressnan0
25Ensha of the Royal Remainshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ensha.pngRoundtable HoldNPC InvadernanEnsha of the Royal Remains or Ensha is an NPC in Elden Ring. He will refuse to speak to the player, but instead stare at them. He is the servant of Gideon Ofnir.0
26Erdtree Sanctuary Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtreesanctuaryspirit.jpgOutside Erdtree SanctuaryBenevolentnanErdtree Sanctuary Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He is sitting in a chair facing the bridge that connects the Queen's Bedchamber to the Elden Throne.0
27Fia, Deathbed Companionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fia-npc-elden-ring-wiki-300px2-min.jpegRoundtable HoldQuest NPCChiara GoldsmithFia is an NPC in Elden Ring. Fia is a deathbed companion that you will find inside a small bedroom at the Roundtable Hold. Her embrace will give you a special consumable that can increase poise called the Baldachin's Blessing, at the cost of a debuff that slightly decreases your maximum HP. You can ostensibly come back for more if you happen to run out of this consumable. Fia's Questline Steps are highlighted below.0
28Finger Maiden TherolinananRedmane Castle, Caria ManorNPC SummonnanFinger Maiden Therolina is an NPC in Elden Ring. Finger Maiden Therolina is a sorcerer controlled by Seluvis and one of participants in Radahns' Festival0
29Fire Knight Queelignhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/queelign.pngNPC Invader:Belurat Tower SettlementChurch of CrusadePhysical Body:Church District, Shadow KeepNPC Invader, NPCGeorge BlagdenFire Knight Queelign is an NPC in Elden Ring. Fire Knight Queelign is an NPC exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree expansion, he is a knight who pledges his loyalty to Marika. Fire Knight Queelign is first encountered as an NPC Invader in Belurat Tower Settlement and at the Church of Crusade.1
30Frenzied Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frenziedspirit.jpgNear the Church of InhibitionSpirit NPCnanThe Frenzied Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be seen near the Church of Inhibition of in Northern Liurnia.0
31Redmane Freyjahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/freyja.pngThree-Paths Cross, Gravesite PlainCooperator, Questline RelatedStefanie MartiniRedmane Freyja is an NPC in Elden Ring. Redmane Freyja is a former follower of Radahn, but is now a fervent follower of Miquella. Redmane Freyja is an NPC that can be found exclusively in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC, and can't be found in the base game.1
32Frustrated Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ghost_1_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgNorthernmost part of LimgraveBenevolentnanFrustrated Spirit was an NPC in Elden Ring. Frustrated Spirit would lay beside the gates to a Colosseum North-East of Stormhill Shack.0
33The Gate Town Bridge Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rayaspirit.jpgLiurnia HighwayBenevolentnanThe Gate Town Bridge Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He is upset over the Raya Lucaria Academy closing their gates to him.0
34Gatekeeper Gostochttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gostoc.jpgStormveil Castle EntranceNPC and MerchantBen FoxGatekeeper Gostoc is an NPC in Elden Ring. Gatekeeper Gostoc is an old tall fellow that may seem a bit suspicious, but he seems to want to help. It is your choice to trust him or not.0
35Gideon Ofnirhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gidron-ofnir-roundtable-hold-npc-elden-ring-wiki-300px2-min.jpegRoundtable HoldGuide and Lore NPCJoe McGannGideon Ofnir is an NPC in Elden Ring. Gideon Ofnir is the leader of Roundtable Hold and a profound source of knowledge. He can be found most commonly at his office, absorbed by an endless amount of books.0
36Godwyn the Goldenhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/godwyn_corpse.jpgDeeproot DepthsFirst Demigod to dienanGodwyn the Golden was a demigod and son of Queen Marika the Eternal and Godfrey the First Elden Lord. In the "Night of the Black Knives" he was assassinated by assassins from the land of the Numen with the use of daggers imbued with the Rune of Death. Godwyn the Golden was the firstborn son of Queen Marika the Eternal and her consort Godfrey, the First Elden Lord. Godwyn was a scion of the so-called "Golden Line", of which Godrick the Grafted was the final descendant. Early in his mother's divine reign, the Erdtree came under assault by the Dragons, who had ruled the world before Marika's ascent. The forces of the Erdtree managed to triumph against the dragons, with Godwyn prevailing against the dreaded Fortissax, earning the mighty dragon's friendship in the process. Godwyn would eventually meet his end during the Night of Black Knives. Seeking to be free from her fate as a pawn of the Greater Will, Godwyn's step-sister Lunar Princess Ranni stole a fragment of the rune of death from Maliketh, imbuing the weapons of Numen assassins with the rune. Ranni wished to shed her Empyrean body but preserve her spirit, which meant that someone else's spirit would need to die. Nevertheless, when the assassins fell upon the Royal Capital and murdered Godwyn, his soul was destroyed and left only his soulless body behind. He was the first demigod in history to die since the ascension of Marika to the throne of the Lands Between. Godwyn's death would be the catalyst for the Shattering of the Elden Ring, plunging the kingdom into chaos without the guidance of the Greater Will. Due to Ranni's ritual, Godwyn's flesh was branded with half of the cursemark of death and he became the first of Those Who Live in Death. His body was laid to rest deep in the roots of the Erdtree, but it would eventually corrupt it, leading Deathroot to sprout across the Lands Between, causing others to also rise in undeath. These undead worshipped Godwyn as the Prince of Death, believing he would eventually return and lead them. An aspect of Godwyn's corpse appeared in the depths of Stormveil Castle and is responsible for the loss of Rogier's legs. Many figures, including his half-brother Miquella and his companion Fortissax, tried to cure him of his condition and allow him a proper death, but to no avail. The deathbed companion Fia would become a leading figure among Those Who Live in Death, eventually making her way to Godwyn's corpse. Having received the other half of the cursemark from Ranni's discarded body with help from a Tarnished champion, Fia lay with Godwyn to grant him a second life as the Prince of Death. As a result of their union, Fia conceived a rune, which a champion seeking to become Elden Lord might use to mend the Elden Ring, reimbuing the principle of death within the Golden Order.0
37Goldmaskhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/goldmask_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide300px.jpgAltus Plateau Leyndell, Royal CapitalMountaintops of the GiantsQuest NPCUnknownAltus Plateau Leyndell, Royal CapitalMountaintops of the Giants0
38Gowryhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gowry-location-npc-elden-ring-wiki-300px-min-min.jpegGowry's Shack, CaelidElder SageStephen Boxernan0
39Grape Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grapespirit.jpgStormveil CastleBenevolentnanThe Grape Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. Located in Stormveil Castle. He is looking for a maiden to give his grapes to and seems to have lost one, since a Shabiri Grape can be found beside him.0
40Gurranq, Beast Clergymanhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gurranqbeast.jpgBestial Sanctum, CaelidSpecial TraderJonathan KeebleGurranq, Beast Clergyman is an NPC in Elden Ring. Gurranq appears to be a large, hunched creature that lies isolated in the Bestial Sanctum. Constantly hungering for Deathroot, he will reward those who offer it to him.0
41Hermit Merchant (Leyndell)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/hermit_merchant_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide.pngHermit Merchant's Shack, Leyndell Royal CapitalMerchant???Hermit Merchant (Leyndell) is an NPC in Elden Ring. Hermit Merchant (Leyndell) lives a life of seclusion within Hermit Merchant (Leyndell)'s Shack.0
42Hornsenthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/hornsent.pngThree-Paths Cross, Realm of ShadowAmicable NPC, Invader NPCJonathan ForbesHornsent is an NPC in Elden Ring. Hornsent can be found alongside Freyja at the Three-Paths Cross in the Realm of Shadow. He is exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC, and can't be found in the base game.1
43Hornsent Grandamhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/hornsent_grandam_npcs_sote_wiki_guide300px1.jpgStoreroom, Belurat, Tower SettlementHornsent SurvivorSorcha CusackHornsent Grandam is an NPC in Elden Ring. Hornsent Grandam is a member of the antique race that inhabited Belurat, Tower Settlement. Her people were set to the torch by Messmer the Impaler and his forces. Hornsent Grandam is an NPC exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC, and is not present in the base game.1
44Hyettahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/hyetta_2_fix_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgLiurnia of the LakesSubterranean Shunning-GroundsQuest NPCClare CorbettLiurnia of the LakesSubterranean Shunning-Grounds0
45Igonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/igon.pngGravesite PlainJagged PeakDrake Warrior, NPC Quest RelatedRichard LinternIgon is an NPC in Elden Ring. Igon can be heard screaming in pain, and swearing revenge against a dragon. Igon is an NPC exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC and does not appear in the base game.1
46Imprisoned Merchanthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/imprisoned_merchant.jpgMohgwyn Dynasty MausoleumGeneral Goods ShopnanImprisoned Merchant is an NPC and Merchant in Elden Ring. Similar to Nomadic Merchants, the Imprisoned Merchant serves as a general goods vendor, selling various Consumables, Ammunition and other items. He can be found inside the Mohgwyn Dynasty Mausoleum.0
47Irinahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/irina_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgBridge of Sacrifice, Weeping PeninsulaQuest NPCClare CorbettIrina is an NPC in Elden Ring. Irina is a blind character wearing a ribbon over her eyes, and a dirty dress stained with blood. She can be encountered just beyond the Bridge of Sacrifice, on the Weeping Peninsula Side. Irina warns you about a rebellion in Castle Morne, and asks you to deliver a letter to her father, commander of the castle forces.0
48Iron Fist Alexanderhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/alexander_npc_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgnannanKevin Howarthnan0
49Isolated Merchant Raya Lucariahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/isolated-merchant-raya-lucaria-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgRaya Lucaria Academy, Liurnia of the LakesGeneral Goods Shop???Raya Lucaria0
50Jar Bairnhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/image_2022-03-17_071433.pngJarburg, Liurnia of the LakesQuest NPCGrace Saifnan0
51Jolanhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/jolan_(1).pngCathedral of Manus MetyrServant of Count YmirEleanor MatsuuraJolan is an NPC in Elden Ring. Jolan is a servant dressed in all black and can be found in the Cathedral of Manus Metyr. In the same room where you speak with Count Ymir, she can be seen on the pillar to your right.1
52Kenneth Haighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/kenneth_haight_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgLimgraveNext Rightful Ruler of LimgraveWilliam GaminaraKenneth Haight is an NPC in Elden Ring. Kenneth Haight claims to be the next ruler of Limgrave, you will encounter him as you make your way down the ledges at Limgrave. Haight will ask for your help to clean and clear out Fort Haight that's currently being overrun by different enemies.0
53Kingsrealm Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/kingsrealm_spirit.jpgInside the Kingsrealm RuinsSpirit NPCnanKingsrealm Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. Kingrealm Spirit rests at the Kingsrealm Ruins in Northern Liurnia.0
54Knight Bernahlhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/knight_bernahl_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgWarmaster's ShackVolcano ManorAsh of War MerchantFergus O'DonnellKnight Bernahl (later known as Recusant Bernahl) is an NPC in Elden Ring. Bernahl is a Tarnished Knight initially found at the Warmaster's Shack in central Stormhill. He serves as an Ash of War merchant, selling various ashes in exchange for Runes. He is also involved in certain questlines and will move locations according to player progress. Upon meeting him and progressing his storyline, he can become available as an NPC Summon against the Godskin Duo, as well as an NPC Invader.0
55Laiedd Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/laieddspirit.jpgFort LaieddBenevolentnanThe Laiedd Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He is hiding in Fort Laiedd.0
56Latennahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/latenna-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLiurnia of the Lakes, Slumbering Wolf's ShackQuest NPCJennifer EnglishLatenna is an NPC in Elden Ring. Latenna can be found after finishing the Lakeside Crystal Cave dungeon located under the southern ridge of Liurnia. She willingly becomes a Spirit to join the player, becoming Latenna the Albinauric.0
57Lionel the Lionheartedhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lionel-the-lionhearted-invader-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.pngDeeproot DepthsSummon and BossnanLionel the Lionhearted is an NPC in Elden Ring. Lionel the Lionhearted acts as the Father of Fia and can be encountered as an NPC Invader as one of Fia's Champions. He is also available as an NPC Summon and can be seen wielding a Great Epee, as well as the Prince of Deaths Staff, casting Rancorcall and Fias Mist.0
58Liurnian Highway Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/liurnianhighwayspirit.jpgLiurnia Highway NorthBenevolentnanThe Liurnian Highway Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be found on the Liurnia Highway in a defeated position, talking about puppet soliders.0
59Liurnian Lake Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/liurnianlakespirit.jpgNear Revengers Shack, Liurnia of the LakesBenevolentnanThe Liurnian Lake Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be found knelt down in the shallow water, just east of the Revenger's Shack.0
60Lost Snow Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lostsnowspirit.jpgConsecrated SnowfieldSpirit NPCnanThe Lost Snow Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He is lost and looking for the Haligtree.0
61Master Lusathttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/20220315163048_1.jpgSellia HideawaynannanMaster Lusat is an NPC in Elden Ring. Master Lusat can be found at Sellia Hideaway.0
62Melinahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/melina_1.jpgThe beginning of the Tarnished's journey.MaidenMartha Mackintoshnan0
63Merchant Kalehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/merchant-kale-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgLimgrave: Church of EllehGeneral Goods ShopnanMerchant Kale is a Merchant and NPC in Elden Ring. Merchant Kale can be found in Limgrave: Church of Elleh, soon after emerging from the Stranded Graveyard at the start of the game, youll see a building to the North which is the Church of Elleh.0
64Millicenthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/millicent-npc-elden-ring-wiki-300px-min-min-min.jpegChurch of the PlagueQuest NPC and Summonable CooperatorAllegra Marlandnan0
65Millicent's SistersnanElphael, Brace of the HaligtreeEnding of Millicent questlinenanMillicent's Sisters is a NPC collective in Elden Ring. They are group of female warriors associated with Gowry.0
66Miquellahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/screenshot_2024-07-10_210339.pngLand of ShadownanNaomi McDonaldMiquella, also known as Miquella the Kind, is a background character in Elden Ring and a central character in Shadow of the Erdtree. One of the Empyrean children of Queen Marika, he is the twin brother of Malenia, Blade of Miquella, together known as the Twin Prodigies. It is revealed that Miquella has stripped himself of his flesh and Empyrean lineage in the Land of Shadow, a place obscured by the Erdtree and purged in an unsung war.1
67Miriel, Pastor of Vowshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mirel_pastor_of_vow.jpgChurch of VowsMerchantMatthew MarshMiriel, Pastor of Vows is an NPC in Elden Ring. Miriel, Pastor of Vows is the Liurna Church of Vow's steward, a huge silver tortoise wearing a mitre. He first interacts with you when arriving at the Church of Vows. Miriel, Pastor of Vows welcomes you and offers to share their knowledge of Sorceries and Incantations, as well as lore on certain characters.0
68Moorehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/moore.pngOutside Belurat, Tower SettlementMerchantFreddy CarterMoore is an NPC in Elden Ring. Moore is one of the followers of Miquella. A gentle giant that also acts as a Merchant. Moore is an NPC exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC and does not appear in the base game.1
69Morne Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mornespirit.jpgCastle MorneBenevolentnanThe Morne Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be found locked inside a cage behind the castle.0
70Needle Knight Ledahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/elden_ring_leda.jpgMoghwyn PalaceMiquella's Followers LeaderNaomi YangNeedle Knight Leda is an NPC in Elden Ring. Needle Knight Leda is the leader of Miquella's band of followers in the Realm of Shadow. She is an NPC exclusive to Shadow of the Erdtree and does not appear in the base game.1
71Nepheli Loux, Warriorhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/nepheli-loux-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgStormveil CastleQuest NPC and SummonCara TheoboldNepheli Loux, Warrior is an NPC in Elden Ring. Nepheli Loux is a warrior and fellow tarnished who was ordered by decree from her adoptive father to kill and dethrone Godrick. She wears clothing similar to the starting Hero class, and she can help you in the battle against Godrick the Grafted if summoned. Her summoning sign is golden and is just outside the boss fog. Other NPC Summon opportunities include boss fights against Godfrey, First Elden Lord and Omenkiller (in Village of the Albinaurics). Progress in her questline to have her summon sign available for these encounters.0
73Nomadic Merchant Central ALTUS PLATEAUhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/nomadic_merchant_npc_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgForest-Spanning Greatbridge, Altus PlateauGeneral Goods Shop???Central ALTUS PLATEAU0
74Patcheshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/patches-npc-photo-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpgMurkwater Cave, LimgraveLiurniaMt. GelmirVolcano ManorThe Shaded CastleBoss, Merchant, Quest NPC, SummonWill VanderpuyePatches the Untethered is a Merchant, NPC, and Field Boss in Elden Ring. Patches is a recurring character in From Software games, usually playing the part of a trickster. He can be found in Murkwater Cave. This is an optional boss as players do not need to defeat him to advance.0
75Pidia, Carian Servanthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pidia_carian_servant_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgCaria ManorMerchant-Pidia, Carian Servant is an NPC in Elden Ring, found in Caria Manor. He sells high end goods.0
76Preceptor Seluvishttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/seluvis_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgSeluvis's Rise, Three SistersQuest NPC and MerchantCharles DalePreceptor Seluvis is an NPC in Elden Ring. Seluvis is a pompous sorcerer in service to Ranni the Witch. Seluvis Questline is important for players looking to make Magic Builds, so make sure to read all the Seluvis Questline steps below including a potential lockout due to your choices. Seluvis is first encountered in spectral form at Ranni's Rise in the Three Sisters sub-region of Liurnia of the Lakes.0
77Primeval Sorcerer Azurhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/primeval_sorcerer_azur_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgHermit VillagenannanPrimeval Sorcerer Azur is an NPC in Elden Ring. Azur can be found near the cliffs north of the Hermit Village in Mt. Gelmir.0
78Queen Marika the Eternalhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/queen-marika-lore-npc-elden-ring-wiki-300px.jpegWithin the ErdtreeRuler of The Lands BetweennanQueen Marika the Eternal is a background character in Elden Ring and Shadow of the Erdtree. She is the current ruler of the Lands Between, and the one who shattered the Elden Ring. She has many powerful Demigod offspring, who seek the Elden Ring's remaining power (see Elden Ring Timeline).1
79Ranni Witch Carian Lunar Princesshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ranni-the-witch-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpgRanni's Rise, Three SistersMain NPC - Affects EndingsAimee-Ffion Edwardsnan0
81Rennahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/the-snow-witch-npc-infobox-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpgLimgraveThe StorytellerAimee-Ffion EdwardsAimee-Ffion Edwards0
82Rennala, Queen of the Full Moonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rennala-queen-of-the-moon-raya-lucaria-academy-walkthrough-elden-ring-wiki-guide-600px-min.jpgAcademy of Raya LucariaLast Carian QueenMali HarriesRennala, Queen of the Full Moon is an NPC in Elden Ring. Rennala gives access to the Rebirth function, allowing the player to reallocate their stats by using a Larval Tear (also called respeccing). She can also be used to change the player's appearance.0
83Roderikahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/woman_with_a_red_hood_npc_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgStormhill ShackRoundtable HoldSpirit-TunerHelen MonksRoderika is an NPC in Elden Ring. Roderika is a spirit-tuner that you will encounter at Stormhill Shack on the trail to Stormveil. She will later move to the Roundtable Hold if you progress her quest.0
84Ryahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rya_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgVolcano ManorScoutEllie HeydonRya is an NPC in Elden Ring. Rya acts as a scout for the Volcano Manor, and is the adopted daughter of Tanith.0
85Rykard, Lord of Blasphemyhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rykard_lord_of_blasphemy_bosses_elden_ring_wiki_600px1.jpgVolcano ManornannanGod-Devouring Serpent and Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy is a two-phase Demigod Boss in Elden Ring. The God-Devouring Serpent is a massive coiled serpent found at the Volcano Manor in Mt. Gelmir, and Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy is its true form that's revealed after the first phase is defeated. When Rykard offered himself up to the serpent in a pursuit of immortality, most of his followers turned on him and sought to bring him down with the Serpent-Hunter.0
86Sanguine Noble (NPC)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sanguine-noble-npc.jpegConsecrated SnowfieldnannanSanguine Noble is an NPC enemy invader located in the Consecrated Snowfields. By heading West of the Inner Consecrated Snowfield grace, and just North of the Yelough Anix Ruins towards the cliff edge.0
87Shabririhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/shabriri_npc_mountaintops_of_the_giants_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgMountaintops of the GiantsNPC and Summonable CooperatorShaun DooleyShabriri is an NPC in Elden Ring. Shabriri can be found at the Mountaintops of the Giants and looks exactly the same as Bloody Finger Hunter Yura, as he implies the hunter died and he has been given his body. Shabriri can become available as an NPC Summon against Godfrey, First Elden Lord depending on questline progress and ending route.0
88The Shaded Castle Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/shadedcastle_spiritt.jpgInside The Shaded CastleBenevolentnanThe Shaded Castle Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. The Shaded Castle Spirit lays defeated within The Shaded Castle.0
89Siofra River Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/siofrariverspiritc.jpgSiofra RiverBenevolentnanThe Siofra River Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be seen worshipping the Mohgwyn Dynasty Mausoleum.0
91Smithing Master Hewghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/blacksmith_hewg_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgRoundtable HoldBlacksmithJames DohertySmithing Master Hewg is an NPC in Elden Ring. Hewg is an imprisoned Misbegotten blacksmith that can be found at the Roundtable Hold. He will upgrade your Weapons beyond the +3 level, as well as duplicating Ashes of War for a fee, provided you have the proper Materials.0
92Sorcerer Rogierhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rogier_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgStormveil Castle Roundtable HoldMerchant, Quest NPC, and SummonBen NorrisStormveil Castle0
93Sorceress Sellenhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sorceress-sellen-npc-photo-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px-min.jpgLimgrave, Waypoint Ruins Weeping Peninsula, Witchbane RuinsMerchant and Quest NPCnanSorceress Sellen is a Merchant and NPC in Elden Ring. She can be found inside the Waypoint Ruins, far east from where you first arrive in Limgrave. She can teach you Sorceries. She can also be made available as an NPC Summon for specific battles.0
94St. Trinahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/elden-ring-st-trina-jpeg.jpgGarden of Deep Purple (Stone Coffin Fissure)NPC Quest RelatedJessica RhodesSt. Trina is an NPC in Elden Ring. She can be found in Stone Coffin Fissure and is vital to the progression of Thiollier's questline. St. Trina was first mentioned in the base game in various items like St. Trina's Torch and resembles Miquella.1
95Stranded Graveyard Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/strandedgraveyardspirit.jpgStranded GraveyardBenevolentnanThe Stranded Graveyard Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He is located in the Stranded Graveyard and tells you where the training area for the game is.0
96Study Hall Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/carianstudyhallspirit.jpgCarian Study HallBenevolentnanThe Study Hall Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be found inside the Carian Study Hall behind a pew.0
97Tanithhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tanith_npc_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300x.jpgVolcano ManorQuest NPCGemma WhelanTanith, Volcano Manor Proprietress is an NPC in Elden Ring. Tanith is the head of the Volcano Manor, and asks the players about joining forces against the Fingers. If you decide to join her quest, you will receive particular missions as well as access to some new Npcs.0
98The Great-Jarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/great-jar.pngCaelidNPCnanThe Great-Jar is an NPC in Elden Ring. The Great-Jar can be found in Northern Caelid, at the colosseum North of the Deep Siofra River Well Site of Grace.0
99The Two Fingershttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/two-fingers.pngRoundtable HoldMessenger of The Greater WillnanThe Two Fingers are an PC in Elden Ring. They are large, shriveled hands with only two fingers that are said to deliver messages of The Greater Will that only the finger readers can interpret.0
100Thiollierhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/thiollier.pngGravesite Plain, next to Pillar Path CrossMerchant, NPC Quest RelatedSam GlenThiollier is an NPC in Elden Ring. Thiollier has an eye for crafting poison and is not a fighter. Thiollier is an NPC that can be found exclusively in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC, and can't be found in the base game.1
101Thopshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/thops_npc_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgChurch of Irith in Liurnia of the LakesSorcery StudentMathew MorganThops is an NPC in Elden Ring. Thops is a student at the Academy of Raya Lucaria. He can teach some rudimentary sorceries, provided you can spare a small donation of Runes first.0
102Three Fingershttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/three_fingerssmall.jpgCathedral of the ForsakenQuest NPCnanThree Fingers is an NPC in Elden Ring. Three Fingers is an integral part of The Lord of Frenzied Flame ending and can be found near the Cathedral of the Forsaken, below the Subterranean Shunning-Grounds0
103Tower of Return Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tower_of_return_spirit.jpgOn a Western cliff in the Weeping PeninsulaBenevolentnanThe Tower of Return Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He rests on a rock with a forlonging stare towards the Tower of Return.0
104Twin Maiden Huskshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/twin_maiden_husks_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgRoundtable HoldMerchantnanTwin Maiden Husks is an NPC and Merchant in Elden Ring. Twin Maiden Husks look like two Finger Readers, holding a staff, and will take Bell Bearing objects to expand their inventory, giving players an option to purchase many Upgrade Materials and the stores of any dead merchant.0
105Two Fingershttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/two-fingers.pngRoundtable HoldGod Greater Will ManifestationnanGod0
106Volcano Manor SpiritnanVolcano ManorBenevolentnanThe Volcano Manor Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He rests in the Volcano Manor.0
107Wandering Artist Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flightlessbirdspiritcl.jpgLimgraveLakes of LiurniaDragonbarrowAltus PlateauMountaintops of the GiantsQuest NPCnanThe Wandering Artist Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He is the artist that painted the landscape paintings that can be collected through the Lands Between.For a guide and more information on the Wandering Artist Spirit's quest, visit the Paintings page.0
108Iji War Counselor & Carian Blacksmithhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/smithing-master-iji-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgKingsrealm Ruins, Western Liurnia of the LakesBlacksmith & Quest NPCAneirin HughesWar Counselor Iji is an NPC in Elden Ring. War Counselor Iji (first encountered as Smithing Master Iji) is a gentle Troll in charge of the smithing for the Carian royals, but will also provide his services to the player.Find him by heading north into the slopes of Western Liurnia of the Lakes.0
109White Mask Varrehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/white-faced-varre-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgVarious LocationsGuide and Quest NPCPip TorrensWhite Mask Varre is an NPC in Elden Ring. White Mask Varre is encountered near the start of the game, right by The First Step Site of Grace, and will offer advice to the player. He can be found multiple times in different locations as the story progresses.0
110Windmill Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/windmillspirit.jpgDominula, Windmill VillageBenevolentnanThe Windmill Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be found hiding from the Celebrants behind a cart and a wooden box in the Windmill Village.,0
111Witch-Hunter Jerrenhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/witch-hunter-jerren-npcs-elden-ring-wiki-300px-min.jpegRedmane Castle Academy of Raya LucariaQuest NPC and SummonShane AttwoollWitch-Hunter Jerren is an NPC in Elden Ring. Jerren, first known as Castellan Jerren, is a part of the Sorceress Sellen questline. He can also be seen as a herald, making proclamations about the Radahn Festival around Redmane Castle just as the festival is getting prepared to start. He then initiates the festival. Jerren has the opportunity to fight alongside players as an NPC Summon.0
0Abandoned Merchant Siofra Riverhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/nomadic-merchant-siofra-river-elden-ring-wiki-guide-300px.jpgSiofra RiverGeneral Goods ShopVoice Actor goes here.Abandoned Merchant Siofra River is an NPC and one of several Nomadic Merchants in Elden Ring. Abandoned Merchants sell various items and equipment including Consumables, Materials, Weapons and Armor as well as notes containing hints on how to acquire certain items. This Abandoned Merchant can be found inside one of the ruins in Central Siofra River.0
1Aeonian Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/swamp_of_aoenia_spirit.jpgNorthern cliff of Swamp of AeoniaBenevolentnanThe Aeonian Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He stands upon the northern cliffs of the Swamp of Aeonia.0
2Aeonian Swamp Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/aeonianswampspirit_.jpgAeonia Swamp ShoreBenevolentnanThe Aeonian Swamp Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He rests on the shore of the swamp and looks out towards the Heart of Aeonia.0
3Albinauric Village Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/albinauricvillagespiritb.jpgVillage of the AlbinauricsBenevolentnanThe Albinauric Village Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. Located in the Village of the Albinaurics, he wishes for Albus' safety and gives you a hint on how to find him.0
4Albushttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/albus-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgVillage of the Albinaurics, Liurnia of the LakesGives Key ItemMartyn EllisAlbus is an NPC in Elden Ring. Albus is an Albinauric who is trying to hide from the calamity that befell Village of the Albinaurics in Liurnia of the Lakes. He has an important item that he would like you to protect0
5Sir Ansbachhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ansbach(1).pngOutside Belurat, Tower SettlementPureblood Knight Captain (former), NPC Quest RelatedBen MilesSir Ansbach is an NPC in Elden Ring. Sir Ansbach is a former servant of Mohg, Lord of Blood, but is now part of the group that follows Miquella through the Realm of Shadow. Sir Ansbach is an NPC exclusive to Shadow of the Erdtree and does not appear in the base game.1
6Ashen Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ashen_spirit_b.jpgLeyndell, Ashen CapitalBenevolentnanAshen Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. Ashen Spirit can be found sitting on the ground in the ash.0

10Boc the Seamsterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/boc_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgLimgraveGarments Adjuster andQuest NPCCalvin A. DeanBoc the Seamster is an NPC in Elden Ring. Boc is a Demi-Human who is capable of advanced communication. Boc is initially met by the player in the form of a small tree.0
11Brother Corhynhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/brother_corhyn_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide.jpgRoundtable HoldMerchant and Quest NPCSamuel BarnettBrother Corhyn is an NPC in Elden Ring. Brother Corhyn is a holy practitioner who will teach you practical faith-based Incantations in exchange for Runes. You will encounter him once you've reached the Roundtable Hold.0
12Carian Manor Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/carianmanorspirit.jpgCarian ManorBenevolentnanThe Carian Manor Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be found sitting on a chair, inside the0
13Church of Pilgrimage Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/church-of-pilgrimage-spirit-npc.pngChurch of PilgrimageSpirit NPCnanThe Church of Pilgrimage Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. They can be found outside of the Church of Pilgrimage in the Weeping Peninsula.0
14Count Ymir, High Priesthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ymir.pngCathedral of Manus MetyrMerchantMatthew GravelleCount Ymir, High Priest is an NPC in Elden Ring. Count Ymir, High Priest is a High Priest who oversees the Cathedral of Manus Metyr. He sells a collection of spells that can be purchased with runes. He has a servant named Jolan, who can be summoned during certain fights after progressing his questline. Count Ymir, High Priest is an NPC exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC and does not appear in the base game.1
15D, Beholder of Deathhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/d_twin_brother_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgNokron, Eternal CityQuest NPC and Summon???D, Beholder of Death (real name: Devin) is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be found in Nokron, Eternal City, east of the Great Waterfall Basin grace. To interact with D, Beholder of Death, you need the Twinned Armor. If given the armor, he will be available as a summon against the Valiant Gargoyle pair. He is the twin brother of Darian, also known as D, Hunter of the Dead.0
16D, Hunter of the Deadhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/d-hunter-of-the-dead-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgRoundtable HoldQuest NPC and SummonHuw ParmenterD, Hunter of the Dead is an NPC in Elden Ring. D is a hunter of the undead who can be found where the Tibia Mariner boss is located, and later at the Roundtable Hold. When you first encounter D, he will warn you that the nearby small town of Summonwater Village has been taken over by a Mariner. If the player shows him Deathroot and takes him up on his offer of introduction, he will mark your map with a red "Sending Gate" waypoint, indicating that it will take you to the Beast Clergymen.0
17Deathtouched Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/deathtouchedspirit.jpgOutside the Deathtouched CatacombsSpirit NPCnanThe Deathtouched Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be found sitting defeated out the front of the Deathtouched Catacombs in Northern Limgrave.0
18Knight Dialloshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/diallos-npc-elden-ring-wiki-300px-min.jpegRoundtable HoldQuest NPCPeter CaulfieldDiallos is an NPC in Elden Ring. Diallos is a noble you'll come across at the Roundtable Hold. Upon welcoming you, he mentions that he's looking for a loyal servant to his house called Lanya, and asks you to tell him if you happen to come across her.0
19Dragon Communion Priestesshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/priestess.pngGrand Altar of Dragon CommunionQuestline RelatedKajsa MohammarDragon Communion Priestess is an NPC in Elden Ring. Dragon Communion Priestess is a survivor of the ancient dragon worshippers, or also known as servants of Dragonlord Placidusax. Dragon Communion Priestess is exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC and does not appear in the base game.1
20Dryleaf Danehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dryleaf.pngMoorth RuinsEnir-IlimMini-BossAlec NewmanDryleaf Dane is an NPC in Elden Ring. Dryleaf Dane is an NPC exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree expansion. Dryleaf Dane is a master of hand-to-hand combat, he leaves a Monk's Missive for travelers to find and wish to seek a challenge and learn the way of the warrior.1
21Dung Eaterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dung_eater_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_guide_300px.jpgRoundtable Hold Subterannean Shunning-GroundsQuest NPC, Invader, and SummonJim JohnsonRoundtable Hold0
22Eclipse Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/eclipsespiritb.jpgChurch of Eclipse, Castle SolSpirit NPCnanThe Eclipse Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be seen praying inside the Church of Eclipse.0
23Edgarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/edgar-npcs-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgCastle Morne, Weeping PeninsulaMorne Castellan, Quest NPCRichard HainsworthEdgar is an NPC in Elden Ring. Edgar is Irina's father and introduces himself as the warden of Castle Morne. He can be found sitting on a bench in a non-hostile area of the ramparts of the castle. His NPC Summon Sign can be used to fight against the Leonine Misbegotten once he has received Irina's Letter.0
24Eniahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/enia-npc-elden-ring-wiki-guide.jpgRoundtable HoldFinger ReaderSouad Faressnan0

26Erdtree Sanctuary Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtreesanctuaryspirit.jpgOutside Erdtree SanctuaryBenevolentnanErdtree Sanctuary Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He is sitting in a chair facing the bridge that connects the Queen's Bedchamber to the Elden Throne.0
27Fia, Deathbed Companionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fia-npc-elden-ring-wiki-300px2-min.jpegRoundtable HoldQuest NPCChiara GoldsmithFia is an NPC in Elden Ring. Fia is a deathbed companion that you will find inside a small bedroom at the Roundtable Hold. Her embrace will give you a special consumable that can increase poise called the Baldachin's Blessing, at the cost of a debuff that slightly decreases your maximum HP. You can ostensibly come back for more if you happen to run out of this consumable. Fia's Questline Steps are highlighted below.0
28Finger Maiden TherolinananRedmane Castle, Caria ManorNPC SummonnanFinger Maiden Therolina is an NPC in Elden Ring. Finger Maiden Therolina is a sorcerer controlled by Seluvis and one of participants in Radahns' Festival0
29Fire Knight Queelignhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/queelign.pngNPC Invader:Belurat Tower SettlementChurch of CrusadePhysical Body:Church District, Shadow KeepNPC Invader, NPCGeorge BlagdenFire Knight Queelign is an NPC in Elden Ring. Fire Knight Queelign is an NPC exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree expansion, he is a knight who pledges his loyalty to Marika. Fire Knight Queelign is first encountered as an NPC Invader in Belurat Tower Settlement and at the Church of Crusade.1
30Frenzied Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frenziedspirit.jpgNear the Church of InhibitionSpirit NPCnanThe Frenzied Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He can be seen near the Church of Inhibition of in Northern Liurnia.0
31Redmane Freyjahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/freyja.pngThree-Paths Cross, Gravesite PlainCooperator, Questline RelatedStefanie MartiniRedmane Freyja is an NPC in Elden Ring. Redmane Freyja is a former follower of Radahn, but is now a fervent follower of Miquella. Redmane Freyja is an NPC that can be found exclusively in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC, and can't be found in the base game.1
32Frustrated Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ghost_1_npcs_elden_ring_wiki_300px.jpgNorthernmost part of LimgraveBenevolentnanFrustrated Spirit was an NPC in Elden Ring. Frustrated Spirit would lay beside the gates to a Colosseum North-East of Stormhill Shack.0
33The Gate Town Bridge Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rayaspirit.jpgLiurnia HighwayBenevolentnanThe Gate Town Bridge Spirit is an NPC in Elden Ring. He is upset over the Raya Lucaria Academy closing their gates to him.0
34Gatekeeper Gostochttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gostoc.jpgStormveil Castle EntranceNPC and MerchantBen FoxGatekeeper Gostoc is an NPC in Elden Ring.
