Deals holy damage. Such is the mark of those who serve Maliketh, the Black Blade.0{'Str': 24, 'Dex': 8, 'Fai': 22}StandardGreataxesNo passive effectsWar Cry16nannannannannannannannannannannan
192193.0Winged Greathornhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/winged_greathorn_greataxe_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png11.0Distinctive horn suffused with the power of ancestral spirits. This large, wing-shaped specimen is wielded as a weapon of spirit worship.In the ancestral spirit-worshipping faith, these are considered envoys' wings, made to reap the lives of beings which experience no sprouting.0{'Str': 30, 'Dex': 20}StandardGreataxesNo passive effectsSoul Stifler12nannannannannannannannannannannan
193194.0Axe of Godrickhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/axe_of_godrick_greataxe_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png11.0Greataxe wielded by Godrick the Grafted. This golden battleaxe is emblazoned with the figure of a beast, representing the strength of Godfrey, First Elden Lord and patriarch of the golden lineage. "I command thee kneel! For I am the lord of all that is golden!"0{'Str': 34, 'Dex': 22}StandardGreataxesNo passive effectsI Command Thee, Kneel!15nannannannannannannannannannannan
194195.0Putrescence Cleaverhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/putrescence_cleaver_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png13.5Weapon wielded by the Putrescent Knight. A great cleaver of hardened putrescence affixed to an arch fashioned from human bones. Gains power from the wielder's arcane attribute.1{'Str': 28, 'Dex': 10, 'Arc': 15}SlashGreataxes(55) FrostbiteSpinning Guillotine12nannannannannannannannannannannan
195196.0Death Knight's Longhaft Axehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/death_knights_longhaft_axe_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png11.5A long-hafted golden axe wielded by the Death Knight. Bears a representation of a decayed golden ring. Crackles with lightning, the power of the capital's ancient dragon cult. The knight, once the personal guard of Godwyn, was also the protector of the Prince of Death's cadaver surrogate.1{'Str': 23, 'Dex': 10, 'Fai': 18}StandardGreataxesNo passive effectsBlinkbolt: Long-hafted Axe8nannannannannannannannannannannan
196197.0Bonny Butchering Knifehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bonny_butchering_knife_greataxe_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png8.5Weapon of the greater potentates of Bonny Village. An outsize butcher's cleaver used to dismember human bodies in the making of the great jars stored in the gaols. Restores a very small amount of HP when it squarely strikes an enemy.1{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 20}StandardGreataxesNo passive effectsHone Blade16nannannannannannannannannannannan
197198.0Clubhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/club_hammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5A thick, solid lump of wood.Wielding this striking weapon requires no skill. A simple, primitive weapon that requires only brute strength and persistence to hammer your foe into the ground.0{'Str': 10}StrikeHammersNo passive effectsBarbaric Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
198199.0Curved Clubhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/curved_club_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0Hard, curved club, shaped like a crescent moon. Wielded instead of a curved sword by Albinaurics lacking dexterity. The only point of similarity between the two is the shape.0{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 7}StrikeHammersNo passive effectsBarbaric Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
199200.0Spiked Clubhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spiked_club_hammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0A club with beast fangs wrapped around the striking end. The uneven spread of fangs causes blood loss. Given only to the toughest of demi-humans, this weapon is a badge of honor. Or so the demi-humans believe.0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 7}StrikeHammers(50) HemorrhageBarbaric Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
200201.0Stone Clubhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/stone_club_clubs_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png7.0Signature weapon of battlemages, hewn from hard glintstone. This club is much heavier than its size suggests, but has no magic power. So that they not lose sight of the true essence of combat, battlemages prefer to feel the impact of their blows, fighting their opponents hand to hand.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 8}StrikeHammersNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
201202.0Macehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mace_hammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5An iron bludgeon with sharp protrusions. Striking attacks have few drawbacks, potent as they are at breaking through guards and stances, Most suited to head on slugging matches.0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 7}StrikeHammersNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
202203.0Morning Starhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/morning_star_hammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0Battle hammer comprised of a globe attached to a handle. Though a bludgeon dealing strike damage, the appellative star is covered in spikes which cause blood loss. Ironic given its graceful name, this weapon often reeks of blood.0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 8}StrikeHammers(50) HemorrhageKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
203204.0Warpickhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/warpick_hammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Battle hammer with a hard protruding beak. A pickaxe designed for combat, in essence. A simple but highly effective weapon, the weighty piercing attack casually rips through metal armor.0{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 9}StrikeHammersNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
204205.0Hammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/hammer_hammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.5Hammer comprised of a large stone affixed to a metal handle.Originally a blacksmith's tool. The art of smithing is said to have originated among the giants.This weapon's striking attacks boast ample weight behind them.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 7}StrikeHammersNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
205206.0Monk's Flamemacehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/monks_flamemace_hammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.0Battle hammer made to resemble flickering flames. Signature weapon of the Fire Monks, who hail from the Mountaintops of the Giants. The unique strong attack rouses fiery combative spirit.0{'Str': 13, 'Dex': 13}StrikeHammersNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
206207.0Varre's Bouquethttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/varres_bouquet_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0A steel mace resembling a charming bouquet of roses. Each petal has a sharpened edge, leaving the roses perpetually colored with blood. This weapon reflects White Mask Varre's manner of speech rather well, enticing in its splendor, but full of deadly consequence.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 16, 'Arc': 24}StrikeHammersCauses blood loss buildup (65)Blood Tax14nannannannannannannannannannannan
207208.0Envoy's Hornhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/envoys_horn_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Golden horn of the Oracle Envoys. Profoundly weighty, its blows are sure to be felt. Originally an instrument, but one that cannot be sounded by a mere human. Or perhaps it is too early to sound the call.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 12, 'Fai': 16}StrikeHammersNo passive effectsOracular Bubble- 6nannannannannannannannannannannan
208209.0Nox Flowing Hammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/nox_flowing_hammer_hammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.5Mace shaped like a suspended metal droplet wielded by monks of the Eternal City. Forged from liquid metal from a Silver Tear, it is thoroughly tempered until hardened.0{'Str': 17, 'Dex': 7}StrikeHammersNo passive effectsFlowing Form16nannannannannannannannannannannan
209210.0Ringed Fingerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ringed_finger_hammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Bludgeon made of an enormous finger sheathed in several heavy rings. Thought to have been cut from an ancestor of the Fingercreeper. Some life yet remains in this legacy of an ancient act of blasphemy, as evidenced by the barely perceptible warmth it still exudes.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 9}StrikeHammersNo passive effectsClaw Flick14nannannannannannannannannannannan
210211.0Scepter of the All-Knowinghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/scepter_of_the_all-knowing_hammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Scepter in the form of a hand grasping a pearl. Signature weaponof Sir Gideon Ofnir, the All-Knowing. The pearl stands for theworld, the heavens, and an eye, representing the many forms ofknowledge, never fully attainable. Even knowing that, the All-Knowing's hand grasps for it.0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 18, 'Int': 21}Strike/PierceHammersNo passive effectsKnowledge Above All35nannannannannannannannannannannan
211212.0Marika's Hammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/marikas_hammer_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.0Stone hammer made in the lands of the Numen, outside the Lands Between. The tool with which Queen Marika shattered the Elden Ring and Radagon attempted to repair it. The hammer partially broke upon shattering the Ring, becoming splintered with rune fragments.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 12, 'Fai': 19}StrikeHammersNo passive effectsGold Breaker26nannannannannannannannannannannan
212213.0Flowerstone Gavelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flowerstone_gavel_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png6.0Weapon of the Dragon Communion priestess. A dragonstone hammer resembling an ancient flower. The four petals and the flower's core are all sharp, ending in points, and are capable of dealing heavy damage to dragons.1{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 8, 'Arc': 15}PierceHammersNo passive effectsFlower Dragonbolt18nannannannannannannannannannannan
213214.0Flailhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flail_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0Weapon consisting of a bludgeoning head attached to a handle by chain. The iron ball is spiked and induces blood loss. Blows from this weapon cannot be parried. The charge attack whirls the iron ball around for increased force before striking.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 18}StrikeFlails(50) HemorrhageSpinning Chain8 (8 10)nannannannannannannannannannannan
214215.0Nightrider Flailhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/nightrider_flail_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.0A flail with two additional bludgeoning heads. Weapon of the Night's Cavalry who ride funeral steeds. The large spikes make it highly effective at inducing blood loss, but also demand higher dexterity to wield.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 24}StrikeFlails(50) HemorrhageSpinning Chain8 (8 10)nannannannannannannannannannannan
215216.0Chainlink Flailhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/chainlink_flail_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0A spiked iron tube attached by a chain wielded by Mad Pumpkin Heads. Especially large for a flail, wielding it requires more strength than it does dexterity.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 12}StrikeFlails(50) HemorrhageSpinning Chain8 (8 10)nannannannannannannannannannannan
216217.0Family Headshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/family_heads_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Three bludgeoning copper heads attached to a handle by chains. Signature weapon of Necromancer Garris, the heretical sage.The heads were made to resemble those of his wife and two children.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 18, 'Int': 16}StrikeFlailsNo passive effectsFamilial Rancor25nannannannannannannannannannannan
217218.0Bastard's Starshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bastards_stars_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Flail which deals magic damage, having been imbued with power by the remembrance of Astel. Formed of the same many-colored star debris that comprised the form of the Naturalborn of the Void.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 22, 'Int': 22}StrikeFlailsNo passive effectsNebula25nannannannannannannannannannannan
218219.0Serpent Flailhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/serpent_flail_flails_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png6.0A flail with coiled snakes for bludgeoning heads. Fire roars within the snakes' bodies, inflicting horrible burns. Some of Messmer's army used these flails to burn hornsentto brand them with agony and fear.1{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 24, 'Fai': 21}StrikeFlailsNo passive effectsFlare, O Serpent8nannannannannannannannannannannan
219220.0Large Clubhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/large_club_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.5A thick, solid lump of wood. Wielding this striking weapon requires no skill. A simple, primitive weapon that requires only brute strength to swing about.0{'Str': 22}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsBarbaric Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
220221.0Curved Great Clubhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/curved_great_club_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Large curved club of hard wood, shaped like a crescent moon. Wielded by Albinaurics lacking the dexterity demanded by a curved sword, and who prefer the added weight and destructive force.0{'Str': 24, 'Dex': 10}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsBarbaric Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
221222.0Great Macehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/great_mace_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png11.5Huge bludgeon with sharp protrusions. An enlarged version of its smaller cousin. Maintains all the advantages of smaller bludgeons, boasting few deficiencies while being very capable at breaking enemy guards and stances. A shrewd choice for simple slugging matches.0{'Str': 28}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
222223.0Pickaxehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pickaxe_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Large pickaxe designed to crack thick bedrock. Tool of sturdy miners. Not originally designed as a weapon, but very adept at piercing armor. "Little wretches, do you think your armor harder than stone?"0{'Str': 22, 'Dex': 10}PierceGreat HammersNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
223224.0Brick Hammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/brick_hammer_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png12.5Weapon made from an ordinary stone brick. Wielded by a laborer who lead a rebellion, and later become a champion himself. Even among other bludgeons of its size, this weapon is especially weighty. The strength of a giant is required to wield it.0{'Str': 31}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsBarbaric Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
225226.0Battle Hammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/battle_hammer_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Large iron great hammer designed for gladiatorial combat. Used by duelists who were exiled from the colosseum. Weighty enough to crush armor and its wearer alike.0{'Str': 26, 'Dex': 8}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsBraggart's Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
226227.0Rotten Battle Hammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rotten_battle_hammer_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Large iron great hammer designed for gladiatorial combat, now festering with scarlet rot. Weighty enough to crush armor and its wearer alike. Skill: Braggart's Roar Declare your presence with a boastful roar. Raises attack power, defense, and stamina recovery speed.0{'Str': 26, 'Dex': 8}StrikeGreat Hammers(65) Scarlet RotBraggart's Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
227228.0Celebrant's Skullhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/celebrants_skull_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.5Large bludgeon decorated with flowers and many-colored fabrics. Ceremonial tool used by dancers during the festivities of Dominula, Windmill Village. The striking end is a skull too large in size to be human. Grants trace amounts of runes on landing attacks.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 12}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsBarbaric Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
228229.0Great Starshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/great_stars_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Huge bludgeon with three stars at the striking end. Though primarily a striking weapon, the stars' spikes cause blood loss.A blood-stained star is an ill omen, a fact not lost upon those against whom this weapon is brought to bear. Landing attacks slightly restores HP.0{'Str': 22, 'Dex': 12}StrikeGreat Hammers(55) HemorrhageEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
230231.0Greathorn Hammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/greathorn_hammer_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Huge thick horn carved with tree ring-like markings adapted into a bludgeoning weapon. Wielded by ancestral follower warriors. The ancient horn is imbued with the power of ancestral spirits. A small amount of HP is restored upon defeating an enemy.0{'Str': 22, 'Dex': 10}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsBarbaric Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
231232.0Envoy's Long Hornhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/envoys_long_horn_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png9.5Long golden horn of the Oracle Envoys. Profoundly weighty, its blows are sure to be felt. Originally an instrument, but one that cannot be sounded by a mere human. Or perhaps it is too early to sound the call.0{'Str': 23, 'Dex': 11, 'Fai': 18}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsBubble Shower16nannannannannannannannannannannan
232233.0Cranial Vessel Candlestandhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cranial_vessel_candlestand_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png12.5Candlestand used in worship of Birac, the most hallowed MonkPrelate of the Giants' Flame. Concerned over the lazy arrogancewith which the monks treated the Flame, Birac severed his ownhead as a lesson to the others, intending it be used as a candlestand. His faith yet smolders from within the cranial vessel.0{'Str': 26, 'Dex': 8, 'Fai': 22}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsSurge of Faith15 (-15)nannannannannannannannannannannan
233234.0Beastclaw Greathammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/beastclaw_greathammer_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0Greathammer with a striking end modelled to resemble five beastly claws. The black nails protruding from golden fur are said to represent Serosh, Lord of Beasts, who went to become King Godfrey's Regent.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 10, 'Fai': 18}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsRegal Beastclaw20nannannannannannannannannannannan
234235.0Devourer's Scepterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/devourers_scepter_warhammer_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png11.5Scepter in the shape of a serpent devouring the world. Thisweapon will one day become the very symbol of the Lord of Blasphemy.One of the legendary armaments. A vision of the future briefly seen by Rykard in his final momentsbefore being devoured by the great serpent.0{'Str': 24, 'Dex': 20, 'Fai': 25}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsDevourer of Worlds35nannannannannannannannannannannan
235236.0Black Steel Greathammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black_steel_greathammer_great_hammer_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png12.0Weapon of the Black Knights, servants of Messmer the Impaler. Greathammer of black steel with decorative embellishments in gold. Blessed with an Erdtree incantation. Further holy imbuement will amplify the effect and greatly increase the armament's power. Guard Counters cause a burst of power.1{'Str': 25, 'Dex': 11, 'Fai': 17}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
236237.0Smithscript Greathammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/smithscript_greathammer_great_hammer_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0Greathammer engraved with a smithscript. A throwing weapon created through the smithing arts. Execute a strong attack or dashing strong attack to spin and fling the greathammer.1{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 10, 'Int': 11, 'Fai': 11}StrikeGreat HammersNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan

238239.0Rotten Greataxehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rotten_greataxe_colossal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png20.0Greataxe designed for gladiatorial combat, now festering with scarlet rot. 240241.0Giant-Crusherhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/giant-crusher_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png26.5A hammer made from a boulder, used in the War against the Giants.One of the heftiest weapons in the entire Lands Between. After the giants were quelled, and man turned against man in violence, this weapon was all but forgotten. Man has grown feeble in comparison to his forebears.0{'Str': 60}StrikeColossal WeaponsNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
241242.0Prelate's Inferno Crozierhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/prelates_inferno_crozier_colossal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png23.5Colossal hammer with the appearance of roiling flames. The hammer's head is unusually substantial, and strong attacks' will fling foes into the air.0{'Str': 45, 'Dex': 8}StrikeColossal WeaponsNo passive effectsPrelate's Charge7 (7)nannannannannannannannannannannan
242243.0Great Clubhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/great_club_colossal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png17.0An enormous club of hardwood. Wildly hammering foes with this striking weapon requires no dexterity; only brute force. While it may seem sacrilegious, this weapon is said to be a withered branch of the Erdtree. Imbued with holy power, this weapon will never snap.0{'Str': 35}StrikeColossal WeaponsNo passive effectsGolden Land16 ( - 5)nannannannannannannannannannannan
243244.0Troll's Hammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/trolls_hammer_colossal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png16.0Mining tool of stonedigger trolls used to crack bedrock. Trolls are descended from the giants, and these were supposedly once used as ceremonial smithing tools. In the distant past, smithing was considered divine.0{'Str': 28, 'Dex': 8, 'Fai': 10}StrikeColossal WeaponsNo passive effectsTroll's Roar22nannannannannannannannannannannan
244245.0Dragon Greatclawhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragon_greatclaw_colossal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png16.0Weapon said to have been whittled from the claw of a great, ancient dragon, wielded by grotesque Tree Sentinels who yet serve the Erdtree. The claw is enwreathed with lightning, and tears through the dragons' feeble descendants with ease.0{'Str': 30, 'Dex': 14}StandardColossal WeaponsNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
245246.0Watchdog's Staffhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/watchdog_staff_colossal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png19.0Large stone staff embedded with glintstone. Wielded by Erdtree Burial Watchdogs who protect catacombs. The Watchdogs, battered and broken over their lengthy tenure, rule the catacombs and are even said to command the imps. Unique Skill: Sorcery of the Crozier Channel magic into the glintstone to activate an ancient sorcery, producing floating magic projectiles that chase enemies automatically.0{'Str': 34, 'Dex': 10}StrikeColossal WeaponsNo passive effectsSorcery of the Crozier15nannannannannannannannannannannan
246247.0Staff of the Avatarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/staff_of_the_avatar_colossal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png20.0Ceremonial staff depicting the Erdtree in its historic radiance. Wielded by the avatars who protect the Minor Erdtrees. The avatars, emerging in the wake of the Elden Ring's shattering, were determined to protect the withering Erdtree's offspring.0{'Str': 34, 'Dex': 8, 'Fai': 24}StrikeColossal WeaponsNo passive effectsErdtree Slam19nannannannannannannannannannannan
247248.0Rotten Staffhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rotten_staff_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png18.0Ceremonial staff depicting the Erdtree in its historic radiance. 249250.0Ghiza's Wheelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ghiza's_wheel_colossal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png19.0Great iron wheel lined with flesh-flaying blades. Device of torture used by Inquisitor Ghiza. As the wheel spins it causes severe pain and blood loss. The design was adopted for use as the iconic weapon wielded by Iron Virgins.0{'Str': 28, 'Dex': 18}StandardColossal Weapons(70) HemorrhageSpinning Wheel3nannannannannannannannannannannan
250251.0Fallingstar Beast Jawhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fallingstar_beast_jaw_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png21.5Part of a Falling star Beast's jaw, hard and shining black, fashioned into a weapon. 251252.0Axe of Godfreyhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/axe_of_godfrey_colossal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png18.0Weapon of Godfrey, Elden Lord. It was broken in a battle fought as leader of the Tarnished during the Long March. This weapon is symbolic of Godfrey's vow to conduct himself as a lord, later becoming an emblem of the golden lineage. In the days of the past, a crown was warranted with strength.0{'Str': 42, 'Dex': 14}StandardColossal WeaponsNo passive effectsRegal Roar25nannannannannannannannannannannan
252253.0Bloodfiend's Armhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodfiends_arm_colossal_weapon_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png20.0Weapon used by the bloodfiends. An arm pulled from the corpse of one of their kin, and wielded as a makeshift weapon. Having been sanctified by a blood ritual, this armament is capable of spraying blood stored within when executing a strong attack.1{'Str': 28, 'Dex': 11, 'Arc': 16}StrikeColossal WeaponsNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
253254.0Anvil Hammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/anvil_hammer_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png22.0One of the treasures of the ruined forges. A tremendous hammer that incorporates as its head the red-hot anvil of the forge. It is said that the anvil's shape is inspired by that of an altar, and that long ago, it was indeed used as such in rite and ritual.1{'Str': 39, 'Dex': 10, 'Int': 11, 'Fai': 20}StrikeColossal WeaponsNo passive effectsSmithing Art Spears18nannannannannannannannannannannan
254255.0Devonia's Hammerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/devonias_hammer_unique_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png20.0Great hammer wielded by Devonia, longest-serving of the Crucible Knights. Weapon forged of primordial gold, marked by its reddish hue and inhabited by ancient holiness. A torrent of life is engraved upon the striking face.1{'Str': 30, 'Dex': 13, 'Fai': 19}StrikeColossal WeaponsNo passive effectsDevonia's Vortex16nannannannannannannannannannannan
255256.0Shadow Sunflower Blossomhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/shadow_sunflower_blossom_colossal_weapon_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png16.0The head of a monstrous shadow sunflower manifestation of the Scadutree. Much like the Scadutree itself in appearance, a second stalk winds tightly around the first, almost as if in a tender embrace.1{'Str': 24, 'Dex': 8, 'Fai': 25}StrikeColossal WeaponsNo passive effectsShadow Sunflower Headbutt16nannannannannannannannannannannan
256257.0Gazing Fingerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gazing_finger_colossal_weapon_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png15.0The head of Metyr, the finger-mother, wielded as a weapon without modification. 258259.0Iron Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/iron_spear_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Commonly used iron spear with no notable traits.The blade is severely rusted.0{'Str': 13, 'Dex': 11}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
259260.0Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spear_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Weapon comprised of a blade attached to a long haft. Very effective against mounted foes.0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 15}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
260261.0Partisanhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/partisan_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.5Spear with a wide tip. 261262.0Pikehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pike_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png7.5A longspear featuring an especially lengthy handle. Incredibly useful even against foes on horseback, but hard to wield in cramped spaces.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 14}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
262263.0Spiked Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spiked_spear_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.0Weapon comprised of a spiked cylinder attached to a long pole. Weapon of the Marionette Soldiers employed by sorcerers.0{'Str': 14}Strike/PierceSpears(50) HemorrhageImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
263264.0Cross-Naginatahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cross-naginata_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0Weapon consisting of a three-pronged blade affixed to a long pole. A weapon of the Land of Reeds, known for its ability to be wielded as a spear while still being capable of performing slashing attacks.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 20}Slash/PierceSpears(50) HemorrhageImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
264265.0Clayman's Harpoonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/claymans_harpoon_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Harpoon with a tip made from a sharpened meteorite shard. 265266.0Celebrant's Rib-Rakehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/celebrants_rib-rake_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0Rake decorated with many-colored fabrics. Ceremonial tool used by dancers during the festivities of Dominula, Windmill Village. Crafted from human bone. Grants trace amounts of runes upon landing attacks.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 14}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsBarbaric Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
266267.0Torchpolehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/torchpole_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.0Torch fastened to a long pole. Lights up dark areas, but cannot be raised overhead. Used by soldiers on watch, its attacks set foes aflame.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 15}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
267268.0Inquisitor's Girandolehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/inquisitors_girandole_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png7.5Instrument of torture used on nobles behind the curtain at the Volcano Manor of Mt. Gelmir. Its numerous spikes pierce the flesh, then singe the wounds withflame. The smell of burnt blood induces despair in the victim. Acandlestick conveived by a thorough mind.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 15, 'Fai': 16}PierceSpears(50) HemorrhageCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
268269.0Crystal Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/crystal_spear_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Spear fashioned from pure crystal; a deed impossible for a human. Enwreathed with powerful magic, its attack scales with intelligence. The inscrutable Crystalians have but one clear purpose; to safeguard their crystals unto the end. One theory posits that they yearn for the return of their creator who will carve for them new brethren.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 16, 'Int': 16}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
269270.0Rotten Crystal Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rotten_crystal_spear_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Spear fashioned from pure crystal; a deed impossible for a human. It festers with scarlet rot.Enwreathed with powerful magic, its attack scales with intelligence.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 16, 'Int': 16}PierceSpears(55) Scarlet RotCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
270271.0Cleanrot Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cleanrot_spear_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Spear of the Cleanrot Knights who fought alongside Malenia, Blade of Miquella. The winged golden blade deals holy damage. The diminutive shield is blessed with an incantation that wards off rot.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 16, 'Fai': 14}PierceSpearsRaises Immunity by 50Sacred Phalanx12nannannannannannannannannannannan
271272.0Death Ritual Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/death_ritual_spear_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.5Ritual spear used by priests of old who were permitted to come among the Deathbirds. The priests became guardians of the birds through the rite of Death, which also serves as an oath sworn to their distant resurrection.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 20, 'Int': 18}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsSpearcall Ritual20nannannannannannannannannannannan
272273.0Bolt of Gransaxhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bolt_of_gransax_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.5Spear whittled from the weapon wielded by Gransax.One of the legendary armaments. A great ancient dragon, Gransax once rained calamity upon the Royal Capital - the only time in historical record that Leyndell's walls have fallen. This marked the dawn of the war against dragons.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 40}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsAncient Lightning Spear25nannannannannannannannannannannan
273274.0Smithscript Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/smithscript_spear_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Spear engraved with a smithscript. A throwing weapon created through the smithing arts. Execute a strong attack, a dashing strong attack, or a mounted strong attack to throw the spear.1{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 12, 'Int': 11, 'Fai': 11}Standard/PierceSpearsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
274275.0Swift Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/swift_spear_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0A metal-bodied spear of extremely lightweight make, being the result of a sophisticated molding technique. Capable of swift consecutive attacks.1{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 26}Standard/PierceSpearsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
275276.0Bloodfiend's Forkhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodfiends_fork_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Weapon used by the bloodfiends. Three tines of carved bone spear the victim to provoke blood loss. A ritual implement for blood offerings to the Formless Mother. At times, the bloodfiends will spill even their own blood using these forks.1{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 8, 'Arc': 13}Standard/PierceSpears(30) HemorrhageBarbaric Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
276277.0Lancehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lance_greatspear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0Considered a type of greatspear, this weapon has no blade, but instead features a long, conical body designed to pierce.Though heavy and hard to wield, this weapon displays its worth in horseback combat whether mounted or even on foot.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 14}PierceGreat SpearsNo passive effectsCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
277278.0Treespearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/treespear_greatspear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png9.5Golden spear with tree-like design. Wielded by knights employed as palace guards in the Royal Capital of Leyndell. Deals holy damage. Requiring superior dexterity to wield, this greatspear can perform consecutive thrust attacks despite its larger size.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 22, 'Fai': 18}PierceGreat SpearsNo passive effectsSacred Order18nannannannannannannannannannannan
278279.0Serpent-Hunterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/serpent-hunter_greatspear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png12.0Weapon that serves as both greatsword and spear. Thought to have been used to hunt an immortal great serpent in the distant past, it manifests a long blade of light when facing such a creature. When their master's heroic aspirations degenerated into mere greed, his men searched for a weapon with which they might halt their lord.0{}PierceGreat SpearsNo passive effectsGreat-Serpent Hunt15nannannannannannannannannannannan
279280.0Siluria's Treehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/silurias_tree_greatspear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Siluria's Tree, weapon of one of the two honored as foremost among the Crucible Knights. The primordial form of the Erdtree is close in nature to life itself, and this spear, modeled on its crucible, is imbued with ancient holy essence.0{'Str': 27, 'Dex': 13, 'Fai': 20}PierceGreat SpearsNo passive effectsSiluria's Woe25nannannannannannannannannannannan
280281.0Vyke's War Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/vykes_war_spear_greatspear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0War spear singed and blistered by fingers, used by Vyke, Knight of the Roundtable Hold. Like Vyke himself, it has been tormented by the yellow flame of frenzy from within.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 20, 'Fai': 18}PierceGreat Spears(65) MadnessFrenzyflame Thrust22nannannannannannannannannannannan
281282.0Mohgwyn's Sacred Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mohgwyns_sacred_spear_great_spears_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Trident of Mohg, Lord of Blood. A sacred spear that will come to symbolize his dynasty. As well as serving as a weapon, it is an instrument of communion with an outer god who bestows power upon accursed blood. The mother of truth desires a wound.0{'Str': 24, 'Dex': 14, 'Arc': 27}PierceGreat Spears(55) HemorrhageBloodboon Ritual20 (-20)nannannannannannannannannannannan
282283.0Bloodfiend's Sacred Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodfiends_sacred_spear_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0Greatspear of the bloodfiend hexers. The mother of truth desires a wound.1{'Str': 22, 'Dex': 12, 'Arc': 13}Standard/PierceGreat Spears(55) HemorrhageBloodfiend's Bloodboon20nannannannannannannannannannannan
283284.0Messmer Soldier's Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/messmer_soldiers_spear_spears_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png8.5Weapon used by the soldiers who serve Messmer the Impaler. A greatspear with a steel blade worn from use. Being made for overwhelming onslaughts, attacks with this weapon can be charged to unleash consecutive strikes.1{'Str': 19, 'Dex': 16}Standard/PierceGreat SpearsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
284285.0Spear of the Impalerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spear_of_the_impaler_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png9.5Weapon of Messmer the Impaler. A greatspear with a warped blade in the shape of undulating flame. Remade by the forging arts of the realm of shadow, this weapon can be thrown by executing a strong attack, dashing strong attack, or mounted strong attack. Charge the attack to produce flame on impact.1{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 35, 'Fai': 18}Standard/PierceGreat SpearsNo passive effectsMessmer's Assault15nannannannannannannannannannannan
285286.0Barbed Staff-Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/barbed_staff-spear_spears_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png7.5Greatstaff of Jori, elder inquisitor. The tip bristles with golden barbs symbolic of the inquisition's torture, allowing one to wield the staff as a greatspear. Attacks deal holy damage, and potency increases with faith.1{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 18, 'Fai': 22}Standard/PierceGreat Spears(55) HemorrhageJori's Inquisition4nannannannannannannannannannannan
286287.0Halberdhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/halberd_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0A long-handled polearm that combines the functions of both axe and spear. Can be used to press a single enemy with continuous thrusting attacks or swept at groups, taking advantage of its great reach and cleaving blade. A versatile weapon for any situation.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 12}Standard/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
287288.0Banished Knight's Halberdhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/banished_knights_halberd_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0A finely-crafted halberd intricately engraved with an ancient motif. Given to knights who, whether by misfortune or misdeed, were forced to abandon their homes. Most of these knights were sent to the fringes, where they were forced to start anew with only despair for company.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 12}Standard/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
288289.0Lucernehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lucerne_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png7.0This polearm features a hard, sharpened beak-like spike attached to its head, designed to pierce armor. Though designed mainly as a thrusting weapon, its long handle can be utilized to get around an enemy's guard with a sideward sweeping attack.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 12}PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
289290.0Glaivehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/glaive_halberds_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Weapon comprised of a sharp blade affixed to a long grip. It is in fact a sickle repurposed to be a tool of war. This far-reaching weapon excels at slashing attacks.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 15}Slash/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6nannannannannannannannannannannan
290291.0Vulgar Militia Shotelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/vulgar_militia_shotel_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0A hooked blade attached to a long handle. Wielded by the vulgar militia, its attacks can slip through an enemy's guard. The vulgar militia are the undecorated stewards of rancid, scorched battlefields that none dare approach, and forbidden domains better forgotten by the rest of the world0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 16}Standard/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6( - 12)nannannannannannannannannannannan
291292.0Vulgar Militia Sawhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/vulgar_militia_saw_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0A weapon comprised of a saw blade attached to a long grip. Brandished by the vulgar militia, its serrated edge is very effective at inflicting blood loss. The saw is said to also be used to cut up bodies to feed the militia, but there are no firsthand witnesses to confirm the dire rumor.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 13}Standard/PierceHalberds(55) HemorrhageSpinning Slash6nannannannannannannannannannannan

Wielded by guardians of the Minor Erdtrees, known as experts in the arts of combat. The power of this weapon scales greatly with dexterity.0{'Str': 17, 'Dex': 16}Standard/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6 ( -12)nannannannannannannannannannannan
293294.0Gargoyle's Halberdhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gargoyles_halberd_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png12.0Bronze halberd wielded by Valiant Gargoyles. Just like the wielder, the missing parts have been mended with corpse wax; a patchwork of champions.0{'Str': 26, 'Dex': 10}Standard/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6 ( - 12)nannannannannannannannannannannan

Weapon of the Night's Cavalry who ride funeral steeds. This glaive excels at weighty slash attacks that crash into foes, making it a powerful weapon even on horse back.0{'Str': 26, 'Dex': 10}Slash/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6 ( - 12)nannannannannannannannannannannan
296297.0Pest's Glaivehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pests_glaive_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png7.0Glaive made from a hard, sharpened shell. Wielded by the pests who emerged from the Swamp of Aeonia. Slightly increases non-physical damage negation. Though men might recognize the keen intellect of the pests evidenced by this spear's uncanny design, it will never be understood by them.0{'Str': 13, 'Dex': 13}Slash/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6( - 12)nannannannannannannannannannannan

A viciously keen and slender scythe made for combat. Every giant is red of hair, and Radagon was said to have despised his own red locks. Perhaps that was a curse of their kind.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 12, 'Fai': 21}StrikeWhipsNo passive effectsFlame Dance25nannannannannannannannannannannan
315316.0Tooth Whiphttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tooth_whip_whips_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Whip bestrewn with rotting, misshapen teeth. Filthy and seething with disease, the teeth are embedded in the whip and dose the victim with deadly poison upon each strike. As the wounds ripen they grow inflamed and ooze pus. The flesh of shamans was said to meld harmoniously with others.1{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 24}StrikeWhips(66) PoisonPainful Strike16nannannannannannannannannannannan
316317.0Caestushttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/caestus_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A weapon built for striking with the fists, made of tough leather inlaid with iron rivets. Fist weapons come in pairs, and two-handing this weapon will equip it to both hands.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 8}StrikeFistsNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
317318.0Spiked Caestushttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spiked_caestus_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0A Caestus with the rivets replaced by blood loss-inducing spikes. Fists weapons come in pairs, and two-handing this weapon will equip it to both hands.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 10}StrikeFists(45) HemorrhageEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
318319.0Katarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/katar_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Imported dagger design with a rather unique handle. The blade can be swung about as the extension of one's fist.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 10}Slash/PierceFistsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust14nannannannannannannannannannannan
319320.0Iron Ballhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/iron_ball_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Iron manifer of spherical shape. Big Boggart the blackguard's weapon of choice. Not a weapon to be taken lightly, as its weighty blows shatter bones with ease.0{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 8}StrikeFistsNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
320321.0Star Fisthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/star_fist_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Spherical iron manifer covered in spikes which induce blood loss. Used in brutal games of pugilism.0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 8}StrikeFists(45) HemorrhageEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
321322.0Clinging Bonehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/clinging_bone_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Horrific weapon made of a hardened skeletal arm. Wielded by Ensha of the Royal Remains. Fitted by placing one's hands into the fists' grips until they dig in. ""O clinging creature. A king relinquishes not the hand.""0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 22, 'Arc': 16}Slash/PierceFistsNo passive effectsLifesteal Fist14nannannannannannannannannannannan
322323.0Veteran's Prosthesishttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/veterans_prosthesis_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Bladed prosthetic leg enwreathed with the power of lightning, instead attached to the fist. Commander Niall, veteran of Castle Sol, offered this prosthesis in exchange for the lives of defeated knights held prisoner. He went on to lead these men as an army of no nation.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 12}Slash/PierceFistsNo passive effectsStorm Kick10nannannannannannannannannannannan
323324.0Cipher Patahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cipher_pata_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.0One of the weapons originating from the Two Fingers. A formless sequence of ciphers comprise its blade, and as such no shield can repel it. Deals holy damage. The furtive inscription appears to hang in the air; the language of light spoken by the Two Fingers.0{'Fai': 30}Slash/PierceFistsNo passive effectsUnblockable Blade17nannannannannannannannannannannan
324325.0Grafted Dragonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grafted_dragon_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5The embodiment of the power that still remained in the dragon's head that was grafted to Godrick's left arm. The wielder's arm will take the form of a small dragon, sprouting sharp dragon fangs at the fist.This weapon cannot be two-handed.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 14, 'Fai': 16}StrikeFistsNo passive effectsBear Witness!20nannannannannannannannannannannan
325326.0Patahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pata_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0A weapon comprised of a linear, double-sided blade attached to a substantial guard. Wielded by the Oathseeker Knights. This versatile armament can be swung about like a fist or used in the manner of a straight sword.1{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 15}Standard/PierceFistsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
326327.0Golem Fisthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/golem_fist_fist_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0A giant fist of fractured rock. Taken from the body of a golem of the ruined forges. Carved with a smithscript enabling strong attacks to launch the entire fist straight ahead.1{'Str': 24, 'Dex': 8, 'Int': 11, 'Fai': 11}StrikeFistsNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
327328.0Madding Handhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/madding_hand_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A glove stitched together from the flayed skin of the victims of a butcherous bloodbath. Afflicts target with madness. Raises attack power when madness is triggered in the vicinity. Forged of an unyielding, black impulse toward revenge fostered in those who were hunted down as heretics by their own brethren, these are the weapons of the utterly downtrodden.1{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 8, 'Int': 13, 'Fai': 20}StrikeFists(55) MadnessMadding Spear-Hand Strike13nannannannannannannannannannannan
328329.0Thiollier's Hidden Needlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/thiolliers_hidden_needle_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.5Concealed weapon used by Thiollier, of a design generally favored by poison-wielders for dark and subtle purposes. Like St. Trina, who blossomed in the deep-purple garden, a rich poison is secreted from within which sends its victims into an eternal sleep.1{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 22, 'Int': 15}PierceFists(42) SleepSleep Evermore16nannannannannannannannannannannan
329330.0Poisoned Handhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/poisoned_hand_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A glove stitched together from the flayed skin of the victims of a butcherous bloodbath. Afflicts target with deadly poison. Raises attack power when poisoning occurs in the vicinity. Forged of an unyielding, black impulse toward revenge fostered in those who have had everything burned or stolen from them, these are the weapons of the utterly downtrodden.1{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 8, 'Arc': 28}StrikeFists(36) PoisonPoison Spear-Hand Strike13nannannannannannannannannannannan
330331.0Hookclawshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/hookclaws_claw_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0Weapon worn on the fist comprised of sharp parallel blades favored by those who lurk in the dark. Lacerations cause blood loss with great effect. Claw weapons come in pairs, and two-handing this weapon will equip it to both hands.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 14}Slash/PierceClaws(60) HemorrhageQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan
331332.0Bloodhound Clawshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodhound_claws_claw_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Large curved claws used by Bloodhound Knights. The curve allows the weapon to slip through an enemy's guard.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 15}Slash/PierceClaws(60) HemorrhageBloodhound's Step5nannannannannannannannannannannan
332333.0Venomous Fanghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/venomous_fang_claw_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5One of the weapons designed for gladiatorial combat. Used by duelists who were exiled from the colosseum. The black fang protruding from the bronze snake head is coated in deadly poison.0{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 9}Slash/PierceClaws(72) PoisonQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan
333334.0Raptor Talonshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/raptor_talons_claw_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5Claw comprised of two sharp, thin blades, wielded by the assassins of Ravenmount, this weapon allows them to imitate the attacks of Deathbirds. Besides excelling at airborne attacks, its charge attack mimics the vicious swoop of a bird of prey.0{'Str': 6, 'Dex': 14}Slash/PierceClaws(60) HemorrhageQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan
334335.0Claws of Nighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/claws_of_night_unique_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Claws of a bottomless black from which no light can escape. Wielded by Anna, Swordhand of Night. Engraved with a smithscript enabling strong attack to launch all three claws at a target. The blades are only semicorporeal, and cannot be fully guarded against.1{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 20}Slash/PierceClaws(45) HemorrhageScattershot Throw11nannannannannannannannannannannan
335336.0Shortbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/shortbow_lightbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Small bow made to fire arrows over great distances. Other than its ability to fire off arrows in rapid succession, it is also well-suited for use on horseback. To use a bow, arrows must also be equipped.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 10}nanLight BowsNo passive effectsBarrage- ( 2 2)nannannannannannannannannannannan
336337.0Composite Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/composite_bow_light_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Bow composited from a mix of Materials. Demands high attributes, and is tricky to wield, but is a fearsome tool when mastered.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 15}nanLight BowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot-( 6 6)nannannannannannannannannannannan
337338.0Red Branch Shortbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/red_branch_shortbow_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Shortbow of polished red wood. Fashioned by a master craftsman and wielded by pages. A bow which requires dexterity rather than strength to master.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 16}nanLight BowsNo passive effectsBarrage-(2 2)nannannannannannannannannannannan
338339.0Misbegotten Shortbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/misbegotten_shortbow_light_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Shortbow wielded by Winged Misbegotten. Fine fur clings to it.Designed to inflict additional damage by sacrificing range.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 8}LightBowsLight BowsNo passive effectsBarrage- (2 2)nannannannannannannannannannannan
339340.0Harp Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/harp_bow_light_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0Bow fashioned from a minstrel's harp. Sonorous tones still resound when firing arrows. Troubadours sing tales of champions, both in the honorable service of the Erdtree, and the one who spurns honor for blasphemy.0{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 9}LightBowsLight BowsNo passive effectsBarrage- (2 2)nannannannannannannannannannannan
340341.0Bone Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bone_bow_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0A crude shortbow fashioned from sickly bone. A medium for spirit-calling, and a product of the ancient hexing arts of the tower.1{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 11}nanBowsNo passive effectsRancor Shot0nannannannannannannannannannannan
341342.0Longbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/longbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Longbow made to fire arrows over great distances. Compared to a shortbow, arrows fired reach further and deal more damage. To use a bow, arrows must also be equipped.0{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 14}nanBowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot6nannannannannannannannannannannan
342343.0Albinauric Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/albinauric_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Longbow featuring delicate silverwork. Wielded by Albinauric wolfback archers. This bow requires dexterity over strength to master.0{'Str': 7, 'Dex': 18}nanBowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot-(6 6)nannannannannannannannannannannan
343344.0Black Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Longbow carved from black wood to resemble a blade. One of the most difficult bows to master. The blade-like body of the bow is light and cuts through the air.Though a longbow, it can be wielded similarly to a shortbow.0{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 20}nanBowsNo passive effectsBarrage- ( 2 2)nannannannannannannannannannannan
344345.0Pulley Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pulley_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0Longbow which utilizes a series of pulleys and strings. The complex mechanism, which required advanced mathematical and mechanical understanding to craft, was likely made by a certain genius who learned Golden Order Fundamentalism. Enhances precision while shooting, enabling arrows to fly much further distances.0{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 11}nanBowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot- (6 6)nannannannannannannannannannannan
345346.0Horn Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/horn_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Longbow made from animal horn. Wielded by the master hunters of the ancestral followers. Imbues arrows fired with magic damage.Reveals its true worth when used with magic-infused arrows.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 14, 'Int': 12}nanBowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot- (6 6)nannannannannannannannannannannan
346347.0Serpent Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/serpent_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5Malformed bow in the shape of a pair of poisonous snakes. Imbues arrows with poison through pagan magic, revealing its true worth when used with poison-infused arrows. Used by assassins known as the Formless Serpents.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 15, 'Arc': 11}nanBowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot- (6 6)nannannannannannannannannannannan
347348.0Erdtree Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtree_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Longbow featuring Erdtree styling. In times of old, when faith and battle went hand in hand, this weapon was created in tandem with the Golden Arrow. Scales all arrow damage with faith, revealing its true worth when used with holy-infused arrows.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 12, 'Fai': 14}-BowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot6nannannannannannannannannannannan
348349.0Ansbach's Longbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ansbachs_longbow_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Weapon of Sir Ansbach. A longbow consisting of two bow bodies and two strings. Unusually for a longbow, it can be wielded similarly to a light bowprovided that the wielder has the extraordinary dexterity demanded.1{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 43}nanBowsNo passive effectsFan Shot0nannannannannannannannannannannan
349350.0Greatbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/greatbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Enormous greatbow larger than any man. Can not be drawn with any ordinary level of strength, but the force of its shots is extraordinary. A greatbow can only fire great arrows.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 20}nanGreatbowsNo passive effectsThrough and Through- (9 9)nannannannannannannannannannannan
350351.0Golem Greatbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/golem_greatbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png14.5Greatbow of black stone crafted by a civilization now gone to ruin. Weapon of the Guardian Golem.Extremely heavy, this greatbow requires enormous strength just to draw, suggesting it was not designed for human use.0{'Str': 24, 'Dex': 18}nanGreatbowsNo passive effectsThrough and Through- ( 9 9 )nannannannannannannannannannannan
351352.0Erdtree Greatbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtree_greatbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png11.0Greatbow featuring Erdtree styling. In times of old, when faith and battle went hand in hand, this weapon was created in tandem with the Golden Great Arrow. Scales all arrow damage with faith, revealing its true worth when used with holy-infused arrows.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 14, 'Fai': 14}nanGreatbowsNo passive effectsThrough and Through- ( 9 9 )nannannannannannannannannannannan
352353.0Lion Greatbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lion_greatbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png9.5Greatbow of black iron wielded by General Radahn. Decorated with a lion mane motif. Imbued with gravitational power of the Starscourge, when used along with Radahn's Spear, it becomes a true weapon of a champion.0{'Str': 22, 'Dex': 18}nanGreatbowsNo passive effectsRadahn's Rain- (32 -)nannannannannannannannannannannan
353354.0Igon's Greatbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/igons_greatbow_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png12.5Weapon of Igon, the broken drake warrior. A greatbow fashioned from two dragon bones bound with coarse rope. Covered in gashes left by claws. Imbued with Igon's obsession, enhancing the power of Igon's Harpoon.1{'Str': 23, 'Dex': 16}nanGreatbowsNo passive effectsIgon's Drake Hunt- (13 13)nannannannannannannannannannannan
354355.0Soldier's Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/soldiers_crossbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5A crossbow of simple make, usable by anyone, but lacking in both power and accuracy. 355356.0Light Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/light_crossbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Ranged weapon made from a bow fixed to a stock. Bolts must be equipped to use a crossbow.0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 8}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
356357.0Heavy Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/heavy_crossbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Heavy crossbow with iron limbs, increasing damage dealt. Commonly employed in the Shattering.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 10}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
357358.0Arbalesthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/arbalest_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.0Large crossbow made from composite materials. One of the largest of all bolt firing devices. Its limbs are more pliable than metallic ones, allowing bolts fired from this weapon to pierce even forged of steel.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 12}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
358359.0Crepus's Black-Key Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/crepuss_black-key_crossbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0Black crossbow featuring a long stock. Used for sniping, it has a very long range. Weapon of Crepus, who served the Two Fingers from the shadows of the Roundtable as the head confessor.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 16}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
359360.0Pulley Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pulley_crossbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Crossbow made with pulleys and power springs. The complex mechanism, which required advanced mathematical and mechanical understanding to craft, was likely made by a certain genius who learned Golden Order fundamentalism. One touch fires a volley of bolts. Be warned; large stores of bolts can be quickly spent.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 16}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
360361.0Full Moon Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/full_moon_crossbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0One-of-a-kind enchanted crossbow of exquisitely detailed craftsmanship. Made to celebrate the matrimonial union, and reconciliation, between the houses of the Erdtree and the Full Moon, Leyndell and Raya Lucaria. The two rings dance when reloading the weapon. Reveals true worth when used with holy- infused bolts.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 10, 'Int': 14}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
361362.0Repeating Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/repeating_crossbow_crossbow_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png6.0A mechanized crossbow that has been fitted with a fan-shaped contraption. This metallic piece adds a reloading system used in the execution of a unique battle art.1{'Str': 13, 'Dex': 15}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsRepeating Fire0nannannannannannannannannannannan
362363.0Spread Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spread_crossbow_crossbow_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0A modified crossbow made by combining two crossbows into one. Capable of loading multiple bolts and firing them simultaneously, enabling a spread of fire.1{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 17}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
363364.0Hand Ballistahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/hand_ballista_ballista_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0An unconventional ballistic device modeled on a weapon used to besiege castles. Only capable of firing greatbolts. Perfect for reckless acts such as storming a castle or facing an entire army alone.0{'Str': 30, 'Dex': 14}nanBallistasNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
364365.0Jar Cannonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/jar_cannon_ballista_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png15.0Jar cannon which uses explosives to fire greatbolts. Deals great damage but is slow to reload. Experimental firearm brought to the assault on Volcano Manor, where it was discovered that no one knew how to use it.0{'Str': 34, 'Dex': 12}nanBallistasNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
365366.0Rabbath's Cannonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rabbaths_cannon_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png15.0A type of jar cannon used to fire greatbolts. A masterwork of Spellmachinist Rabbath. The power of the glintstones that encircle the barrel imbues bolts with magic damage and guides shots toward their targets.1{'Str': 28, 'Dex': 16}nanBallistasNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
366367.0Astrologer's Staffhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/astrologers_staff_glintstonestaff_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Staff of the astrologers. Sorceries must be memorized first at a site of lost grace, and a staff must be equipped to cast them.0{'Str': 7, 'Int': 16}StrikeGlintstone StaffsNo passive effectsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
367368.0Glintstone Staffhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/glintstone_staff_glintstonestaff_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Staff with a glintstone embedded at the tip. A catalyst for casting sorceries. Sorceries must be memorized first at a site of lost grace, and a staff must be equipped to cast them.0{'Str': 6, 'Int': 10}StrikeGlintstone StaffsNo passive effectsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan

384385.0Staff of the Great Beyondhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/staff_of_the_great_beyond_glintstone_staff_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Staff fashioned from the tail-fingers of Metyr, the Mother of Fingers, and the microcosm raised aloft over the crux they form. Despite being broken and abandoned, she kept waiting for another message to come.1{'Str': 7, 'Int': 25, 'Fai': 25}StrikeGlinstone StavesNo passive effectsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
385386.0Maternal Staffhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dryleaf_seal_glinstone_staff_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Staff of Count Ymir, who made himself a Mother of Fingers. 387388.0Erdtree Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtree_seal_sacred_seal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.0A formless sacred seal decorated with an Erdtree crest, once the focus of religion in the Lands Between.Even though the Elden Ring is shattered, and the Erdtree has dulled from its former radiance, earnest faith continues to hold the answers.0{'Fai': 40}StrikeSacred SealsNo passive effectsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
389390.0Golden Order Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/golden_order_seal_sacred_seal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.0A formless sacred seal depicting the ceremonial observation of Order. Enhances Golden Fundamentalist incantations. Fundamentalism is scholarship in all but name. Scales incantation using both intelligence and faith.0{'Int': 17, 'Fai': 17}StrikeSacred SealsBoosts Fundamentalist Inc.No Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan

395396.0Dragon Communion Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragon_communion_seal_sacred_seal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.0Formless drakeblood seal with a dragon communion crest. This seal scales incantations with one's arcane attribute.0{'Fai': 10, 'Arc': 10}StrikeSacred SealsBoosts Dragon Communion IncantationsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan

402403.0Sentry's Torchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sentrys_torch_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0Torch Given to protectors of the Erdtree. Furnished on behalf of the Erdtree and the Grace-Given Lord such that a Night of Black Knives will never come again.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 8, 'Fai': 15}StrikeTorchesNo passive effectsTorch Attack0nannannannannannannannannannannan
403404.0Ghostflame Torchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ghostflame_torch_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Metal torch that burns with cold ghostflame. Tool of the Fallen Hawks who prowl the underground rivers. 405406.0Lamenting Visagehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lamenting_visage_torch_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0A stone lantern carved to resemble a lamenting human head, the eyes vacantly beaming out light. 406407.0Nanaya's Torchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/nanayas_torch_1_torches_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5A torch made by attaching a dying flame of frenzy to a small spinal column. 01.0Dueling Shieldhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dueling_shield_thrusting_shields_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0A "thrusting shield," or combined weapon and shield. 23.0Dryleaf Artshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dryleaf_arts_hand-to-hand_arts_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A technique for hand-to-hand combat without the aid of a weapon. The practice of this martial art marks the dawn of an ascetic's journey.1{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 8}StrikeHand-to-Hand ArtsNo passive effectsPalm Blast14nannannannannannannannannannannan
34.0Dane's Footworkhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/danes_footwork_hand-to-hand_arts_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A technique for hand-to-hand combat without the aid of a weapon. This martial art focuses on kicking techniques. This kick-based martial art is unique to Dane, a Dryleaf and sworn ally of Leda. 45.0Smithscript Daggerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/smithscript_dagger_throwing_blade_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5Dagger engraved with a smithscript. 1011.0Frenzyflame Perfume Bottlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frenzyflame_perfume_bottle_perfume_bottles_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0Perfume bottle remade into a weapon by perfumers of the realm of shadow. Attacks release perfumed powder, producing frenzied flame. From time to time, perfumers set out on journeys to pursue new aromatics and flower gardens.1{'Str': 3, 'Dex': 10, 'Int': 12, 'Fai': 12}StandardPerfume Bottles(60) MadnessKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
1112.0Lightning Perfume Bottlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lightning_perfume_bottle_perfume_bottles_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0Perfume bottle remade into a weapon by perfumers of the realm of shadow. Attacks release perfumed powder, producing lightning. From time to time, perfumers set out on journeys to pursue new aromatics and flower gardens.1{'Str': 3, 'Dex': 16, 'Fai': 14}StandardPerfume BottlesNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
1213.0Deadly Poison Perfume Bottlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/deadly_poison_perfume_bottle_perfume_bottles_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0Perfume bottle customized by Thiollier. Attacks release perfumed powder, producing deadly poison. There are some techniques of the perfuming arts that employ poison. Upon learning of this, Thiollier threw himself into mastering those techniques, and he made them his own.1{'Str': 3, 'Dex': 13, 'Arc': 18}StandardPerfume Bottles(66) PoisonDeadly Poison Spray21nannannannannannannannannannannan
1314.0Red Bear's Clawhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/red_bears_claw_beast_claws_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Claw of a great red bear wielded without modification by Red Bear, whose name is lost to madness. After killing the great red bear in a blood-soaked bout, he became fascinated by the untainted glory of its naked strength. "I wish to be a bear, no more, and no less1{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 10}SlashBeast Claws(45) HemorrhageRed Bear Hunt8nannannannannannannannannannannan
1415.0Beast Claw (Weapon)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/beast_claw_beast_claws_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Weapon in the form of a carnivorous beast's vicious claws. Used to perform bestial slashing attacks uncanny to humankind. An imitation of the esoteric technique of the horned warriors. Those who carry this weapon wield it as though they have been possessed by a savage beast.1{'Str': 13, 'Dex': 11}SlashBeast Claws(45) HemorrhageSavage Claws13nannannannannannannannannannannan
1516.0Miladyhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/milady_light_greatswords_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png6.5A light greatsword; that is, a sword whose blade matches the length of a greatsword, while being constrained to a minimal weight. Nicknamed after ladies of noble status for its refined appearance. With cultivated form, one can wield this weapon as swiftly as one might a straight sword.1{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 17}Standard/PierceLight GreatswordsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
1617.0Leda's Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ledas_sword_light_greatswords_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png7.5Light greatsword with gold inlaid. Weapon of Leda, the Needle Knight. Deals holy damage. Though polished to a mirror sheen, this blade still reeks with the stench of crusted blood that lingers from the cull of her knightly comrades.1{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 22, 'Fai': 19}Standart/PierceLight GreatswordsNo passive effectsNeedle Piercer19nannannannannannannannannannannan
1718.0Rellana's Twin Bladeshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rellanas_twinblade_light_greatswords_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0Carian light greatsword embedded with blue glintstone. Weapon of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight. Two swords as a single armament. When two-handing, a straight sword engraved with golden flame will be carried in the left hand. Here, and here alone, were moon and fire ever together.1{'Str': 13, 'Dex': 16, 'Int': 16, 'Fai': 16}Standard/PierceLight GreatswordsNo passive effectsMoon-and-Fire Stance10 - 25nannannannannannannannannannannan
1819.0Great Katanahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/great_katana_great_katana_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0Large katana with a long, heavy blade. A weapon unique to warriors of the Land of Reeds. Designed for aggression, this armament requires the wielder to throw their entire body into swinging it. The slashing attacks of its honed edge incite blood loss.1{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 18}Slash/PierceGreat Katanas(55) HemorrhageOverhead Stance0nannannannannannannannannannannan
1920.0Dragon-Hunter's Great Katanahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragon-hunters_great_katana_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png10.5Great katana with spines of gravel stone along its blade, wielded by the Ancient Dragon-Man of the Dragon's Pit. Has an anti-dragon effect. Formerly a Dragon Communion warrior, the Ancient Dragon-Man was once arbiter of those worthy to devour the Dreaded One.1{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 20}Slash/PierceGreat Katanas(55) HemorrhageDragonwound Slash18nannannannannannannannannannannan
2021.0Rakshasa's Great Katanahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rakshasas_great_katana_great_katana_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png9.5A great katana with the tempering pattern of its blade forever stained red with blood. Weapon of Rakshasa, who cuts down and devours. A berserker's weapon used to endure enemy attacks and reply with one's full fury. When attacking, the wielder is less likely to stagger from counterattacks, but will also take increased damage.1{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 27}Slash/PierceGreat Katanas(55) HemorrhageWeed Cutter8nannannannannannannannannannannan
2122.0Daggerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dagger_dagger_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A standard dagger with a straight blade. 2223.0Parrying Daggerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/parrying_dagger_dagger_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A knife with curved handguards. Designed to parry, turning foes' attacks against them. For master of combat who anticipate every enemy strike and counter accordingly, this weapon is all they need.0{'Str': 5, 'Dex': 14}Slash/PierceDaggersNo passive effectsParry0nannannannannannannannannannannan
2324.0Misericordehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/misericorde_dagger_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0Dagger favored by military physicians in white. The pointed blade is hard and sharp, making critical hits especially potent. Medicine is mercy. and mercy upon the battlefield is ruthless. Beware the killers clothed as men of compassion0{'Str': 7, 'Dex': 12}Slash/PierceDaggersNo passive effectsQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan
