Weapon of the Marionette Soldiers employed by sorcerers.0{'Str': 14}Strike/PierceSpears(50) HemorrhageImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
263264.0Cross-Naginatahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cross-naginata_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0Weapon consisting of a three-pronged blade affixed to a long pole. The long central blade closely resembles a katana. A weapon of the Land of Reeds, known for its ability to be wielded as a spear while still being capable of performing slashing attacks.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 20}Slash/PierceSpears(50) HemorrhageImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
264265.0Clayman's Harpoonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/claymans_harpoon_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Harpoon with a tip made from a sharpened meteorite shard. Wielded by the claymen who infest dynastic remains. The blade emits a faint light and deals magic damage.0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 10, 'Int': 12}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
265266.0Celebrant's Rib-Rakehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/celebrants_rib-rake_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0Rake decorated with many-colored fabrics. Ceremonial tool used by dancers during the festivities of Dominula, Windmill Village. Crafted from human bone. Grants trace amounts of runes upon landing attacks.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 14}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsBarbaric Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
266267.0Torchpolehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/torchpole_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.0Torch fastened to a long pole. Lights up dark areas, but cannot be raised overhead. Used by soldiers on watch, its attacks set foes aflame.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 15}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
267268.0Inquisitor's Girandolehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/inquisitors_girandole_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png7.5Instrument of torture used on nobles behind the curtain at the Volcano Manor of Mt. Gelmir. Its numerous spikes pierce the flesh, then singe the wounds withflame. The smell of burnt blood induces despair in the victim. Acandlestick conveived by a thorough mind.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 15, 'Fai': 16}PierceSpears(50) HemorrhageCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
268269.0Crystal Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/crystal_spear_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Spear fashioned from pure crystal; a deed impossible for a human. Enwreathed with powerful magic, its attack scales with intelligence. The inscrutable Crystalians have but one clear purpose; to safeguard their crystals unto the end. One theory posits that they yearn for the return of their creator who will carve for them new brethren.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 16, 'Int': 16}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
269270.0Rotten Crystal Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rotten_crystal_spear_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Spear fashioned from pure crystal; a deed impossible for a human. It festers with scarlet rot.Enwreathed with powerful magic, its attack scales with intelligence.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 16, 'Int': 16}PierceSpears(55) Scarlet RotCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
270271.0Cleanrot Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cleanrot_spear_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Spear of the Cleanrot Knights who fought alongside Malenia, Blade of Miquella. The winged golden blade deals holy damage. The diminutive shield is blessed with an incantation that wards off rot.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 16, 'Fai': 14}PierceSpearsRaises Immunity by 50Sacred Phalanx12nannannannannannannannannannannan
271272.0Death Ritual Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/death_ritual_spear_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.5Ritual spear used by priests of old who were permitted to come among the Deathbirds. The priests became guardians of the birds through the rite of Death, which also serves as an oath sworn to their distant resurrection.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 20, 'Int': 18}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsSpearcall Ritual20nannannannannannannannannannannan
272273.0Bolt of Gransaxhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bolt_of_gransax_spear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.5Spear whittled from the weapon wielded by Gransax.One of the legendary armaments. A great ancient dragon, Gransax once rained calamity upon the Royal Capital - the only time in historical record that Leyndell's walls have fallen. This marked the dawn of the war against dragons.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 40}PierceSpearsNo passive effectsAncient Lightning Spear25nannannannannannannannannannannan
273274.0Smithscript Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/smithscript_spear_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Spear engraved with a smithscript. A throwing weapon created through the smithing arts. Execute a strong attack, a dashing strong attack, or a mounted strong attack to throw the spear.1{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 12, 'Int': 11, 'Fai': 11}Standard/PierceSpearsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
274275.0Swift Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/swift_spear_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0A metal-bodied spear of extremely lightweight make, being the result of a sophisticated molding technique. Capable of swift consecutive attacks.1{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 26}Standard/PierceSpearsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
275276.0Bloodfiend's Forkhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodfiends_fork_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Weapon used by the bloodfiends. Three tines of carved bone spear the victim to provoke blood loss. A ritual implement for blood offerings to the Formless Mother. At times, the bloodfiends will spill even their own blood using these forks.1{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 8, 'Arc': 13}Standard/PierceSpears(30) HemorrhageBarbaric Roar16nannannannannannannannannannannan
276277.0Lancehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lance_greatspear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0Considered a type of greatspear, this weapon has no blade, but instead features a long, conical body designed to pierce.Though heavy and hard to wield, this weapon displays its worth in horseback combat whether mounted or even on foot.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 14}PierceGreat SpearsNo passive effectsCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
277278.0Treespearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/treespear_greatspear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png9.5Golden spear with tree-like design. Wielded by knights employed as palace guards in the Royal Capital of Leyndell. Deals holy damage. Requiring superior dexterity to wield, this greatspear can perform consecutive thrust attacks despite its larger size.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 22, 'Fai': 18}PierceGreat SpearsNo passive effectsSacred Order18nannannannannannannannannannannan
278279.0Serpent-Hunterhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/serpent-hunter_greatspear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png12.0Weapon that serves as both greatsword and spear. Thought to have been used to hunt an immortal great serpent in the distant past, it manifests a long blade of light when facing such a creature. When their master's heroic aspirations degenerated into mere greed, his men searched for a weapon with which they might halt their lord.0{}PierceGreat SpearsNo passive effectsGreat-Serpent Hunt15nannannannannannannannannannannan
279280.0Siluria's Treehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/silurias_tree_greatspear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Siluria's Tree, weapon of one of the two honored as foremost among the Crucible Knights. The primordial form of the Erdtree is close in nature to life itself, and this spear, modeled on its crucible, is imbued with ancient holy essence.0{'Str': 27, 'Dex': 13, 'Fai': 20}PierceGreat SpearsNo passive effectsSiluria's Woe25nannannannannannannannannannannan
280281.0Vyke's War Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/vykes_war_spear_greatspear_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0War spear singed and blistered by fingers, used by Vyke, Knight of the Roundtable Hold. Like Vyke himself, it has been tormented by the yellow flame of frenzy from within.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 20, 'Fai': 18}PierceGreat Spears(65) MadnessFrenzyflame Thrust22nannannannannannannannannannannan
281282.0Mohgwyn's Sacred Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/mohgwyns_sacred_spear_great_spears_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Trident of Mohg, Lord of Blood. A sacred spear that will come to symbolize his dynasty. As well as serving as a weapon, it is an instrument of communion with an outer god who bestows power upon accursed blood. The mother of truth desires a wound.0{'Str': 24, 'Dex': 14, 'Arc': 27}PierceGreat Spears(55) HemorrhageBloodboon Ritual20 (-20)nannannannannannannannannannannan
282283.0Bloodfiend's Sacred Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodfiends_sacred_spear_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0Greatspear of the bloodfiend hexers. 283284.0Messmer Soldier's Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/messmer_soldiers_spear_spears_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png8.5Weapon used by the soldiers who serve Messmer the Impaler. A greatspear with a steel blade worn from use. Being made for overwhelming onslaughts, attacks with this weapon can be charged to unleash consecutive strikes.1{'Str': 19, 'Dex': 16}Standard/PierceGreat SpearsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
284285.0Spear of the Impalerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spear_of_the_impaler_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png9.5Weapon of Messmer the Impaler. A greatspear with a warped blade in the shape of undulating flame. Remade by the forging arts of the realm of shadow, this weapon can be thrown by executing a strong attack, dashing strong attack, or mounted strong attack. Charge the attack to produce flame on impact.1{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 35, 'Fai': 18}Standard/PierceGreat SpearsNo passive effectsMessmer's Assault15nannannannannannannannannannannan
285286.0Barbed Staff-Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/barbed_staff-spear_spears_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png7.5Greatstaff of Jori, elder inquisitor. The tip bristles with golden barbs symbolic of the inquisition's torture, allowing one to wield the staff as a greatspear. Attacks deal holy damage, and potency increases with faith.1{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 18, 'Fai': 22}Standard/PierceGreat Spears(55) HemorrhageJori's Inquisition4nannannannannannannannannannannan
286287.0Halberdhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/halberd_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0A long-handled polearm that combines the functions of both axe and spear. Can be used to press a single enemy with continuous thrusting attacks or swept at groups, taking advantage of its great reach and cleaving blade. A versatile weapon for any situation.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 12}Standard/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
287288.0Banished Knight's Halberdhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/banished_knights_halberd_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0A finely-crafted halberd intricately engraved with an ancient motif. Given to knights who, whether by misfortune or misdeed, were forced to abandon their homes. Most of these knights were sent to the fringes, where they were forced to start anew with only despair for company.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 12}Standard/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsCharge Forth16nannannannannannannannannannannan
288289.0Lucernehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lucerne_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png7.0This polearm features a hard, sharpened beak-like spike attached to its head, designed to pierce armor. 289290.0Glaivehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/glaive_halberds_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Weapon comprised of a sharp blade affixed to a long grip. It is in fact a sickle repurposed to be a tool of war. This far-reaching weapon excels at slashing attacks.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 15}Slash/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6nannannannannannannannannannannan
290291.0Vulgar Militia Shotelhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/vulgar_militia_shotel_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0A hooked blade attached to a long handle. Wielded by the vulgar militia, its attacks can slip through an enemy's guard. The vulgar militia are the undecorated stewards of rancid, scorched battlefields that none dare approach, and forbidden domains better forgotten by the rest of the world0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 16}Standard/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6( - 12)nannannannannannannannannannannan
291292.0Vulgar Militia Sawhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/vulgar_militia_saw_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0A weapon comprised of a saw blade attached to a long grip. Brandished by the vulgar militia, its serrated edge is very effective at inflicting blood loss. The saw is said to also be used to cut up bodies to feed the militia, but there are no firsthand witnesses to confirm the dire rumor.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 13}Standard/PierceHalberds(55) HemorrhageSpinning Slash6nannannannannannannannannannannan

Wielded by guardians of the Minor Erdtrees, known as experts in the arts of combat. The power of this weapon scales greatly with dexterity.0{'Str': 17, 'Dex': 16}Standard/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6 ( -12)nannannannannannannannannannannan

Just like the wielder, the missing parts have been mended with corpse wax; a patchwork of champions.0{'Str': 26, 'Dex': 10}Standard/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6 ( - 12)nannannannannannannannannannannan

Weapon of the Night's Cavalry who ride funeral steeds. This glaive excels at weighty slash attacks that crash into foes, making it a powerful weapon even on horse back.0{'Str': 26, 'Dex': 10}Slash/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6 ( - 12)nannannannannannannannannannannan
296297.0Pest's Glaivehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pests_glaive_halberd_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png7.0Glaive made from a hard, sharpened shell. Wielded by the pests who emerged from the Swamp of Aeonia. Slightly increases non-physical damage negation. Though men might recognize the keen intellect of the pests evidenced by this spear's uncanny design, it will never be understood by them.0{'Str': 13, 'Dex': 13}Slash/PierceHalberdsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6( - 12)nannannannannannannannannannannan

A viciously keen and slender scythe made for combat. 310311.0Thorned Whiphttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/thorned_whip_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Hefty whip coverd in crimson thorns. 312313.0Hoslow's Petal Whiphttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/hoslows_petal_whip_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5Metal whip formed of razor-sharp chain-link blades that have theappearance of flower petals. This work of art is handed downthough the generations of the illustrious House Hoslow.High dexterity is required to wield this weapon, but it excels at inflicting devastation0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 20}StrikeWhips(55) HemorrhageKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
313314.0Magma Whip Candlestickhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/magma_whip_candlestick_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5This ritual implement is a three pronged candlestick with solidflames formed of the magma of Mt. Gelmir. When wielded as a weapon, the flames become supple whips oflava.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 16, 'Fai': 18}StrikeWhipsNo passive effectsSea of Magma5 ( -5)nannannannannannannannannannannan
314315.0Giant's Red Braidhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/giant's_red_braid_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Hefty whip woven from the flame-red hair of a Fire Giant. Every giant is red of hair, and Radagon was said to have despised his own red locks. Perhaps that was a curse of their kind.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 12, 'Fai': 21}StrikeWhipsNo passive effectsFlame Dance25nannannannannannannannannannannan
315316.0Tooth Whiphttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/tooth_whip_whips_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Whip bestrewn with rotting, misshapen teeth. Filthy and seething with disease, the teeth are embedded in the whip and dose the victim with deadly poison upon each strike. As the wounds ripen they grow inflamed and ooze pus. The flesh of shamans was said to meld harmoniously with others.1{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 24}StrikeWhips(66) PoisonPainful Strike16nannannannannannannannannannannan
316317.0Caestushttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/caestus_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A weapon built for striking with the fists, made of tough leather inlaid with iron rivets. Fist weapons come in pairs, and two-handing this weapon will equip it to both hands.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 8}StrikeFistsNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
317318.0Spiked Caestushttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spiked_caestus_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0A Caestus with the rivets replaced by blood loss-inducing spikes. Fists weapons come in pairs, and two-handing this weapon will equip it to both hands.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 10}StrikeFists(45) HemorrhageEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
318319.0Katarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/katar_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Imported dagger design with a rather unique handle. The blade can be swung about as the extension of one's fist.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 10}Slash/PierceFistsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust14nannannannannannannannannannannan
319320.0Iron Ballhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/iron_ball_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Iron manifer of spherical shape. Big Boggart the blackguard's weapon of choice. Not a weapon to be taken lightly, as its weighty blows shatter bones with ease.0{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 8}StrikeFistsNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
320321.0Star Fisthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/star_fist_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Spherical iron manifer covered in spikes which induce blood loss. Used in brutal games of pugilism.0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 8}StrikeFists(45) HemorrhageEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
321322.0Clinging Bonehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/clinging_bone_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Horrific weapon made of a hardened skeletal arm. Wielded by Ensha of the Royal Remains. Fitted by placing one's hands into the fists' grips until they dig in. ""O clinging creature. A king relinquishes not the hand.""0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 22, 'Arc': 16}Slash/PierceFistsNo passive effectsLifesteal Fist14nannannannannannannannannannannan
322323.0Veteran's Prosthesishttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/veterans_prosthesis_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Bladed prosthetic leg enwreathed with the power of lightning, instead attached to the fist. Commander Niall, veteran of Castle Sol, offered this prosthesis in exchange for the lives of defeated knights held prisoner. He went on to lead these men as an army of no nation.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 12}Slash/PierceFistsNo passive effectsStorm Kick10nannannannannannannannannannannan
323324.0Cipher Patahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cipher_pata_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.0One of the weapons originating from the Two Fingers. A formless sequence of ciphers comprise its blade, and as such no shield can repel it. Deals holy damage. The furtive inscription appears to hang in the air; the language of light spoken by the Two Fingers.0{'Fai': 30}Slash/PierceFistsNo passive effectsUnblockable Blade17nannannannannannannannannannannan
324325.0Grafted Dragonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grafted_dragon_fist_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5The embodiment of the power that still remained in the dragon's head that was grafted to Godrick's left arm. The wielder's arm will take the form of a small dragon, sprouting sharp dragon fangs at the fist.This weapon cannot be two-handed.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 14, 'Fai': 16}StrikeFistsNo passive effectsBear Witness!20nannannannannannannannannannannan
325326.0Patahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pata_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0A weapon comprised of a linear, double-sided blade attached to a substantial guard. Wielded by the Oathseeker Knights. This versatile armament can be swung about like a fist or used in the manner of a straight sword.1{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 15}Standard/PierceFistsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
326327.0Golem Fisthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/golem_fist_fist_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0A giant fist of fractured rock. Taken from the body of a golem of the ruined forges. Carved with a smithscript enabling strong attacks to launch the entire fist straight ahead.1{'Str': 24, 'Dex': 8, 'Int': 11, 'Fai': 11}StrikeFistsNo passive effectsEndure9nannannannannannannannannannannan
327328.0Madding Handhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/madding_hand_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A glove stitched together from the flayed skin of the victims of a butcherous bloodbath. Afflicts target with madness. Raises attack power when madness is triggered in the vicinity. Forged of an unyielding, black impulse toward revenge fostered in those who were hunted down as heretics by their own brethren, these are the weapons of the utterly downtrodden.1{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 8, 'Int': 13, 'Fai': 20}StrikeFists(55) MadnessMadding Spear-Hand Strike13nannannannannannannannannannannan
328329.0Thiollier's Hidden Needlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/thiolliers_hidden_needle_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.5Concealed weapon used by Thiollier, of a design generally favored by poison-wielders for dark and subtle purposes. Like St. Trina, who blossomed in the deep-purple garden, a rich poison is secreted from within which sends its victims into an eternal sleep.1{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 22, 'Int': 15}PierceFists(42) SleepSleep Evermore16nannannannannannannannannannannan
329330.0Poisoned Handhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/poisoned_hand_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A glove stitched together from the flayed skin of the victims of a butcherous bloodbath. Afflicts target with deadly poison. Raises attack power when poisoning occurs in the vicinity. Forged of an unyielding, black impulse toward revenge fostered in those who have had everything burned or stolen from them, these are the weapons of the utterly downtrodden.1{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 8, 'Arc': 28}StrikeFists(36) PoisonPoison Spear-Hand Strike13nannannannannannannannannannannan
330331.0Hookclawshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/hookclaws_claw_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0Weapon worn on the fist comprised of sharp parallel blades favored by those who lurk in the dark. Lacerations cause blood loss with great effect. Claw weapons come in pairs, and two-handing this weapon will equip it to both hands.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 14}Slash/PierceClaws(60) HemorrhageQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan
331332.0Bloodhound Clawshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodhound_claws_claw_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Large curved claws used by Bloodhound Knights. The curve allows the weapon to slip through an enemy's guard.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 15}Slash/PierceClaws(60) HemorrhageBloodhound's Step5nannannannannannannannannannannan
332333.0Venomous Fanghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/venomous_fang_claw_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5One of the weapons designed for gladiatorial combat. Used by duelists who were exiled from the colosseum. The black fang protruding from the bronze snake head is coated in deadly poison.0{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 9}Slash/PierceClaws(72) PoisonQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan
333334.0Raptor Talonshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/raptor_talons_claw_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5Claw comprised of two sharp, thin blades, wielded by the assassins of Ravenmount, this weapon allows them to imitate the attacks of Deathbirds. Besides excelling at airborne attacks, its charge attack mimics the vicious swoop of a bird of prey.0{'Str': 6, 'Dex': 14}Slash/PierceClaws(60) HemorrhageQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan
334335.0Claws of Nighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/claws_of_night_unique_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Claws of a bottomless black from which no light can escape. Wielded by Anna, Swordhand of Night. Engraved with a smithscript enabling strong attack to launch all three claws at a target. The blades are only semicorporeal, and cannot be fully guarded against.1{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 20}Slash/PierceClaws(45) HemorrhageScattershot Throw11nannannannannannannannannannannan
335336.0Shortbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/shortbow_lightbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Small bow made to fire arrows over great distances. Other than its ability to fire off arrows in rapid succession, it is also well-suited for use on horseback. To use a bow, arrows must also be equipped.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 10}nanLight BowsNo passive effectsBarrage- ( 2 2)nannannannannannannannannannannan
336337.0Composite Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/composite_bow_light_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Bow composited from a mix of Materials. Demands high attributes, and is tricky to wield, but is a fearsome tool when mastered.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 15}nanLight BowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot-( 6 6)nannannannannannannannannannannan
337338.0Red Branch Shortbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/red_branch_shortbow_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Shortbow of polished red wood. Fashioned by a master craftsman and wielded by pages. A bow which requires dexterity rather than strength to master.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 16}nanLight BowsNo passive effectsBarrage-(2 2)nannannannannannannannannannannan
338339.0Misbegotten Shortbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/misbegotten_shortbow_light_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Shortbow wielded by Winged Misbegotten. Fine fur clings to it.Designed to inflict additional damage by sacrificing range.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 8}LightBowsLight BowsNo passive effectsBarrage- (2 2)nannannannannannannannannannannan
339340.0Harp Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/harp_bow_light_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0Bow fashioned from a minstrel's harp. Sonorous tones still resound when firing arrows. Troubadours sing tales of champions, both in the honorable service of the Erdtree, and the one who spurns honor for blasphemy.0{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 9}LightBowsLight BowsNo passive effectsBarrage- (2 2)nannannannannannannannannannannan
340341.0Bone Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bone_bow_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0A crude shortbow fashioned from sickly bone. A medium for spirit-calling, and a product of the ancient hexing arts of the tower.1{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 11}nanBowsNo passive effectsRancor Shot0nannannannannannannannannannannan
341342.0Longbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/longbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Longbow made to fire arrows over great distances. Compared to a shortbow, arrows fired reach further and deal more damage. To use a bow, arrows must also be equipped.0{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 14}nanBowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot6nannannannannannannannannannannan
342343.0Albinauric Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/albinauric_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Longbow featuring delicate silverwork. Wielded by Albinauric wolfback archers. This bow requires dexterity over strength to master.0{'Str': 7, 'Dex': 18}nanBowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot-(6 6)nannannannannannannannannannannan
343344.0Black Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Longbow carved from black wood to resemble a blade. One of the most difficult bows to master. The blade-like body of the bow is light and cuts through the air.Though a longbow, it can be wielded similarly to a shortbow.0{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 20}nanBowsNo passive effectsBarrage- ( 2 2)nannannannannannannannannannannan
344345.0Pulley Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pulley_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0Longbow which utilizes a series of pulleys and strings. The complex mechanism, which required advanced mathematical and mechanical understanding to craft, was likely made by a certain genius who learned Golden Order Fundamentalism. Enhances precision while shooting, enabling arrows to fly much further distances.0{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 11}nanBowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot- (6 6)nannannannannannannannannannannan
345346.0Horn Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/horn_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Longbow made from animal horn. Wielded by the master hunters of the ancestral followers. Imbues arrows fired with magic damage.Reveals its true worth when used with magic-infused arrows.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 14, 'Int': 12}nanBowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot- (6 6)nannannannannannannannannannannan
346347.0Serpent Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/serpent_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5Malformed bow in the shape of a pair of poisonous snakes. Imbues arrows with poison through pagan magic, revealing its true worth when used with poison-infused arrows. Used by assassins known as the Formless Serpents.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 15, 'Arc': 11}nanBowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot- (6 6)nannannannannannannannannannannan
347348.0Erdtree Bowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtree_bow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Longbow featuring Erdtree styling. In times of old, when faith and battle went hand in hand, this weapon was created in tandem with the Golden Arrow. Scales all arrow damage with faith, revealing its true worth when used with holy-infused arrows.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 12, 'Fai': 14}-BowsNo passive effectsMighty Shot6nannannannannannannannannannannan
348349.0Ansbach's Longbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ansbachs_longbow_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Weapon of Sir Ansbach. A longbow consisting of two bow bodies and two strings. Unusually for a longbow, it can be wielded similarly to a light bowprovided that the wielder has the extraordinary dexterity demanded.1{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 43}nanBowsNo passive effectsFan Shot0nannannannannannannannannannannan
349350.0Greatbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/greatbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Enormous greatbow larger than any man. Can not be drawn with any ordinary level of strength, but the force of its shots is extraordinary. A greatbow can only fire great arrows.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 20}nanGreatbowsNo passive effectsThrough and Through- (9 9)nannannannannannannannannannannan

Weapon of the Guardian Golem.Extremely heavy, this greatbow requires enormous strength just to draw, suggesting it was not designed for human use.0{'Str': 24, 'Dex': 18}nanGreatbowsNo passive effectsThrough and Through- ( 9 9 )nannannannannannannannannannannan
351352.0Erdtree Greatbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtree_greatbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png11.0Greatbow featuring Erdtree styling. In times of old, when faith and battle went hand in hand, this weapon was created in tandem with the Golden Great Arrow. Scales all arrow damage with faith, revealing its true worth when used with holy-infused arrows.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 14, 'Fai': 14}nanGreatbowsNo passive effectsThrough and Through- ( 9 9 )nannannannannannannannannannannan

Imbued with gravitational power of the Starscourge, when used along with Radahn's Spear, it becomes a true weapon of a champion.0{'Str': 22, 'Dex': 18}nanGreatbowsNo passive effectsRadahn's Rain- (32 -)nannannannannannannannannannannan
353354.0Igon's Greatbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/igons_greatbow_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png12.5Weapon of Igon, the broken drake warrior. A greatbow fashioned from two dragon bones bound with coarse rope. Covered in gashes left by claws. Imbued with Igon's obsession, enhancing the power of Igon's Harpoon.1{'Str': 23, 'Dex': 16}nanGreatbowsNo passive effectsIgon's Drake Hunt- (13 13)nannannannannannannannannannannan

355356.0Light Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/light_crossbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Ranged weapon made from a bow fixed to a stock. Bolts must be equipped to use a crossbow.0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 8}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
356357.0Heavy Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/heavy_crossbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Heavy crossbow with iron limbs, increasing damage dealt. Commonly employed in the Shattering.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 10}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
357358.0Arbalesthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/arbalest_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.0Large crossbow made from composite materials. One of the largest of all bolt firing devices. Its limbs are more pliable than metallic ones, allowing bolts fired from this weapon to pierce even forged of steel.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 12}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
358359.0Crepus's Black-Key Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/crepuss_black-key_crossbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0Black crossbow featuring a long stock. Used for sniping, it has a very long range. Weapon of Crepus, who served the Two Fingers from the shadows of the Roundtable as the head confessor.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 16}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
359360.0Pulley Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pulley_crossbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Crossbow made with pulleys and power springs. The complex mechanism, which required advanced mathematical and mechanical understanding to craft, was likely made by a certain genius who learned Golden Order fundamentalism. One touch fires a volley of bolts. Be warned; large stores of bolts can be quickly spent.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 16}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
360361.0Full Moon Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/full_moon_crossbow_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0One-of-a-kind enchanted crossbow of exquisitely detailed craftsmanship. Made to celebrate the matrimonial union, and reconciliation, between the houses of the Erdtree and the Full Moon, Leyndell and Raya Lucaria. The two rings dance when reloading the weapon. Reveals true worth when used with holy- infused bolts.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 10, 'Int': 14}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
361362.0Repeating Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/repeating_crossbow_crossbow_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png6.0A mechanized crossbow that has been fitted with a fan-shaped contraption. This metallic piece adds a reloading system used in the execution of a unique battle art.1{'Str': 13, 'Dex': 15}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsRepeating Fire0nannannannannannannannannannannan
362363.0Spread Crossbowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spread_crossbow_crossbow_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0A modified crossbow made by combining two crossbows into one. Capable of loading multiple bolts and firing them simultaneously, enabling a spread of fire.1{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 17}nanCrossbowsNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
363364.0Hand Ballistahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/hand_ballista_ballista_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0An unconventional ballistic device modeled on a weapon used to besiege castles. Only capable of firing greatbolts. Perfect for reckless acts such as storming a castle or facing an entire army alone.0{'Str': 30, 'Dex': 14}nanBallistasNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
364365.0Jar Cannonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/jar_cannon_ballista_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png15.0Jar cannon which uses explosives to fire greatbolts. Deals great damage but is slow to reload. Experimental firearm brought to the assault on Volcano Manor, where it was discovered that no one knew how to use it.0{'Str': 34, 'Dex': 12}nanBallistasNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
365366.0Rabbath's Cannonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rabbaths_cannon_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png15.0A type of jar cannon used to fire greatbolts. A masterwork of Spellmachinist Rabbath. The power of the glintstones that encircle the barrel imbues bolts with magic damage and guides shots toward their targets.1{'Str': 28, 'Dex': 16}nanBallistasNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
366367.0Astrologer's Staffhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/astrologers_staff_glintstonestaff_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Staff of the astrologers. A glintsone is embedded in the tip, enabling it to be used as a catalyst for sorceries. Sorceries must be memorized first at a site of lost grace, and a staff must be equipped to cast them.0{'Str': 7, 'Int': 16}StrikeGlintstone StaffsNo passive effectsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan

Boosts the power of Stonedigger sorceries0{'Str': 8, 'Int': 12}StrikeGlintstone StaffsBoosts Stonedigger SorceryNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan

376377.0Albinauric Staffhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/albinauric_staff_glintstonestaff_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Short staff with a blue glintstone embedded. 377378.0Staff of Losshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/staff_of_loss_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Staff missing its glintstone. Wielded by sorcerers who believe that discovery comes through acts of asceticism. This staff only distinguishes itself when casting invisibility sorceries, but that is reason enough for some to wield it.0{'Str': 6, 'Dex': 12, 'Int': 14}StrikeGlintstone StaffsBoosts Invisibility SorceryNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan

This staff can only be weilded by those of intellect high enough to grasp such wisdom.0{'Str': 8, 'Int': 48}StrikeGlintstone StaffsBoosts Crystalian sorceriesNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan

381382.0Meteorite Staffhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/meteorite_staff_glintstonestaff_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Staff embedded with a dark purple glintstone, said to be the fragment of a meteorite. 382383.0Staff of the Guiltyhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/staff_of_the_guilty_glintstonestaff_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5A heretical staff fashioned from a smoldering, withered sapling that turns the blood of sacrifices pierced by it into glintstone. Similar to hex magic. 383384.0Prince of Death's Staffhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/prince_of_deaths_staff_glintstonestaff_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Staff embedded with sullied amber, said to be a very part of the Prince of Death. Enhances death sorceries. One of the staves deemed heretical by the academy for its ability to allow sorceries to be augmented through faith in addition to intelligence.0{'Str': 6, 'Int': 18, 'Fai': 18}StrikeGlintstone StaffsBoosts Death SorceriesNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
384385.0Staff of the Great Beyondhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/staff_of_the_great_beyond_glintstone_staff_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Staff fashioned from the tail-fingers of Metyr, the Mother of Fingers, and the microcosm raised aloft over the crux they form. Despite being broken and abandoned, she kept waiting for another message to come.1{'Str': 7, 'Int': 25, 'Fai': 25}StrikeGlinstone StavesNo passive effectsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
385386.0Maternal Staffhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dryleaf_seal_glinstone_staff_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Staff of Count Ymir, who made himself a Mother of Fingers. The crystal ball, though representative of a microcosm, would not receive any sign.1{'Str': 7, 'Int': 21, 'Arc': 21}StrikeGlinstone StavesNo passive effectsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
386387.0Finger Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/finger_seal_sacred_seal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A sacred seal bestowed by a Finger Maiden which serves as a catalyst for casting sacred incantations. 387388.0Erdtree Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtree_seal_sacred_seal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.0A formless sacred seal decorated with an Erdtree crest, once the focus of religion in the Lands Between.Even though the Elden Ring is shattered, and the Erdtree has dulled from its former radiance, earnest faith continues to hold the answers.0{'Fai': 40}StrikeSacred SealsNo passive effectsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
389390.0Golden Order Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/golden_order_seal_sacred_seal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.0A formless sacred seal depicting the ceremonial observation of Order. Enhances Golden Fundamentalist incantations. Fundamentalism is scholarship in all but name. Scales incantation using both intelligence and faith.0{'Int': 17, 'Fai': 17}StrikeSacred SealsBoosts Fundamentalist Inc.No Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
390391.0Gravel Stone Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gravel_stone_seal_sacred_seal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5Sacred seal made from Gravel Stone thought to be an ancient dragon scale. Enhances Dragon Cult incantations of the Royal Capital. The worship of the ancient dragons does not conflict with belief in the Erdtree. After all, this seal, and lightning itself, are both imbued with gold.0{'Str': 4, 'Fai': 18}StrikeSacred SealsBoosts Dragon Cult IncantationsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
391392.0Giant's Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/giants_seal_sacred_seal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5Sacred seal depicting the one eyed god of the Fire Giants, adorned with braids of red hair. 392393.0Godslayer's Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/godslayers_seal_sacred_seal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5Sacred seal of the Godskin Apostles, inlaid with obsidian. 393394.0Clawmark Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/clawmark_seal_sacred_seal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A sacred seal given by Gurranq, the BeastClergyman. Enhances bestial incantations learned from Gurranq.0{'Str': 4, 'Fai': 10}StrikeSacred SealsBoosts Bestial IncantationsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
394395.0Frenzied Flame Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frenzied_flame_seal_sacred_seal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png12.0Formless sacred seal bestowed by the maiden of the Three Fingers. Enhances incantations of the frenzied flame. This seal is the mark of the Lord of Frenzied Flame. Scales incantations using strength, dexterity, intelligence, and faith all together.0{}StrikeSacred Seals(55) MadnessNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
395396.0Dragon Communion Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragon_communion_seal_sacred_seal_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.0Formless drakeblood seal with a dragon communion crest. Enhances Dragon Communion incantations. The sacrificial devouring of the heart gives power. Indeed, Dragon Communion is too primal in nature for the term "incantation" to be appropriate. This seal scales incantations with one's arcane attribute.0{'Fai': 10, 'Arc': 10}StrikeSacred SealsBoosts Dragon Communion IncantationsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
396397.0Dryleaf Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dryleaf_seal_unique_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5Sacred seal of the spiritual seekers known as the Dryleaf Sect. And then, they made to serve a new god.1{'Str': 8, 'Fai': 27}StrikeSacred SealsNo passive effectsNo Skill0nannannannannannannannannannannan
397398.0Fire Knight's Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fire_knights_seal_unique_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5Sacred seal of the Fire Knights, who answer directly to Messmer the Impaler. 398399.0Spiraltree Sealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spiraltree_seal_unique_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5Sacred seal of soiled amber engraved with a spiral tree design. Enhances spiral incantations. 399400.0Torchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/torch_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5This torch's tip is wrapped in oil-soaked rags and set on fire. Can be raised up when equipped in the left hand, illuminating more of the surrounding area.0{'Str': 5, 'Dex': 5}StrikeTorchesNo passive effectsTorch Attack0nannannannannannannannannannannan
400401.0Beast-Repellent Torchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/beast-repellent_torch_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5A torch which burns oil infused with a special incense. The aroma pacifies wild beasts. Torches such as these were used to keep unwelcome beasts away from treasure troves hidden in caves.0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 8}StrikeTorchesNo passive effectsTorch Attack0nannannannannannannannannannannan
401402.0Steel-Wire Torchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/steel-wire_torch_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Torch wound with metal wire. 402403.0Sentry's Torchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sentrys_torch_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0Torch Given to protectors of the Erdtree. Furnished on behalf of the Erdtree and the Grace-Given Lord such that a Night of Black Knives will never come again.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 8, 'Fai': 15}StrikeTorchesNo passive effectsTorch Attack0nannannannannannannannannannannan
403404.0Ghostflame Torchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ghostflame_torch_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Metal torch that burns with cold ghostflame. Tool of the Fallen Hawks who prowl the underground rivers. When the band's last embers were used up in their long search, they began to burn the bones of their fellows, acquiring the cold ghostflame, but sealing their fate as dwellers of the underground for all eternity.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 10, 'Int': 14}StrikeTorches(65) FrostbiteTorch Attack0nannannannannannannannannannannan
404405.0St. Trina's Torchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/st_trinas_torch_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Candlestand torch that burns with a light-purple flame. 405406.0Lamenting Visagehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lamenting_visage_torch_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0A stone lantern carved to resemble a lamenting human head, the eyes vacantly beaming out light. The languid ease of one who needs not sight.1{'Str': 9}StrikeTorchesNo passive effectsBlindfold of Happiness10nannannannannannannannannannannan
406407.0Nanaya's Torchhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/nanayas_torch_1_torches_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5A torch made by attaching a dying flame of frenzy to a small spinal column. A primordial life energy resides inside.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises maximum Stamina by 13%500nannannannannannannannannan

12nanTwo-Headed Turtle Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/two-headed_turtle_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A talisman in the shape of a two-headed green turtle. Greatly raises stamina recovery speed. Turtles are known as a nutritious ingredient, symbolic of inexhaustible power. Two-headed turtles are a favorite subject in the land of the tower, due to the spiral shape of their intertwined necks.1nannannannannannanEffect Greatly raises stamina recovery speed???nannannannannannannannannan
13nanStalwart Horn Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/stalwart_horn_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6An accoutrement worn by the ancestral followers. Raises robustness. (Robustness governs resistance to blood loss and frost.) Said to be a budding horn. The ancestral followers believe that the horns of a long-lived beast continue to bud like antlers, over and over again, until the beast one day becomes an ancestral spirit.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Robustness by 90500nannannannannannannannannan

46nanBlessed Blue Dew Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/blessed_blue_dew_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3Talisman depicting the blessed boon that is a droplet of the blue, luminescent sap of the Erdtree. Gradually restores FP. It was once thought that the blessed sap of the Erdtree would drip from its boughs forever—but that age of plenty swiftly came to a close, and with time, the Erdtree became more an object of faith.1nannannannannannanEffect Slowly restores FP1000nannannannannannannannannan
47nanFine Crucible Feather Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/fine_crucible_feather_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman fashioned from thin feathers that embody the aspects of various creatures. Said to have grown on the human body long ago. Improves backsteps but increases damage taken at all times. Hornsent view the Crucible as sacred for the refinement wrought through its evolutionary gifts. Most prominently, their tangled horns.1nannannannannannanEffect Improves backsteps but increases damage taken???nannannannannannannannannan
48nanOuter God Heirloomhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/outer_god_heirloom_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman engraved with the lore of an outer god. Raises arcane. The clan, who lost everything in the great fires, peered upon the corpse of their ancestor, normally an act of sanctity, and saw in its shadow a twisted deity. The clan had suffered such torment that the horrible thing was taken as an object of worship.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises arcane???nannannannannannannannannan
49nanShattered Stone Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/shattered_stone_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3Shattered linchpin stone. Raises potency of kicking and stomping skills. Linchpin stones are spiritual anchors said to hold the ground in place and quell the fury of earthquakes—when this one shattered, the surrounding town fell into the broken earth. One account claimed that the moon itself had come tumbling down.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of kicking and stomping skills500nannannannannannannannannan
50nanTwo-Handed Sword Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/two-handed_sword_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.2A talisman depicting a warrior two-handing a sword. Enhances attacks with two-handed weapons. The horned warriors were fitting figureheads for the military might of the tower they kept watch over, their deft attacks slashing through any and all foes.1nannannannannannanEffect Enhances attacks with two-handed weapons500nannannannannannannannannan
51nanCrusade Insigniahttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/crusade_insignia_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman depicting a raised spear on a backdrop of flames, in remembrance of the lives lost in the sacred crusade led by Messmer. Raises attack power after defeating an enemy. The warriors who fought in the crusade set aside both honor and mercy to wantonly impale and scorch those deemed impure. Those who felt invigorated by each cry of death were the same men who were certain of the sanctity of the campaign.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 15% for 20 seconds after defeating an enemy???nannannannannannannannannan
52nanAged One's Exultationhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/aged_ones_exultation_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman depicting the exultation of the aging untouchable, whose head resembles a sprig of ripe grapes. Raises attack power when madness is triggered in the vicinity. "Gift your madness to our Lord. Bless our brethren with grapes. Take care that they fully ripen."1nannannannannannanEffect Madness in the vicinity increases attack power???nannannannannannannannannan
53nanArrow's Soaring Sting Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/arrows_soaring_sting_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman composed of fletched and iron arrows. Increases the effective range of bows and raises attack power of arrows and bolts.1nannannannannannanEffect Increases the effective range of bows and raises attack power of arrows and bolts???nannannannannannannannannan
54nanPearl Shield Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/pearl_shield_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9Talisman depicting a knight bearing a pearlescent greatshield. Boosts all non-physical damage negation while guarding. The nature and the potential of impurity surpassed the understanding of the knights, and so they were forced to prepare for all threats known or unknown.1nannannannannannanReduces Elemental Damage taken by 20% while guarding???nannannannannannannannannan
55nanDried Bouquethttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/dried_bouquet_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A quaint bouquet of dried flowers, offered to a small grave. Raises attack power when a spirit you have summoned dies. The sorrow that flows from the untimely demise of a loved one is a tenderness shared by all, regardless of birthplace.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 20% for 30 seconds when summoned spirit dies???nannannannannannannannannan
56nanSmithing Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/smithing_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman depicting an ancient smithing hammer. Inscribed with a smithscript. Enhances weapon-throwing attacks. In ancient times, smithing was a divine act, and blacksmiths interpreted the script they perceived in the wrinkles of molten steel to imbue weapons with souls.1nannannannannannanEffect Enhances weapon-throwing attacks by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
57nanAilment Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/ailment_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman depicting a soul taken by sickness. When certain ailments are triggered, this talisman grants resistance to the same ailment. When the weak were infected with the dreaded fly sickness, they perished well before the metamorphosis could take hold. Oddly, those who cared for the infected and made certain they were given a proper burial were never afflicted themselves.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises resistance to the last ailment suffered???nannannannannannannannannan
58nanRetaliatory Crossed-Treehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/retaliatory_crossed-tree_1_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3Handicraft depicting a golden crossed-tree. One of the items conferred to the Needle Knights. Enhances attacks executed after rolling or backstepping. Long ago, the Needle Knights were in service of Miquella, but now they are no more. Save for one.1nannannannannannanEffect Enhances attacks executed after rolling or backstepping by 17%???nannannannannannannannannan
59nanLacerating Crossed-Treehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/lacerating_crossed-tree_1_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3Handicraft depicting a golden crossed-tree. One of the items conferred to the Needle Knights. Enhances dash attacks. Long ago, the Needle Knights were in service of Miquella, but now they are no more. Save for one.1nannannannannannanEffect Enhances dash attacks???nannannannannannannannannan
60nanSharpshot Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/sharpshot_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman depicting an archer wielding a longbow. Boosts attack power of precision-aimed shots. The Albinauric archers were in a class of their own, and their deadly long-range specialists struck fear into the hearts of men.1nannannannannannanEffect Boosts attack power of precision-aimed shots by 12%500nannannannannannannannannan
61nanSt. Trina's Smilehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/st._trinas_smile_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A talisman depicting a smiling St. Trina, a vision conjured deep within a certain man's heart. Raises attack power when sleep is triggered in the vicinity. "Only I am allowed to know. Of your velvety sleep. Its sweetly gentle embrace. So please, smile—for me, and only me."1nannannannannannanEffect Sleep in the vicinity increases attack power???nannannannannannannannannan
62nanTalisman of the Dreadhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/talisman_of_the_dread_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3Talisman depicting the dread dragon of the jagged peak, whose roars cause the peak's molten fury to boil and churn. Raises potency of magma. Bayle was the foul dragon's name—a terrible harbinger of destruction whose challenge to the ancient Dragonlord ended in grievous mutual injury.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of magma???nannannannannannannannannan
63nanEnraged Divine Beasthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/enraged_divine_beast_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A charm depicting the crazed, cavorting dance of the divine beast conducted at the tower festival. Raises potency of storms. Divine beasts are messengers of the heavens, and their rage mirrors the tumult of the skies, of which storms are the pinnacle.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of storms by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
64nanBeloved Stardusthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/beloved_stardust_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.3A talisman depicting a wizened hand gently gripping a glintstone. Shortens casting speed for sorcery and incantations by the utmost, but increases damage taken. Count Ymir was known for his recitations. "One need only envision the romance of the stars above with adoration for stardust in one's heart to become a great sorcerer. Do so, and you will know love."1nannannannannannanEffect Shortens casting speed for sorcery and incantations by the utmost, but increases damage taken2000nannannannannannannannannan
65nanTalisman of Lord's Bestowalhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/talisman_of_lords_bestowal_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0A talisman depicting Godfrey, first Elden lord, receiving the precious sap. Increases poise after using a flask of tears. The Lord accepted the sap stoically, without any sign of wavering. No wonder Lord of the Erdtree casts a long shadow over the lands.1nannannannannannanEffect Increases poise after using a flask of tears???nannannannannannannannannan
66nanVerdigris Discushttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/verdigris_discus_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5A discus made of verdigris, the corroded metal known for its heft. Raises defense with higher equipment load. Great weight makes for great strength. The strength to protect others.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises defense with higher equipment load???nannannannannannannannannan
67nanRellana's Cameohttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/rellanas_cameo_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8Talisman featuring a gallant portrait of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight. Enhances attacks executed after maintaining the same stance for a certain length of time. Engraved as a reminder of the unparalleled devotion of those who left their homelands to serve Rellana. "By your leave, we will accompany you wherever your lunar vessel takes you."1nannannannannannanEffect Enhances attacks executed after maintaining the same stance for a while500nannannannannannannannannan
68nanBlade of Mercyhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/blade_of_mercy_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A thin, blood-stained dagger. No longer fit for use. Raises attack power after each critical hit. Hornsent employed this to honorably end the suffering of a compatriot. After claiming numerous lives, the dagger is now broken, but has acquired a spectral aura.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 20% for 20 seconds after each critical hit500nannannannannannannannannan
69nanTalisman of All Crucibleshttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/talisman_of_all_crucibles_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A giant mass of intermingling Crucible attributes. Reduces damage taken from critical hits and head shots and improves the effectiveness of rolling and backstepping, but also increases damage taken at all times. Rumored to have sprouted upon giants and is known as the "mother of Crucibles" in ancient tower lore.1nannannannannannanEffect Grants effects of all crucible talismans???nannannannannannannannannan
70nanBlessed Dew Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/blessed_dew_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6Talisman depicting a drop of the Erdtree's sap, a blessed boon. Gradually restores HP. It was once thought that the blessed sap of the Erdtree would drip from its boughs forever -- but that age of plenty swiftly came to a close, and with time, the Erdtree became more an object of faith.0nannannannannannanEffect Restores 2 HP/sec1000nannannannannannannannannan
71nanGreen Turtle Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/green_turtle_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman in the shape of a green turtle.Raises stamina recovery speed. Turtles are known as a nutritious ingredient, symbolic of inexhaustible power. However, those who hold turtles to be wise creatures consider the practice of eating their meat to be barbarous.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Stamina recovery speed by 8 per second (17.7%)500nannannannannannannannannan
72nanArsenal Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/arsenal_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5An iron charm that resembles a mass of weaponry. Boosts maximum equipment load. This talisman was derived from an unusual greatsword, once wielded by a hero hungry for vengeance.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises maximum Equip Load by 15%100nannannannannannannannannan
73nanArsenal Charm +1 Varianthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/arsenal_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5An iron charm that resembles a mass of weaponry. Boosts maximum equipment load. This talisman was derived from an unusual greatsword, once wielded by a hero hungry for vengeance.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises maximum Equip Load by 17%500nannannannannannannannannan
74nanGreat-Jar's Arsenalhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/great-jars_arsenal_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A charm that resembles a great jar overflowing with weaponry.Vastly boosts maximum equipment load. The great jar grants this talisman to their warriors. Carry as much as you can — grow big and strong.0nannannannannannanEffect Vastly raises maximum Equip Load, by 19%1000nannannannannannannannannan
75nanRadagon's Scarsealhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/radagons_scarseal_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8An eye engraved with an Elden Rune.Said to be the seal of King Consort Radagon. Raises vigor, endurance, strength, and dexterity, but also increases damage taken. These seals represent the lifelong duty of those chosen by the gods.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Vigor, Endurance, Strength, and Dexterity by 3, but increases damage taken by 10%3000nannannannannannannannannan
76nanRadagon's Soresealhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/radagons_ soreseal_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8This legendary talisman is an eye engraved with an Elden Rune, said to be the seal of King Consort Radagon. Greatly raises vigor, endurance, strength, dexterity, but also increases damage taken by a similar measure. Solemn duty weighs upon the one beholden; not unlike a gnawing curse from which there is no deliverance.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Vigor, Endurance, Strength, and Dexterity by 5 each, but increases damage taken by 15%3000nannannannannannannannannan
77nanMarika's Scarsealhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/marikas_scarseal_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8An eye engraved with an Elden Rune.Said to be the seal of Queen Marika. Greatly raises mind, intelligence, faith, and arcane, but also increases damage taken by a similar measure. Solemn duty weighs upon the one beholden; not unlike a gnawing curse from which there is no deliverance.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Mind, Intelligence, Faith, and Arcane by 5 each, but increases damage taken by 15%3000nannannannannannannannannan
79nanStarscourge Heirloomhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/starscourge_heirloom_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman engraved with a scene from a heroic tale.Raises strength. The mightiest hero of the demigods confronted the falling stars alone—and thus did he crush them, his conquest sealing the very fate of the stars.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Strength by 51000nannannannannannannannannan
80nanProsthesis-Wearer Heirloomhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/prosthesis-wearer_heriloom_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman engraved with a scene from a heroic tale.Raises dexterity. Though born into the accursed rot, when the young girl encountered her mentor and his flowing blade, she gained wings of unparalleled strength.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Dexterity by 51000nannannannannannannannannan
81nanStargazer Heirloomhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/stargazer_heirloom_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A talisman engraved with the legend of a queen.Raises intelligence. The young astrologer gazed at the night sky as she walked. She had always chased the stars every step of her journey. Then she met the full moon — and, in time, the astrologer became a queen.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Intelligence by 51000nannannannannannannannannan
82nanTwo Fingers Heirloomhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/two_fingers_heirloom_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A talisman engraved with the legend of the Two Fingers.Raises faith. Fingers cannot speak, yet these are eloquent.Persistently they wriggle, spelling out mysteries in the air.Thus did we gain the words. The words of our faith.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Faith by 51000nannannannannannannannannan
83nanDragoncrest Shield Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/dragoncrest_shield_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8Wrought iron talisman depicting a trio of ancient dragons.Boosts physical damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock.And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces Physical Damage taken 10%100nannannannannannannannannan

90nanPrince of Death's Pustulehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/prince_of_deaths_pustule_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A fetid pustule taken from facial flesh.Raises vitality.(Vitality governs resistance to the effects of Death.) It is said that this pustule came from the visage of the Prince of Death, he who used to be called Godwyn. As First Dead of the demigods, it's said he's buried deep under the capital, at the Erdtree's roots.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Vitality by 90500nannannannannannannannannan
91nanPrince of Death's Cysthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/prince_of_deaths_cyst_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A fetid, overgrown cyst taken from facial flesh.Greatly raises vitality.(Vitality governs resistance to the effects of Death.) It is said that this cyst came from the corrupted visage of one unable to die a true Death. Indeed, it comes from the Prince of Death, scion of the golden bough and First of the Dead among the demigods.0nannannannannannanEffect Greatly raises Vitality, by 1401000nannannannannannannannannan
92nanDagger Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/dagger_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.1A talisman depicting a dagger and a surgeon.Enhances critical hits. The white-garbed field surgeons come to the aid of friend and foe alike by dealing a final deadly thrust to spare them from the prolonged agony of a mortal wound. A sense of mercy is a catalyst for bloodlust.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Critical Damage by 17%500nannannannannannannannannan
93nanCurved Sword Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/curved_sword_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting a curved sword and a swordsman.Enhances guard counters. It is said that a blind swordsman was the originator of this technique — the art of allowing one's opponent to strike so as to leave them vulnerable to a well-timed reply.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases guard counter damage by 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
94nanTwinblade Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/twinblade_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting a twinblade and a confessor.Enhances the final hit ending a chain of attacks. The twinblade technique is a tradition of the confessors, who closely guard the secret of how they preserve the momentum of their attacks. Thus is the final strike of their onslaught all the more deadly.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases damage of final hit in attack chain by 45%500nannannannannannannannannan
95nanAxe Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/axe_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman depicting an axe and a warrior.Enhances charge attacks. The Lord who led the Long March bore an axe, and his loyal warriors honored him by wielding axes of their own, making them very effective at dealing decisive blows.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Charge Attack damage by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
96nanHammer Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/hammer_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A talisman depicting a hammer and a knight.Enhances stamina-reducing attacks against a blocking opponent. Hammers are highly effective against shield-bearing foes, so much so that they are known as "knight-killers."0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Stamina damage against blocking enemies by 40%500nannannannannannannannannan
97nanSpear Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/spear_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.5A talisman depicting a spear and a soldier. Enhances the counterattacks that are unique to thrusting weapons. Spears are standard weapons for soldiers in the Lands Between. They made it possible to respond to a ferocious foe with an equally ferocious counterattack.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases thrusting weapon counterattack damage by 15%500nannannannannannannannannan
98nanLance Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/lance_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting a lance and a knight.Enhances attacks while on horseback. Knights on horseback are deadly foes. They see all below from their lofty position, meeting little meaningful resistance as they charge ahead.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases damage of attacks while on horseback by 15%500nannannannannannannannannan
99nanClaw Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/claw_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting a claw and an assassin.Enhances jump attacks. The assassins of Ravenmount are killers by trade. They assail their victims while dressed as birds of prey.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases jump attack damage by 15% (7.5% in PvP)500nannannannannannannannannan
100nanGreatshield Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/greatshield_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9Talisman depicting a knight holding a greatshield.Boosts guarding ability. The knights of Leyndell once modelled themselves after the Tree Sentinels. Their purpose is to protect that which deserves protection, and thus the shield always comes before the sword.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces stamina damage taken while blocking by 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
101nanArrow's Sting Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/arrows_sting_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting three iron arrows.Carried by soldiers long ago. Raises attack power of arrows and bolts.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power of Arrows/Bolts by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
102nanArrow's Reach Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/arrows_reach_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting three arrows.Carried by hunters of beasts.
