103nanGraven-School Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/graven-school_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting a school of graven mages, the nightmare of the academy. Raises potency of sorceries. The primeval current is a forbidden tradition of glintstone sorcery. To those who cleave to its teachings, the act of collecting sorcerers to fashion them into the seeds of stars is but another path of scientific inquiry.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of Sorceries by 4%1000nannannannannannannannannan
104nanGraven-Mass Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/graven-mass_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A talisman depicting the first school of graven mages — a nightmare that would continue to haunt the academy. Greatly raises potency of sorceries. The primeval current is a forbidden tradition of glintstone sorcery. To those who cleave to its teachings, the act of collecting sorcerers to fashion them into the seeds of stars is but another path of scientific inquiry.0nannannannannannanEffect Greatly raises potency of Sorceries by 8%2000nannannannannannannannannan
105nanFaithful's Canvas Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/faithfuls_canvas_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman bearing an icon that depicts a group of masked figures.Raises potency of incantations. The figures represent the flock at prayer, their firm belief in the intangible inspiring even the solitary founder of their religion. What is faith if not an affirmation?0nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of Incantations by 4%1000nannannannannannannannannan
106nanFlock's Canvas Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/flocks_canvas_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A talisman bearing an icon that depicts a mass of masked figures.Greatly raises potency of incantations. The figures represent the flock at prayer, their firm belief in the intangible inspiring even the solitary founder of their religion. What is faith if not an affirmation?0nannannannannannanEffect Greatly raises potency of incantations (8%)2000nannannannannannannannannan
107nanPrimal Glintstone Bladehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/primal_glintstone_blade_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6An old glintstone blade that has been stained with blood. Reduces FP consumption of sorceries and incantations at the cost of maximum HP. The old sorcerers would slice open their hearts with these blades to imbue a primal glintstone with their soul, and thus did they die.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces Spell FP costs by 25% but reduces maximum HP by 15%2000nannannannannannannannannan
108nanMoon of Nokstellahttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/moon_of_nokstella_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8This legendary talisman is a treasure of Nokstella, the Eternal City. Increases memory slots. This talisman represents the lost black moon.The moon of Nokstella was the guide of countless stars.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Memory Slots by 22000nannannannannannannannannan
109nanOld Lord's Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/old_lords_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.5A legendary talisman depicting the ancient king whose seat lies at the heart of the storm beyond time. Extends the duration of sorceries and incantations. It is said that the ancient royal city of Farum Azula has been slowly crumbling since time immemorial.0nannannannannannanEffect Extends the duration of Spells by 30%1000nannannannannannannannannan
110nanRadagon Iconhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/radagon_icon_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A legendary talisman depicting the Elden Lord Radagon.Shortens the casting time of sorceries and incantations. As the husband of Rennala of Caria, the red-haired Radagon studied sorcery, and as the husband of Queen Marika, he studied incantations. Thus did the hero aspire to be complete.0nannannannannannanEffect Shortens the casting time of Spells1000nannannannannannannannannan
111nanRoar Medallionhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/roar_medallion_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A bronze medallion depicting a roaring giant.Enhances roars and breath attacks. In ancient times, the giants were mortal enemies of the Erdtree. Their bellowing roars desolated nature, triggered avalanches, and whipped up storms of flame.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases the damage of roars and breath attacks by 15%500nannannannannannannannannan
112nanCompanion Jarhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/companion_jar_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A talisman given by the jars to their friends.Raises potency of thrown jars. Though the jars are brought to life by human flesh and blood, they are all rather kindly folk. Perhaps they were made to be better than their innards.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of Throwing Pots by 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
113nanPerfumer's Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/perfumers_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A talisman depicting a set of perfume bottles.Raises potency of arts employing perfume. There are gardens known only to the perfumers. Whether hidden on the fringes of the highlands, or obscured by shadows inside caves, the flowers blossom in secret, waiting to impart their scent.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of Arts employing Perfume by 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
114nanCarian Filigreed Cresthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/carian_filigreed_crest_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman adorned with the royal crest. Lowers FP consumed by skills. An honor said to have once been awarded to Carian knights who served as direct retainers to the kingdom's princesses. Now there is only one princess: Ranni, daughter of Rennala.0nannannannannannanEffect Lowers FP cost of Skills by 25%1000nannannannannannannannannan
115nanWarrior Jar Shardhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/warrior_jar_shard_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9Shard of a shattered warrior jar. Boosts the attack power of skills. Scraps of stewed flesh cling to the shard, and tatters of ornaments can be seen mingled within the slime. Relics of ancient royal warriors, perhaps.0nannannannannannanEffect Boosts the attack power of Skills by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
116nanShard of Alexanderhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/shard_of_alexander_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9Shard of the late Alexander, a shattered warrior jar. Greatly boosts the attack power of skills. Scraps of stewed flesh cling to the shard, and tatters of ornaments can be seen mingled within the slime. Relics of a red-haired champion, it would seem.0nannannannannannanEffect Greatly boosts the attack power of Skills by 15%1000nannannannannannannannannan
117nanGodfrey Iconhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/godfrey_icon_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A legendary talisman depicting the Elden Lord Godfrey.Raises charge attack power of sorceries, incantations, and skills. Godfrey was a ferocious warrior. When he vowed to become a lord, he took the Beast Regent Serosh upon on his back to suppress the ceaseless lust for battle that raged within.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power of charged Spells and Skills by 15%1000nannannannannannannannannan
118nanBull-Goat's Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/bull-goats_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.5A talisman depicting the horns of a bull-goat.Raises poise. Bull-goats are associated with the stout and mighty Tragoth, said to be unflinching in combat - now a silent comrade to those who fight.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Poise by 33%1000nannannannannannannannannan
119nanBlue Dancer Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/blue_dancer_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A cloth doll depicting a dancer garbed in blue.An ancient heirloom of some sort. Raises attack power with lower equipment load. The dancer in blue represents a fairy, who in legend bestowed a flowing sword upon a blind swordsman. Blade in hand, theswordsman sealed away an ancient god — a god that was Rot itself.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Physical Damage with lower Equip Weight500nannannannannannannannannan
120nanMagic Scorpion Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/magic_scorpion_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman carried by assassins who strike unseen.Patterned on a scorpion freshly shed of its exoskeleton, its claws seizing a heart that shimmers with magic. Raises magic attack power, but lowers damage negation.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Magic Damage by 12%, but increases Physical Damage taken by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
121nanFire Scorpion Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/fire_scorpion_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman carried by assassins who strike unseen.Patterned on a scorpion freshly shed of its exoskeleton, its claws seizing a heart that burns with fire. Raises fire attack power, but lowers damage negation.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Fire Damage by 12%, but increases Physical Damage taken by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
122nanLightning Scorpion Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/lightning_scorpion_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman carried by assassins who strike unseen.Patterned on a scorpion freshly shed of its exoskeleton, its claws seizing a heart that sparks with lightning. Raises lightning attack power, but lowers damage negation.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Lightning Damage by 12%, but increases Physical Damage taken by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
123nanSacred Scorpion Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/sacred_scorpion_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman carried by assassins who strike unseen.Patterned on a scorpion freshly shed of its exoskeleton, its claws seizing a heart with a blessed glow. Raises holy attack power, but lowers damage negation.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Holy Damage by 12%, but increases Physical Damage taken by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
124nanCrucible Scale Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/crucible_scale_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.1A talisman fashioned from a scale that embodies the aspects of various creatures.Said to have grown on the human body long ago. Reduces damage taken from critical hits. A vestige of the crucible of primordial life. Born partially of devolution, it was considered a signifier of the divine in ancient times, but is now increasingly disdained as an impurity as civilization has advanced.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces Critical Damage taken by 30%500nannannannannannannannannan
125nanCrucible Feather Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/crucible_feather_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman fashioned from feathers that embody the aspects of various creatures.Said to have grown on the human body long ago. Improves the effectiveness of dodge rolls, but increases damage taken at all times. A vestige of the crucible of primordial life. Born partially of devolution, it was considered a signifier of the divine in ancient times, but is now increasingly disdained as an impurity as civilization has advanced.0nannannannannannanEffect Improves dodge rolling but increases damage taken1000nannannannannannannannannan
126nanCrucible Knot Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/crucible_knot_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.5A talisman fashioned from a bony knot that embodies that aspects of various creatures.Said to have grown on the human body long ago. Reduces damage and impact of headshots taken. A vestige of the crucible of primordial life. Born partially of devolution,it was considered a signifier of the divine in ancient times, but is now increasingly disdained as an impurity as civilization has advanced.0nannannannannannanEffect Eliminates headshot bonus damage and stagger on self500nannannannannannannannannan
127nanRed-Feathered Branchswordhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/red-feathered_branchsword_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.4A talisman adorned with red feathers, once used in ancient death rituals.Raises attack power when HP is low. The heart sings when one draws close to death, and a glorious end awaits those who cling so tenaciously to life.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 20% when HP is below 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
128nanBlue-Feathered Branchswordhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/blue-feathered_branchsword_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.1A talisman adorned with blue feathers, once used in ancient death rituals.Raises defense when HP is low. The heart sings when one draws close to death, and thus does one cling so tenaciously to life - to render up a death worth offering.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces damage taken by 50% when HP is below 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
129nanRitual Sword Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/ritual_sword_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A talisman patterned after swords used in ritual combat held to honor the Erdtree. Raises attack power when HP is at maximum. The practice had died out by the age of King Consort Radagon, but remains of the arenas where ritual combat took place can still be found in every land.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 10% when HP is at maximum500nannannannannannannannannan
130nanRitual Shield Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/ritual_shield_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A talisman patterned after shields used in ritual combat held to honor the Erdtree. Raises defense when HP is at maximum. The practice had died out by the age of King Consort Radagon, but remains of the arenas where ritual combat took place can still be found in every land.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces damage taken by 30% when HP is at maximum500nannannannannannannannannan
131nanAssassin's Crimson Daggerhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/assassins_crimson_dagger_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8An assassin's dagger, misshapen and stained in crimson.Critical hits restore HP. This charm is modelled after the darkly gleaming blades used in the Night of Black Knives. Those which gave the demigods their first taste of death.0nannannannannannanEffect Critical attacks restore 10% + 85 HP1500nannannannannannannannannan
132nanAssassin's Cerulean Daggerhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/assassins_cerulean_dagger_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8An assassin's dagger, misshapen and stained in cerulean.Critical hits restore FP. This charm is modelled after the darkly gleaming blades used in the Night of Black Knives. Those which gave the demigods their first taste of death.0nannannannannannanEffect Critical attacks restore 15 FP1500nannannannannannannannannan
133nanWinged Sword Insigniahttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/winged_sword_insignia_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.4A talisman depicting a raised prosthetic blade.An honor bestowed upon the knights who fought alongside Malenia the Severed. Raises attack power with successive attacks. The wings symbolize Malenia and her undefeated prowess. Though she never knew relief from the accursed rot she was born into, her blade was forever beautiful - and relentless.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power with successive attacks (3%,5%,10%)500nannannannannannannannannan
134nanRotten Winged Sword Insigniahttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/rotten_winged_sword_insignia_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.4A talisman depicting a raised prosthetic blade. An honor bestowed upon the valkyries who serve the goddess of rot. Greatly raises attack power with successive attacks. The Four sisters were born in the swamp of Aeonia, and came to the Haligtree under the aegis of Gowry. And yet, those buds were doomed to never blossom.0nannannannannannanEffect Greatly raises attack power with successive attacks (6%,8%,13%)500nannannannannannannannannan
135nanMillicent's Prosthesishttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/millicents_prosthesis_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.6Part of the golden prosthesis used by Millicent.The hand is locked into a fist that once raised a sword aloft. Boosts dexterity and raises attack power with successive attacks. The despair of sweet betrayal transformed Millicent from a mere bud into a magnificent flower. And one day, she will be reborn - as a beautiful scarlet valkyrie.0nannannannannannanEffect Boosts dexterity (+5), raises attack power with successive attacks (4%,6%, 11%)1000nannannannannannannannannan
136nanGodskin Swaddling Clothhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/godskin_swaddling_cloth_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9Sacred cloth of the Godskin Apostles, made from supple skin sewn together. Successive attacks restore HP. The Gloam-Eyed Queen cradles newborn apostles swaddled in this cloth. Soon they will grow to become the death of the gods.0nannannannannannanEffect Successive attacks restore 30 + 3% HP1000nannannannannannannannannan
137nanKindred of Rot's Exultationhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/kindred_of_rots_exultation_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A talisman depicting the exultation of pests. Raises attack power when poisoning or rot occurs in the vicinity. "Rot for the scarlet goddess. O scarlet blossoms, flourish in distant lands, and return to us, the unwanted children."0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 20% for 20 seconds when Poisoning or Rot occurs in the vicinity500nannannannannannannannannan
138nanLord of Blood's Exultationhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/lord_of_bloods_exultation_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A talisman depicting the exultation of the Lord of Blood. Raises attack power when blood loss occurs in the vicinity. "Render up you offerings of blood to your Lord. Drench my consort's chamber. Slake his cocoon's thirst. His awakening shall herald the dawn of our dynasty"0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 20% (12% in PvP) for 20 seconds when Blood Loss occurs in the vicinity500nannannannannannannannannan
139nanTaker's Cameohttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/takers_cameo_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A talisman engraved with a stern likeness of Praetor Rykard, master of Volcano Manor. Restores HP upon defeating enemies. When Rykard turned to heresy, taking by force became the rule. The gods themselves were no different, after all.0nannannannannannanEffect Restores 3% + 30 HP upon defeating enemies1000nannannannannannannannannan
140nanAncestral Spirit's Hornhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/ancestral_spirits_horn_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.2Item cut from the horns of the Regal Ancestor Spirit. Restore FP upon defeating enemies. A number of new growths bud from the antler-like horns of the fallen king, each glowing with light. Thus does new life grow from death, and from death, one obtains power.0nannannannannannanEffect Restores 3 FP upon defeating enemies500nannannannannannannannannan
141nanGold Scarabhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/gold_scarab_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.2A talisman facsimile of a scarab, the carrier of treasures and precious things. This golden scarab increases the amount of runes obtained from defeating enemies.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Rune acquisition by 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
142nanSilver Scarabhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/silver_scarab_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.2A talisman facsimile of a scarab, the carrier of treasures and precious things. This silver scarab enhances item discovery.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Item Discovery by 75500nannannannannannannannannan
143nanCrepus's Vialhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/crepuss_vial_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7Small mysterious bottle with a dark mist sealed within. Eliminates all sound made by the wearer during movement. A ritual implement used by Roundtable Hold assassins. There was a time when Tarnished who had strayed from guidance feared nothing more than utter silence.0nannannannannannanEffect Eliminates all sound made by the wearer during movement500nannannannannannannannannan
144nanConcealing Veilhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/concealing_veil_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9Talisman put together from dark cloth with a lustrous sheen. Completely conceals the wearer's presence while crouching at a distance from foes. Part of one of the concealing veils used by the assassins on the Night of Black Knives.0nannannannannannanEffect Conceals wearer while crouching away from foes500nannannannannannannannannan
145nanLongtail Cat Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/longtail_cat_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A brooch depicting Lacrima, the long-tailed cat. Renders the wearer immune to fall damage.However, it cannot prevent falling to one's death. Lacrima features in the fables of Raya Lucaria, in which she is described as a faerie cat who was fond of playing in the great bell tower.0nannannannannannanEffect Negates non-lethal Fall Damage500nannannannannannannannannan
146nanFurled Finger's Trick-Mirrorhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/furled_fingers_trick-mirror_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A small, clouded mirror that reflects a flesh-and-blood figure. Makes the bearer take on the appearance of a Host of Fingers One of the ritual implements created by the Tarnished to deceive invaders.0nannannannannannanEffect Take on appearance of a Host of Fingers1000nannannannannannannannannan
147nanHost's Trick-Mirrorhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/hosts_trick-mirror_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A small, clouded mirror that reflects a flesh-and-blood figure. Makes the bearer take on the appearance of a summoned cooperator. One of the ritual implements created by the Tarnished to deceive invaders.0nannannannannannanEffect Take on appearance of a cooperator1000nannannannannannannannannan
148nanShabriri's Woehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/shabriris_woe_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6Disturbing likeness of a man whose eyes have been gouged out.The corners of his mouth are upturned in an almost flirtatious manner. Constantly attracts enemies' aggression. It is said that the man, named Shabriri, had his eyes gouged out as punishment for the crime of slander, and, with time, the blight of the flame of frenzy came to dwell in the empty sockets.0nannannannannannanEffect Constantly attracts enemies' aggression500nannannannannannannannannan
149nanDaedicar's Woehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/daedicars_woe_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8Disturbing likeness of a woman whose skin was flayed.She smiles with a serene tenderness. Increases damage taken. It is said that this woman, named Daedicar, indulged in every form of adultery and wicked pleasure imaginable, giving birth to a myriad of grotesque children.0nannannannannannanEffect Doubles damage taken500nannannannannannannannannan
150nanSacrificial Twighttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/sacrificial_twig_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A talisman fashioned from a dried twig, so slender that it might snap at the slightest touch. Prevent rune loss upon death, but will be lost itself in exchange. Believed to be a twig pruned from the Erdtree long, long ago.0nannannannannannanEffect Will be lost on death in place of runes.1000nannannannannannannannannan
151nanEntwining Umbilical Cordhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/entwining_umbilical_cord_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.5Mysterious circular object that's oddly warped.Changes the demeanour of the wearer's actions.0nannannannannannanEffect Changes demeanour of wearer's actions1000nannannannannannannannannan
152nanErdtree's Favorhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtrees_favor_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A talisman depicting a special blessing of the Erdtree.Slightly raises maximum HP, stamina, and equip load. It is said that when the Age of the Erdtree began, such blessings were personally bestowed upon their recipients by Queen Marika herself.0nannannannannannanIncreases HP (3%), Stamina (7%), and Equip Load (5%)500nannannannannannannannannan
153nanErdtree's Favor +1 Varianthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtrees_favor_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A talisman depicting a special blessing of the Erdtree.Slightly raises maximum HP, stamina, and equip load. 154nanErdtree's Favor +2 Varianthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtrees_favor_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A talisman depicting a special blessing of the Erdtree.Slightly raises maximum HP, stamina, and equip load. It is said that when the Age of the Erdtree began, such blessings were personally bestowed upon their recipients by Queen Marika herself.0nannannannannannanIncreases HP (4%), Stamina (10%), and Equip Load (8.0%)3000nannannannannannannannannan
01.0Dueling Shieldhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dueling_shield_thrusting_shields_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0A "thrusting shield," or combined weapon and shield. Enables the wielder to attack and guard simultaneously. An armament once used in ritual combat performed to honor the Erdtreea custom that had somehow remained within the realm of shadow.1{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 14}Standard/PierceThrusting ShieldsNo passive effectsShield Strike0nannannannannannannannannannannan
12.0Carian Thrusting Shieldhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/carian_thrusting_shield_thrusting_shields_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png10.5Silver thrusting shield embedded with glintstones. Enables the wielder to attack and guard simultaneously. Once wielded by Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight, during her sole entry into ritual combata demonstration of fidelity to the Erdtree.1{'Str': 17, 'Dex': 13, 'Int': 15}Standard/PierceThrusting ShieldsNo passive effectsShield Strike0nannannannannannannannannannannan
23.0Dryleaf Artshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dryleaf_arts_hand-to-hand_arts_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A technique for hand-to-hand combat without the aid of a weapon. This martial art combines fist strikes and kicks. The teachings of a group of spiritual seekers known as the Dryleaf Sect, revealed only to those of worthy valor and character. The practice of this martial art marks the dawn of an ascetic's journey.1{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 8}StrikeHand-to-Hand ArtsNo passive effectsPalm Blast14nannannannannannannannannannannan
34.0Dane's Footworkhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/danes_footwork_hand-to-hand_arts_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A technique for hand-to-hand combat without the aid of a weapon. This martial art focuses on kicking techniques. This kick-based martial art is unique to Dane, a Dryleaf and sworn ally of Leda. He acquired these skills by training with the aid of a waterfall; letting the water beat his body, and throwing himself into its basin.1{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 8}StrikeHand-to-Hand ArtsNo passive effectsPalm Blast14nannannannannannannannannannannan
45.0Smithscript Daggerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/smithscript_dagger_throwing_blade_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5Dagger engraved with a smithscript. Reduced mass enhances the effects of the smithing arts, allowing this weapon to function as a throwing dagger for all attacks. Once thrown, the dagger instantly reappears in the wielder's hand.1{'Str': 5, 'Dex': 11, 'Int': 11, 'Fai': 11}PierceThrowing BladesNo passive effectsPiercing Throw6nannannannannannannannannannannan
56.0Backhand Bladehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/backhand_blade_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0Curved blade wielded with a backhand grip. A type of weapon wielded by hornsent for generations. The style of combat associated with this weapon is marked by spinning slashes and gouging thrust attacks.1{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 13}Slash/PierceBackhand BladesNo passive effectsBlind Spot9nannannannannannannannannannannan
67.0Smithscript Cirquehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/smithscript_cirque_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0Circular backhand blade engraved with a smithscript. A throwing weapon created through the smithing arts. Execute a strong attack to throw the backhand blade, causing it to fly in a curved trajectory.1{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 14, 'Int': 11, 'Fai': 11}SlashBackhand BladesNo passive effectsBlind Spot9nannannannannannannannannannannan
78.0Curseblade's Cirquehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/curseblades_cirque_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Weapon of the masked Curseblades. Circular backhand blade with wave-like cutting edges, sharpened into points that incite blood loss. Long ago, this was employed by the ascetics who strove to become tutelary deities as a ritualistic object in their self-flagellating dances.1{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 22}SlashBackhand Blades(45) HemorrhageDeadly Dance15nannannannannannannannannannannan
89.0Firespark Perfume Bottlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/firespark_perfume_bottle_perfume_bottles_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0Perfume bottle remade into a weapon by perfumers of the realm of shadow. Attacks release perfumed powder, producing sparks of fire. The crusade was a violent purge, and the perfumers were not called there to heal.1{'Str': 3, 'Dex': 14}StandardPerfume BottlesNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
910.0Chilling Perfume Bottlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/chilling_perfume_bottle_perfume_bottles_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0Perfume bottle remade into a weapon by perfumers of the realm of shadow. Attacks release perfumed powder, producing an icy chill. From time to time, perfumers set out on journeys to pursue new aromatics and flower gardens.1{'Str': 3, 'Dex': 13, 'Int': 13}StandardPerfume Bottles(60) FrostbiteKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
1011.0Frenzyflame Perfume Bottlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frenzyflame_perfume_bottle_perfume_bottles_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0Perfume bottle remade into a weapon by perfumers of the realm of shadow. Attacks release perfumed powder, producing frenzied flame. From time to time, perfumers set out on journeys to pursue new aromatics and flower gardens.1{'Str': 3, 'Dex': 10, 'Int': 12, 'Fai': 12}StandardPerfume Bottles(60) MadnessKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
1112.0Lightning Perfume Bottlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lightning_perfume_bottle_perfume_bottles_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0Perfume bottle remade into a weapon by perfumers of the realm of shadow. From time to time, perfumers set out on journeys to pursue new aromatics and flower gardens.1{'Str': 3, 'Dex': 16, 'Fai': 14}StandardPerfume BottlesNo passive effectsKick0nannannannannannannannannannannan
1213.0Deadly Poison Perfume Bottlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/deadly_poison_perfume_bottle_perfume_bottles_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0Perfume bottle customized by Thiollier. Attacks release perfumed powder, producing deadly poison. There are some techniques of the perfuming arts that employ poison. Upon learning of this, Thiollier threw himself into mastering those techniques, and he made them his own.1{'Str': 3, 'Dex': 13, 'Arc': 18}StandardPerfume Bottles(66) PoisonDeadly Poison Spray21nannannannannannannannannannannan
1314.0Red Bear's Clawhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/red_bears_claw_beast_claws_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Claw of a great red bear wielded without modification by Red Bear, whose name is lost to madness. After killing the great red bear in a blood-soaked bout, he became fascinated by the untainted glory of its naked strength. "I wish to be a bear, no more, and no less1{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 10}SlashBeast Claws(45) HemorrhageRed Bear Hunt8nannannannannannannannannannannan
1415.0Beast Claw (Weapon)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/beast_claw_beast_claws_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Weapon in the form of a carnivorous beast's vicious claws. Used to perform bestial slashing attacks uncanny to humankind. An imitation of the esoteric technique of the horned warriors. Those who carry this weapon wield it as though they have been possessed by a savage beast.1{'Str': 13, 'Dex': 11}SlashBeast Claws(45) HemorrhageSavage Claws13nannannannannannannannannannannan
1516.0Miladyhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/milady_light_greatswords_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png6.5A light greatsword; that is, a sword whose blade matches the length of a greatsword, while being constrained to a minimal weight. Nicknamed after ladies of noble status for its refined appearance. With cultivated form, one can wield this weapon as swiftly as one might a straight sword.1{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 17}Standard/PierceLight GreatswordsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
1617.0Leda's Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ledas_sword_light_greatswords_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png7.5Light greatsword with gold inlaid. Weapon of Leda, the Needle Knight. Deals holy damage. Though polished to a mirror sheen, this blade still reeks with the stench of crusted blood that lingers from the cull of her knightly comrades.1{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 22, 'Fai': 19}Standart/PierceLight GreatswordsNo passive effectsNeedle Piercer19nannannannannannannannannannannan
1718.0Rellana's Twin Bladeshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rellanas_twinblade_light_greatswords_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0Carian light greatsword embedded with blue glintstone. Weapon of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight. Two swords as a single armament. When two-handing, a straight sword engraved with golden flame will be carried in the left hand. Here, and here alone, were moon and fire ever together.1{'Str': 13, 'Dex': 16, 'Int': 16, 'Fai': 16}Standard/PierceLight GreatswordsNo passive effectsMoon-and-Fire Stance10 - 25nannannannannannannannannannannan
1819.0Great Katanahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/great_katana_great_katana_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0Large katana with a long, heavy blade. A weapon unique to warriors of the Land of Reeds. Designed for aggression, this armament requires the wielder to throw their entire body into swinging it. The slashing attacks of its honed edge incite blood loss.1{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 18}Slash/PierceGreat Katanas(55) HemorrhageOverhead Stance0nannannannannannannannannannannan
1920.0Dragon-Hunter's Great Katanahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragon-hunters_great_katana_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png10.5Great katana with spines of gravel stone along its blade, wielded by the Ancient Dragon-Man of the Dragon's Pit. Has an anti-dragon effect. Formerly a Dragon Communion warrior, the Ancient Dragon-Man was once arbiter of those worthy to devour the Dreaded One.1{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 20}Slash/PierceGreat Katanas(55) HemorrhageDragonwound Slash18nannannannannannannannannannannan
2021.0Rakshasa's Great Katanahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rakshasas_great_katana_great_katana_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png9.5A great katana with the tempering pattern of its blade forever stained red with blood. Weapon of Rakshasa, who cuts down and devours. A berserker's weapon used to endure enemy attacks and reply with one's full fury. When attacking, the wielder is less likely to stagger from counterattacks, but will also take increased damage.1{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 27}Slash/PierceGreat Katanas(55) HemorrhageWeed Cutter8nannannannannannannannannannannan
2122.0Daggerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dagger_dagger_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A standard dagger with a straight blade. 2223.0Parrying Daggerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/parrying_dagger_dagger_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A knife with curved handguards. Designed to parry, turning foes' attacks against them. For master of combat who anticipate every enemy strike and counter accordingly, this weapon is all they need.0{'Str': 5, 'Dex': 14}Slash/PierceDaggersNo passive effectsParry0nannannannannannannannannannannan
2324.0Misericordehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/misericorde_dagger_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0Dagger favored by military physicians in white. The pointed blade is hard and sharp, making critical hits especially potent. Medicine is mercy. and mercy upon the battlefield is ruthless. Beware the killers clothed as men of compassion0{'Str': 7, 'Dex': 12}Slash/PierceDaggersNo passive effectsQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan

2526.0Bloodstained Daggerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodstained_dagger_dagger_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0Dagger with a bloodstained blade. Afflicts targets with blood loss. As blood darkened the dagger through repeated slashing and stabbing, its blade only grew sharper and harder.0{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 12}Slash/PierceDaggers(38) HemorrhageQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan
2627.0Erdsteel Daggerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdsteel_dagger_dagger_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.0An erdsteel dagger with a grass crest engraved upon its blade. Carried by the Erdtree royalty for self-defense in times of peace. Though forged to a high standard, the weapon is difficult to wield. Attack power also scales with faith.0{'Str': 7, 'Dex': 12, 'Fai': 14}Slash/PierceDaggersNo passive effectsQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan
2728.0Wakizashihttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/wakizashi_dagger_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Short sword with a tempering pattern on the blade. A weapon unique to warriors of the Land of Reeds. Afflicts targets with blood loss. These swords are considered auxiliary weapons. Yet, one man is known to wield this weapon in his left hand while using a full-sized katana in his right. A demonic swordsman known only as Okina.0{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 13}Slash/PierceDaggers(38) HemorrhageQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan
2829.0Celebrant's Sicklehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/celebrants-sickle_dagger_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5Sickle decorated with flowers and many-coloured fabrics. Grants trace amounts of runes on landing attacks.0{'Str': 6, 'Dex': 11}Slash/PierceDaggersRune Gain on HitQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan

3233.0Cinquedeahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cinquedea_dagger_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5Short sword given to high ranking clergymen of Farum Azula. The design celebrates a beast's five fingers, symbolic of the intelligence once granted upon their kind.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 10}Slash/PierceDaggersNo passive effectsQuickstep3nannannannannannannannannannannan

Though the Erdtree styling is still visible, time has not been kind to this sword, now merely a shadow of its former self.0{'Str': 7, 'Dex': 10}Standard/PierceStraight SwordsNo passive effectsSquare Off- ( 6 8)nannannannannannannannannannannan

Apparently once used as a staff of sorcery, this sword is made of wood.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 9, 'Int': 13}Standard/PierceStraight SwordsNo passive effectsGlintstone Pebble8nannannannannannannannannannannan
4849.0Carian Knight's Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/carian_knights_sword_straight_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Straight sword embedded with a blue glintstone. Weapon of knights sworn to Carian royalty. These knights' swords could serve as catalysts, letting them wield sorcerous battle skills. Despite numbering fewer than twenty, this power made them a match for even the champions of gold in battle.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 10, 'Int': 18}Standard/PierceStraight SwordsNo passive effectsCarian Grandeur26nannannannannannannannannannannan
4950.0Crystal Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/crystal_sword_straight_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Sword fashioned from pure crystal; a deed impossible for a human. Enwreathed with powerful magic, its attack scales with intelligence. The inscrutable Crystalians have but one clear purpose; to safeguard their crystals unto the end. 5152.0Miquellan Knight's Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/miquellan_knights_sword_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5Sword forged by servants of Miquella of the Haligtree, with a design modeled after those carried by Carian knights. Instead of glintstone however, amber from the Haligtree is embedded in the blade. A sumptuous piece, yet it has never been offered to any knight an ill-starred sword with no master. Skill: Sacred Blade0{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 11, 'Fai': 16}Standard/PierceStraight SwordsNo passive effectsSacred Blade19nannannannannannannannannannannan
5253.0Ornamental Straight Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ornamental_straight_sword_straight_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Slender straight sword patterned after an antique ornament.Superior swordsmen prefer to wield one in each hand. After falling from grace, the dregs of the golden lineage sought power and purpose in the past.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 14}Standard/PierceStraight SwordsNo passive effectsGolden Tempering24nannannannannannannannannannannan
5354.0Golden Epitaphhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/golden_epitaph_straight_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5A sword made to commemorate the death of Godwyn the Golden, first of the demigods to die. Infused with the humble prayer of a young boy; "O brother, lord brother, please die a true death."0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 10, 'Fai': 14}Standard/PierceStraight SwordsNo passive effectsLast Rites25nannannannannannannannannannannan
5455.0Sword of St Trinahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sword_of_st_trina_straight_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Silver sword carried by clerics of St. Trina. Inflicts sleep ailment upon foes. St. Trina is an enigmatic figure. Some say she is a comely young girl, others are sure he is a boy. The only certainty is that their appearance was as sudden as their disappearance.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 12, 'Int': 14}Standard/PierceStraight Swords(66) SleepMists of Slumber20nannannannannannannannannannannan
5556.0Regalia of Eochaidhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/regalia_of_eochaid_straight_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.5Treasured sword of Eochaid, a lesser, long-vanished domain. The copper coloration is not to be confused for rust, but is a conduit for its wielder to move it by their will alone. Swords of Eochaid dance through the skies0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 18, 'Arc': 15}Standard/PierceStraight SwordsNo passive effectsEochaid's Dancing Blade15nannannannannannannannannannannan
5657.0Coded Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/coded_sword_straight_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Hidden sword once granted to the Tarnished of the Roundtable by the Two Fingers. A formless cipher comprises its blade, which deals holy damage no shield can repel. Champions would gather at the Roundtable Hold in days long past, when the Two Fingers were masters of oration, their flesh yet full of vigor.0{'Fai': 20}Standard/PierceStraight SwordsNo passive effectsUnblockable Blade18nannannannannannannannannannannan
5758.0Sword of Night and Flamehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sword_of_night_and_flame_straight_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Storied sword and treasure of Caria Manor.One of the legendary armaments. Astrologers, who preceded the sorcerers, established themselves in mountaintops that nearly touched the sky, and considered the Fire Giants their neighbors.0{'Str': 12, 'Dex': 12, 'Int': 24, 'Fai': 24}Standard/PierceStraight SwordsNo passive effectsNight-and-Flame Stance- (26 32)nannannannannannannannannannannan
5859.0Velvet Sword of St Trinahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/velvet_sword_of_st_trina_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5Silver sword of St. Trina, now stained the color of velvet. Inflicts eternal sleep. When St. Trina was abandoned, the faint, light-purple mists coalesced into an intoxicating deep-purple cloud.1{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 12, 'Int': 14}Standard/PierceStraight Swords(42) SleepMists of Eternal Sleep23nannannannannannannannannannannan
5960.0Stone-Sheathed Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/stone-sheathed_sword_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0A sword that none can pull from its scabbard of cracked stone. Relic of a lost civilization from a time long past, said to have served a ritual purpose at altars of light and darkness.1{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 8}StrikeStraight SwordsNo passive effectsSquare Off0nannannannannannannannannannannan
6061.0Sword of Lighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sword_of_light_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Sword of light, pulled from its stone scabbard at an altar. From the quick of the root, unswerving rays of light intersect and reflect to give the silver blade form.1{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 11, 'Fai': 24}Standard/PierceStraight SwordsNo passive effectsLight30nannannannannannannannannannannan
6162.0Sword of Darknesshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sword_of_darkness_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Sword of darkness, pulled from its stone scabbard at an altar. From the quick of the root, wandering coils of darkness coalesce and release, their eddies and vortices giving form to the dark blade.1{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 11, 'Fai': 24}Standard/PierceStraight SwordsNo passive effectsDarkness30nannannannannannannannannannannan
6263.0Bastard Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bastard_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0A large sword with a straight blade.This heavy sword is normally wielded with two hands, but those with sufficient strength can wield it in one alone.The hefty blade can be swung into multiple foes at once thanks to the broad, sweeping attack, making fending off crowds all the easier.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 10}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsStamp (Upward Cut)5 ( - 8)nannannannannannannannannannannan
6364.0Claymorehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/claymore_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0A large sword with a long, straight blade. This heavy sword is usually wielded with two hands, but for those with enough strength, one is sufficient. In addition to the heavy sweeping attacks, it can also make a heavy piercing thrust making this a versatile weapon.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 13}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsLion's Claw20nannannannannannannannannannannan
6465.0Iron Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/iron_greatsword_greatswords_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png12.0Greatsword with a blade of unusually thick steel. A coarse weapon to which polishing is a foreign concept. Weighty even among others of its class, the impact of each strike is sure to be felt.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 10}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsStamp (Upward Cut)20nannannannannannannannannannannan
6566.0Lordsworn's Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lordsworns_greatsword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0Well-crafted straight sword with an illustrious design, wielded by regulars of a lord's army. Through blackened and damaged by years of use, it appears to have otherwise been kept in a serviceable condition, despite the soldiers having long since lost their minds.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 10}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsStamp (Upward Cut)5 (- 8)nannannannannannannannannannannan
6667.0Knight's Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/knights_greatsword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Greatsword bestowed upon skilled swordsmen in the demigods' service, and yet had no rank or title. Featuring a long grip enabling a dual-handed use, this weapon was designed to dispatch larger foes. Being charged with such a duty was undoubtedly a great honor.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 12}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsStamp (Upward Cut)5( - 8)nannannannannannannannannannannan
6768.0Banished Knight's Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/banished_knights_greatsword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0A finely-crafted greatsword intricately engraved with an ancient motif. G iven to knights who, whether by misfortune or misdeed, were forced to abandon their homes. Most of these knights were sent to the fringes, where they were forced to start anew with only despair for company.0{'Str': 17}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsStamp (Upward Cut)5 ( - 8)nannannannannannannannannannannan
6869.0Forked Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/forked_greatsword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0Oddly shaped greatsword wielded by imps. The gently undulating forked blade is known as an "imp's tongue" and causes blood loss.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 16}Standard/PierceGreatswords(55) HemorrhageStamp (Upward Cut)5 (-8)nannannannannannannannannannannan
6970.0Flambergehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flamberge_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Greatsword featuring a flame-like undulation.Shreds enemy flesh, inducing blood loss. Scarlet rot is kept at bay with flame at Redmane Castle, and as such, this beloved sword of Jerren's eventually became the symbol of the castle itself.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 14}Standard/PierceGreatswords(55) HemorrhageStamp (Upward Cut)5 ( - 8)nannannannannannannannannannannan
7071.0Gargoyle's Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gargoyles_greatsword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png11.5Bronze greatsword wielded by Valiant Gargoyles. Just like the wielder, the missing parts have been mended with corpse wax; a patchwork of champions.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 10}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsVacuum Slice12nannannannannannannannannannannan
7172.0Gargoyle's Blackbladehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gargoyles_blackblade_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png11.5Bronze greatsword wielded by Valiant Gargoyles mended with blackened corpse wax. Deals holy damage. Such is the mark of those who serve Maliketh, the Black Blade.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 10, 'Fai': 22}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsCorpse Wax Cutter16nannannannannannannannannannannan
7273.0Inseparable Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/inseparable_sword_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Sword forged by compounding silver and gold. A sacred weapon to hunt Those Who Live in Death. Deals holy damage. The inseparable twins found solace in the Golden Order, the only institution not to revile them as accursed beings.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 18, 'Fai': 20}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsSacred Blade19 (- -)nannannannannannannannannannannan
7475.0Sword of Miloshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sword_of_milos_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Sinister greatsword fashioned from a giant's backbone. Metes out wounds like a lopsided saw-blade, and restores some FP upon defeating an enemy. Milos was undersized for a giant, and was viewed as sullied and terribly grotesque.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 19}Standard/PierceGreatswords(55) HemorrhageShriek of Milos30nannannannannannannannannannannan
7576.0Marais Executioner's Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/marais_executioners_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png11.5Storied sword of House Marais, the family of executioners who presided over the Shaded Castle. One of the legendary armaments. Elemer of the Briar, the Bell Bearing Hunter, snatched the sword from the site of his looming execution, and furnished it with battle skills from his home of Eochaid..0{'Str': 24, 'Dex': 14, 'Arc': 23}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsEochaid's Dancing Blade15nannannannannannannannannannannan
7677.0Ordovis's Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ordoviss_greatsword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png12.0Greatsword of Ordovis, one of the two honored as foremostamong the Crucible Knights. This sword is imbued with an ancient holy essence.Its red tint exemplifies the nature of primordial gold, said to beclose in nature to life itself.0{'Str': 25, 'Dex': 13, 'Fai': 15}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsOrdovis's Vortex15nannannannannannannannannannannan
7778.0Alabaster Lord's Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/alabaster_lords_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0Greatsword forged from a blue-white meteoric ore.The blade conceals gravity-manipulating magic. A weapon unique to the Alabaster Lords, a race of ancients withskin of stone who were said to have risen to life when a meteorstruck long ago.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 12, 'Int': 18}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsAlabaster Lords' Pull15nannannannannannannannannannannan
7879.0Death's Pokerhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/deaths_poker_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.5Barbed rod carried by Deathbirds. The birds are graveyard fire keepers; it is said they rake out the ashen remains of the dead from their kilns.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 17, 'Int': 11}Standard/PierceGreatswords(65) FrostbiteGhostflame Ignition15nannannannannannannannannannannan
7980.0Helphen's Steeplehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/helphens_steeple.png11.5Greatsword patterned after the black steeple of the Helphen, the lampwood which guides the dead of the spirit world. The lamplight is similar to grace in appearance, only it is said that it can only be seen by those who met their death in battle.0{'Str': 19, 'Dex': 10, 'Int': 22}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsRuinous Ghostflame20nannannannannannannannannannannan
8081.0Blasphemous Bladehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/blasphemous_blade_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png13.5Sacred sword of Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy.Remains of the countless heroes he has devoured writhe upon the surface of this blade. 8182.0Golden Order Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/golden_order_greatsword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0Greatsword made of light, modeled after the Elden Ring itself. Forged by King Consort Radagon to proudly symbolize the tenets of the Golden Order. One of the legendary armaments. Telltale signs betray that this was once the greatsword bequeathed to him by his first wife, Rennala.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 21, 'Fai': 28}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsEstablish Order20nannannannannannannannannannannan
8283.0Dark Moon Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dark_moon_greatsword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png10.0A Moon Greatsword, bestowed by a Carian queen upon herspouse to honor long-standing tradition.One of the legendary armaments. Ranni's sigil is a full moon, cold and leaden, and this sword is but a beam of its light.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 11, 'Int': 38}Standard/PierceGreatswords(55) FrostbiteMoonlight Greatsword32nannannannannannannannannannannan
8384.0Sacred Relic Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sacred_relic_sword.png11.0Sword wrought from the remains of a god who should have lived a life eternal. Thoughts on what the weapon portends are many and varied. Some consider it the mark of a great sin, or a sign of great devastation. Some think of it as the end of an age, while others; the beginning.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 24, 'Fai': 22}Standard/PierceGreatswordsNo passive effectsWave of Gold42nannannannannannannannannannannan
8485.0Lizard Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lizard_greatsword_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png9.5A peculiar weapon carried by imps. 8586.0Greatsword of Damnationhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/greatsword_of_damnation_greatsword_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0Golden greatsword that once pierced the body of Midra, master of the manse. Used by the hornsent in the execution of a damnation like no other. 8687.0Greatsword of Solitudehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/greatsword_of_solitude_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png15.5Steel greatsword wielded by the Knights of the Solitary Gaol. 8788.0Zweihanderhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/zweihander_colossal_swords_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png15.5Just about the largest sword a mere man is capable of swinging. True to its name, it is designed to be wielded in both hands, but those of merely ordinary strength will still struggle to do so.The long blade is heavy and sharp, sending foes reeling back with its broader strokes, while also capable of a devastating piercing thrust.0{'Str': 19, 'Dex': 11}StandardColossal SwordsNo passive effectsStamp (Upward Cut)5( -8)nannannannannannannannannannannan
8889.0Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/greatsword_colossal_swords_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png23.0A coarse iron lump of an ultra greatsword. Mows down foes by utilizing its incredible weight. Though handling it likely requires the wielder to have surpassed the realm of the merely human, it is precisely for this reason the weapon is used to slaughter even inhuman foes.0{'Str': 31, 'Dex': 12}StandardColossal SwordsNo passive effectsStamp (Upward Cut)5 ( - 8)nannannannannannannannannannannan
8990.0Watchdog's Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/watchdogs_greatsword_colossal_swords_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png22.0Stone greatsword wielded by Erdtree Burial Watchdogs. Though decorated with the watchman's eye, the pupil was taken by graverobbers and is now hollow, leaving this sword a mere lump of stone.0{'Str': 30, 'Dex': 10}StandardColossal SwordsNo passive effectsStamp (Upward Cut)5 ( - 8)nannannannannannannannannannannan
9091.0Troll's Golden Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/trolls_golden_sword_colossal_swords_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png19.0Sword given to the lesser giants who fought for the Erdtree during the War against the Giants long ago. Though the giants have lost their minds, they stay inseparable from their swords that are in sad shapesuch that the gold plating had flaked away.0{'Str': 29, 'Dex': 10}StandardColossal SwordsNo passive effectsTroll's Roar22nannannannannannannannannannannan
9192.0Troll Knight's Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/troll_knights_sword_colossal_swords_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png18.0Greatsword embedded with a blue glintstone.Weapon of the trolls in service to the royal family of Caria. Called into service when the Queen invoked an oath they swore, the trolls are treated as true knights of Caria, and fight arm in arm with their human comrades.0{'Str': 20, 'Dex': 14, 'Int': 18}StandardColossal SwordsNo passive effectsTroll's Roar22nannannannannannannannannannannan
9293.0Royal Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/royal_greatsword__colossal_swords_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png20.0Greatsword decorated in royal Carian Style. Favored weapon of Blaidd the Half-Wolf. In defiance of the fate he was born to, Blaidd swore to serve no master but Ranni. As proof. the sword was imbued with a cold magic at the moment oath was sworn.0{'Str': 26, 'Dex': 18, 'Int': 22}StandardColossal SwordsNo passive effectsWolf s Assault20nannannannannannannannannannannan
9394.0Grafted Blade Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/grafted_blade_greatsword_colossal_swords_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png21.0The storied sword of Castle Morne. A revenger's weapon, it is burdened with oceans of anger and regret. One of the legendary armaments. A lone surviving champion from a country now vanished was so determined to continue fighting that he claimed the swords of an entire clan of warriors.0{'Str': 40, 'Dex': 14}StandardColossal SwordsNo passive effectsOath of Vengeance20nannannannannannannannannannannan
9495.0Ruins Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ruins_greatsword_colossal_swords_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png23.0Originally rubble from a ruin which fell from the sky, this surviving fragment was honed into a weapon.One of the legendary armaments. 9596.0Starscourge Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/starscourge-greatsword-weapon-elden-ring-wiki-guide.png20.0Curved greatswords of black steel wielded by General Radahn. A pair of weapons decorated with a lion mane motif. Radahn earned considerable renown as the Starscourge in his youth, and it is said that it was during this time he engraved the gravity crest upon these blades.0{'Str': 38, 'Dex': 12, 'Int': 15}StandardColossal SwordsNo passive effectsStarcaller Cry20 (-20)nannannannannannannannannannannan

9798.0Maliketh's Black Bladehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/malikeths_black_blade_colossal_swords_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png22.0Maliketh's black blade which once harbored the power of theRune of Death. A sad shadow of its former glory. After a fragment of Death was stolen on that fateful night,Maliketh bound the blade within his own flesh, such that nonemight ever rob Death again.0{'Str': 34, 'Dex': 12, 'Fai': 20}StandardColossal SwordsNo passive effectsDestined Death40nannannannannannannannannannannan
9899.0Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ancient_meteoric_ore_greatsword_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png22.0One of the treasures of the ruined forges. A capable piercing weapon that excels at thrusting attacks.1{'Str': 35, 'Dex': 10, 'Arc': 19}Standard/PierceColossal SwordsNo passive effectsWhite Light Charge10nannannannannannannannannannannan
99100.0Fire Knight's Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fire_knights_greatsword_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png16.0Greatsword of the Fire Knights. Further flame imbuement will amplify the effect and greatly increase the armament's power.1{'Str': 22, 'Dex': 18, 'Fai': 12}Standard/PierceColossal SwordsNo passive effectsStamp (Upward Cut)5nannannannannannannannannannannan
100101.0Greatsword of Radahn (Light)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/greatsword_of_radahn_(light)_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png20.0Greatswords of black steel wielded by Radahn in his youth. 102103.0Moonrithyll's Knight Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/troll_knights_sword_colossal_swords_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png18.0Greatsword embedded with a blue glintstone. The favored weapon of the steadfast Carian knight, Moonrithyll. Moonrithyll was the Twin Moon Knight's chamberlain. 104105.0Rapierhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rapier_thrusting_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5A piercing sword with a sharp, slender blade.In addition to this weapon's thrusting attack prowess, it also boasts the ability to be used while guarding with a shield. As one of the smaller piercing swords, quick successive thrust area easy to perform, but without a cutting edge, it cannot be used for slashing attacks.0{'Str': 7, 'Dex': 12}Standard/PierceThrusting SwordsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust14nannannannannannannannannannannan
105106.0Estochttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/estoc_thrusting_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5Large piercing sword with a long, hard bladed edge which is also capable of slashing attacks. For its large size, it can be wielded rather nimbly, leaving little opportunity for the enemy to counter.0{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 13}Standard/PierceThrusting SwordsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust14nannannannannannannannannannannan
106107.0Noble's Estochttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/nobles_estoc_thrusting_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5Estoc carried by wandering nobles. Made to be easy to wield. Daubed with gold from tip to tail, it should fetch a good sum.0{'Str': 9, 'Dex': 10}Standard/PierceThrusting SwordsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
107108.0Cleanrot Knight's Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cleanrot_knight's_sword_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png4.0Piercing sword of the Cleanrot Knights who fought alongside Malenia, Blade of Miquella. Mainly used as a backup weapon, in combination with a long- handled armament.0{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 13}Standard/PierceThrusting SwordsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
108109.0Rogier's Rapierhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rogiers_rapier_thrusting_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5Piercing sword of superior quality, featuring intricate ornamentation. Signature weapon of the sorcerer Rogier. High dexterity is required to wield the blade to its full potential, but mastery is a sight to behold, characterized by a flowing style which excels in successive attacks.0{'Str': 8, 'Dex': 17}Standard/PierceThrusting SwordsNo passive effectsRepeating Thrust10nannannannannannannannannannannan
109110.0Antspur Rapierhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/antspur_rapier_thrusting_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0Spur of a giant ant which has been fashioned into a rapier. The blade drips with scarlet rot. Scarlet rot is an old legend, of which Maleigh Marais of the Shaded Castle was a private believer. And indeed, he eventually found his own personal goddess.0{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 20}Standard/PierceThrusting Swords(55) Scarlet RotImpaling Thrust14nannannannannannannannannannannan
110111.0Frozen Needlehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frozen_needle_thrusting_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5A razor-thin piercing blade of ice.Forged by Ijii, the carian Royal Blackmith. Can inflict frost upon enemies, and launch its blade with a strong attack. The blade immediately regenerates.0{'Str': 11, 'Dex': 18}Standard/PierceThrusting Swords(60) FrostbiteImpaling Thrust14nannannannannannannannannannannan
111112.0Carian Sorcery Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/carian_sorcery_sword_thrusting_sword_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png2.5One of the Carian royal family's glintstone swords. A smaller piercing sword with a slender blade. Formerly used by the Carian knights of old before the full refinement of their sorcerous combat techniques, this armament functions as a catalyst for glintstone sorcery when executing strong attacks.1{'Str': 10, 'Dex': 19, 'Int': 16}Standard/PierceThrusting SwordsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
112113.0Great Epeehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/great_epee_heavy_thrusting_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png6.5Large rapier featuring a thin, sharp blade. Commonly used in life or death duels.Like its smaller counterparts, its made for thrusting attacks, and can be used while guarding with a shield.0{'Str': 15, 'Dex': 16}Standard/PierceHeavy Thrusting SwordsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
113114.0Godskin Stitcherhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/godskin_stitcher_heavy_thrusting_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png7.0Elegant piercing sword with a celadon colored blade wielded by Godskin Nobles. The nobles possess skill with the sword unmatched by any lowborn. Despite its size, successive attacks from this weapon are swifter than the eye can follow.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 17}Standard/PierceHeavy Thrusting SwordsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
114115.0Bloody Helicehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloody_helice_heavy_thrusting_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0Ominous piercing sword with a winding blade. Carried by the noble servants of the Lord of Blood. Designed to bore into flesh, causing severe blood loss at the wound. The extracted blood trickles gracefully down the length of the blade.0{'Str': 16, 'Dex': 19, 'Arc': 17}Standard/PierceHeavy Thrusting Swords(55) HemorrhageDynast's Finesse5 ( -7)nannannannannannannannannannannan
115116.0Dragon King's Cragbladehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragon_kings_cragblade_heavy_thrusting_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png8.0Piercing Gravel Stone sword containing primeval lightning. A portion of the Dragonlord's power, gained from a remembrance. This weapon commands great power over the paltry, mortal dragons of today.0{'Str': 18, 'Dex': 37}Standard/PierceHeavy Thrusting SwordsNo passive effectsThundercloud Form28nannannannannannannannannannannan
116117.0Queelign's Greatswordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/queeligns_greatsword_heavy_thrusting_sword_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png7.5Greatsword of the Fire Knight Queelign. A weighty piercing sword with a blade that undulates like fire. Queelign devoted his all to the crusade, and remade his greatsword in the shape of the lance wielded by his liegeaspiring to become a second Impaler.1{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 18, 'Fai': 12}Standard/PierceHeavy Thrusting SwordsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
117118.0Sword Lancehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/sword_lance_heavy_thrusting_sword_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png9.0Weapon once wielded by Commander Gaius. A combination of greatsword and lance. Weighty and capable of being brought to bear with great force, this armament shows its true potential when used astride a mount. Gaius himself was never without his boar.1{'Str': 21, 'Dex': 11}Standard/PierceHeavy Thrusting SwordsNo passive effectsImpaling Thrust9nannannannannannannannannannannan
118119.0Scimitarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/scimitar_curved_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0A curved sword with a single-sided blade. Delivers slashing attacks with its sharp blade, but is ineffective against armor and hides covered in tough scales. Smaller in size than most curved swords, it carves into enemies with quick, sharp cuts.0{'Str': 7, 'Dex': 13}SlashCurved SwordsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6 (- 12)nannannannannannannannannannannan
119120.0Falchionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/falchion_curved_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5A curved sword with a single-sided blade. Light of weight despite its larger size, its slicing attacks come in rapid succession. A devastatingly powerful weapon in the hands of a skilled swordsman.0{'Str': 7, 'Dex': 13}SlashCurved SwordsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6 ( - 12)nannannannannannannannannannannan

A thoroughly reliable choice of weapon for those who can master its particulars.0{'Str': 14, 'Dex': 12}SlashCurved SwordsNo passive effectsSpinning Slash6 ( - 12)nannannannannannannannannannannan
122123.0Bandit's Curved Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bandits_curved_sword_curved_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png5.0Curved sword with a light, crescent-shaped blade. 127128.0Flowing Curved Swordhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flowing_curved_sword_curved_sword_weapon_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png3.5Legends speak of a master of the sword garbed in blue, and his curved blade that was patterned after flowing water.
