46nanBlessed Blue Dew Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/blessed_blue_dew_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3Talisman depicting the blessed boon that is a droplet of the blue, luminescent sap of the Erdtree. Gradually restores FP. It was once thought that the blessed sap of the Erdtree would drip from its boughs forever—but that age of plenty swiftly came to a close, and with time, the Erdtree became more an object of faith.1nannannannannannanEffect Slowly restores FP1000nannannannannannannannannan
47nanFine Crucible Feather Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/fine_crucible_feather_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman fashioned from thin feathers that embody the aspects of various creatures. Said to have grown on the human body long ago. Improves backsteps but increases damage taken at all times. Hornsent view the Crucible as sacred for the refinement wrought through its evolutionary gifts. Most prominently, their tangled horns.1nannannannannannanEffect Improves backsteps but increases damage taken???nannannannannannannannannan
48nanOuter God Heirloomhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/outer_god_heirloom_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman engraved with the lore of an outer god. Raises arcane. The clan, who lost everything in the great fires, peered upon the corpse of their ancestor, normally an act of sanctity, and saw in its shadow a twisted deity. The clan had suffered such torment that the horrible thing was taken as an object of worship.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises arcane???nannannannannannannannannan
49nanShattered Stone Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/shattered_stone_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3Shattered linchpin stone. Raises potency of kicking and stomping skills. Linchpin stones are spiritual anchors said to hold the ground in place and quell the fury of earthquakes—when this one shattered, the surrounding town fell into the broken earth. One account claimed that the moon itself had come tumbling down.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of kicking and stomping skills500nannannannannannannannannan
50nanTwo-Handed Sword Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/two-handed_sword_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.2A talisman depicting a warrior two-handing a sword. Enhances attacks with two-handed weapons. The horned warriors were fitting figureheads for the military might of the tower they kept watch over, their deft attacks slashing through any and all foes.1nannannannannannanEffect Enhances attacks with two-handed weapons500nannannannannannannannannan
51nanCrusade Insigniahttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/crusade_insignia_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman depicting a raised spear on a backdrop of flames, in remembrance of the lives lost in the sacred crusade led by Messmer. Raises attack power after defeating an enemy. The warriors who fought in the crusade set aside both honor and mercy to wantonly impale and scorch those deemed impure. Those who felt invigorated by each cry of death were the same men who were certain of the sanctity of the campaign.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 15% for 20 seconds after defeating an enemy???nannannannannannannannannan
52nanAged One's Exultationhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/aged_ones_exultation_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman depicting the exultation of the aging untouchable, whose head resembles a sprig of ripe grapes. Raises attack power when madness is triggered in the vicinity. "Gift your madness to our Lord. Bless our brethren with grapes. Take care that they fully ripen."1nannannannannannanEffect Madness in the vicinity increases attack power???nannannannannannannannannan
53nanArrow's Soaring Sting Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/arrows_soaring_sting_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman composed of fletched and iron arrows. Increases the effective range of bows and raises attack power of arrows and bolts.1nannannannannannanEffect Increases the effective range of bows and raises attack power of arrows and bolts???nannannannannannannannannan
54nanPearl Shield Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/pearl_shield_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9Talisman depicting a knight bearing a pearlescent greatshield. Boosts all non-physical damage negation while guarding. The nature and the potential of impurity surpassed the understanding of the knights, and so they were forced to prepare for all threats known or unknown.1nannannannannannanReduces Elemental Damage taken by 20% while guarding???nannannannannannannannannan
55nanDried Bouquethttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/dried_bouquet_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A quaint bouquet of dried flowers, offered to a small grave. Raises attack power when a spirit you have summoned dies. The sorrow that flows from the untimely demise of a loved one is a tenderness shared by all, regardless of birthplace.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 20% for 30 seconds when summoned spirit dies???nannannannannannannannannan
56nanSmithing Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/smithing_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman depicting an ancient smithing hammer. Inscribed with a smithscript. Enhances weapon-throwing attacks. In ancient times, smithing was a divine act, and blacksmiths interpreted the script they perceived in the wrinkles of molten steel to imbue weapons with souls.1nannannannannannanEffect Enhances weapon-throwing attacks by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
57nanAilment Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/ailment_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman depicting a soul taken by sickness. When certain ailments are triggered, this talisman grants resistance to the same ailment. When the weak were infected with the dreaded fly sickness, they perished well before the metamorphosis could take hold. Oddly, those who cared for the infected and made certain they were given a proper burial were never afflicted themselves.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises resistance to the last ailment suffered???nannannannannannannannannan
58nanRetaliatory Crossed-Treehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/retaliatory_crossed-tree_1_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3Handicraft depicting a golden crossed-tree. One of the items conferred to the Needle Knights. Enhances attacks executed after rolling or backstepping. Long ago, the Needle Knights were in service of Miquella, but now they are no more. Save for one.1nannannannannannanEffect Enhances attacks executed after rolling or backstepping by 17%???nannannannannannannannannan
59nanLacerating Crossed-Treehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/lacerating_crossed-tree_1_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3Handicraft depicting a golden crossed-tree. One of the items conferred to the Needle Knights. Enhances dash attacks. Long ago, the Needle Knights were in service of Miquella, but now they are no more. Save for one.1nannannannannannanEffect Enhances dash attacks???nannannannannannannannannan
60nanSharpshot Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/sharpshot_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A talisman depicting an archer wielding a longbow. Boosts attack power of precision-aimed shots. The Albinauric archers were in a class of their own, and their deadly long-range specialists struck fear into the hearts of men.1nannannannannannanEffect Boosts attack power of precision-aimed shots by 12%500nannannannannannannannannan
61nanSt. Trina's Smilehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/st._trinas_smile_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A talisman depicting a smiling St. Trina, a vision conjured deep within a certain man's heart. Raises attack power when sleep is triggered in the vicinity. "Only I am allowed to know. Of your velvety sleep. Its sweetly gentle embrace. So please, smile—for me, and only me."1nannannannannannanEffect Sleep in the vicinity increases attack power???nannannannannannannannannan
62nanTalisman of the Dreadhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/talisman_of_the_dread_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3Talisman depicting the dread dragon of the jagged peak, whose roars cause the peak's molten fury to boil and churn. Raises potency of magma. Bayle was the foul dragon's name—a terrible harbinger of destruction whose challenge to the ancient Dragonlord ended in grievous mutual injury.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of magma???nannannannannannannannannan
63nanEnraged Divine Beasthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/enraged_divine_beast_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A charm depicting the crazed, cavorting dance of the divine beast conducted at the tower festival. Raises potency of storms. Divine beasts are messengers of the heavens, and their rage mirrors the tumult of the skies, of which storms are the pinnacle.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of storms by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
64nanBeloved Stardusthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/beloved_stardust_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png1.3A talisman depicting a wizened hand gently gripping a glintstone. Shortens casting speed for sorcery and incantations by the utmost, but increases damage taken. Count Ymir was known for his recitations. "One need only envision the romance of the stars above with adoration for stardust in one's heart to become a great sorcerer. Do so, and you will know love."1nannannannannannanEffect Shortens casting speed for sorcery and incantations by the utmost, but increases damage taken2000nannannannannannannannannan
65nanTalisman of Lord's Bestowalhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/talisman_of_lords_bestowal_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png3.0A talisman depicting Godfrey, first Elden lord, receiving the precious sap. Increases poise after using a flask of tears. The Lord accepted the sap stoically, without any sign of wavering. No wonder Lord of the Erdtree casts a long shadow over the lands.1nannannannannannanEffect Increases poise after using a flask of tears???nannannannannannannannannan
66nanVerdigris Discushttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/verdigris_discus_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png4.5A discus made of verdigris, the corroded metal known for its heft. Raises defense with higher equipment load. Great weight makes for great strength. The strength to protect others.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises defense with higher equipment load???nannannannannannannannannan
67nanRellana's Cameohttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/rellanas_cameo_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8Talisman featuring a gallant portrait of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight. Enhances attacks executed after maintaining the same stance for a certain length of time. Engraved as a reminder of the unparalleled devotion of those who left their homelands to serve Rellana. "By your leave, we will accompany you wherever your lunar vessel takes you."1nannannannannannanEffect Enhances attacks executed after maintaining the same stance for a while500nannannannannannannannannan
68nanBlade of Mercyhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/blade_of_mercy_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A thin, blood-stained dagger. No longer fit for use. Raises attack power after each critical hit. Hornsent employed this to honorably end the suffering of a compatriot. After claiming numerous lives, the dagger is now broken, but has acquired a spectral aura.1nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 20% for 20 seconds after each critical hit500nannannannannannannannannan
69nanTalisman of All Crucibleshttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/talisman_of_all_crucibles_talisman_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.png0.3A giant mass of intermingling Crucible attributes. Reduces damage taken from critical hits and head shots and improves the effectiveness of rolling and backstepping, but also increases damage taken at all times. Rumored to have sprouted upon giants and is known as the "mother of Crucibles" in ancient tower lore.1nannannannannannanEffect Grants effects of all crucible talismans???nannannannannannannannannan
70nanBlessed Dew Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/blessed_dew_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6Talisman depicting a drop of the Erdtree's sap, a blessed boon. Gradually restores HP. It was once thought that the blessed sap of the Erdtree would drip from its boughs forever -- but that age of plenty swiftly came to a close, and with time, the Erdtree became more an object of faith.0nannannannannannanEffect Restores 2 HP/sec1000nannannannannannannannannan
71nanGreen Turtle Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/green_turtle_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman in the shape of a green turtle.Raises stamina recovery speed. Turtles are known as a nutritious ingredient, symbolic of inexhaustible power. However, those who hold turtles to be wise creatures consider the practice of eating their meat to be barbarous.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Stamina recovery speed by 8 per second (17.7%)500nannannannannannannannannan
72nanArsenal Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/arsenal_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5An iron charm that resembles a mass of weaponry. Boosts maximum equipment load. This talisman was derived from an unusual greatsword, once wielded by a hero hungry for vengeance.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises maximum Equip Load by 15%100nannannannannannannannannan
73nanArsenal Charm +1 Varianthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/arsenal_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5An iron charm that resembles a mass of weaponry. Boosts maximum equipment load. This talisman was derived from an unusual greatsword, once wielded by a hero hungry for vengeance.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises maximum Equip Load by 17%500nannannannannannannannannan
74nanGreat-Jar's Arsenalhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/great-jars_arsenal_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A charm that resembles a great jar overflowing with weaponry.Vastly boosts maximum equipment load. The great jar grants this talisman to their warriors. Carry as much as you can — grow big and strong.0nannannannannannanEffect Vastly raises maximum Equip Load, by 19%1000nannannannannannannannannan
75nanRadagon's Scarsealhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/radagons_scarseal_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8An eye engraved with an Elden Rune.Said to be the seal of King Consort Radagon. Raises vigor, endurance, strength, and dexterity, but also increases damage taken. These seals represent the lifelong duty of those chosen by the gods.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Vigor, Endurance, Strength, and Dexterity by 3, but increases damage taken by 10%3000nannannannannannannannannan
76nanRadagon's Soresealhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/radagons_ soreseal_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8This legendary talisman is an eye engraved with an Elden Rune, said to be the seal of King Consort Radagon. Greatly raises vigor, endurance, strength, dexterity, but also increases damage taken by a similar measure. Solemn duty weighs upon the one beholden; not unlike a gnawing curse from which there is no deliverance.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Vigor, Endurance, Strength, and Dexterity by 5 each, but increases damage taken by 15%3000nannannannannannannannannan
77nanMarika's Scarsealhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/marikas_scarseal_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8An eye engraved with an Elden Rune.Said to be the seal of Queen Marika. Raises mind, intelligence, faith, arcane, but also increases damage taken. These seals represent the lifelong duty of those chosen by the gods.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Mind, Intelligence, Faith, and Arcane by 3, but increases damage taken by 10%3000nannannannannannannannannan
78nanMarika's Soresealhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/marika's_soreseal_talismans_elden_ring_wiki_200px.png0.8This legendary talisman is an eye engraved with an Elden Rune, said to be the seal of Queen Marika. Greatly raises mind, intelligence, faith, and arcane, but also increases damage taken by a similar measure. Solemn duty weighs upon the one beholden; not unlike a gnawing curse from which there is no deliverance.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Mind, Intelligence, Faith, and Arcane by 5 each, but increases damage taken by 15%3000nannannannannannannannannan
79nanStarscourge Heirloomhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/starscourge_heirloom_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman engraved with a scene from a heroic tale.Raises strength. The mightiest hero of the demigods confronted the falling stars alone—and thus did he crush them, his conquest sealing the very fate of the stars.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Strength by 51000nannannannannannannannannan
80nanProsthesis-Wearer Heirloomhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/prosthesis-wearer_heriloom_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman engraved with a scene from a heroic tale.Raises dexterity. Though born into the accursed rot, when the young girl encountered her mentor and his flowing blade, she gained wings of unparalleled strength.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Dexterity by 51000nannannannannannannannannan
81nanStargazer Heirloomhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/stargazer_heirloom_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A talisman engraved with the legend of a queen.Raises intelligence. The young astrologer gazed at the night sky as she walked. She had always chased the stars every step of her journey. Then she met the full moon — and, in time, the astrologer became a queen.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Intelligence by 51000nannannannannannannannannan
82nanTwo Fingers Heirloomhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/two_fingers_heirloom_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A talisman engraved with the legend of the Two Fingers.Raises faith. Fingers cannot speak, yet these are eloquent.Persistently they wriggle, spelling out mysteries in the air.Thus did we gain the words. The words of our faith.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Faith by 51000nannannannannannannannannan
83nanDragoncrest Shield Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/dragoncrest_shield_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8Wrought iron talisman depicting a trio of ancient dragons.Boosts physical damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock.And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces Physical Damage taken 10%100nannannannannannannannannan
84nanDragoncrest Shield Talisman +1 Varianthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/dragoncrest_shield_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8Wrought iron talisman depicting a trio of ancient dragons.Boosts physical damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock.And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces Physical Damage taken 13%500nannannannannannannannannan

The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock.And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces Physical Damage taken 17%1000nannannannannannannannannan

The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock.And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.0nannannannannannanEffect Enormously reduces Physical Damage taken by 20%.2000nannannannannannannannannan

The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock.And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces Holy Damage taken by 13%100nannannannannannannannannan
88nanHaligdrake Talisman +1 Varianthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/haligdrake_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6Talisman depicting a golden ancient dragon.Boosts holy damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock.And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces Holy Damage taken by 17%500nannannannannannannannannan
89nanHaligdrake Talisman +2 Varianthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/haligdrake_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6Talisman depicting a golden ancient dragon.Boosts holy damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock.And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces Holy Damage taken by 20%1000nannannannannannannannannan
90nanPrince of Death's Pustulehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/prince_of_deaths_pustule_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A fetid pustule taken from facial flesh.Raises vitality.(Vitality governs resistance to the effects of Death.) It is said that this pustule came from the visage of the Prince of Death, he who used to be called Godwyn. As First Dead of the demigods, it's said he's buried deep under the capital, at the Erdtree's roots.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Vitality by 90500nannannannannannannannannan
91nanPrince of Death's Cysthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/prince_of_deaths_cyst_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A fetid, overgrown cyst taken from facial flesh.Greatly raises vitality.(Vitality governs resistance to the effects of Death.) It is said that this cyst came from the corrupted visage of one unable to die a true Death. Indeed, it comes from the Prince of Death, scion of the golden bough and First of the Dead among the demigods.0nannannannannannanEffect Greatly raises Vitality, by 1401000nannannannannannannannannan
92nanDagger Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/dagger_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.1A talisman depicting a dagger and a surgeon.Enhances critical hits. The white-garbed field surgeons come to the aid of friend and foe alike by dealing a final deadly thrust to spare them from the prolonged agony of a mortal wound. A sense of mercy is a catalyst for bloodlust.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Critical Damage by 17%500nannannannannannannannannan
93nanCurved Sword Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/curved_sword_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting a curved sword and a swordsman.Enhances guard counters. It is said that a blind swordsman was the originator of this technique — the art of allowing one's opponent to strike so as to leave them vulnerable to a well-timed reply.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases guard counter damage by 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
94nanTwinblade Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/twinblade_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting a twinblade and a confessor.Enhances the final hit ending a chain of attacks. The twinblade technique is a tradition of the confessors, who closely guard the secret of how they preserve the momentum of their attacks. Thus is the final strike of their onslaught all the more deadly.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases damage of final hit in attack chain by 45%500nannannannannannannannannan
95nanAxe Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/axe_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman depicting an axe and a warrior.Enhances charge attacks. The Lord who led the Long March bore an axe, and his loyal warriors honored him by wielding axes of their own, making them very effective at dealing decisive blows.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Charge Attack damage by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
96nanHammer Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/hammer_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A talisman depicting a hammer and a knight.Enhances stamina-reducing attacks against a blocking opponent. Hammers are highly effective against shield-bearing foes, so much so that they are known as "knight-killers."0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Stamina damage against blocking enemies by 40%500nannannannannannannannannan
97nanSpear Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/spear_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.5A talisman depicting a spear and a soldier. Enhances the counterattacks that are unique to thrusting weapons. Spears are standard weapons for soldiers in the Lands Between. They made it possible to respond to a ferocious foe with an equally ferocious counterattack.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases thrusting weapon counterattack damage by 15%500nannannannannannannannannan
98nanLance Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/lance_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting a lance and a knight.Enhances attacks while on horseback. Knights on horseback are deadly foes. They see all below from their lofty position, meeting little meaningful resistance as they charge ahead.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases damage of attacks while on horseback by 15%500nannannannannannannannannan
99nanClaw Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/claw_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting a claw and an assassin.Enhances jump attacks. The assassins of Ravenmount are killers by trade. They assail their victims while dressed as birds of prey.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases jump attack damage by 15% (7.5% in PvP)500nannannannannannannannannan
100nanGreatshield Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/greatshield_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9Talisman depicting a knight holding a greatshield.Boosts guarding ability. The knights of Leyndell once modelled themselves after the Tree Sentinels. Their purpose is to protect that which deserves protection, and thus the shield always comes before the sword.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces stamina damage taken while blocking by 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
101nanArrow's Sting Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/arrows_sting_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting three iron arrows.Carried by soldiers long ago. Raises attack power of arrows and bolts.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power of Arrows/Bolts by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
102nanArrow's Reach Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/arrows_reach_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting three arrows.Carried by hunters of beasts. Increases the effective range of bows.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases range of various projectiles500nannannannannannannannannan
103nanGraven-School Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/graven-school_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman depicting a school of graven mages, the nightmare of the academy. Raises potency of sorceries. The primeval current is a forbidden tradition of glintstone sorcery. To those who cleave to its teachings, the act of collecting sorcerers to fashion them into the seeds of stars is but another path of scientific inquiry.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of Sorceries by 4%1000nannannannannannannannannan
104nanGraven-Mass Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/graven-mass_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A talisman depicting the first school of graven mages — a nightmare that would continue to haunt the academy. Greatly raises potency of sorceries. The primeval current is a forbidden tradition of glintstone sorcery. To those who cleave to its teachings, the act of collecting sorcerers to fashion them into the seeds of stars is but another path of scientific inquiry.0nannannannannannanEffect Greatly raises potency of Sorceries by 8%2000nannannannannannannannannan
105nanFaithful's Canvas Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/faithfuls_canvas_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A talisman bearing an icon that depicts a group of masked figures.Raises potency of incantations. The figures represent the flock at prayer, their firm belief in the intangible inspiring even the solitary founder of their religion. What is faith if not an affirmation?0nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of Incantations by 4%1000nannannannannannannannannan
106nanFlock's Canvas Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/flocks_canvas_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A talisman bearing an icon that depicts a mass of masked figures.Greatly raises potency of incantations. The figures represent the flock at prayer, their firm belief in the intangible inspiring even the solitary founder of their religion. What is faith if not an affirmation?0nannannannannannanEffect Greatly raises potency of incantations (8%)2000nannannannannannannannannan
107nanPrimal Glintstone Bladehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/primal_glintstone_blade_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6An old glintstone blade that has been stained with blood. Reduces FP consumption of sorceries and incantations at the cost of maximum HP. The old sorcerers would slice open their hearts with these blades to imbue a primal glintstone with their soul, and thus did they die.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces Spell FP costs by 25% but reduces maximum HP by 15%2000nannannannannannannannannan
108nanMoon of Nokstellahttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/moon_of_nokstella_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8This legendary talisman is a treasure of Nokstella, the Eternal City. Increases memory slots. This talisman represents the lost black moon.The moon of Nokstella was the guide of countless stars.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Memory Slots by 22000nannannannannannannannannan
109nanOld Lord's Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/old_lords_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.5A legendary talisman depicting the ancient king whose seat lies at the heart of the storm beyond time. Extends the duration of sorceries and incantations. It is said that the ancient royal city of Farum Azula has been slowly crumbling since time immemorial.0nannannannannannanEffect Extends the duration of Spells by 30%1000nannannannannannannannannan
110nanRadagon Iconhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/radagon_icon_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A legendary talisman depicting the Elden Lord Radagon.Shortens the casting time of sorceries and incantations. As the husband of Rennala of Caria, the red-haired Radagon studied sorcery, and as the husband of Queen Marika, he studied incantations. Thus did the hero aspire to be complete.0nannannannannannanEffect Shortens the casting time of Spells1000nannannannannannannannannan
111nanRoar Medallionhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/roar_medallion_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A bronze medallion depicting a roaring giant.Enhances roars and breath attacks. In ancient times, the giants were mortal enemies of the Erdtree. Their bellowing roars desolated nature, triggered avalanches, and whipped up storms of flame.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases the damage of roars and breath attacks by 15%500nannannannannannannannannan
112nanCompanion Jarhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/companion_jar_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A talisman given by the jars to their friends.Raises potency of thrown jars. Though the jars are brought to life by human flesh and blood, they are all rather kindly folk. Perhaps they were made to be better than their innards.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of Throwing Pots by 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
113nanPerfumer's Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/perfumers_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A talisman depicting a set of perfume bottles.Raises potency of arts employing perfume. There are gardens known only to the perfumers. Whether hidden on the fringes of the highlands, or obscured by shadows inside caves, the flowers blossom in secret, waiting to impart their scent.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises potency of Arts employing Perfume by 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
114nanCarian Filigreed Cresthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/carian_filigreed_crest_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman adorned with the royal crest. Lowers FP consumed by skills. An honor said to have once been awarded to Carian knights who served as direct retainers to the kingdom's princesses. Now there is only one princess: Ranni, daughter of Rennala.0nannannannannannanEffect Lowers FP cost of Skills by 25%1000nannannannannannannannannan
115nanWarrior Jar Shardhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/warrior_jar_shard_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9Shard of a shattered warrior jar. Boosts the attack power of skills. Scraps of stewed flesh cling to the shard, and tatters of ornaments can be seen mingled within the slime. Relics of ancient royal warriors, perhaps.0nannannannannannanEffect Boosts the attack power of Skills by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
116nanShard of Alexanderhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/shard_of_alexander_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9Shard of the late Alexander, a shattered warrior jar. Greatly boosts the attack power of skills. Scraps of stewed flesh cling to the shard, and tatters of ornaments can be seen mingled within the slime. Relics of a red-haired champion, it would seem.0nannannannannannanEffect Greatly boosts the attack power of Skills by 15%1000nannannannannannannannannan
117nanGodfrey Iconhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/godfrey_icon_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A legendary talisman depicting the Elden Lord Godfrey.Raises charge attack power of sorceries, incantations, and skills. Godfrey was a ferocious warrior. When he vowed to become a lord, he took the Beast Regent Serosh upon on his back to suppress the ceaseless lust for battle that raged within.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power of charged Spells and Skills by 15%1000nannannannannannannannannan
118nanBull-Goat's Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/bull-goats_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.5A talisman depicting the horns of a bull-goat.Raises poise. Bull-goats are associated with the stout and mighty Tragoth, said to be unflinching in combat - now a silent comrade to those who fight.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Poise by 33%1000nannannannannannannannannan
119nanBlue Dancer Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/blue_dancer_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A cloth doll depicting a dancer garbed in blue.An ancient heirloom of some sort. Raises attack power with lower equipment load. The dancer in blue represents a fairy, who in legend bestowed a flowing sword upon a blind swordsman. Blade in hand, theswordsman sealed away an ancient god — a god that was Rot itself.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Physical Damage with lower Equip Weight500nannannannannannannannannan
120nanMagic Scorpion Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/magic_scorpion_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman carried by assassins who strike unseen.Patterned on a scorpion freshly shed of its exoskeleton, its claws seizing a heart that shimmers with magic. Raises magic attack power, but lowers damage negation.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Magic Damage by 12%, but increases Physical Damage taken by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
121nanFire Scorpion Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/fire_scorpion_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman carried by assassins who strike unseen.Patterned on a scorpion freshly shed of its exoskeleton, its claws seizing a heart that burns with fire. Raises fire attack power, but lowers damage negation.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Fire Damage by 12%, but increases Physical Damage taken by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
122nanLightning Scorpion Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/lightning_scorpion_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman carried by assassins who strike unseen.Patterned on a scorpion freshly shed of its exoskeleton, its claws seizing a heart that sparks with lightning. Raises lightning attack power, but lowers damage negation.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Lightning Damage by 12%, but increases Physical Damage taken by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
123nanSacred Scorpion Charmhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/sacred_scorpion_charm_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman carried by assassins who strike unseen.Patterned on a scorpion freshly shed of its exoskeleton, its claws seizing a heart with a blessed glow. Raises holy attack power, but lowers damage negation.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Holy Damage by 12%, but increases Physical Damage taken by 10%500nannannannannannannannannan
124nanCrucible Scale Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/crucible_scale_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.1A talisman fashioned from a scale that embodies the aspects of various creatures.Said to have grown on the human body long ago. Reduces damage taken from critical hits. A vestige of the crucible of primordial life. Born partially of devolution, it was considered a signifier of the divine in ancient times, but is now increasingly disdained as an impurity as civilization has advanced.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces Critical Damage taken by 30%500nannannannannannannannannan
125nanCrucible Feather Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/crucible_feather_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8A talisman fashioned from feathers that embody the aspects of various creatures.Said to have grown on the human body long ago. Improves the effectiveness of dodge rolls, but increases damage taken at all times. A vestige of the crucible of primordial life. Born partially of devolution, it was considered a signifier of the divine in ancient times, but is now increasingly disdained as an impurity as civilization has advanced.0nannannannannannanEffect Improves dodge rolling but increases damage taken1000nannannannannannannannannan
126nanCrucible Knot Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/crucible_knot_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.5A talisman fashioned from a bony knot that embodies that aspects of various creatures.Said to have grown on the human body long ago. Reduces damage and impact of headshots taken. A vestige of the crucible of primordial life. Born partially of devolution,it was considered a signifier of the divine in ancient times, but is now increasingly disdained as an impurity as civilization has advanced.0nannannannannannanEffect Eliminates headshot bonus damage and stagger on self500nannannannannannannannannan
127nanRed-Feathered Branchswordhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/red-feathered_branchsword_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.4A talisman adorned with red feathers, once used in ancient death rituals.Raises attack power when HP is low. The heart sings when one draws close to death, and a glorious end awaits those who cling so tenaciously to life.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 20% when HP is below 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
128nanBlue-Feathered Branchswordhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/blue-feathered_branchsword_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.1A talisman adorned with blue feathers, once used in ancient death rituals.Raises defense when HP is low. The heart sings when one draws close to death, and thus does one cling so tenaciously to life - to render up a death worth offering.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces damage taken by 50% when HP is below 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
129nanRitual Sword Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/ritual_sword_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A talisman patterned after swords used in ritual combat held to honor the Erdtree. Raises attack power when HP is at maximum. The practice had died out by the age of King Consort Radagon, but remains of the arenas where ritual combat took place can still be found in every land.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 10% when HP is at maximum500nannannannannannannannannan
130nanRitual Shield Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/ritual_shield_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A talisman patterned after shields used in ritual combat held to honor the Erdtree. Raises defense when HP is at maximum. The practice had died out by the age of King Consort Radagon, but remains of the arenas where ritual combat took place can still be found in every land.0nannannannannannanEffect Reduces damage taken by 30% when HP is at maximum500nannannannannannannannannan
131nanAssassin's Crimson Daggerhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/assassins_crimson_dagger_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8An assassin's dagger, misshapen and stained in crimson.Critical hits restore HP. This charm is modelled after the darkly gleaming blades used in the Night of Black Knives. Those which gave the demigods their first taste of death.0nannannannannannanEffect Critical attacks restore 10% + 85 HP1500nannannannannannannannannan
132nanAssassin's Cerulean Daggerhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/assassins_cerulean_dagger_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8An assassin's dagger, misshapen and stained in cerulean.Critical hits restore FP. This charm is modelled after the darkly gleaming blades used in the Night of Black Knives. Those which gave the demigods their first taste of death.0nannannannannannanEffect Critical attacks restore 15 FP1500nannannannannannannannannan
133nanWinged Sword Insigniahttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/winged_sword_insignia_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.4A talisman depicting a raised prosthetic blade.An honor bestowed upon the knights who fought alongside Malenia the Severed. Raises attack power with successive attacks. The wings symbolize Malenia and her undefeated prowess. Though she never knew relief from the accursed rot she was born into, her blade was forever beautiful - and relentless.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power with successive attacks (3%,5%,10%)500nannannannannannannannannan
134nanRotten Winged Sword Insigniahttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/rotten_winged_sword_insignia_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.4A talisman depicting a raised prosthetic blade. An honor bestowed upon the valkyries who serve the goddess of rot. Greatly raises attack power with successive attacks. The Four sisters were born in the swamp of Aeonia, and came to the Haligtree under the aegis of Gowry. And yet, those buds were doomed to never blossom.0nannannannannannanEffect Greatly raises attack power with successive attacks (6%,8%,13%)500nannannannannannannannannan
135nanMillicent's Prosthesishttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/millicents_prosthesis_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.6Part of the golden prosthesis used by Millicent.The hand is locked into a fist that once raised a sword aloft. Boosts dexterity and raises attack power with successive attacks. The despair of sweet betrayal transformed Millicent from a mere bud into a magnificent flower. And one day, she will be reborn - as a beautiful scarlet valkyrie.0nannannannannannanEffect Boosts dexterity (+5), raises attack power with successive attacks (4%,6%, 11%)1000nannannannannannannannannan
136nanGodskin Swaddling Clothhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/godskin_swaddling_cloth_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9Sacred cloth of the Godskin Apostles, made from supple skin sewn together. Successive attacks restore HP. The Gloam-Eyed Queen cradles newborn apostles swaddled in this cloth. Soon they will grow to become the death of the gods.0nannannannannannanEffect Successive attacks restore 30 + 3% HP1000nannannannannannannannannan
137nanKindred of Rot's Exultationhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/kindred_of_rots_exultation_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A talisman depicting the exultation of pests. Raises attack power when poisoning or rot occurs in the vicinity. "Rot for the scarlet goddess. O scarlet blossoms, flourish in distant lands, and return to us, the unwanted children."0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 20% for 20 seconds when Poisoning or Rot occurs in the vicinity500nannannannannannannannannan
138nanLord of Blood's Exultationhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/lord_of_bloods_exultation_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9A talisman depicting the exultation of the Lord of Blood. Raises attack power when blood loss occurs in the vicinity. "Render up you offerings of blood to your Lord. Drench my consort's chamber. Slake his cocoon's thirst. His awakening shall herald the dawn of our dynasty"0nannannannannannanEffect Raises attack power by 20% (12% in PvP) for 20 seconds when Blood Loss occurs in the vicinity500nannannannannannannannannan
139nanTaker's Cameohttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/takers_cameo_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A talisman engraved with a stern likeness of Praetor Rykard, master of Volcano Manor. Restores HP upon defeating enemies. When Rykard turned to heresy, taking by force became the rule. The gods themselves were no different, after all.0nannannannannannanEffect Restores 3% + 30 HP upon defeating enemies1000nannannannannannannannannan
140nanAncestral Spirit's Hornhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/ancestral_spirits_horn_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.2Item cut from the horns of the Regal Ancestor Spirit. Restore FP upon defeating enemies. A number of new growths bud from the antler-like horns of the fallen king, each glowing with light. Thus does new life grow from death, and from death, one obtains power.0nannannannannannanEffect Restores 3 FP upon defeating enemies500nannannannannannannannannan
141nanGold Scarabhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/gold_scarab_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.2A talisman facsimile of a scarab, the carrier of treasures and precious things. This golden scarab increases the amount of runes obtained from defeating enemies.0nannannannannannanEffect Increases Rune acquisition by 20%500nannannannannannannannannan
142nanSilver Scarabhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/silver_scarab_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.2A talisman facsimile of a scarab, the carrier of treasures and precious things. This silver scarab enhances item discovery.0nannannannannannanEffect Raises Item Discovery by 75500nannannannannannannannannan
143nanCrepus's Vialhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/crepuss_vial_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7Small mysterious bottle with a dark mist sealed within. Eliminates all sound made by the wearer during movement. A ritual implement used by Roundtable Hold assassins. There was a time when Tarnished who had strayed from guidance feared nothing more than utter silence.0nannannannannannanEffect Eliminates all sound made by the wearer during movement500nannannannannannannannannan
144nanConcealing Veilhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/concealing_veil_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.9Talisman put together from dark cloth with a lustrous sheen. Completely conceals the wearer's presence while crouching at a distance from foes. Part of one of the concealing veils used by the assassins on the Night of Black Knives.0nannannannannannanEffect Conceals wearer while crouching away from foes500nannannannannannannannannan
145nanLongtail Cat Talismanhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/longtail_cat_talisman_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6A brooch depicting Lacrima, the long-tailed cat. Renders the wearer immune to fall damage.However, it cannot prevent falling to one's death. Lacrima features in the fables of Raya Lucaria, in which she is described as a faerie cat who was fond of playing in the great bell tower.0nannannannannannanEffect Negates non-lethal Fall Damage500nannannannannannannannannan
146nanFurled Finger's Trick-Mirrorhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/furled_fingers_trick-mirror_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A small, clouded mirror that reflects a flesh-and-blood figure. Makes the bearer take on the appearance of a Host of Fingers One of the ritual implements created by the Tarnished to deceive invaders.0nannannannannannanEffect Take on appearance of a Host of Fingers1000nannannannannannannannannan
147nanHost's Trick-Mirrorhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/hosts_trick-mirror_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.7A small, clouded mirror that reflects a flesh-and-blood figure. Makes the bearer take on the appearance of a summoned cooperator. One of the ritual implements created by the Tarnished to deceive invaders.0nannannannannannanEffect Take on appearance of a cooperator1000nannannannannannannannannan
148nanShabriri's Woehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/shabriris_woe_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.6Disturbing likeness of a man whose eyes have been gouged out.The corners of his mouth are upturned in an almost flirtatious manner. Constantly attracts enemies' aggression. It is said that the man, named Shabriri, had his eyes gouged out as punishment for the crime of slander, and, with time, the blight of the flame of frenzy came to dwell in the empty sockets.0nannannannannannanEffect Constantly attracts enemies' aggression500nannannannannannannannannan
149nanDaedicar's Woehttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/daedicars_woe_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.8Disturbing likeness of a woman whose skin was flayed.She smiles with a serene tenderness. Increases damage taken. It is said that this woman, named Daedicar, indulged in every form of adultery and wicked pleasure imaginable, giving birth to a myriad of grotesque children.0nannannannannannanEffect Doubles damage taken500nannannannannannannannannan
150nanSacrificial Twighttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/sacrificial_twig_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.0A talisman fashioned from a dried twig, so slender that it might snap at the slightest touch. Prevent rune loss upon death, but will be lost itself in exchange. Believed to be a twig pruned from the Erdtree long, long ago.0nannannannannannanEffect Will be lost on death in place of runes.1000nannannannannannannannannan
151nanEntwining Umbilical Cordhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com//file/Elden-Ring/entwining_umbilical_cord_talisman_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png0.5Mysterious circular object that's oddly warped.Changes the demeanour of the wearer's actions.0nannannannannannanEffect Changes demeanour of wearer's actions1000nannannannannannannannannan
152nanErdtree's Favorhttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtrees_favor_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A talisman depicting a special blessing of the Erdtree.Slightly raises maximum HP, stamina, and equip load. It is said that when the Age of the Erdtree began, such blessings were personally bestowed upon their recipients by Queen Marika herself.0nannannannannannanIncreases HP (3%), Stamina (7%), and Equip Load (5%)500nannannannannannannannannan
153nanErdtree's Favor +1 Varianthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtrees_favor_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A talisman depicting a special blessing of the Erdtree.Slightly raises maximum HP, stamina, and equip load. It is said that when the Age of the Erdtree began, such blessings were personally bestowed upon their recipients by Queen Marika herself.0nannannannannannanIncreases HP (3.5%), Stamina (8.5%), and Equip Load (6.5%)1500nannannannannannannannannan
154nanErdtree's Favor +2 Varianthttps://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtrees_favor_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.png1.5A talisman depicting a special blessing of the Erdtree.Slightly raises maximum HP, stamina, and equip load. It is said that when the Age of the Erdtree began, such blessings were personally bestowed upon their recipients by Queen Marika herself.0nannannannannannanIncreases HP (4%), Stamina (10%), and Equip Load (8.0%)3000nannannannannannannannannan
0nanFurious Blade of Ansbachhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/furious_blade_of_ansbach_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of Ansbach, Pureblood Knight. Produces a bloodflame blade from the side of the hand, then lunges at enemies to cleave through them. Charge to increase the number of slashes. Markedly different from the finessed swordplay of the dynast, this is an aggressive last resort of an incantation that gave rise to Ansbach's fearsome reputation.1nannannannannannanCleaves through enemies with bloodflame blade summoned from side of the handnan1810192721BloodDamageComplete Sir Ansbach's questline all the way through the end, and side with him when facing Leda, and then Promised Consort Radahn/ Radahn, Consort of Miquella. After the fight is over, Sir Ansbach's body will be near the site of grace, alongside with his equipment and this Incantation. [Map Link]
1nanHeal from Afarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/heal_from_afar_incantation-2_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanAn Erdtree incantation discovered in the realm of shadow. Fires a projectile toward distant allies that greatly restores HP on contact. Even when far beyond, far out of sight, the Erdtree will surely give us its blessing.1nannannannannannanGreatly heals HP for distant allies the spell reachesnan451018040Two FingersHealingThis spell can be looted on the ground by the foot of an underground golden tree. It is located in a cave path to the base of the Rauh Ruins, north-northeast of the Moorth Ruins in Scadu Atlus. [Map Link]
2nanAspects of the Crucible: Thornshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/aspects_of_the_crucible_thorns_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanAspect of the Crucible that manifested in golden hippopotami. Creates a bristling mass of thorn-like fur on the caster's back before scouring the area by rolling around on the ground. Charging increases potency. In an age long past, before this land was enshrouded in shadow, the vitality of the Crucible flourished. Remains of this can be seen in the ancient ruins.1nannannannannannanCreates a mass of bristling thorns on back to scour the areanan141027029ErdtreeDamageDropped by the Golden Hippopotamus by going up the elevator in the Shadow Keep Main Gate. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Map]
3nanAspects of the Crucible: Bloomhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/aspects_of_the_crucible_bloom_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanAspect of the Crucible discovered in the ancient ruins. Creates a miranda flower on one's chest before calling down a rain of light. Charging increases potency. In an age long past, before this land was enshrouded in shadow, the vitality of the Crucible flourished.1nannannannannannanCreates a miranda flower on chest to summon rain of lightnan231027020ErdtreeDamageCan be found on a corpse near the Giant Miranda Sprout near the Ravine North Site of Grace [Map Link]
4nanMinor Erdtreehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/minor_erdtree_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSecret incantation of Queen Marika. Only the kindness of gold, without Order. Creates a small, illusory Erdtree that continuously restores the HP of nearby allies. Marika bathed the village of her home in gold, knowing full well that there was no one to heal.1nannannannannannanContinuously heals allies in the areanan302070030ErdtreeHealingLocated at the Shaman Village in the Scaduview region. The spell can be found in the field of flowers.[Map Link]
5nanLand of Shadow (Incantation)http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/land_of_shadow_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation originating from Scadutree avatars. Creates a hail of golden projectiles which are fired toward foes after a brief delay. This incantation channels the force of the Scadutree's power, and its gold is accompanied by shadow.1nannannannannannanFires a hail of golden projectiles toward foesnan401058048ErdtreeDamageCan be selected as one of the possible rewards when tradingRemembrance of the Shadow Sunflower with Enia at the Roundtable Hold.
6nanWrath from Afarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/wrath_from_afar_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanAn Erdtree incantation discovered in the realm of shadow. Fires a golden shockwave that knocks back nearby foes. Charging increases the size of the shockwave. When the Elden Ring was shattered, the people of the realm of shadow felt it tooand feared it as a sign of the Erdtree's wrath.1nannannannannannanFires a golden shockwave that knocks back foesnan181034024ErdtreeDamageTake the elevator at the Storehouse, Loft site of grace in Shadow Keep. Once you are on the upper level, turn left, and turn left again. As soon as you can turn right. Beware of the bat hanging from the ceiling. Reach the other side, and take the ladder up. Turn left and move towards the area in which there is a giant gear (the one that does not have a bat on it), once you are aligned fall down to find the spell behind the column. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Map Link]
7nanLight of Miquellahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/light_of_miquella_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanThe strength of Miquella upon his deific return, wielded as an incantation. Annihilates foes with a pillar of light. Miquella sought to accept all that was and would be, but found one that refused to be embraced. No wonder, as one god, and one king consort, is all the world needs.1nannannannannannanAnnihilates foes with a pillar of lightnan482072060MiquellanDamageLocation goes here...
8nanMultilayered Ring of Lighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/multilayered_ring_of_light_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of those who served Miquella. Produces a multilayered ring of golden light and fires it forwards, inflicting continuous damage on those struck by it. Charging increases potency. This light-ring incantation was cultivated by a tradition separate from Golden Order fundamentalism.1nannannannannannanFires a multilayered golden ring of light that continuously inflicts damagenan231036028MiquellanDamageLocation goes here...
9nanRoar of Rugaleahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/roar_of_rugalea_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanAn incantation of what is jokingly called "the bear communion." Channels the power of Rugalea, the great red bear. Transform oneself into a great red bear and emit a mighty roar. Charging increases potency. An incantation that is more akin to the divine invocation of the hornsent than it is to the Dragon Communion. Only through desperate battle with the feral wild can one discover a god unique to oneself.1nannannannannannanChannels great red bear to emit a furious roarnan171014035BestialDamageDropped by a large bear northwest of the Ravine North Site of Grace, in the wooded area where there are many large bears. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]
10nanKnight's Lightning Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/knights_lightning_spear_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the capital's ancient dragon cult. Summons a lightning spear while also manifesting ancient dragon crests. On throwing the spear, the crests will launch additional spears. Charge to increase the number of crests. An incantation that was taught only to the most accomplished knights, and now a lost art in the Lands Between.1nannannannannannanHurls lightning spear while firing additional spears from ancient dragon crestsnan291036031Dragon CultDamageScorpion River Catacombs: In the big hall with the set of eyes that inflict deathblight upon you, there is a ledge on the right side which lets you cross to the other side. Run across the ledge while hugging the wall and then go inside the opening behind the set of eyes. You can find the incantation in the room directly in front of you.
11nanDragonbolt of Florissaxhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonbolt_of_florissax_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSpecial incantation of the ancient dragon Florissax. Calls down red lightning to bolster the caster and nearby allies. While enrobed with red lightning, all forms of damage negation (including physical) are increased. This also increases damage negation while guarding as an additional effect. There was a time when the priestess never knew love, and thus never used this incantation herself.1nannannannannannanCalls down red lightning to bolster self and nearby alliesnan351052020Dragon CultBuffLocation goes here...
12nanElectrochargehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/electrocharge_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the capital's ancient dragon cult. Calls down lightning to charge the caster's body. While charged, electric shocks will strike the area several times. Charging increases potency. The origin of incantations that bolster the body with lightning, and now a lost art in the Lands Between.1nannannannannannanCalls down lightning to charge body with electricitynan261030028Dragon CultDamageLocation goes here...
13nanBayle's Tyrannyhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bayles_tyranny_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the greatest Dragon Communion incantations. Harnesses the fearsome power of Bayle the Dread. Channels the form of the dread dragon to emit a mighty roar accompanied by a heatwave burst, causing violent eruptions of fire in the area. Even after being consumed, the throbbing heart of Bayle continues to resist its subjugation, never weakening. One day, the fire within will consume the very body and soul of its Communion devourer. One day.1nannannannannannanChannels dread dragon to roar with a heatwave blastnan462004972Dragon CommunionDamageHeart of Bayle can be used to at the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion to trade for Bayle's Flame Lightning or Bayle's Tyranny. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]
14nanBayle's Flame Lightninghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bayles_flame_lightning_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the greatest Dragon Communion incantations. Harnesses the fearsome power of Bayle the Dread. Channels the form of the dread dragon in right arm to smash foes with an exposed talon bone coursing with flame lightning. Even after being consumed, the throbbing heart of Bayle continues to resist its subjugation, never weakening. One day, the fire within will consume the very body and soul of its Communion devourer. One day.1nannannannannannanChannels dread dragon to strike with flame-lightning-infused talon bonenan432005335Dragon CommunionDamageHeart of Bayle can be used to at the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion to trade for Bayle's Flame Lightning or Bayle's Tyranny. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]
15nanGhostflame Breathhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ghostflame_breath_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of Dragon Communion. Transforms caster into a dragon to spew ghostflame breath. Charging extends duration. The land of spiritgraves is home to all manner of dead, and even the corpses of fallen dragons found their way there. Several of them were endowed with such vivacity that even in death, they could not fully die.1nannannannannannanChannels dragon to spew ghostflame breathnan3610231560Dragon CommunionDamageLocation goes here...
16nanRotten Butterflieshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rotten_butterflies_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation used by Romina, Saint of the Bud. Summons a myriad of butterflies while performing a gentle twirl. The butterflies break apart on contact, scattering rot and setting off a chain reaction. The scarlet butterflies are as the Goddess of Rot's wings. Bereft of a master, they were soothed by Romina, who reached out to them.1nannannannannannanSummons countless butterflies to scatter rotnan481033050Servants of RotDamageCan be selected as one of the possible rewards when trading Remembrance of the Saint of the Bud with Enia at the Roundtable Hold.
17nanPest-Thread Spearshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pest-thread_spears_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide.pngnanSkill of the pests known as the Kindred of Rot, now wielded as an incantation. Secrete numerous sticky threads, then twist them into two spears launched frontwards. Charge to enhance potency. The pests are abandoned servants, and it is for this reason that they found a mother in the Saint of the Bud.1nannannannannannanSecrete sticky threads and twist them into two frontward flying spearsnan281026029Servants of RotDamageFrom the Church of the Bud, Main Enterance grace, go North back into the cave and down the stairs, then take a right or left (it doesn't matter) and head behind the stairs, the incantation will be directly behind, guarded by one enemy. [Map Link] [Video Link]
18nanMidra's Flame of Frenzyhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/midras_flame_of_frenzy_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation in praise of Midra, Lord of Frenzied Flame. Summons an apparition of the Lord's head to spew frenzied flame. This incantation can be used while in motion. The apparition will remain for as long as the input is held. The Lord of Frenzied Flame shall take their torment, despair. Their affliction. Every sin, every curse. All melted away. Yet Midra, like others before him, was too weak to become a Lord.1nannannannannannanSummons Lord of Frenzied Flame's head to spew frenzied flamenan222041020Frenzied FlameDamageCan be selected as one of the possible rewards when trading Remembrance of the Lord of Frenzied Flame with Enia at the Roundtable Hold.
19nanDivine Beast Tornadohttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/divine_beast_tornado_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanThe tempest of the Dancing Lion, wielded as an incantation. A whirlwind-like twist of the body summons a storm, launching a tornado forward. Charging enhances potency. The majority of divine beasts were gored and hung upon Messmer's spears, then burned in his flame. Those who witnessed the deed likened it to a funeral pyre for the tower itself.1nannannannannannanSummons a storm that launches a tornado forwardnan241028020--DamageThe Divine Beast Dancing Lion of the North East from the Temple Town Ruins Site of Grace drops this incantation upon defeat. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]
20nanDivine Bird Feathershttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/divine_beast_tornado2_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanA technique of the divine bird warriors, the very first of all horned warriors, wielded as an incantation. Spread the arms wide like wings to release a flurry of feathers. This incantation can be cast while in motion. Hold to continue releasing feathers. The divine bird warriors, and indeed this technique, are said to bear resemblance to the golden Crucible.1nannannannannannanSpreads arms like wings and releases a flurry of feathersnan3102403--DamageLocation goes here...
21nanFire Serpenthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fire_serpent_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Fire Knights under Messmer the Impaler's personal command. Launch a serpentine flame that bends and curls in pursuit of its foe. Charging enhances potency. When the flame they received from Messmer would not find purchase within them, the Fire Knights relied on fire incantations to honor their bond.1nannannannannannanLaunches a threaded serpentine flamenan111016022Messmer FireDamageShadow Keep: From the Storehouse site of grace, find the ladder and climb it up, pass the enemies, and move forward until you reach the balcony. You will find the item there. [Map Link]
22nanRain of Firehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rain_of_fire_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of Salza, sage of the Fire Knights. Summons a cloud of flame overhead that rains fire for a short time. Charging increases potency. Salza's disdain for barbarism never waned, even as he burned more villages and scorched more land than any other.1nannannannannannanRains fire for a short durationnan271052031Messmer FireDamageFrom the West Rampart Site of Grace, take the bridge all the way. Use Torrent to avoid being trapped in the Rain of Fire. Defeat the Fire Knight at the end to obtain this and Salza's Hood. [Map Link]
23nanMessmer's Orbhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/messmers_orb_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanAn incantation of Messmer the Impaler. Summons Messmer's flame to form a giant floating orb. The orb soars toward a foe, crashes into the earth, and explodes after a brief delay. Charging enhances potency. Messmer despised his own fire. Time and time again he hoped to rid himself of it, but ever did it burn.1nannannannannannanShapes Messmer's flame into a giant orb that soars at foenan312060043Messmer FireDamageCan be selected as one of the possible rewards when trading Remembrance of the Impaler with Enia at the Roundtable Hold
24nanWatchful Spirithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/watchful_spirit_incantation_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanAn entreaty received from the Empyrean grandam. Summon a guardian spirit above the caster's head. The spirit never strays far from the caster, conjuring several apparitions before dissipating. "Take vengeance upon Messmer and his lot. They who betrayed us, aye, they who burned us... Let them face in thy wrath their just deserts."1nannannannannannanSummons a guardian spirit above the caster's headnan121026020SpiralDamageGiven by Hornsent Grandam after defeating the Divine Beast Dancing Lion. Talk to her twice with the Divine Beast Head equipped, to receive this incantation. [Map Link]
25nanGolden Arcshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/golden_arcs_sorceries_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSorcery of the inquisitors of the tower, wielded as an incantation of the spiral. A swing of the arm releases a procession of golden arcs. Charging enhances potency. The arcs resemble barbs, a known symbol of coercive questioning.1nannannannannannanReleases a procession of golden arcs with a swing of the armnan121022020SpiralDamageHead southeast of Moorth Ruins. From the Shattered Stone Talisman chest, drop down to the nearest platform and continue descending until you reach the ground where three Inquisitors are situated. Defeat them and enter the small building nearby to find this item inside a chest. [Map Link]
26nanGiant Golden Archttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/giant_golden_arc_sorceries_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSorcery of the inquisitors of the tower, wielded as an incantation of the spiral. A swing of the arm releases a giant golden arc. Charging enhances potency. The arc resembles the barb, a known symbol of coercive questioning.1nannannannannannanReleases a giant golden arc with a swing of the armnan241034020SpiralDamageObtained by looting a chest in the Ruins of Unte. The chest is inside a building in a flower area that is only accessible after using a Hefty Furnace Pot and throwing it at the head of the deactivated Furnace Golem that blocks the entrance so that it moves away. [Elden Ring Map]
27nanSpirahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/spira_sorceries_elden_ring_shadow_of_the_erdtree_dlc_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior sorcery of the tower priests, wielded as an incantation of the spiral. Wrap one's arms together and hold them up to the heavens to summon a spiral of light that erupts at the enemy's feet. Column of light persists for as long as the button is pressed. The spiral is a normalized Crucible current that, one day, will form a column that stretches to the gods.1nannannannannannanSummons a spiral of light that erupts at the enemy's feetnan102048014SpiralDamagePast the impenetrable thorns at the end of Belurat, Tower Settlement. It would be on a small altar that is directly in front of statue. [Map Link]
28nanAgheel's Flamehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/agheels_flame_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior incantation of Dragon Communion.Channels the power of the flying dragon Agheel. Transforms caster into a dragon to spew flaming breath from above.Charging extends duration. This incantation can be used while jumping. The dead gazed at the skies over the lakes of Limgrave, praying that the dragons' flames would burn them to ash.Base GamenannannannannannanSpews flame breath of Agheel from abovenan36 (6)10231560Dragon CommunionDamageCan be purchased at the Dragon Communion Altar at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion in Caelid for 2 Dragon Hearts. Players need to defeat Flying Dragon Agheel in order to unlock this Incantation.
29nanAncient Dragons' Lightning Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ancient_dragons_ lightning_spear_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanA secret incantation of the capital's ancient dragon cult. Creates a spear of red lightning and stabs it into the ground from above. On impact, the spear will burst into trails of lightning covering the area. Spoken of in legend, red lightning is the weapon wielded by the ancient dragons. Note:Base GamenannannannannannanStabs with red lightning spear from abovenan251032041Dragon CultDamagePurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either the Ancient Dragon Prayerbook for 8,500 Runes.
30nanAncient Dragons' Lightning Strikehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ancient_dragons_ lightning_strike_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanA secret incantation of the capital's ancient dragon cult. Summons a red bolt of lightning that scatters and spreads around the surrounding area. Charging enhances the range of the lightning bolt. Spoken of in legend, red lightning is the weapon wielded by the ancient dragons.Base GamenannannannannannanSummons red lightning that spreads from impactnan361026031Dragon CultDamagePurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either the Ancient Dragon Prayerbook for 10,000 Runes.
31nanAspects of the Crucible: Breathhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/aspect_of_the_crucible_breath_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the ancient Erdtree incantations. Creates a throat pouch on the caster's neck, allowing them to spew fiery breath while walking. Charging increases duration of the breath. This is a manifestation of the Erdtree's primal vital energies - an Aspects of the primordial crucible, where all life was once blended together.Base GamenannannannannannanCreates throat pouch to spew fire while walkingnan28 (4)1027040Erdtree [1][2]DamageObtained from Tanith's Crucible Knight invasion after attacking Tanith inside Rykard's boss room.
32nanAspects of the Crucible: Hornshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/aspect_crucible_horns.pngnanOne of the ancient Erdtree incantations. Creates a mighty horn on the caster's shoulder to gore foes from a low stance. Charging allows the caster to barrel into foes before delivering the final attack. This is a manifestation of the Erdtree's primal vital energies - an aspect of the primordial crucible, where all life was once blended together. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanCreates shoulder horn to gore foes form low stancenan181027049Erdtree [1][2]DamageObtained by defeating Crucible Knight in Stormveil Castle. To reach the Knight you must drop down a series of ledges to the left, outside of Rampart Tower grace.
33nanAspects of the Crucible: Tailhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/aspects_of_the_crucible_tail_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the ancient Erdtree incantations. Creates a supple tail that sweeps through foes before the caster.Charging enhances potency.
