This is a manifestation of the Erdtree's primal vital energies - anaspect of the primordial crucible, where all life was once blendedtogether. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanCreates supple tail to sweep area before casternan201027042Erdtree [1][2]DamageObtained by defeating Crucible Knight at the Stormhill Evergaol
34nanAssassin's Approachhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/assassins_approach_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Two Fingers' servants, who once served as the assassins of the Roundtable Hold. Completely silences the footsteps of the caster. Additionally, reduces fall damage and the sound produced by falling. This incantation can be cast while in motion or crouching. The assassins were charged with eliminating Tarnished who had strayed from guidance. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanSilences footsteps, reduces fall damage/ soundnan151010013Two FingersBuffStarting Incantation for the Confessor ClassPurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either the Assassin's Prayerbook for 2,000 Runes.
35nanBarrier of Goldhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/barrier_of_gold_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of Erdtree Worship. Greatly increases magic damage negation for the caster and nearby allies. Hold to continue praying and delay activation. This incantation was used by the champions of the Erdtree in the First and the Second Liurnian Wars, during which the red-haired Radagon joined the heroes' ranksBase GamenannannannannannanGreatly increases magic damage negation for self & alliesnan301024013ErdtreeBuffDropped by an invisible Teardrop Scarab in Leyndell, Royal Capital, near where you fight Godfrey, First Elden Lord (Golden Shade). Can be found after heading down the stairs and taking the elevator, right after the fight with Godfrey, First Elden Lord. Elden Ring Interactive Map Link
36nanBeast Clawhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/beast_claw_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman. Creates beast claws that rend the land with shockwaves.Charging enhances potency. This incantation represents the fury of Gurranq, his bestial nature returned, as much as it does his restless agitation. Notes:Base GamenannannannannannanCreates claws that tear through the land.nan10108027BestialDamageBestial Sanctum: Reward from Gurranq, Beast Clergyman after giving him the fifth Deathroot. Map Link.
37nanBestial Constitutionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bestial_constitution_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman. Fills the body with bestial vigor, alleviating buildup of frost and blood loss. Having gained intelligence, the beasts must have felt how their wildness slipped away as civilization took hold.Base GamenannannannannannanAlleviates blood loss and frost buildupnan10109010BestialHealingFound by killing a golden scarab along the cliffside North East of the Minor Erdtree in Caelid, close to the bridge to the Bestial Sanctum.
38nanBestial Slinghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bestial_sling_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman.Swiftly flings a number of sharp rock shards.This incantation can be cast without delay after performing another action. It is said that in the time before the Erdtree, stones were the firstweapons of the beasts who had gained intelligence. deals x% of your incant scaling in damage (INFORMATION NEEDED)Base GamenannannannannannanSwiftly flings numerous sharp rock shardsnan71010019BestialDamageBestial Sanctum: Reward from Gurranq, Beast Clergyman after giving him the first Deathroot.
39nanBestial Vitalityhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bestial_vitality_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman. Fills the body with bestial vigor, restoring HP over a period of time. Having gained intelligence, the beasts must have felt how their wildness slipped away as civilization took hold. costBase GamenannannannannannanHeals HP over a period of timenan181012010BestialBuffBestial Sanctum: Reward from Gurranq, Beast Clergyman after giving him the third Deathroot
40nanBlack Bladehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black_blade_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanPower gleaned from the remembrance of Maliketh. Caster creates an illusory black blade, then leaps forward to deliver a spinning slash that emits a wave of light. This can be followed up with one additional attack. This blade was once imbued with Destined Death. In addition to dealing damage, it reduces foes' maximum HP and continues to sap their current HP for a very short time.Base GamenannannannannannanBlack blade spinning slash that emits wave of lightnan262046044ErdtreeDamageTrade Remembrance of the Black Blade with Enia at Roundtable Hold.
41nanBlack Flamehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black_flame_incantation_spell_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanA black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles. Throws a ball of raging black fire. Charging enhances potency and causes the fireball to explode. Black flame is weighty. After dealing damage it continues to sap foes' HP for a very short time. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanThrows a ball of raging black firenan181020025Godskin ApostleDamageThis incantation is unlocked for purchase after giving a Godskin Prayerbook to Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows for 7,500 Runes.
42nanBlack Flame Bladehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black_flame_blade_incantation_spell_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanA black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles. Engulfs armament held in the right hand with black flame. This incantation can be cast without delay after performing another action. Black flame is weighty. After dealing damage it continues to sap foes' HP for a very short time.Base GamenannannannannannanEnchants right-hand armament with black flamenan151017010Godskin ApostleBuffThis incantation is unlocked for purchase after giving a Godskin Prayerbook to Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows for 6,00 Runes.
43nanBlack Flame Ritualhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black_flame_ritual_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles. Summons a circle of black flame pillars around the caster. Charging increases the size of the circle. The Gloam-Eyed Queen led the apostles. It is said that she was an Empyrean chosen by the Fingers.Base GamenannannannannannanSummons circle of black flame pillars around caster.nan301042039Godskin ApostleDamageDropped by Godskin Apostle and Godskin Noble boss fight in Spiritcaller's Cave.
44nanBlack Flame's Protectionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/black_flames_protection_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanA black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles. Summons black fire within, increasing physical damage negation. However, sacred flasks and other such forms of HP restoration are impaired. The Apostles were all embraced by the Gloam-Eyed Queen, and the black flame was their armor within.Base GamenannannannannannanIncreases physical damage negationnan301030013Godskin ApostleBuffReceived from Gideon Ofnir, after reaching Miquella's Haligtree.Purchasable at Twin Maiden Husks after defeating Maliketh, the Black Blade.
45nanBlessing of the Erdtreehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/blessing_of_the_erdtree_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the ancient Erdtree incantations Grants a greater blessing to the caster and nearby allies, gradually restoring a large amount of HP.Hold to continue praying and delay activation. The Erdtree once flourished with abundance- yet it was only for a fleeting moment. Such is the course of all life.Base GamenannannannannannanGrants greater blessing to self and nearby alliesnan601038050ErdtreeBuffFound at Queens Bedchamber in Leyndell Royal Capital. [Map Link]
46nanBlessing's Boonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/blessings_boon_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the ancient Erdtree incantations. Grants a blessing to the caster and nearby allies, gradually restoring HP.Hold to continue praying and delay activation. Blessings once fell like tears from the Erdtree, and this incantation is but a lingering remnant of their power.Base GamenannannannannannanGrants blessing to self and nearby alliesnan301024030ErdtreeBuffCan be purchased from Miriel, Pastor of Vows at the Church of Vows for 4,000 Runes.
47nanBloodboonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodboon_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSacred incantation of Mohg, Lord of Blood. Thrust arm into the body of the Formless Mother, then scatter the bloodflame to set the area ablaze. This incantation can be cast while in motion. The mother of truth craves wounds. When Mohg stood before her, deep underground, his accursed blood erupted with fire, and besotted with the defilement that he was born into. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanScatters bloodflame before caster to set area aflame.nan1310141734BloodDamageTrade Remembrance of the Blood Lord with Enia at Roundtable Hold.
48nanBloodflame Bladehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodflame_blade_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanA Blood Oath incantation, granted by the Lord of Blood. Engulfs armament held in the right hand with bloodflame.This incantation can be cast while in motion. After dealing damage, bloodflame continues to build up onset of blood loss for a very short time.Base GamenannannannannannanEnchants right-hand armament with bloodflamenan2010121010BloodBuffLiurnia of the Lakes: Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab in the marshes near the Rose Church, southwest of the lake. [Map Link] (Note that there is another scarab in this area that does not drop anything)
49nanBloodflame Talonshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/bloodflame_talons_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanA Blood Oath incantation, granted by the Lord of Blood. Creates bloodflame lacerations before the caster, which explode in an instant. This incantation can be cast repeatedly. After dealing damage, bloodflame continues to build up onset of blood loss for a very short time. will NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanCreates bloodflame lacerations that then explodenan1210131521BloodBuffDropped by Mohg. the Omen in Forsaken Depths under the Capital.
50nanBorealis's Misthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/borealiss_mist_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior incantation of Dragon Communion. Channels the power of Borealis, the Freezing Fog. Transforms caster into a dragon to spew icy breath from above. Charging extends the duration. This incantation can be cast while jumping. The ice dragons were once lords of the mountaintops long ago, until they were defeated by the Fire Giants and chased from the peak.Base GamenannannannannannanSpews icy breath of Borealis from abovenan48 (6)10231560Dragon CommunionDamageCan be purchased at the Dragon Communion Altar at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion. Players need to defeat Borealis the Freezing Fog in order to unlock this Incantation.
51nanBurn, O Flame!http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/burn_o_flame_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations that draws directly from the power of the Fire Giants. Raises a series of flame pillars around the caster. Charging further increases the number of flame pillars. The Fire Giants borrowed from the power of a fell god, and still they were defeated. Yet their failure released them from their solitary curse: to serve as keepers of the Flame for eternity. Note:Base GamenannannannannannanRaises a series of flame pillars around casternan261027036Fire GiantDamageTrade Remembrance of the Fire Giant with Enia at Roundtable Hold.
52nanCatch Flamehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/catch_flame_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation originating from a sinister prophecy. Momentarily sparks flame from the caster's hand. This incantation can be cast without delay after performing another action. The flame of ruin is anathema to the Erdtree. But prophets sometimes glimpse it within the faith all the same. Sadly when this occurs their sole reward is banishment.Base GamenannannannannannanMomentarily sparks flame from handnan10108017Fire MonkDamageStarting equipment for the Prophet ClassPurchase from Brother Corhyn.
53nanCure Poisonhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/cure_poison_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Two Fingers' faithful. Alleviates poison buildup and cures poison. This incantation can be cast while in motion. The Two Fingers has high hopes for the Tarnished; that even if they should be wounded, even should they fall, they will continue to fight for their duty.Base GamenannannannannannanCures poison ailment and reduces poison build-up.nan71010010Two FingersHealingSold by Brother Corhyn at the Roundtable Hold for 1,000 Runes.
54nanDarknesshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/darkness_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Two Fingers' servants, who once served as the assassins of the Roundtable Hold. Creates a veil of darkness that conceals the caster.This incantation can be cast while in motion or crouching. The assassins were themselves once Tarnished who had strayed from guidance, and they pursued their duty in the darkness that is without grace. Note:Base GamenannannannannannanCreates area of darkness that conceals casternan241018024Two FingersBuffPurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either the Assassin's Prayerbook for 3,500 Runes.
55nanDeath Lightninghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/death_lightning_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation that channels the power of the ancient dragon Fortissax, now corrupted by Death. Strikes surroundings with a storm of Death lightning. Inflicts Death blight upon foes. Charging extends duration of the storm. It is said that this golden lightning was wielded by Godwyn, who befriended Fortissax. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanStrikes surroundings with storm of death lightningnan282047032Dragon CultDamageTrade Remembrance of the Lichdragon with Enia at Roundtable Hold.
56nanDiscus of Lighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/discus_of_light_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. Produces a ring of light and fires it forwards. The ring of light returns to a position close to the caster before disappearing. This incantation can be cast repeatedly. A gift from the young Miquella to his father, Radagon. Note: Updated to patch 1.07. See Patch Notes for details. used on larger enemies used while on horsebackBase GamenannannannannannanFires ring of light before the casternan311313020Golden OrderDamagePurchase from Brother Corhyn for 11,000 Runes after he moves to Goldmask's location at Altus Plateau.
57nanDivine Fortificationhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/divine_fortification_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Two Fingers' faithful. Increases holy damage negation.This incantation can be cast while in motion. Follow the path that has been set for you, and you will make enemies of all others: the monks, the sorcerers, the ancient dragon knights and the scions of gold. Heed me the Lands Between offers no welcome to the Tarnished.Base GamenannannannannannanIncreases holy damage negationnan201010013Two FingersBuffWeeping Peninsula: Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab atop a collapsed stone structure overgrown with yellow moss. This structure is found a short distance southwest of the Tombsward Ruins.
58nanDragonbolt Blessinghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonbolt_blessing_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior incantation of the capital's ancient dragon cult. Summons lightning to bolster the caster's body. Attacks become easier to deflect and resistance to all ailments is increased. However, lightning damage negation will be reduced. Only those loved by dragons can survive the ordeal of cladding their bodies in lightning.Base GamenannannannannannanBolsters caster's body with lightningnan201021020Dragon CultBuffFound at Stormcaller Church, inside a chest that's against a wall. [Map Link]
59nanDragonclawhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonclaw_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of Dragon Communion. Transforms caster into a dragon to tear through foes with dragon claws. Allows one follow-up attack. Incantation of those who have hunted dragons and feasted upon their hearts. This is a pure and overwhelming power.Base GamenannannannannannanChannels dragon to rend foes with dragon clawsnan2410171350Dragon CommunionDamageFound on the island with the Church of Dragon Communion. You need 1 Dragon Heart in order to acquire it.
60nanDragonfirehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonfire_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of Dragon Communion. Transforms caster into a dragon to spew flaming breath. Charging extends duration. Incantation of those who have hunted dragons and feasted upon their hearts. Theirs is a pure and overwhelming power.Base GamenannannannannannanChannels dragon to spew flame breathnan28 (4)10151240Dragon CommunionDamageFound on the island with the Church of Dragon Communion. You need 1 Dragon Heart in order to acquire it.
61nanDragonicehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonice_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of Dragon Communion. Transforms caster into a dragon to spew icy breath.Charging extends duration. Those extraordinary individuals who perpetuate DragonCommunion are called the dragon-hearted.Base GamenannannannannannanChannels dragon to spew icy breathnan36 (4)10151248Dragon CommunionDamageCan be purchased at the Dragon Communion Altar at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion for 1 Dragon Heart.
62nanDragonmawhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/dragonmaw_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of Dragon Communion. Transforms caster into a dragon to bite enemies before them. Incantations of those who have hunted dragons and feasted upon their hearts. Theirs is a pure and overwhelming power. Note: eitherBase GamenannannannannannanChannels dragon to bite foes before casternan3410241672Dragon CommunionDamageFound on the island with the Church of Dragon Communion. You need 1 Dragon Heart in order to acquire it. Map Link.Can be purchased at the Dragon Communion Altar at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion for 1 Dragon Heart.
63nanEkzykes's Decayhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/ekzykess_decay_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior incantation of Dragon Communion.Channels the power of Ekzykes, the Decaying. Transforms caster into a dragon to spew scarlet rot breath from above.Charging extends duration. This incantation can be cast while jumping. Ekzykes, Dragon Communion Revenger, did not forget his hatred even as he succumbed to the scarlet rot. NOTEBase GamenannannannannannanSpews scarlet rot breath of Ekzykes from abovenan48 (6)10231560Dragon CommunionDamageCan be purchased at the Dragon Communion Altar at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion for 2 Dragon Hearts.
64nanElden Starshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/elden_stars_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanThis legendary incantation is the most ancient of those that derive from the Erdtree. Creates a stream of golden shooting stars that assail the area. It is said that long ago, the Greater Will sent a golden star bearing a beast into the Lands Between, which would later become the Elden Ring. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanCreates a steam of golden shooting stars that assail the area.nan412050048ErdtreeDamageFrom the Great Waterfall Crest until you find a pack of Giant Ants. Follow the roots and head inside the cave, you'll find Elden Stars inside.
65nanElectrify Armamenthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/electrify_armament_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the capital's ancient dragon cult. Enchants armament held in the right hand with lightning-affinity attacks. Long ago, Godwyn the Golden defeated the ancient dragon Fortissax, and befriended his fallen foe an event that gave rise to the ancient dragon cult in the capital.Base GamenannannannannannanEnchants right-hand armament with lightning damagenan271015010Dragon CultBuffPurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either the Dragon Cult Prayerbook for 4,000 Runes.
66nanErdtree Healhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/erdtree_heal_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the ancient Erdtree incantations. Heals a vast amount of HP for the caster and nearby allies. Hold to continue praying and delay activation. The Erdtree once flourished with abundance - yet it was only for a fleeting moment. Such is the course of all life.Base GamenannannannannannanVastly heals HP for self and nearby alliesnan651042050ErdtreeHealingCan be found in Queen's Bedchamber in Leyndell, Ashen Capital
67nanFire's Deadly Sinhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fires_ deadly_sin_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation originating from a deeply ominous prophecy. Sets both the caster and the surrounding area ablaze with raging flames. The caster's body will remain engulfed in flame for a while, burning them and any who draw near. Charging enhances potency. The prophet despaired, looking up at the Erdtree, for soon the kindling would burst into flame, bringing ruin. "The burning of the Erdtree is the first cardinal sin. That is not the domain of mere men."Base GamenannannannannannanSets area and self ablaze with raging flamesnan261019028-DamageReward from completing the "Flightless Bird" painting puzzle.
68nanFlame Fortificationhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flame_fortification_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Two Fingers' faithful. Increases fire damage negation. This incantation can be cast while in motion. Follow the path that has been set for you, and you will make enemies of all others: the monks, the sorcerers, the ancient dragon knights, and the scions of gold. Heed me the Lands Between offers no welcome to the Tarnished.Base GamenannannannannannanIncreases fire damage negationnan201010013Two FingersBuffPurchase from Brother Corhyn for 3,000 Runes.
69nanFlame Slinghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/feast_upon_flame_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantiation originating from a sinister prophecy. Throws a ball of raging fire. Charging enhances potency and causes the ball of fire to explode. The flame of ruin is anathema to the Erdtree. But prophets sometimes glimpse it within the faith all the same. Sadly when this occurs their sole reward is banishment. Note:Base GamenannannannannannanThrows balls of raging firenan111010022Fire MonkDamageSold by Brother Corhyn at the Roundtable Hold for 800 Runes.
70nanFlame of the Fell Godhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flame_of_the_fell _god_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanThis legendary incantation is one of several that draws directlyfrom the power of the Fire Giants.Releases a ball of raging fire said to be inhabited by a fell god. Thefireball floats toward enemies and explodes, setting the areaablaze.Arghanthy, the chief guardian of the Flame, had kept this incantation a well-kept secret until it was stolen by Adan. The fell god still lurks within the Fire Giants. Note:Base GamenannannannannannanSummons raging fireball that explodes and sets the area ablazenan342041042Fire GiantDamageLiurnia of the Lakes: Dropped by Adan, Thief of Fire upon defeat. [Map Link]
71nanFlame, Cleanse Mehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flame_cleanse_me_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the Fire Monks.Creates a fire within that burns away toxins.Alleviates poison and scarlet rot buildup and cures these ailments.This incantation leaves the caster with subtle burns - a reminderthat they must fear the flame.Base GamenannannannannannanAlleviates buildup and cures both poison and scarlet rotnan141012010Fire MonkHealingHeld by one of the corpses at the Fire Monk camp.
72nanFlame, Fall Upon Themhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flame_fall_upon_them_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations that draws directly from the power of the Fire Giants. Hurls several balls of fire at once. Charging enhances potency and causes the balls offire to explode. There is no record of this incantation in common prayerbooks. Only a select few prelates know of its existence. Notes:Base GamenannannannannannanHurls several balls of fire at oncenan161028040Fire GiantDamagePurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving them the Giant's Prayerbook for 10,000 Runes.
73nanFlame, Grant me Strengthhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flame_grant_me strength_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior incantation of the Fire Monks. Creates an invigorating fire within that enhances physical and fire-affinity attack power. This incantation does not burn the caster, and so it is considered forbidden by the guardians of the Flame.Base GamenannannannannannanRaises physical and fire-affinity attack powernan281015016Fire MonkBuffFound behind Fort Gael, on a body between two flame carts
74nanFlame, Protect Mehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/flame_protect_me_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanThe most ancient of the Fire Monks' incantations. Creates a fire within that greatly increases fire damage negation. It is said that this incantation was used during the War against the Giants long ago, during which it protected the champions of the Erdtree.Base GamenannannannannannanGreatly increases fire damage negationnan301024020Fire MonkBuffFound Behind the double Stone-Key fog door in Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave
75nanFortissax's Lightning Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/fortissaxs_lightning_spear_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation that channels the power of the ancient dragon Fortissax. creates two spears of red lightning and stabs them into the ground from above, one after another. On impact, each spear will burst into trails of lightning covering the area. During the War of the Anicent Dragons, these twin red lightning stakes were the hallmark of the ancient dragon who was once called the mightiest boulderstone. Notes:Base GamenannannannannannanStabs from above with two red lightning spears in tandemnan351046052Dragon CultDamageTrade Remembrance of the Lichdragon with Enia at Roundtable Hold.
76nanFrenzied Bursthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frenzied_burst_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantations originating from the maddening Three Fingers. Releases concentrated blasts of the yellow flame of frenzy from the caster's eyes. Charging enhances potency, enabling the blasts to penetrate the enemy's guard. In times past, every single person who attempted to control the flame of frenzy succumbed to madness after a desperate internal struggle. This incantation is testament to a meager victory. Note:Base GamenannannannannannanEmits concentrated blast of yellow flame of frenzy from eyesnan241022033Frenzied FlameDamageDropped by a Teardrop Scarab in the Liurnia of the Lakes region. [Map Link]
77nanFrozen Lightning Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/frozen_lightning_spear_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation that channels the power of the Dragonkin Soldiers.Creates a spear of ice lightning and stabs it into the ground fromabove. On impact, the spear will burst into trails of lightning advancing forwards.The Dragonkin were born in the Eternal City, where they knewno true sky, nor true lightning. Instead, ice lightning was theirweapon. Note:Base GamenannannannannannanStabs with ice lightning spear from abovenan291034045Dragon CultDamageDropped by Dragonkin Soldier of Nokstella
78nanGiantsflame Take Theehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/giantsflame_take_thee_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations that draws directly from the power of the Fire Giants. Hurls a massive ball of raging fire. Charging enhances potency and causes the ball of fire to explode. There is no record of this incantation in common prayerbooks. Only a select few prelates know of its existence. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanHurls massive ball of raging firenan302030043Fire GiantDamagePurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving them the Giant's Prayerbook for 13,000 Runes.
79nanGlintstone Breathhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/glintstone_breath_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of Dragon Communion. Transforms caster into a dragon to spew magic breath.Charging extends duration. Those extraordinary individuals who perpetuate DragonCommunion are called the dragon-hearted.Base GamenannannannannannanChannels dragon to spew magic breathnan28 (4)10151240Dragon CommunionDamageCan be purchased at the Dragon Communion Altar at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion for 1 Dragon Heart
80nanGolden Lightning Fortificationhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/golden_lightning_fortification_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200.pngnanAn incantation of Erdtree Worship. Greatly increases lightning damage negation for the caster and nearby allies. Hold to continue praying, delaying the effect. This incantation was used by the knights of the Erdtree during the assault by the great ancient dragon Gransax, and the bitter War of the Ancient Dragons that followed.Base GamenannannannannannanGreatly increases lightning damage negation for self and alliesnan301024020ErdtreeBuffCrumbling Farum Azula: Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab found by the cliffs south of the fountain plaza. This area is located in the upper level after ascending the Dragon Temple Lift.
81nanGolden Vowhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/golden_vow_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanAn incantation of Erdtree Worship. Increases attack power and defense for the caster and nearby allies. Hold to continue praying and delay activation. This incantation has been taught to knights of the royal capital for generations, and knights sent on distant expeditions lean on it as a source of courage.Base GamenannannannannannanIncreases attack and defense for self and alliesnan471025050ErdtreeBuffCorpse-Stench Shack, in Mt Gelmir
82nanGreat Healhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/great_heal_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior incantation of the Two Fingers' faithful. Greatly heals HP for the caster and nearby allies. Hold to continue praying and delay activation. The Two Fingers has high hopes for the Tarnished; that even if they should be wounded, even should they fall, they will continue to fight for their duty.Base GamenannannannannannanGreatly Heals HP for self and nearby alliesnan451015040Two FingersHealingSold by Brother Corhyn for 9,000 Runes after he moves to Altus Plateau.
83nanGreyoll's Roarhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/greyolls_roar_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior incantation of Dragon Communion.Channels the power of Greyoll, the Elder Dragon.An incantation of legendary status. Transforms caster into a dragon to emit a terrible roar, reducing the attack power and defense of nearby enemies. Greyoll was the mother of all dragons, dwarfing all who stood before her like a looming mountain.Base GamenannannannannannanEmits the roar of Elder Dragon Greyollnan5020281780Dragon CommunionDamageCan be purchased at the Dragon Communion Altar at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion for Dragon Heart. You need to defeat Greyoll in order to unlock this Incantation.
84nanGurranq's Beast Clawhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/gurrangs_beast_claw_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior incantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman. Creates beast claws that rend surroundings with shockwaves. Long ago, Gurranq was a beast of such terrifying ferocity that his former name meant "Death of the Demigods." Notes:Base GamenannannannannannanCreates beast claws to rend surroundings with shockwavesnan211015042BestialDamageBestial Sanctum: Reward from Gurranq, Beast Clergyman after giving him the eighth Deathroot.
85nanHealhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/heal_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Two Fingers' faithful. Heals HP for the caster and nearby allies.Hold to continue praying and delay activation. The Two Fingers has high hopes for the Tarnished; that even if they should be wounded, even should they fall, they will continue to fight for their duty.Base GamenannannannannannanHeals HP for you and nearby allies.nan321012035Two FingersHealingStarting equipment for the Prophet ClassPurchase from Brother Corhyn at Roundtable Hold for 1,500 Runes.
86nanHoned Bolthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/honedbolt_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the capital's ancient dragon cult. Summons a bolt of lightning to strike foes from above.This incantation can be cast repeatedly. Long ago, Godwyn the Golden defeated the ancient dragon Fortissax, and befriended his fallen foe an event that gave rise to the ancient dragon cult in the capital.Base GamenannannannannannanStrikes foe with lightning bolt from abovenan121024029Dragon CultDamagePurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either the Dragon Cult Prayerbook for 7,000 Runes.
87nanHowl of Shabririhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/howl_of_shabriri_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation originating from the maddening Three Fingers. Releases a maddening shriek that causes madness buildup in foes nearby. This incantation also causes madness buildup in the caster and makes enemies more likely to target them. It is said that the sickness of the flame of frenzy began with Shabriri, the most reviled man in all history.Base GamenannannannannannanShrieks, building up madness in nearby foesnan211033038Frenzied FlameDamageA stone tower named Frenzy-Flaming Tower between the Great Lift of Dectus and the Frenzied Flame Village. [Map Link]
88nanImmutable Shieldhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/immutable_shield_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. Enchants shield held in the left hand with the light of regression, increasing all forms of non-physical damage negation and ailment resistance. Two concepts form the basis for Golden Order fundamentalism. One is the law of regression, to which this incantation relates.Base GamenannannannannannanIncreases left-hand shield's affinity/ailment resistancenan1511919010Golden OrderBuffPurchasable from Brother Corhyn as part of his quest to the west of the Erdtree Sanctuary at the Colosseum overlooking Leyndell for 13,000 Runes.
89nanInescapable Frenzyhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/inescapable_frenzy_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation originating from the maddening Three Fingers. Causes the yellow flame of frenzy to blaze from the caster's eyes. The caster then latches onto foes, spreading the madness. This incantation also causes buildup of madness in the caster, and is only effective against Tarnished. To gaze into one another's eyes is truly the most intimate form of human contact. Note: Note: Note:Base GamenannannannannannanLatches onto foes to spread madnessnan321021031Frenzied FlameDamageLocated in Subterranean Shunning-Grounds at Cathedral of the Forsaken Site of Grace just after Mohg, the Omen boss fight; behind the altar in the boss is a hidden path. At the end of the hidden path are a series of drops, and Inescapable Frenzy is towards the very bottom path.
90nanLansseax's Glaivehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lansseaxs_glaive_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation that channels the power of the ancient dragon Lansseax. Creates a red-lightning glaive and sweeps the area from above.This attack unleashes trails of lightning. Lansseax was the sister of Fortissax. It is said that she took the form of a human to commune with the knights as a priestess of the ancient dragon cult. Note:Base GamenannannannannannanSweeps from above with red lightning glaivenan221040055Dragon CultDamageDropped by Ancient Dragon Lansseax
91nanLaw of Causalityhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/law_of_causality_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. One of the key fundamentals. Manifests a small ring of causality within that allows the caster to automatically retaliate upon receiving a certain number of blows. The fundamentalists describe the Golden Order through the powers of regression and causality. Causality is the pull between meanings; that which links all things in a chain of relation . NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanRetaliates upon receiving a number of blowsnan221290020Golden OrderBuffGiven by Gideon Ofnir after beating Mohg, Lord of Blood and asking about the cocoon in the boss arena.Purchasable at Twin Maiden Husks after defeating Maliketh, the Black Blade.
92nanLaw of Regressionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/law_of_regression_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Golden Order fundamentalists.One of the key fundamentals. Heals all negative statuses, dispels special effects, and reveals mimicry in all its forms. The fundamentalists describe the Golden Order through the powers of regression and causality. Regression is the pull of meaning; that all things yearn eternally to converge. ,Base GamenannannannannannanHeals all ailments and dispels all special effectsnan551370050Golden OrderHealingPurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either the Golden Order Principia for 10,000 Runes.
93nanLightning Fortificationhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lightning_fortification_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Two Fingers' faithful. Increases lightning damage negation. This incantation can be cast while in motion. Follow the path that has been set for you, and you will make enemies of all others: the monks, the sorcerers, the ancient dragon knights, and the scions of gold. Heed me the Lands Between offers no welcome to the Tarnished.Base GamenannannannannannanIncrease lightning damage negationnan201010013Two FingersBuffSold by Brother Corhyn for 7,500 Runes after he moves to Altus Plateau.
94nanLightning Spearhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lightning_spear_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the capital's ancient dragon cult. Summons a lightning spear and hurls it before the caster.Charging causes a lightning bolt to strike the point of impact.Long ago, Godwyn the Golden defeated the ancient dragon Fortissax, and befriended his fallen foe an event that gave rise to the ancient dragon cult in the capital. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanHurls lightning spear before casternan181017028Dragon CultDamagePurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either the Dragon Cult Prayerbook for 6,000 Runes.
95nanLightning Strikehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lightning_strike_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the capital's ancient dragon cult. Summons a bolt of lightning that scatters and spreads around the surrounding area.This incantation can be cast repeatedly. Ancestors of the modern dragons, the ancient dragons had scales of Gravel Stone and wielded lightning as their weapon. It is said that they once attacked Leyndell, the Royal Capital. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanSummons lightning bolt that spreads from impactnan191028037Dragon CultDamageWeeping Peninsula: Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab
96nanLitany of Proper Deathhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/litany_of_proper_death_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. Used by hunters of Those Who Live in Death. Creates an image of Order, dealing holy damage to nearby foes. This incantation is especially damaging to Those Who Live in Death. Any felled by this incantation cannot be revived. The role of the hunters is to stamp out defiled reason all for the perfection of the Golden Order.Base GamenannannannannannanCreates image of Order to deal holy damagenan1711717028Golden OrderDamageCan be purchased from D, Hunter of The Dead for 2,500 RunesCan be purchased from Twin Maiden Husks at the Roundtable Hold after giving them D's Bell Bearing
97nanLord's Aidhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lord's_aid_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation bestowed by the Two Fingers upon the Tarnished deemed worthy of becoming a lord. Alleviates buildup of poison, blood loss, and sleep for the caster and nearby allies. Additionally, cures poison. Hold to continue praying and delay activation.Base GamenannannannannannanAlleviates poison/ blood loss/ sleep buildup for self/ alliesnan121012010Two FingersHealingPurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either the Two Fingers' Prayerbook for 2,500 Runes.
98nanLord's Divine Fortificationhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lords_divine_fortification_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation taught to Gideon the All-Knowing by the Two Fingers. Greatly increases holy damage negation for the caster and nearby allies. Hold to continue praying and delay activation. Gideon gained true knowledge after his long exchange with the Two Fingers - discovering all had been broken long ago; that the trembling fingers, bent with age, and the Erdtree itself, were no exception.Base GamenannannannannannanGreatly increases holy damage negation incl. alliesnan301027020Two FingersBuffReceived from Gideon Ofnir after defeating Malenia, Blade of Miquella.Purchasable at Twin Maiden Husks after defeating Maliketh, the Black Blade.
99nanLord's Healhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/lords_heal_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation bestowed by the Two Fingers upon the Tarnished deemed worthy of becoming a lord. Heals a massive amount of HP for the caster and nearby allies. Hold to continue praying and delay activation. Tarnished - O, Tarnished! Seek the Erdtree and stand before Marika, its Queen. Become the Elden Lord!Base GamenannannannannannanMassively heals HP for self and nearby alliesnan551020045Two FingersHealingPurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either the Two Fingers' Prayerbook for 8,000 Runes.
100nanMagic Fortificationhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/magic_fortification_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Two Fingers' faithful. Follow the path that has been set for you, and you will make enemies of all others: the monks, the sorcerers, the ancient dragon knights, and the scions of gold. Heed me the Lands Between offers no welcome to the Tarnished.Base GamenannannannannannanIncreases magic damage negationnan201010013Two FingersBuffCan be purchased from Brother Corhyn for 3,500 Runes.
101nanMagma Breathhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/magma_breath_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of Dragon Communion. Transforms caster into a wyrm to spew magma breath. Allows one follow-up attack. Those who have performed the Dragon Communion will find their humanity slowly slipping away. Once they fully succumb to their fate, they are left no more than wyrms that crawl the earth.Base GamenannannannannannanChannels wyrm to spew magma breathnan3010141040Dragon CommunionDamageCan be purchased at the Dragon Communion Altar at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion for 1 Dragon Heart after killing the Magma Wyrm located southwest of the Seethewater Terminus grace in Mt. Gelmir.
102nanNoble Presencehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/noble_presence_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanAncient power of the Godskin Nobles. Thrust out belly with gusto to produce a shockwave that knocks back nearby foes. Charging enhances potency, knocking enemies into the air. Once a sign of the gods' wrath, this incantation became a trophy of the Nobles' god hunt.Base GamenannannannannannanThrust out belly with gusto to unleash repelling shockwavenan201026028Godskin ApostleDamageAcquired from defeating the Godskin Noble at the Volcano Manor
103nanO, Flame!http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/o_flame_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Fire Monks. Momentarily sparks roaring flame from the caster's hand.Charging enhances potency. The Giants' Flame still smolders upon the distant northernmountaintop, and the Fire Monks are its guardians.Base GamenannannannannannanMomentarily sparks roaring flame from handnan161016024Fire MonkDamagePurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving the Fire Monks' Prayerbook for 6,000 Runes.
104nanOrder Healinghttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/order_healing_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. Used by hunters of Those Who Live in Death. Alleviates death blight buildup. The noble Goldmask lamented what had become of the hunters. How easy it is for learning and learnedness to be reduced to the ravings of fanatics; all the good and the great wanted, in their foolishness, was an absolute evil to contend with. Does such a notion exist in the fundamentals of Order?Base GamenannannannannannanAlleviates death blight buildupnan1511111010Golden OrderHealingDropped by a Teardrop Scarab found in the Siofra Aqueduct.
105nanOrder's Bladehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/orders_blade_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. Used by hunters of Those Who Live in Death. Enchants armament held in the right hand with holy-affinity attacks. This incantation is especially damaging to Those Who Live in Death. Any felled by this incantation cannot be revived. The role of the hunters is to stamp out defiled reason - all for the perfection of the Golden Order.Base GamenannannannannannanEnchants right-hand armament with holy damagenan2211313010Golden OrderBuffCan be purchased from D, Hunter of The Dead for 3,000 Runes.Can be purchased from Twin Maiden Husks at the Roundtable Hold after giving them D's Bell Bearing
106nanPest Threadshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/pest_threads_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the servants of rot. Secretes countless sticky threads, launching them forwards. A technique of the pale pests who crawl through the lands afflicted by scarlet rot; the abandoned children of the goddess. "Do you have an interest in rot incantations?"Base GamenannannannannannanLaunches countless sticky threads before casternan191011035Servants of RotDamageCan be purchased from Gowry after progressing in Millicent's questline for 7,500 Runes.
107nanPlacidusax's Ruinhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/placidusaxs_ruin_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanPower gleaned form the remembrance of Dragonlord Placidusax. Transforms caster into the Dragonlord to spew golden breath from above. This incantation can be cast while jumping. These are the dying wails of the Dragonlord who once dwelled eternal beyond time.Base GamenannannannannannanSpews golden breath of Dragonlord Placidusaxnan623036075-DamageTrade Remembrance of the Dragonlord with Enia at Roundtable Hold.
108nanPoison Armamenthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/poison_armament_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the servants of rot. Enchants armament held in the right hand with poison.This incantation can be cast while in motion. Those who dwell within poison know rot all too well. The death that begets life, that comes to all equally. That is to say: it is the cycle of rebirth put into practice. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanEnchants right-hand armament with poisonnan151010010Servants of RotBuffDropped by an invisible scarab beetle on the northeastern shore of the Aeonia Swamp in Caelid, just northwest of Sellia, Town of Sorcery.
109nanPoison Misthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/poison_mist_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the servants of rot. Releases a poisonous mist before the caster.This incantation can be cast while in motion. Those who dwell within poison know rot all too well. The death that begets life, that comes to all equally. That is to say: it is the cycle of rebirth put into practice.Base GamenannannannannannanReleases poison mist before casternan181012010Servants of RotDamageWeeping Peninsula: Dropped by a Teardrop Scarab in a forested area southeast of the Castle Morne Rampart Site of Grace.
110nanProtection of the Erdtreehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/protection_of_the erdtree_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanA superior incantation of Erdtree Worship. Increase damage negation for all affinities except physical, for both the caster and nearby allies.Hold to continue praying and delay activation. In the beginning, everything was in opposition to the Erdtree. But through countless victories in war, it became the embodiment of Order.Base GamenannannannannannanIncreases affinity damage negation for self & alliesnan301035050ErdtreeBuffDropped by an incantation scarab found on a stone platform slightly east of Goldmask's first location, in Altus Plateau.
111nanRadagon's Rings of Lighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/radagons_rings_of_light_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200.pngnanOne of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. A gift of gratitude to the young Miquella from his father, Radagon. Produces a golden ring of light and fires it across a wide area. Charging enhances range. And yet, the young Miquella abandoned fundamentalism, for it could do nothing to treat Malenia's accursed rot. This was the beginning of unalloyed gold. Notes:Base GamenannannannannannanCreates golden ring of light to attack wide areanan2113131037Golden OrderDamagePurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either the Golden Order Principia for 7,500 Runes.
112nanRejectionhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rejection_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Two Fingers' faithful. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanProduces a shockwave that pushes away foes.nan91012024Two FingersUtilityCan be purchased from Brother Corhyn at the Roundtable Hold for 1,500 Runes.
113nanRotten Breathhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/rotten_breath_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of Dragon Communion. 114nanScarlet Aeoniahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/scarlet_aeonia_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanTechnique of Malenia, the Goddess of Rot. With the third bloom, she will become a rue goddess.Base GamenannannannannannanCreates a giant flower that explodes with scarlet rotnan483035050Servants of RotDamageTrade Remembrance of the Rot Goddess with Enia at Roundtable Hold.
115nanScouring Black Flamehttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/scouring_black_flame_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanA black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles.Sweeps a wide area before the caster with black flame.Charging enhances range.The black flame could once slay gods. Notes:Base GamenannannannannannanSweeps area before caster with black flamenan211028036GodslayerDamageDropped by Godskin Apostle.
116nanShadow Baithttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/shadow_bait_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Two Fingers' servants, who once served as the assassins of the Roundtable Hold. Creates a pale gold shadow before the caster, luring foes of human build and attracting their aggression. This incantation can be cast while in motion or crouching, and will still affect foes that are already in a combat state. It is said that those beguiled by the shadow see within it a hated foe. (this list is not exhaustive, feel free to contribute)Base GamenannannannannannanCreates shadow that lures the aggression of foes of human buildnan151013014Two FingersUtilityCan be found on a corpse at Subterranean Shunning-Grounds, after going through the pipe room to a room with the corpse sitting at the center, next to a not very well hidden Ogre ready to strike.
117nanSmarag's Glintstone Breathhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/smarags_glintsotne_breath_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior incantation of Dragon Communion. Channels the power of Smarag, the Glintstone Dragon. Transforms caster into a dragon to spew magic breath from above. Charging extends duration. This incantation can be used while jumping. Smarag was a devourer of sorcerers, and over time, his body became corrupted by their glintstones.Base GamenannannannannannanSpews magic breath of Glintstone Dragon Smarag from abovenan36 (6)10231560Dragon CommunionDamageCan be purchased at the Dragon Communion Altar at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion in Caelid for 2 Dragon Hearts. Glintstone Dragon Smarag must first be defeated in order to unlock this Incantation.
118nanStone of Gurranqhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/stone_of_gurranq_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior incantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman. Hurls a boulder before the caster. This incantation can be cast repeatedly. Long ago, Gurranq was a beast of such terrifying ferocity that his former name meant "Death of the Demigods." Note:Base GamenannannannannannanHurls a boulder before the casternan151013037BestialDamageBestial Sanctum: Reward from Gurranq, Beast Clergyman after giving him the sixth Deathroot. Map Link.
119nanSurge, O Flame!http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/surge_o_flame_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior incantation of the Fire Monks. Creates a stream of fire to burn the area before the caster.This incantation can be cast while in motion. Hold to maintainthe effect. The Giants' Flame is the flame of ruin, capable of burning theErdtree. And so, following the War against the Giants, its ruinousblaze was sealed, and guardians were appointed to watch over it.Base GamenannannannannannanIncinerates area before caster with stream of firenan1 (1)10902Fire MonkDamagePurchase from Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either the Fire Monks' Prayerbook for 5,500 Runes.
120nanSwarm of Flieshttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/swarm_of_flies_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanA Blood Oath incantation, shared from the Lord of Blood's power. Releases a swarm of bloodflies before the caster to assault foes. The vile swarm deals damage and builds up onset of blood loss. This incantation can be cast while in motion. The new palace of the Lord of Blood lies in a swamp of festering blood, and these flies are said to spawn from excrement in that land.Base GamenannannannannannanReleases a swarm of bloodflies before casternan1410111624BloodDamageFound on a corpse along the east wall of the Mohgwyn Palace blood marsh, directly north from the Palace Approach Ledge-Road Site of Grace.
121nanThe Flame of Frenzyhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/the_flame_of_frenzy_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation originating from the maddening Three Fingers. Causes the yellow flame of frenzy to burst forth from the caster's eyes. Charging increases the range of the burst. The flame of frenzy deals damage and causes buildup of madness. This incantation also causes buildup of madness in the caster, and is only effective against Tarnished.Base GamenannannannannannanEmits burst of yellow flame of frenzy from eyesnan161016030Frenzied FlameDamageCallu Baptismal Church in the Weeping Peninsula. Found on a corpse by a pillar on the left side of the church. [Map Link]
122nanTheodorix's Magmahttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/theodorixs_magma_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior incantation of Dragon Communion. Channels the power of the great wyrm Theodorix. Transforms caster into a great wyrm to spew a large volume of magma breath. Allows one follow-up attack. The name of the ancient troll warrior Theodorix lives on as a hero of the War against the Giants.Base GamenannannannannannanSpews magma breath of Theodorix from abovenan4510211460Dragon CommunionDamageDropped by Great Wyrm Theodorix
123nanTriple Rings of Lighthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/triple_rings_of_light_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanOne of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. Produces three rings of light and fires them forwards. The rings of light return to a position close to the caster before disappearing. This incantation can be cast repeatedly. A gift from the young Miquella to his father, Radagon.Base GamenannannannannannanFire three rings of light before the casternan2312323028Golden OrderDamageElphael, Brace of The Haligtree: From the Prayer Room grace, head out onto the northeastern walkway and drop down one level by using the roofs on the right. There is a sealed treasure room just under the Prayer Room that requires one Stonesword Key to unlock. The chest containing the spell is inside.
124nanUnendurable Frenzyhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/unendurable_frenzy_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation originating from the maddening Three Fingers. Causes the yellow flame of frenzy to violently burst forth from the caster's eyes. Hold to continue channeling the flame. This incantation can be used while in motion. It is the maddening pain and unstoppable tears of those afflicted with the flame of frenzy brought into being. Note:Base GamenannannannannannanEmits violent burst of yellow flame of frenzy from eyesnan22 (6)1031040Frenzied FlameDamageYelough Anix Ruins: Found in a chest in an underground treasure room in the central section of the ruins. Its entrance is in a door-less building that you must jump to from the larger ruined church building.
125nanUrgent Healhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/urgent_heal_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of the Two Fingers' faithful. Heals a small amount of HP. This incantation can be cast while in motion. The Two Fingers has high hopes for the Tarnished; that even if they should be wounded, even should they fall, they will continue to fight for their duty.Base GamenannannannannannanHeals a small amount of HPnan16108030Two FingersHealingStarting equipment for the Confessor ClassPurchased from Brother Corhyn for 1,000 Runes.
126nanVyke's Dragonbolthttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/vykes_dragonbolt_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanIncantation of Vyke, knight of the Roundtable Hold. Summons red lightning to bolster both the caster's body and their armament held in the right hand. Enchants armaments with lightning-affinity attacks and increases maximum equipment load. However, lightning damage negation will be reduced. Of all the knights, Vyke the Dragonspear was the one Lansseax loved the most.Base GamenannannannannannanBolsters right-hand armament & body with red lightningnan351023020Dragon CultBuffReceived after defeating Vyke, Knight of the roundtable at Lord Contender's Evergaol.
127nanWhirl, O Flame!http://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/whirl_o_flame_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior Incantation of the Fire Monks. Creates a spiraling stream of fire that burns the area before the caster. Charging enhances potency and reach. Fire beguiles those who gaze into it. And so the guardians of the flame are also its worshippers. Note:Base GamenannannannannannanSweeps area before caster with stream of firenan191013026Fire MonkDamageDropped from a Teardrop Scarab on the road between Rotview Balcony and Caelem Ruins next to the wagon.
128nanWrath of Goldhttp://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/file/Elden-Ring/wrath of gold_incantation_elden_ring_wiki_guide_200px.pngnanSuperior Erdtree Worship incantation.Produces a golden shockwave that knocks back nearby foes.Charging increases the size of the shockwave.This incantation was discovered when the Elden Ring was shattered, and it was feared as a sign of the Erdtree's wrath. NOTE:Base GamenannannannannannanProduces golden shockwave that knocks back foesnan401032044ErdtreeDamageFound at Woodfolk Ruins. Among the enemies, there is a staircase that goes down and leads to a chest that contains this incantation. [Map Link]
